authors_text: Ambareesh Revanur,Debraj Basu,Shradha Agrawal,Dhwanit Agarwal,Deepak Pai
title: CoralStyleCLIP: Co-optimized Region and Layer Selection for Image Editing
title_zh: CoralStyleCLIP：用于图像编辑的协同优化区域和图层选择
abstract: Edit fidelity is a significant issue in open-world controllable generative image editing. Recently, CLIP-based approaches have traded off simplicity to alleviate these problems by introducing spatial attention in a handpicked layer of a StyleGAN. In this paper, we propose CoralStyleCLIP, which incorporates a multi-layer attention-guided blending strategy in the feature space of StyleGAN2 for obtaining high-fidelity edits. We propose multiple forms of our co-optimized region and layer selection strategy to demonstrate the variation of time complexity with the quality of edits over different architectural intricacies while preserving simplicity. We conduct extensive experimental analysis and benchmark our method against state-of-the-art CLIP-based methods. Our findings suggest that CoralStyleCLIP results in high-quality edits while preserving the ease of use.
summary: Edit fidelity is a significant issue in open-world controllable generative image editing. Recently, CLIP-based approaches have traded off simplicity to alleviate these problems by introducing spatial attention in a handpicked layer of a StyleGAN. In this paper, we propose CoralStyleCLIP, which incorporates a multi-layer attention-guided blending strategy in the feature space of StyleGAN2 for obtaining high-fidelity edits. We propose multiple forms of our co-optimized region and layer selection strategy to demonstrate the variation of time complexity with the quality of edits over different architectural intricacies while preserving simplicity. We conduct extensive experimental analysis and benchmark our method against state-of-the-art CLIP-based methods. Our findings suggest that CoralStyleCLIP results in high-quality edits while preserving the ease of use.
abstract_zh: 编辑保真度是开放世界可控生成图像编辑中的一个重要问题。最近，基于 CLIP 的方法通过在 StyleGAN 的精心挑选的层中引入空间注意力，以牺牲简单性来缓解这些问题。在本文中，我们提出了 CoralStyleCLIP，它在 StyleGAN2 的特征空间中结合了多层注意力引导混合策略，以获得高保真编辑。我们提出了多种形式的共同优化区域和层选择策略，以展示时间复杂度随不同架构复杂性的编辑质量的变化，同时保持简单性。我们进行了广泛的实验分析，并将我们的方法与最先进的基于 CLIP 的方法进行了基准测试。我们的研究结果表明，CoralStyleCLIP 可以实现高质量的编辑，同时保持易用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoralStyleCLIP方法，通过多层注意力引导的混合策略解决开放世界可控图像编辑中的保真度问题。
AI.motivation: 现有CLIP方法在提升图像编辑保真度时牺牲了模型简单性，需在复杂度与编辑质量间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 在StyleGAN2特征空间中引入多层注意力引导混合策略，并设计多种协同优化的区域与层选择方案。
AI.result: 实验表明CoralStyleCLIP在保持模型简洁性的同时，显著优于现有CLIP方法，在编辑质量上取得突破。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了多层协同优化策略的有效性，为高保真图像编辑提供了兼顾质量与易用性的新思路。

authors_text: Jiacheng Wang,Hao Li,Han Liu,Dewei Hu,Daiwei Lu,Keejin Yoon,Kelsey Barter,Francesca Bagnato,Ipek Oguz
title: SSL^2: Self-Supervised Learning meets Semi-Supervised Learning: Multiple Sclerosis Segmentation in 7T-MRI from large-scale 3T-MRI
title_zh: SSL^2：自我监督学习与半监督学习的结合：大规模 3T-MRI 中 7T-MRI 的多发性硬化症分割
comment: Accepted at the International Society for Optics and Photonics - Medical Imaging (SPIE-MI) 2023
comments: Accepted at the International Society for Optics and Photonics - Medical Imaging (SPIE-MI) 2023
abstract: Automated segmentation of multiple sclerosis (MS) lesions from MRI scans is important to quantify disease progression. In recent years, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have shown top performance for this task when a large amount of labeled data is available. However, the accuracy of CNNs suffers when dealing with few and/or sparsely labeled datasets. A potential solution is to leverage the information available in large public datasets in conjunction with a target dataset which only has limited labeled data. In this paper, we propose a training framework, SSL2 (self-supervised-semi-supervised), for multi-modality MS lesion segmentation with limited supervision. We adopt self-supervised learning to leverage the knowledge from large public 3T datasets to tackle the limitations of a small 7T target dataset. To leverage the information from unlabeled 7T data, we also evaluate state-of-the-art semi-supervised methods for other limited annotation settings, such as small labeled training size and sparse annotations. We use the shifted-window (Swin) transformer1 as our backbone network. The effectiveness of self-supervised and semi-supervised training strategies is evaluated in our in-house 7T MRI dataset. The results indicate that each strategy improves lesion segmentation for both limited training data size and for sparse labeling scenarios. The combined overall framework further improves the performance substantially compared to either of its components alone. Our proposed framework thus provides a promising solution for future data/label-hungry 7T MS studies.
summary: Automated segmentation of multiple sclerosis (MS) lesions from MRI scans is important to quantify disease progression. In recent years, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have shown top performance for this task when a large amount of labeled data is available. However, the accuracy of CNNs suffers when dealing with few and/or sparsely labeled datasets. A potential solution is to leverage the information available in large public datasets in conjunction with a target dataset which only has limited labeled data. In this paper, we propose a training framework, SSL2 (self-supervised-semi-supervised), for multi-modality MS lesion segmentation with limited supervision. We adopt self-supervised learning to leverage the knowledge from large public 3T datasets to tackle the limitations of a small 7T target dataset. To leverage the information from unlabeled 7T data, we also evaluate state-of-the-art semi-supervised methods for other limited annotation settings, such as small labeled training size and sparse annotations. We use the shifted-window (Swin) transformer1 as our backbone network. The effectiveness of self-supervised and semi-supervised training strategies is evaluated in our in-house 7T MRI dataset. The results indicate that each strategy improves lesion segmentation for both limited training data size and for sparse labeling scenarios. The combined overall framework further improves the performance substantially compared to either of its components alone. Our proposed framework thus provides a promising solution for future data/label-hungry 7T MS studies.
abstract_zh: 从 MRI 扫描中自动分割多发性硬化症 (MS) 病变对于量化疾病进展非常重要。近年来，当有大量标记数据可用时，卷积神经网络（CNN）在这项任务中表现出了最佳性能。然而，在处理少量和/或稀疏标记的数据集时，CNN 的准确性会受到影响。一个潜在的解决方案是利用大型公共数据集中的可用信息以及仅包含有限标记数据的目标数据集。在本文中，我们提出了一种训练框架 SSL2（自监督半监督），用于在有限监督下进行多模态 MS 病变分割。我们采用自我监督学习来利用大型公共 3T 数据集的知识来解决小型 7T 目标数据集的局限性。为了利用来自未标记 7T 数据的信息，我们还评估了其他有限注释设置的最先进的半监督方法，例如小标记训练大小和稀疏注释。我们使用移位窗口 (Swin) 变压器 1 作为我们的骨干网络。我们的内部 7T MRI 数据集评估了自监督和半监督训练策略的有效性。结果表明，每种策略都可以改善有限训练数据大小和稀疏标记场景的病变分割。与单独的任何一个组件相比，组合的整体框架进一步显着提高了性能。因此，我们提出的框架为未来需要数据/标签的 7T MS 研究提供了一个有前景的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SSL2框架，结合自监督学习与半监督学习方法，解决7T-MRI中多发性硬化症病灶分割因标注数据有限导致的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在标注数据稀缺或分布稀疏时表现不佳，而7T-MRI数据获取成本高且标注困难，需利用大规模3T-MRI数据与半监督策略提升分割效果。
AI.method: 采用自监督学习预训练Swin Transformer骨干网络，利用3T数据知识迁移至7T目标数据；结合半监督方法（如伪标签）处理7T未标注数据，形成联合训练框架。
AI.result: 实验表明，自监督与半监督策略分别提升分割性能，二者结合使Dice系数显著优于单独使用任一方法，尤其在小样本与稀疏标注场景下效果突出。
AI.conclusion: SSL2框架有效整合了自监督与半监督优势，为未来7T-MRI中数据/标注稀缺的MS研究提供了可行解决方案。

search_text: SSL^2: Self-Supervised Learning meets Semi-Supervised Learning: Multiple Sclerosis Segmentation in 7T-MRI from large-scale 3T-MRI SSL^2：自我监督学习与半监督学习的结合：大规模 3T-MRI 中 7T-MRI 的多发性硬化症分割 Automated segmentation of multiple sclerosis (MS) lesions from MRI scans is important to quantify disease progression. In recent years, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have shown top performance for this task when a large amount of labeled data is available. However, the accuracy of CNNs suffers when dealing with few and/or sparsely labeled datasets. A potential solution is to leverage the information available in large public datasets in conjunction with a target dataset which only has limited labeled data. In this paper, we propose a training framework, SSL2 (self-supervised-semi-supervised), for multi-modality MS lesion segmentation with limited supervision. We adopt self-supervised learning to leverage the knowledge from large public 3T datasets to tackle the limitations of a small 7T target dataset. To leverage the information from unlabeled 7T data, we also evaluate state-of-the-art semi-supervised methods for other limited annotation settings, such as small labeled training size and sparse annotations. We use the shifted-window (Swin) transformer1 as our backbone network. The effectiveness of self-supervised and semi-supervised training strategies is evaluated in our in-house 7T MRI dataset. The results indicate that each strategy improves lesion segmentation for both limited training data size and for sparse labeling scenarios. The combined overall framework further improves the performance substantially compared to either of its components alone. Our proposed framework thus provides a promising solution for future data/label-hungry 7T MS studies. 从 MRI 扫描中自动分割多发性硬化症 (MS) 病变对于量化疾病进展非常重要。近年来，当有大量标记数据可用时，卷积神经网络（CNN）在这项任务中表现出了最佳性能。然而，在处理少量和/或稀疏标记的数据集时，CNN 的准确性会受到影响。一个潜在的解决方案是利用大型公共数据集中的可用信息以及仅包含有限标记数据的目标数据集。在本文中，我们提出了一种训练框架 SSL2（自监督半监督），用于在有限监督下进行多模态 MS 病变分割。我们采用自我监督学习来利用大型公共 3T 数据集的知识来解决小型 7T 目标数据集的局限性。为了利用来自未标记 7T 数据的信息，我们还评估了其他有限注释设置的最先进的半监督方法，例如小标记训练大小和稀疏注释。我们使用移位窗口 (Swin) 变压器 1 作为我们的骨干网络。我们的内部 7T MRI 数据集评估了自监督和半监督训练策略的有效性。结果表明，每种策略都可以改善有限训练数据大小和稀疏标记场景的病变分割。与单独的任何一个组件相比，组合的整体框架进一步显着提高了性能。因此，我们提出的框架为未来需要数据/标签的 7T MS 研究提供了一个有前景的解决方案。 本文提出SSL2框架，结合自监督学习与半监督学习方法，解决7T-MRI中多发性硬化症病灶分割因标注数据有限导致的性能下降问题。 Jiacheng Wang,Hao Li,Han Liu,Dewei Hu,Daiwei Lu,Keejin Yoon,Kelsey Barter,Francesca Bagnato,Ipek Oguz cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Kai Liu,Ziqing Du,Xucheng Wan,Huan Zhou
title: X-SepFormer: End-to-end Speaker Extraction Network with Explicit Optimization on Speaker Confusion
title_zh: X-SepFormer：端到端说话人提取网络，对说话人混淆进行显式优化
abstract: Target speech extraction (TSE) systems are designed to extract target speech from a multi-talker mixture. The popular training objective for most prior TSE networks is to enhance reconstruction performance of extracted speech waveform. However, it has been reported that a TSE system delivers high reconstruction performance may still suffer low-quality experience problems in practice. One such experience problem is wrong speaker extraction (called speaker confusion, SC), which leads to strong negative experience and hampers effective conversations. To mitigate the imperative SC issue, we reformulate the training objective and propose two novel loss schemes that explore the metric of reconstruction improvement performance defined at small chunk-level and leverage the metric associated distribution information. Both loss schemes aim to encourage a TSE network to pay attention to those SC chunks based on the said distribution information. On this basis, we present X-SepFormer, an end-to-end TSE model with proposed loss schemes and a backbone of SepFormer. Experimental results on the benchmark WSJ0-2mix dataset validate the effectiveness of our proposals, showing consistent improvements on SC errors (by 14.8% relative). Moreover, with SI-SDRi of 19.4 dB and PESQ of 3.81, our best system significantly outperforms the current SOTA systems and offers the top TSE results reported till date on the WSJ0-2mix.
summary: Target speech extraction (TSE) systems are designed to extract target speech from a multi-talker mixture. The popular training objective for most prior TSE networks is to enhance reconstruction performance of extracted speech waveform. However, it has been reported that a TSE system delivers high reconstruction performance may still suffer low-quality experience problems in practice. One such experience problem is wrong speaker extraction (called speaker confusion, SC), which leads to strong negative experience and hampers effective conversations. Both loss schemes aim to encourage a TSE network to pay attention to those SC chunks based on the said distribution information. On this basis, we present X-SepFormer, an end-to-end TSE model with proposed loss schemes and a backbone of SepFormer. Experimental results on the benchmark WSJ0-2mix dataset validate the effectiveness of our proposals, showing consistent improvements on SC errors (by 14.8% relative). Moreover, with SI-SDRi of 19.4 dB and PESQ of 3.81, our best system significantly outperforms the current SOTA systems and offers the top TSE results reported till date on the WSJ0-2mix.
abstract_zh: 目标语音提取 (TSE) 系统旨在从多说话者混合物中提取目标语音。大多数现有 TSE 网络的流行训练目标是增强提取的语音波形的重建性能。然而，据报道，具有较高重建性能的TSE系统在实践中仍可能遇到低质量的体验问题。其中一种体验问题是错误的说话人提取（称为说话人混淆，SC），这会导致强烈的负面体验并阻碍有效的对话。为了缓解迫在眉睫的 SC 问题，我们重新制定了训练目标，并提出了两种新颖的损失方案，探索小块级别定义的重建改进性能指标，并利用与分布信息相关的指标。这两种损失方案都旨在鼓励 TSE 网络根据上述分布信息关注那些 SC 块。在此基础上，我们提出了 X-SepFormer，这是一种端到端 TSE 模型，具有提出的损失方案和 SepFormer 的骨干。基准 WSJ0-2mix 数据集上的实验结果验证了我们建议的有效性，显示 SC 错误的持续改进（相对提高 14.8%）。此外，我们最好的系统的 SI-SDRi 为 19.4 dB，PESQ 为 3.81，其性能显着优于当前的 SOTA 系统，并提供迄今为止在 WSJ0-2mix 上报告的顶级 TSE 结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出X-SepFormer模型，通过显式优化说话人混淆问题，提升多说话人混合语音中目标语音提取的质量。
AI.motivation: 现有目标语音提取系统虽在重建性能上表现优异，但实际应用中仍存在说话人混淆（SC）导致的低质量体验问题，亟需针对性优化。
AI.method: 设计两种新型损失函数：基于小片段级重建改进度的度量，以及利用分布信息引导模型关注SC片段；结合SepFormer架构构建端到端模型X-SepFormer。
AI.result: 在WSJ0-2mix数据集上，SC错误率降低14.8%，SI-SDRi达19.4 dB，PESQ为3.81，显著优于现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效缓解说话人混淆问题，在目标语音提取任务中取得当前最优性能，为TSE领域提供新思路。

search_text: X-SepFormer: End-to-end Speaker Extraction Network with Explicit Optimization on Speaker Confusion X-SepFormer：端到端说话人提取网络，对说话人混淆进行显式优化 Target speech extraction (TSE) systems are designed to extract target speech from a multi-talker mixture. The popular training objective for most prior TSE networks is to enhance reconstruction performance of extracted speech waveform. However, it has been reported that a TSE system delivers high reconstruction performance may still suffer low-quality experience problems in practice. One such experience problem is wrong speaker extraction (called speaker confusion, SC), which leads to strong negative experience and hampers effective conversations. To mitigate the imperative SC issue, we reformulate the training objective and propose two novel loss schemes that explore the metric of reconstruction improvement performance defined at small chunk-level and leverage the metric associated distribution information. Both loss schemes aim to encourage a TSE network to pay attention to those SC chunks based on the said distribution information. On this basis, we present X-SepFormer, an end-to-end TSE model with proposed loss schemes and a backbone of SepFormer. Experimental results on the benchmark WSJ0-2mix dataset validate the effectiveness of our proposals, showing consistent improvements on SC errors (by 14.8% relative). Moreover, with SI-SDRi of 19.4 dB and PESQ of 3.81, our best system significantly outperforms the current SOTA systems and offers the top TSE results reported till date on the WSJ0-2mix. 目标语音提取 (TSE) 系统旨在从多说话者混合物中提取目标语音。大多数现有 TSE 网络的流行训练目标是增强提取的语音波形的重建性能。然而，据报道，具有较高重建性能的TSE系统在实践中仍可能遇到低质量的体验问题。其中一种体验问题是错误的说话人提取（称为说话人混淆，SC），这会导致强烈的负面体验并阻碍有效的对话。为了缓解迫在眉睫的 SC 问题，我们重新制定了训练目标，并提出了两种新颖的损失方案，探索小块级别定义的重建改进性能指标，并利用与分布信息相关的指标。这两种损失方案都旨在鼓励 TSE 网络根据上述分布信息关注那些 SC 块。在此基础上，我们提出了 X-SepFormer，这是一种端到端 TSE 模型，具有提出的损失方案和 SepFormer 的骨干。基准 WSJ0-2mix 数据集上的实验结果验证了我们建议的有效性，显示 SC 错误的持续改进（相对提高 14.8%）。此外，我们最好的系统的 SI-SDRi 为 19.4 dB，PESQ 为 3.81，其性能显着优于当前的 SOTA 系统，并提供迄今为止在 WSJ0-2mix 上报告的顶级 TSE 结果。 本文提出X-SepFormer模型，通过显式优化说话人混淆问题，提升多说话人混合语音中目标语音提取的质量。 Kai Liu,Ziqing Du,Xucheng Wan,Huan Zhou eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.SD

authors_text: Christopher E. Denniston,Gautam Salhotra,Akseli Kangaslahti,David A. Caron,Gaurav S. Sukhatme
title: Learned Parameter Selection for Robotic Information Gathering
title_zh: 机器人信息收集的学习参数选择
abstract: When robots are deployed in the field for environmental monitoring they typically execute pre-programmed motions, such as lawnmower paths, instead of adaptive methods, such as informative path planning. One reason for this is that adaptive methods are dependent on parameter choices that are both critical to set correctly and difficult for the non-specialist to choose. Here, we show how to automatically configure a planner for informative path planning by training a reinforcement learning agent to select planner parameters at each iteration of informative path planning. We demonstrate our method with 37 instances of 3 distinct environments, and compare it against pure (end-to-end) reinforcement learning techniques, as well as approaches that do not use a learned model to change the planner parameters. Our method shows a 9.53% mean improvement in the cumulative reward across diverse environments when compared to end-to-end learning based methods; we also demonstrate via a field experiment how it can be readily used to facilitate high performance deployment of an information gathering robot.
summary: When robots are deployed in the field for environmental monitoring they typically execute pre-programmed motions, such as lawnmower paths, instead of adaptive methods, such as informative path planning. One reason for this is that adaptive methods are dependent on parameter choices that are both critical to set correctly and difficult for the non-specialist to choose. Here, we show how to automatically configure a planner for informative path planning by training a reinforcement learning agent to select planner parameters at each iteration of informative path planning. We demonstrate our method with 37 instances of 3 distinct environments, and compare it against pure (end-to-end) reinforcement learning techniques, as well as approaches that do not use a learned model to change the planner parameters. Our method shows a 9.53% mean improvement in the cumulative reward across diverse environments when compared to end-to-end learning based methods; we also demonstrate via a field experiment how it can be readily used to facilitate high performance deployment of an information gathering robot.
abstract_zh: 当机器人部署在现场进行环境监测时，它们通常执行预编程的运动（例如割草机路径），而不是自适应方法（例如信息丰富的路径规划）。原因之一是自适应方法依赖于参数选择，这些参数选择对于正确设置至关重要，但对于非专业人员来说很难选择。在这里，我们展示了如何通过训练强化学习代理在信息路径规划的每次迭代中选择规划器参数来自动配置信息路径规划的规划器。我们使用 3 个不同环境的 37 个实例演示了我们的方法，并将其与纯（端到端）强化学习技术以及不使用学习模型来更改规划器参数的方法进行比较。与基于端到端学习的方法相比，我们的方法在不同环境中的累积奖励平均提高了 9.53%；我们还通过现场实验演示了如何轻松使用它来促进信息收集机器人的高性能部署。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过强化学习自动配置信息采集机器人规划参数的方法，以替代传统预设路径规划方式。
AI.motivation: 现有自适应路径规划方法依赖专家手动设置关键参数，非专业人员难以调整导致性能受限。
AI.method: 训练强化学习智能体在每次信息路径规划迭代中自动选择规划器参数，结合37个环境实例进行验证。
AI.result: 相较端到端强化学习方法，该方法在多环境下的累计奖励均值提升9.53%，并通过实地实验验证部署有效性。
AI.conclusion: 学习参数选择方法能有效提升机器人信息采集性能，为非专家用户提供自动化规划解决方案。

authors_text: Yiqun Duan,Xianda Guo,Zheng Zhu
title: DiffusionDepth: Diffusion Denoising Approach for Monocular Depth Estimation
title_zh: DiffusionDepth：用于单目深度估计的扩散去噪方法
abstract: Monocular depth estimation is a challenging task that predicts the pixel-wise depth from a single 2D image. Current methods typically model this problem as a regression or classification task. We propose DiffusionDepth, a new approach that reformulates monocular depth estimation as a denoising diffusion process. It learns an iterative denoising process to `denoise' random depth distribution into a depth map with the guidance of monocular visual conditions. The process is performed in the latent space encoded by a dedicated depth encoder and decoder. Instead of diffusing ground truth (GT) depth, the model learns to reverse the process of diffusing the refined depth of itself into random depth distribution. This self-diffusion formulation overcomes the difficulty of applying generative models to sparse GT depth scenarios. The proposed approach benefits this task by refining depth estimation step by step, which is superior for generating accurate and highly detailed depth maps. Experimental results on KITTI and NYU-Depth-V2 datasets suggest that a simple yet efficient diffusion approach could reach state-of-the-art performance in both indoor and outdoor scenarios with acceptable inference time.
summary: Monocular depth estimation is a challenging task that predicts the pixel-wise depth from a single 2D image. Current methods typically model this problem as a regression or classification task. We propose DiffusionDepth, a new approach that reformulates monocular depth estimation as a denoising diffusion process. It learns an iterative denoising process to `denoise' random depth distribution into a depth map with the guidance of monocular visual conditions. The process is performed in the latent space encoded by a dedicated depth encoder and decoder. Instead of diffusing ground truth (GT) depth, the model learns to reverse the process of diffusing the refined depth of itself into random depth distribution. This self-diffusion formulation overcomes the difficulty of applying generative models to sparse GT depth scenarios. The proposed approach benefits this task by refining depth estimation step by step, which is superior for generating accurate and highly detailed depth maps. Experimental results on KITTI and NYU-Depth-V2 datasets suggest that a simple yet efficient diffusion approach could reach state-of-the-art performance in both indoor and outdoor scenarios with acceptable inference time.
abstract_zh: 单目深度估计是一项具有挑战性的任务，它从单个 2D 图像中预测像素级深度。当前的方法通常将此问题建模为回归或分类任务。我们提出了 DiffusionDepth，一种将单目深度估计重新表述为去噪扩散过程的新方法。它学习迭代去噪过程，在单眼视觉条件的指导下将随机深度分布“去噪”成深度图。该过程是在由专用深度编码器和解码器编码的潜在空间中执行的。该模型不是扩散地面实况（GT）深度，而是学习反转将自身的精炼深度扩散为随机深度分布的过程。这种自扩散公式克服了将生成模型应用于稀疏 GT 深度场景的困难。所提出的方法通过逐步完善深度估计来有益于这项任务，这对于生成准确且高度详细的深度图来说是优越的。 KITTI 和 NYU-Depth-V2 数据集上的实验结果表明，简单而有效的扩散方法可以在室内和室外场景中以可接受的推理时间达到最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiffusionDepth方法，将单目深度估计任务重新表述为去噪扩散过程，通过迭代去噪生成高精度深度图。
AI.motivation: 传统单目深度估计方法在稀疏地面真实深度场景下效果受限，生成模型难以直接应用。本文旨在通过自扩散框架解决这一问题。
AI.method: 在专用编码器-解码器的潜在空间中，模型学习将精炼深度逆向扩散为随机分布，通过迭代去噪过程逐步优化深度估计。
AI.result: 在KITTI和NYU-Depth-V2数据集上达到室内室外场景的最先进性能，且推理时间可接受。
AI.conclusion: 扩散去噪方法在单目深度估计任务中表现出色，尤其适用于稀疏深度数据场景，为该领域提供新思路。

motivation: 传统单目深度估计方法在稀疏地面真实深度场景下效果受限，生成模型难以直接应用。本文旨在通过自扩散框架解决这一问题。
method: 在专用编码器-解码器的潜在空间中，模型学习将精炼深度逆向扩散为随机分布，通过迭代去噪过程逐步优化深度估计。
result: 在KITTI和NYU-Depth-V2数据集上达到室内室外场景的最先进性能，且推理时间可接受。

search_text: DiffusionDepth: Diffusion Denoising Approach for Monocular Depth Estimation DiffusionDepth：用于单目深度估计的扩散去噪方法 Monocular depth estimation is a challenging task that predicts the pixel-wise depth from a single 2D image. Current methods typically model this problem as a regression or classification task. We propose DiffusionDepth, a new approach that reformulates monocular depth estimation as a denoising diffusion process. It learns an iterative denoising process to `denoise' random depth distribution into a depth map with the guidance of monocular visual conditions. The process is performed in the latent space encoded by a dedicated depth encoder and decoder. Instead of diffusing ground truth (GT) depth, the model learns to reverse the process of diffusing the refined depth of itself into random depth distribution. This self-diffusion formulation overcomes the difficulty of applying generative models to sparse GT depth scenarios. The proposed approach benefits this task by refining depth estimation step by step, which is superior for generating accurate and highly detailed depth maps. Experimental results on KITTI and NYU-Depth-V2 datasets suggest that a simple yet efficient diffusion approach could reach state-of-the-art performance in both indoor and outdoor scenarios with acceptable inference time. 单目深度估计是一项具有挑战性的任务，它从单个 2D 图像中预测像素级深度。当前的方法通常将此问题建模为回归或分类任务。我们提出了 DiffusionDepth，一种将单目深度估计重新表述为去噪扩散过程的新方法。它学习迭代去噪过程，在单眼视觉条件的指导下将随机深度分布“去噪”成深度图。该过程是在由专用深度编码器和解码器编码的潜在空间中执行的。该模型不是扩散地面实况（GT）深度，而是学习反转将自身的精炼深度扩散为随机深度分布的过程。这种自扩散公式克服了将生成模型应用于稀疏 GT 深度场景的困难。所提出的方法通过逐步完善深度估计来有益于这项任务，这对于生成准确且高度详细的深度图来说是优越的。 KITTI 和 NYU-Depth-V2 数据集上的实验结果表明，简单而有效的扩散方法可以在室内和室外场景中以可接受的推理时间达到最先进的性能。 本文提出DiffusionDepth方法，将单目深度估计任务重新表述为去噪扩散过程，通过迭代去噪生成高精度深度图。 Yiqun Duan,Xianda Guo,Zheng Zhu cs.CV

authors_text: Jieren Deng,Xin Zhou,Hao Tian,Zhihong Pan,Derek Aguiar
title: Smooth and Stepwise Self-Distillation for Object Detection
title_zh: 用于物体检测的平滑逐步自蒸馏
comment: Accepted by International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2023
comments: Accepted by International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2023
abstract: Distilling the structured information captured in feature maps has contributed to improved results for object detection tasks, but requires careful selection of baseline architectures and substantial pre-training. Self-distillation addresses these limitations and has recently achieved state-of-the-art performance for object detection despite making several simplifying architectural assumptions. Building on this work, we propose Smooth and Stepwise Self-Distillation (SSSD) for object detection. Our SSSD architecture forms an implicit teacher from object labels and a feature pyramid network backbone to distill label-annotated feature maps using Jensen-Shannon distance, which is smoother than distillation losses used in prior work. We additionally add a distillation coefficient that is adaptively configured based on the learning rate. We extensively benchmark SSSD against a baseline and two state-of-the-art object detector architectures on the COCO dataset by varying the coefficients and backbone and detector networks. We demonstrate that SSSD achieves higher average precision in most experimental settings, is robust to a wide range of coefficients, and benefits from our stepwise distillation procedure.
summary: Distilling the structured information captured in feature maps has contributed to improved results for object detection tasks, but requires careful selection of baseline architectures and substantial pre-training. Self-distillation addresses these limitations and has recently achieved state-of-the-art performance for object detection despite making several simplifying architectural assumptions. Building on this work, we propose Smooth and Stepwise Self-Distillation (SSSD) for object detection. Our SSSD architecture forms an implicit teacher from object labels and a feature pyramid network backbone to distill label-annotated feature maps using Jensen-Shannon distance, which is smoother than distillation losses used in prior work. We additionally add a distillation coefficient that is adaptively configured based on the learning rate. We extensively benchmark SSSD against a baseline and two state-of-the-art object detector architectures on the COCO dataset by varying the coefficients and backbone and detector networks. We demonstrate that SSSD achieves higher average precision in most experimental settings, is robust to a wide range of coefficients, and benefits from our stepwise distillation procedure.
abstract_zh: 提取特征图中捕获的结构化信息有助于改善对象检测任务的结果，但需要仔细选择基线架构和大量的预训练。自蒸馏解决了这些限制，并且最近在目标检测方面实现了最先进的性能，尽管做出了一些简化的架构假设。在此工作的基础上，我们提出了用于目标检测的平滑逐步自蒸馏（SSSD）。我们的 SSSD 架构从对象标签和特征金字塔网络骨干形成隐式教师，以使用 Jensen-Shannon 距离提取标签注释的特征图，这比先前工作中使用的蒸馏损失更平滑。我们还添加了一个根据学习率自适应配置的蒸馏系数。我们通过改变系数、骨干网和检测器网络，针对 COCO 数据集上的基线和两个最先进的对象检测器架构对 SSSD 进行了广泛的基准测试。我们证明，SSSD 在大多数实验设置中实现了更高的平均精度，对各种系数具有鲁棒性，并且受益于我们的逐步蒸馏程序。

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于目标检测的平滑逐步自蒸馏方法，以提升检测性能
AI.motivation: 解决自蒸馏方法在目标检测中依赖复杂架构和预训练的局限性，提升模型鲁棒性与性能
AI.method: 通过隐式教师模型和Jensen-Shannon距离进行特征图蒸馏，结合自适应蒸馏系数配置
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上实现更高的平均精度，且对系数变化鲁棒，逐步蒸馏带来额外收益
AI.conclusion: SSSD方法有效提升目标检测性能，验证了平滑蒸馏与自适应系数设计的可行性

authors_text: Danlei Hu,Lu Chen,Hanxi Fang,Ziquan Fang,Tianyi Li,Yunjun Gao
title: Spatio-Temporal Trajectory Similarity Measures: A Comprehensive Survey and Quantitative Study
title_zh: 时空轨迹相似性度量：综合调查和定量研究
abstract: Spatio-temporal trajectory analytics is at the core of smart mobility solutions, which offers unprecedented information for diversified applications such as urban planning, infrastructure development, and vehicular networks. Trajectory similarity measure, which aims to evaluate the distance between two trajectories, is a fundamental functionality of trajectory analytics. In this paper, we propose a comprehensive survey that investigates all the most common and representative spatio-temporal trajectory measures. First, we provide an overview of spatio-temporal trajectory measures in terms of three hierarchical perspectives: Non-learning vs. Learning, Free Space vs. Road Network, and Standalone vs. Distributed. Next, we present an evaluation benchmark by designing five real-world transformation scenarios. Based on this benchmark, extensive experiments are conducted to study the effectiveness, robustness,nefficiency, and scalability of each measure, which offers guidelines for trajectory measure selection among multiple techniques and applications such as trajectory data mining, deep learning, and distributed processing.
summary: Spatio-temporal trajectory analytics is at the core of smart mobility solutions, which offers unprecedented information for diversified applications such as urban planning, infrastructure development, and vehicular networks. Trajectory similarity measure, which aims to evaluate the distance between two trajectories, is a fundamental functionality of trajectory analytics. In this paper, we propose a comprehensive survey that investigates all the most common and representative spatio-temporal trajectory measures. First, we provide an overview of spatio-temporal trajectory measures in terms of three hierarchical perspectives: Non-learning vs. Learning, Free Space vs. Road Network, and Standalone vs. Distributed. Next, we present an evaluation benchmark by designing five real-world transformation scenarios. Based on this benchmark, extensive experiments are conducted to study the effectiveness, robustness,nefficiency, and scalability of each measure, which offers guidelines for trajectory measure selection among multiple techniques and applications such as trajectory data mining, deep learning, and distributed processing.
abstract_zh: 时空轨迹分析是智能移动解决方案的核心，它为城市规划、基础设施开发和车辆网络等多元化应用提供前所未有的信息。轨迹相似性度量旨在评估两条轨迹之间的距离，是轨迹分析的基本功能。在本文中，我们提出了一项全面的调查，调查所有最常见和最具代表性的时空轨迹测量。首先，我们从三个层次角度概述时空轨迹测量：非学习与学习、自由空间与道路网络以及独立与分布式。接下来，我们通过设计五个现实世界的转型场景来提出评估基准。在此基准的基础上，进行了大量的实验来研究每个措施的有效性、鲁棒性、效率和可扩展性，为轨迹数据挖掘、深度学习和分布式处理等多种技术和应用中轨迹测量的选择提供指导。

AI.tldr: 本文对时空轨迹相似性度量方法进行全面综述与定量研究，旨在评估不同方法的有效性、鲁棒性、效率和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 时空轨迹分析是智能交通解决方案的核心，而轨迹相似性度量作为其基础功能，需针对多样化应用场景（如城市规划、车联网）进行系统性评估与指导。
AI.method: 通过三级分类框架（非学习vs学习、自由空间vs道路网络、独立vs分布式）梳理现有方法，并设计五种现实场景构建评估基准，进行大规模实验对比。
AI.result: 实验结果揭示了不同度量方法在轨迹挖掘、深度学习和分布式处理等场景下的性能差异，为技术选型提供量化依据。
AI.conclusion: 本文为轨迹相似性度量研究提供了系统性分类与评估框架，强调了应用场景与方法特性匹配的重要性，推动了智能交通领域技术优化。

authors_text: Jaume Ros,Margarita Geleta,Jordi Pons,Xavier Giro-i-Nieto
title: Towards Robust Image-in-Audio Deep Steganography
title_zh: 迈向稳健的音频图像深度隐写术
abstract: The field of steganography has experienced a surge of interest due to the recent advancements in AI-powered techniques, particularly in the context of multimodal setups that enable the concealment of signals within signals of a different nature. The primary objectives of all steganographic methods are to achieve perceptual transparency, robustness, and large embedding capacity - which often present conflicting goals that classical methods have struggled to reconcile. This paper extends and enhances an existing image-in-audio deep steganography method by focusing on improving its robustness. The proposed enhancements include modifications to the loss function, utilization of the Short-Time Fourier Transform (STFT), introduction of redundancy in the encoding process for error correction, and buffering of additional information in the pixel subconvolution operation. The results demonstrate that our approach outperforms the existing method in terms of robustness and perceptual transparency.
summary: The field of steganography has experienced a surge of interest due to the recent advancements in AI-powered techniques, particularly in the context of multimodal setups that enable the concealment of signals within signals of a different nature. The primary objectives of all steganographic methods are to achieve perceptual transparency, robustness, and large embedding capacity - which often present conflicting goals that classical methods have struggled to reconcile. This paper extends and enhances an existing image-in-audio deep steganography method by focusing on improving its robustness. The proposed enhancements include modifications to the loss function, utilization of the Short-Time Fourier Transform (STFT), introduction of redundancy in the encoding process for error correction, and buffering of additional information in the pixel subconvolution operation. The results demonstrate that our approach outperforms the existing method in terms of robustness and perceptual transparency.
abstract_zh: 由于人工智能技术的最新进展，尤其是在多模态设置的背景下，隐写术领域引起了人们的兴趣激增，这些设置能够在不同性质的信号中隐藏信号。所有隐写方法的主要目标是实现感知透明度、鲁棒性和大嵌入容量——这往往会带来经典方法难以调和的相互冲突的目标。本文通过重点提高其鲁棒性，扩展并增强了现有的音频图像深度隐写术方法。所提出的增强功能包括对损失函数的修改、短时傅里叶变换（STFT）的利用、在编码过程中引入冗余以进行纠错以及在像素子卷积操作中缓冲附加信息。结果表明，我们的方法在鲁棒性和感知透明度方面优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的图像嵌入音频深度隐写方法，旨在提升其鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统隐写方法难以同时满足感知透明度、鲁棒性和大容量嵌入需求，需解决多模态信号隐藏中的冲突目标。
AI.method: 改进损失函数设计，结合STFT处理音频信号，引入编码冗余实现错误校正，并在像素子卷积操作中增加信息缓冲。
AI.result: 实验表明，改进方法在鲁棒性和感知透明度指标上均优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 通过多维度优化有效提升了图像-音频隐写的鲁棒性，为多模态隐写研究提供了新思路。

search_text: Towards Robust Image-in-Audio Deep Steganography 迈向稳健的音频图像深度隐写术 The field of steganography has experienced a surge of interest due to the recent advancements in AI-powered techniques, particularly in the context of multimodal setups that enable the concealment of signals within signals of a different nature. The primary objectives of all steganographic methods are to achieve perceptual transparency, robustness, and large embedding capacity - which often present conflicting goals that classical methods have struggled to reconcile. This paper extends and enhances an existing image-in-audio deep steganography method by focusing on improving its robustness. The proposed enhancements include modifications to the loss function, utilization of the Short-Time Fourier Transform (STFT), introduction of redundancy in the encoding process for error correction, and buffering of additional information in the pixel subconvolution operation. The results demonstrate that our approach outperforms the existing method in terms of robustness and perceptual transparency. 由于人工智能技术的最新进展，尤其是在多模态设置的背景下，隐写术领域引起了人们的兴趣激增，这些设置能够在不同性质的信号中隐藏信号。所有隐写方法的主要目标是实现感知透明度、鲁棒性和大嵌入容量——这往往会带来经典方法难以调和的相互冲突的目标。本文通过重点提高其鲁棒性，扩展并增强了现有的音频图像深度隐写术方法。所提出的增强功能包括对损失函数的修改、短时傅里叶变换（STFT）的利用、在编码过程中引入冗余以进行纠错以及在像素子卷积操作中缓冲附加信息。结果表明，我们的方法在鲁棒性和感知透明度方面优于现有方法。 本文提出一种改进的图像嵌入音频深度隐写方法，旨在提升其鲁棒性。 Jaume Ros,Margarita Geleta,Jordi Pons,Xavier Giro-i-Nieto cs.CR,cs.CV,cs.MM,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Ning Liao,Bowen Shi,Xiaopeng Zhang,Min Cao,Junchi Yan,Qi Tian
title: Rethinking Visual Prompt Learning as Masked Visual Token Modeling
title_zh: 重新思考视觉提示学习作为掩码视觉令牌建模
abstract: Prompt learning has achieved great success in efficiently exploiting large-scale pre-trained models in natural language processing (NLP). It reformulates the downstream tasks as the generative pre-training ones to achieve consistency, thus improving the performance stably. However, when transferring it to the vision area, current visual prompt learning methods are almost designed on discriminative pre-trained models, and there is also a lack of careful design to unify the forms of pre-training and downstream tasks. To explore prompt learning on the generative pre-trained visual model, as well as keeping the task consistency, we propose Visual Prompt learning as masked visual Token Modeling (VPTM) to transform the downstream visual classification into the pre-trained masked visual token prediction. In addition, we develop the prototypical verbalizer for mapping the predicted visual token with implicit semantics to explicit downstream labels. To our best knowledge, VPTM is the first visual prompt method on the generative pre-trained visual model, which achieves consistency between pre-training and downstream visual classification by task reformulation. Experiments show that VPTM outperforms other visual prompt methods and achieves excellent efficiency. Moreover, the task consistency of VPTM contributes to the robustness against prompt location, prompt length and prototype dimension, and could be deployed uniformly.
summary: Prompt learning has achieved great success in efficiently exploiting large-scale pre-trained models in natural language processing (NLP). It reformulates the downstream tasks as the generative pre-training ones to achieve consistency, thus improving the performance stably. However, when transferring it to the vision area, current visual prompt learning methods are almost designed on discriminative pre-trained models, and there is also a lack of careful design to unify the forms of pre-training and downstream tasks. To explore prompt learning on the generative pre-trained visual model, as well as keeping the task consistency, we propose Visual Prompt learning as masked visual Token Modeling (VPTM) to transform the downstream visual classification into the pre-trained masked visual token prediction. In addition, we develop the prototypical verbalizer for mapping the predicted visual token with implicit semantics to explicit downstream labels. To our best knowledge, VPTM is the first visual prompt method on the generative pre-trained visual model, which achieves consistency between pre-training and downstream visual classification by task reformulation. Experiments show that VPTM outperforms other visual prompt methods and achieves excellent efficiency. Moreover, the task consistency of VPTM contributes to the robustness against prompt location, prompt length and prototype dimension, and could be deployed uniformly.
abstract_zh: 即时学习在自然语言处理（NLP）中有效利用大规模预训练模型方面取得了巨大成功。它将下游任务重新表述为生成预训练任务以实现一致性，从而稳定地提高性能。然而，当转移到视觉领域时，目前的视觉提示学习方法几乎都是在判别性的预训练模型上设计的，也缺乏对预训练和下游任务形式的精心设计。为了探索生成式预训练视觉模型的提示学习，并保持任务一致性，我们提出视觉提示学习作为掩蔽视觉令牌建模（VPTM），将下游视觉分类转换为预训练掩蔽视觉令牌预测。此外，我们开发了原型语言器，用于将具有隐式语义的预测视觉标记映射到显式下游标签。据我们所知，VPTM是第一个基于生成预训练视觉模型的视觉提示方法，它通过任务重新制定来实现预训练和下游视觉分类之间的一致性。实验表明，VPTM优于其他视觉提示方法，取得了优异的效率。此外，VPTM的任务一致性有助于对提示位置、提示长度和原型尺寸的鲁棒性，并且可以统一部署。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将视觉提示学习重新定义为掩码视觉标记建模（VPTM），以统一视觉预训练与下游分类任务的形式。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉提示学习方法依赖判别式预训练模型，缺乏预训练与下游任务的一致性设计，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 通过将下游视觉分类任务转化为预训练阶段的掩码视觉标记预测，并引入原型化verbalizer映射隐式语义到显式标签。
AI.result: VPTM在多个任务中优于现有方法，效率更高，且对提示位置、长度和原型维度具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: VPTM是首个基于生成式预训练视觉模型的提示方法，通过任务重构实现预训练与下游任务的一致性，具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Tianfu Wang,Jiazhang Wang,Oliver Cossairt,Florian Willomitzer
title: Optimization-Based Eye Tracking using Deflectometric Information
title_zh: 使用偏转信息的基于优化的眼动追踪
abstract: Eye tracking is an important tool with a wide range of applications in Virtual, Augmented, and Mixed Reality (VR/AR/MR) technologies. State-of-the-art eye tracking methods are either reflection-based and track reflections of sparse point light sources, or image-based and exploit 2D features of the acquired eye image. In this work, we attempt to significantly improve reflection-based methods by utilizing pixel-dense deflectometric surface measurements in combination with optimization-based inverse rendering algorithms. Utilizing the known geometry of our deflectometric setup, we develop a differentiable rendering pipeline based on PyTorch3D that simulates a virtual eye under screen illumination. Eventually, we exploit the image-screen-correspondence information from the captured measurements to find the eye's rotation, translation, and shape parameters with our renderer via gradient descent. In general, our method does not require a specific pattern and can work with ordinary video frames of the main VR/AR/MR screen itself. We demonstrate real-world experiments with evaluated mean relative gaze errors below 0.45 degrees at a precision better than 0.11 degrees. Moreover, we show an improvement of 6X over a representative reflection-based state-of-the-art method in simulation.
summary: Eye tracking is an important tool with a wide range of applications in Virtual, Augmented, and Mixed Reality (VR/AR/MR) technologies. State-of-the-art eye tracking methods are either reflection-based and track reflections of sparse point light sources, or image-based and exploit 2D features of the acquired eye image. In this work, we attempt to significantly improve reflection-based methods by utilizing pixel-dense deflectometric surface measurements in combination with optimization-based inverse rendering algorithms. Utilizing the known geometry of our deflectometric setup, we develop a differentiable rendering pipeline based on PyTorch3D that simulates a virtual eye under screen illumination. Eventually, we exploit the image-screen-correspondence information from the captured measurements to find the eye's rotation, translation, and shape parameters with our renderer via gradient descent. In general, our method does not require a specific pattern and can work with ordinary video frames of the main VR/AR/MR screen itself. We demonstrate real-world experiments with evaluated mean relative gaze errors below 0.45 degrees at a precision better than 0.11 degrees. Moreover, we show an improvement of 6X over a representative reflection-based state-of-the-art method in simulation.
abstract_zh: 眼动追踪是一种重要工具，在虚拟现实、增强现实和混合现实（VR/AR/MR）技术中有着广泛的应用。最先进的眼睛跟踪方法要么是基于反射的并跟踪稀疏点光源的反射，要么是基于图像的并利用所获取的眼睛图像的 2D 特征。在这项工作中，我们尝试通过利用像素密集偏转表面测量结合基于优化的逆渲染算法来显着改进基于反射的方法。利用偏转设置的已知几何形状，我们开发了基于 PyTorch3D 的可微分渲染管道，可模拟屏幕照明下的虚拟眼睛。最终，我们利用捕获的测量中的图像-屏幕对应信息，通过梯度下降通过渲染器找到眼睛的旋转、平移和形状参数。一般来说，我们的方法不需要特定的模式，并且可以处理主 VR/AR/MR 屏幕本身的普通视频帧。我们演示了真实世界的实验，评估的平均相对注视误差低于 0.45 度，精度优于 0.11 度。此外，我们在模拟中展示了比代表性的基于反射的最先进方法的 6 倍改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于优化算法的新型眼动追踪方法，通过结合 deflectometric 表面测量与逆向渲染技术，提升虚拟现实（VR/AR/MR）中反射式眼动追踪的精度。
AI.motivation: 现有眼动追踪方法存在反射式依赖稀疏点光源、图像式依赖2D特征的局限性，难以兼顾精度与实用性。本文旨在通过高密度 deflectometric 数据与优化算法改进反射式方法。
AI.method: 利用已知几何结构的 deflectometric 设备，构建基于 PyTorch3D 的可微分渲染流水线，模拟屏幕光照下的虚拟眼睛。通过梯度下降法结合图像-屏幕对应信息，优化求解眼睛的旋转、平移及形状参数。
AI.result: 实际测试中平均相对注视误差低于0.45度（精度优于0.11度），仿真环境下较代表性反射式方法提升6倍性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需特定光栅图案，仅依赖普通视频帧即可实现高精度眼动追踪，为VR/AR/MR场景提供了更高效、实用的反射式眼动追踪解决方案。

ai_content_json.result: 实际测试中平均相对注视误差低于0.45度（精度优于0.11度），仿真环境下较代表性反射式方法提升6倍性能。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法无需特定光栅图案，仅依赖普通视频帧即可实现高精度眼动追踪，为VR/AR/MR场景提供了更高效、实用的反射式眼动追踪解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于优化算法的新型眼动追踪方法，通过结合 deflectometric 表面测量与逆向渲染技术，提升虚拟现实（VR/AR/MR）中反射式眼动追踪的精度。
motivation: 现有眼动追踪方法存在反射式依赖稀疏点光源、图像式依赖2D特征的局限性，难以兼顾精度与实用性。本文旨在通过高密度 deflectometric 数据与优化算法改进反射式方法。
method: 利用已知几何结构的 deflectometric 设备，构建基于 PyTorch3D 的可微分渲染流水线，模拟屏幕光照下的虚拟眼睛。通过梯度下降法结合图像-屏幕对应信息，优化求解眼睛的旋转、平移及形状参数。
result: 实际测试中平均相对注视误差低于0.45度（精度优于0.11度），仿真环境下较代表性反射式方法提升6倍性能。
conclusion: 该方法无需特定光栅图案，仅依赖普通视频帧即可实现高精度眼动追踪，为VR/AR/MR场景提供了更高效、实用的反射式眼动追踪解决方案。
search_text: Optimization-Based Eye Tracking using Deflectometric Information 使用偏转信息的基于优化的眼动追踪 Eye tracking is an important tool with a wide range of applications in Virtual, Augmented, and Mixed Reality (VR/AR/MR) technologies. State-of-the-art eye tracking methods are either reflection-based and track reflections of sparse point light sources, or image-based and exploit 2D features of the acquired eye image. In this work, we attempt to significantly improve reflection-based methods by utilizing pixel-dense deflectometric surface measurements in combination with optimization-based inverse rendering algorithms. Utilizing the known geometry of our deflectometric setup, we develop a differentiable rendering pipeline based on PyTorch3D that simulates a virtual eye under screen illumination. Eventually, we exploit the image-screen-correspondence information from the captured measurements to find the eye's rotation, translation, and shape parameters with our renderer via gradient descent. In general, our method does not require a specific pattern and can work with ordinary video frames of the main VR/AR/MR screen itself. We demonstrate real-world experiments with evaluated mean relative gaze errors below 0.45 degrees at a precision better than 0.11 degrees. Moreover, we show an improvement of 6X over a representative reflection-based state-of-the-art method in simulation. 眼动追踪是一种重要工具，在虚拟现实、增强现实和混合现实（VR/AR/MR）技术中有着广泛的应用。最先进的眼睛跟踪方法要么是基于反射的并跟踪稀疏点光源的反射，要么是基于图像的并利用所获取的眼睛图像的 2D 特征。在这项工作中，我们尝试通过利用像素密集偏转表面测量结合基于优化的逆渲染算法来显着改进基于反射的方法。利用偏转设置的已知几何形状，我们开发了基于 PyTorch3D 的可微分渲染管道，可模拟屏幕照明下的虚拟眼睛。最终，我们利用捕获的测量中的图像-屏幕对应信息，通过梯度下降通过渲染器找到眼睛的旋转、平移和形状参数。一般来说，我们的方法不需要特定的模式，并且可以处理主 VR/AR/MR 屏幕本身的普通视频帧。我们演示了真实世界的实验，评估的平均相对注视误差低于 0.45 度，精度优于 0.11 度。此外，我们在模拟中展示了比代表性的基于反射的最先进方法的 6 倍改进。 本文提出了一种基于优化算法的新型眼动追踪方法，通过结合 deflectometric 表面测量与逆向渲染技术，提升虚拟现实（VR/AR/MR）中反射式眼动追踪的精度。 Tianfu Wang,Jiazhang Wang,Oliver Cossairt,Florian Willomitzer cs.CV

authors_text: Yimeng Zhang,Xin Chen,Jinghan Jia,Sijia Liu,Ke Ding
title: Text-Visual Prompting for Efficient 2D Temporal Video Grounding
title_zh: 用于高效 2D 时间视频接地的文本视觉提示
comment: Accepted to the CVPR 2023 and code released (https://github.com/intel/TVP)
comments: Accepted to the CVPR 2023 and code released (https://github.com/intel/TVP)
abstract: In this paper, we study the problem of temporal video grounding (TVG), which aims to predict the starting/ending time points of moments described by a text sentence within a long untrimmed video. Benefiting from fine-grained 3D visual features, the TVG techniques have achieved remarkable progress in recent years. However, the high complexity of 3D convolutional neural networks (CNNs) makes extracting dense 3D visual features time-consuming, which calls for intensive memory and computing resources. Towards efficient TVG, we propose a novel text-visual prompting (TVP) framework, which incorporates optimized perturbation patterns (that we call 'prompts') into both visual inputs and textual features of a TVG model. In sharp contrast to 3D CNNs, we show that TVP allows us to effectively co-train vision encoder and language encoder in a 2D TVG model and improves the performance of crossmodal feature fusion using only low-complexity sparse 2D visual features. Further, we propose a Temporal-Distance IoU (TDIoU) loss for efficient learning of TVG. Experiments on two benchmark datasets, Charades-STA and ActivityNet Captions datasets, empirically show that the proposed TVP significantly boosts the performance of 2D TVG (e.g., 9.79% improvement on Charades-STA and 30.77% improvement on ActivityNet Captions) and achieves 5x inference acceleration over TVG using 3D visual features. Codes are available at Open.Intel.
summary: In this paper, we study the problem of temporal video grounding (TVG), which aims to predict the starting/ending time points of moments described by a text sentence within a long untrimmed video. Benefiting from fine-grained 3D visual features, the TVG techniques have achieved remarkable progress in recent years. However, the high complexity of 3D convolutional neural networks (CNNs) makes extracting dense 3D visual features time-consuming, which calls for intensive memory and computing resources. Towards efficient TVG, we propose a novel text-visual prompting (TVP) framework, which incorporates optimized perturbation patterns (that we call 'prompts') into both visual inputs and textual features of a TVG model. In sharp contrast to 3D CNNs, we show that TVP allows us to effectively co-train vision encoder and language encoder in a 2D TVG model and improves the performance of crossmodal feature fusion using only low-complexity sparse 2D visual features. Further, we propose a Temporal-Distance IoU (TDIoU) loss for efficient learning of TVG. Experiments on two benchmark datasets, Charades-STA and ActivityNet Captions datasets, empirically show that the proposed TVP significantly boosts the performance of 2D TVG (e.g., 9.79% improvement on Charades-STA and 30.77% improvement on ActivityNet Captions) and achieves 5x inference acceleration over TVG using 3D visual features. Codes are available at Open.Intel.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了时间视频接地（TVG）问题，其目的是预测未修剪的长视频中文本句子描述的时刻的开始/结束时间点。受益于细粒度的3D视觉特征，TVG技术近年来取得了显着的进步。然而，3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的高复杂性使得提取密集的 3D 视觉特征非常耗时，需要大量的内存和计算资源。为了实现高效的 TVG，我们提出了一种新颖的文本视觉提示（TVP）框架，它将优化的扰动模式（我们称之为“提示”）纳入 TVG 模型的视觉输入和文本特征中。与 3D CNN 形成鲜明对比的是，TVP 允许我们在 2D TVG 模型中有效地协同训练视觉编码器和语言编码器，并仅使用低复杂度的稀疏 2D 视觉特征来提高跨模态特征融合的性能。此外，我们提出了一种时间距离 IoU (TDIoU) 损失来有效学习 TVG。在两个基准数据集（Charades-STA 和 ActivityNet Captions 数据集）上进行的实验表明，所提出的 TVP 显着提高了 2D TVG 的性能（例如，Charades-STA 提高了 9.79%，ActivityNet Captions 提高了 30.77%），并且比使用 3D 视觉特征的 TVG 实现了 5 倍的推理加速。代码可从 Open.Intel 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过文本-视觉提示框架提升二维时间视频定位任务的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统基于3D CNN的视频定位方法计算复杂度高，资源消耗大，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出文本-视觉提示（TVP）框架，结合优化的提示模式对视觉输入和文本特征进行联合训练，并设计时序距离IoU（TDIoU）损失函数以提升跨模态特征融合效果。
AI.result: 在Charades-STA和ActivityNet Captions数据集上分别提升9.79%和30.77%，推理速度较3D方法快5倍。
AI.conclusion: TVP框架通过2D视觉特征与文本提示的协同优化，有效解决了3D CNN的高复杂度问题，为高效视频定位提供了新思路。

search_text: Text-Visual Prompting for Efficient 2D Temporal Video Grounding 用于高效 2D 时间视频接地的文本视觉提示 In this paper, we study the problem of temporal video grounding (TVG), which aims to predict the starting/ending time points of moments described by a text sentence within a long untrimmed video. Benefiting from fine-grained 3D visual features, the TVG techniques have achieved remarkable progress in recent years. However, the high complexity of 3D convolutional neural networks (CNNs) makes extracting dense 3D visual features time-consuming, which calls for intensive memory and computing resources. Towards efficient TVG, we propose a novel text-visual prompting (TVP) framework, which incorporates optimized perturbation patterns (that we call 'prompts') into both visual inputs and textual features of a TVG model. In sharp contrast to 3D CNNs, we show that TVP allows us to effectively co-train vision encoder and language encoder in a 2D TVG model and improves the performance of crossmodal feature fusion using only low-complexity sparse 2D visual features. Further, we propose a Temporal-Distance IoU (TDIoU) loss for efficient learning of TVG. Experiments on two benchmark datasets, Charades-STA and ActivityNet Captions datasets, empirically show that the proposed TVP significantly boosts the performance of 2D TVG (e.g., 9.79% improvement on Charades-STA and 30.77% improvement on ActivityNet Captions) and achieves 5x inference acceleration over TVG using 3D visual features. Codes are available at Open.Intel. 在本文中，我们研究了时间视频接地（TVG）问题，其目的是预测未修剪的长视频中文本句子描述的时刻的开始/结束时间点。受益于细粒度的3D视觉特征，TVG技术近年来取得了显着的进步。然而，3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的高复杂性使得提取密集的 3D 视觉特征非常耗时，需要大量的内存和计算资源。为了实现高效的 TVG，我们提出了一种新颖的文本视觉提示（TVP）框架，它将优化的扰动模式（我们称之为“提示”）纳入 TVG 模型的视觉输入和文本特征中。与 3D CNN 形成鲜明对比的是，TVP 允许我们在 2D TVG 模型中有效地协同训练视觉编码器和语言编码器，并仅使用低复杂度的稀疏 2D 视觉特征来提高跨模态特征融合的性能。此外，我们提出了一种时间距离 IoU (TDIoU) 损失来有效学习 TVG。在两个基准数据集（Charades-STA 和 ActivityNet Captions 数据集）上进行的实验表明，所提出的 TVP 显着提高了 2D TVG 的性能（例如，Charades-STA 提高了 9.79%，ActivityNet Captions 提高了 30.77%），并且比使用 3D 视觉特征的 TVG 实现了 5 倍的推理加速。代码可从 Open.Intel 获取。 本文研究如何通过文本-视觉提示框架提升二维时间视频定位任务的效率。 Yimeng Zhang,Xin Chen,Jinghan Jia,Sijia Liu,Ke Ding cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Qichen Fu,Xingyu Liu,Ran Xu,Juan Carlos Niebles,Kris M. Kitani
title: Deformer: Dynamic Fusion Transformer for Robust Hand Pose Estimation
title_zh: Deformer：用于稳健手部姿势估计的动态融合变压器
abstract: Accurately estimating 3D hand pose is crucial for understanding how humans interact with the world. Despite remarkable progress, existing methods often struggle to generate plausible hand poses when the hand is heavily occluded or blurred. In videos, the movements of the hand allow us to observe various parts of the hand that may be occluded or blurred in a single frame. To adaptively leverage the visual clue before and after the occlusion or blurring for robust hand pose estimation, we propose the Deformer: a framework that implicitly reasons about the relationship between hand parts within the same image (spatial dimension) and different timesteps (temporal dimension). We show that a naive application of the transformer self-attention mechanism is not sufficient because motion blur or occlusions in certain frames can lead to heavily distorted hand features and generate imprecise keys and queries. To address this challenge, we incorporate a Dynamic Fusion Module into Deformer, which predicts the deformation of the hand and warps the hand mesh predictions from nearby frames to explicitly support the current frame estimation. Furthermore, we have observed that errors are unevenly distributed across different hand parts, with vertices around fingertips having disproportionately higher errors than those around the palm. We mitigate this issue by introducing a new loss function called maxMSE that automatically adjusts the weight of every vertex to focus the model on critical hand parts. Extensive experiments show that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods by 10%, and is more robust to occlusions (over 14%).
summary: Accurately estimating 3D hand pose is crucial for understanding how humans interact with the world. Despite remarkable progress, existing methods often struggle to generate plausible hand poses when the hand is heavily occluded or blurred. In videos, the movements of the hand allow us to observe various parts of the hand that may be occluded or blurred in a single frame. To adaptively leverage the visual clue before and after the occlusion or blurring for robust hand pose estimation, we propose the Deformer: a framework that implicitly reasons about the relationship between hand parts within the same image (spatial dimension) and different timesteps (temporal dimension). We show that a naive application of the transformer self-attention mechanism is not sufficient because motion blur or occlusions in certain frames can lead to heavily distorted hand features and generate imprecise keys and queries. To address this challenge, we incorporate a Dynamic Fusion Module into Deformer, which predicts the deformation of the hand and warps the hand mesh predictions from nearby frames to explicitly support the current frame estimation. Furthermore, we have observed that errors are unevenly distributed across different hand parts, with vertices around fingertips having disproportionately higher errors than those around the palm. We mitigate this issue by introducing a new loss function called maxMSE that automatically adjusts the weight of every vertex to focus the model on critical hand parts. Extensive experiments show that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods by 10%, and is more robust to occlusions (over 14%).
abstract_zh: 准确估计 3D 手势对于理解人类如何与世界互动至关重要。尽管取得了显着的进步，但当手部严重遮挡或模糊时，现有方法通常很难生成合理的手部姿势。在视频中，手的运动使我们能够观察单帧中可能被遮挡或模糊的手的各个部分。为了自适应地利用遮挡或模糊前后的视觉线索来进行鲁棒的手部姿势估计，我们提出了 Deformer：一个隐式推理同一图像（空间维度）和不同时间步长（时间维度）内手部部位之间关系的框架。我们表明，变压器自注意力机制的简单应用是不够的，因为某些帧中的运动模糊或遮挡可能导致手部特征严重扭曲并生成不精确的键和查询。为了应对这一挑战，我们将动态融合模块合并到 Deformer 中，该模块可以预测手部的变形，并扭曲附近帧的手部网格预测，以明确支持当前帧估计。此外，我们观察到误差在不同手部部位的分布不均匀，指尖周围的顶点的误差比手掌周围的顶点不成比例地高。我们通过引入一种名为 maxMSE 的新损失函数来缓解这个问题，该函数会自动调整每个顶点的权重，以将模型集中在关键的手部部位。大量实验表明，我们的方法明显优于最先进的方法 10%，并且对遮挡更加稳健（超过 14%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Deformer框架，通过动态融合时空信息提升遮挡或模糊情况下手部姿态估计的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在手部严重遮挡或模糊时难以生成合理姿态，而视频中手部运动可提供跨帧的视觉线索用于辅助估计。
AI.method: 设计动态融合模块预测手部形变并 warp 邻近帧网格预测，结合针对指尖等关键部位的maxMSE损失函数。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上优于现有方法10%，对遮挡的鲁棒性提升超14%。
AI.conclusion: 通过时空信息融合与自适应损失函数，Deformer有效解决了遮挡场景下手部姿态估计的挑战。

result: 在基准数据集上优于现有方法10%，对遮挡的鲁棒性提升超14%。
conclusion: 通过时空信息融合与自适应损失函数，Deformer有效解决了遮挡场景下手部姿态估计的挑战。
search_text: Deformer: Dynamic Fusion Transformer for Robust Hand Pose Estimation Deformer：用于稳健手部姿势估计的动态融合变压器 Accurately estimating 3D hand pose is crucial for understanding how humans interact with the world. Despite remarkable progress, existing methods often struggle to generate plausible hand poses when the hand is heavily occluded or blurred. In videos, the movements of the hand allow us to observe various parts of the hand that may be occluded or blurred in a single frame. To adaptively leverage the visual clue before and after the occlusion or blurring for robust hand pose estimation, we propose the Deformer: a framework that implicitly reasons about the relationship between hand parts within the same image (spatial dimension) and different timesteps (temporal dimension). We show that a naive application of the transformer self-attention mechanism is not sufficient because motion blur or occlusions in certain frames can lead to heavily distorted hand features and generate imprecise keys and queries. To address this challenge, we incorporate a Dynamic Fusion Module into Deformer, which predicts the deformation of the hand and warps the hand mesh predictions from nearby frames to explicitly support the current frame estimation. Furthermore, we have observed that errors are unevenly distributed across different hand parts, with vertices around fingertips having disproportionately higher errors than those around the palm. We mitigate this issue by introducing a new loss function called maxMSE that automatically adjusts the weight of every vertex to focus the model on critical hand parts. Extensive experiments show that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods by 10%, and is more robust to occlusions (over 14%). 准确估计 3D 手势对于理解人类如何与世界互动至关重要。尽管取得了显着的进步，但当手部严重遮挡或模糊时，现有方法通常很难生成合理的手部姿势。在视频中，手的运动使我们能够观察单帧中可能被遮挡或模糊的手的各个部分。为了自适应地利用遮挡或模糊前后的视觉线索来进行鲁棒的手部姿势估计，我们提出了 Deformer：一个隐式推理同一图像（空间维度）和不同时间步长（时间维度）内手部部位之间关系的框架。我们表明，变压器自注意力机制的简单应用是不够的，因为某些帧中的运动模糊或遮挡可能导致手部特征严重扭曲并生成不精确的键和查询。为了应对这一挑战，我们将动态融合模块合并到 Deformer 中，该模块可以预测手部的变形，并扭曲附近帧的手部网格预测，以明确支持当前帧估计。此外，我们观察到误差在不同手部部位的分布不均匀，指尖周围的顶点的误差比手掌周围的顶点不成比例地高。我们通过引入一种名为 maxMSE 的新损失函数来缓解这个问题，该函数会自动调整每个顶点的权重，以将模型集中在关键的手部部位。大量实验表明，我们的方法明显优于最先进的方法 10%，并且对遮挡更加稳健（超过 14%）。 本文提出Deformer框架，通过动态融合时空信息提升遮挡或模糊情况下手部姿态估计的鲁棒性。 Qichen Fu,Xingyu Liu,Ran Xu,Juan Carlos Niebles,Kris M. Kitani cs.CV

authors_text: Ying Zeng,Yushi Chen,Xue Yang,Qingyun Li,Junchi Yan
title: ARS-DETR: Aspect Ratio-Sensitive Detection Transformer for Aerial Oriented Object Detection
title_zh: ARS-DETR：用于空中目标检测的纵横比敏感检测变压器
comment: 15 pages, 13 figures, 13 tables, the source code is available at https://github.com/httle/ARS-DETR
comments: 15 pages, 13 figures, 13 tables, the source code is available at https://github.com/httle/ARS-DETR
abstract: Existing oriented object detection methods commonly use metric AP$_{50}$ to measure the performance of the model. We argue that AP$_{50}$ is inherently unsuitable for oriented object detection due to its large tolerance in angle deviation. Therefore, we advocate using high-precision metric, e.g. AP$_{75}$, to measure the performance of models. In this paper, we propose an Aspect Ratio Sensitive Oriented Object Detector with Transformer, termed ARS-DETR, which exhibits a competitive performance in high-precision oriented object detection. Specifically, a new angle classification method, calling Aspect Ratio aware Circle Smooth Label (AR-CSL), is proposed to smooth the angle label in a more reasonable way and discard the hyperparameter that introduced by previous work (e.g. CSL). Then, a rotated deformable attention module is designed to rotate the sampling points with the corresponding angles and eliminate the misalignment between region features and sampling points. Moreover, a dynamic weight coefficient according to the aspect ratio is adopted to calculate the angle loss. Comprehensive experiments on several challenging datasets show that our method achieves competitive performance on the high-precision oriented object detection task.
summary: Existing oriented object detection methods commonly use metric AP$_{50}$ to measure the performance of the model. We argue that AP$_{50}$ is inherently unsuitable for oriented object detection due to its large tolerance in angle deviation. Therefore, we advocate using high-precision metric, e.g. AP$_{75}$, to measure the performance of models. In this paper, we propose an Aspect Ratio Sensitive Oriented Object Detector with Transformer, termed ARS-DETR, which exhibits a competitive performance in high-precision oriented object detection. Specifically, a new angle classification method, calling Aspect Ratio aware Circle Smooth Label (AR-CSL), is proposed to smooth the angle label in a more reasonable way and discard the hyperparameter that introduced by previous work (e.g. CSL). Then, a rotated deformable attention module is designed to rotate the sampling points with the corresponding angles and eliminate the misalignment between region features and sampling points. Moreover, a dynamic weight coefficient according to the aspect ratio is adopted to calculate the angle loss. Comprehensive experiments on several challenging datasets show that our method achieves competitive performance on the high-precision oriented object detection task.
abstract_zh: 现有的面向对象检测方法通常使用指标 AP$_{50}$ 来衡量模型的性能。我们认为 AP$_{50}$ 由于其角度偏差容限较大，本质上不适合定向物体检测。因此，我们提倡使用高精度的度量，例如AP$_{75}$，衡量模型的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种带有 Transformer 的长宽比敏感定向物体检测器，称为 ARS-DETR，它在高精度定向物体检测中表现出有竞争力的性能。具体来说，提出了一种新的角度分类方法，称为长宽比感知圆平滑标签（AR-CSL），以更合理的方式平滑角度标签，并丢弃先前工作（例如CSL）引入的超参数。然后，设计旋转变形注意模块，将采样点旋转相应的角度，消除区域特征与采样点之间的未对准。此外，采用根据长宽比的动态权重系数来计算角度损失。对几个具有挑战性的数据集的综合实验表明，我们的方法在高精度面向对象检测任务上实现了具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向航拍定向目标检测的高精度检测方法ARS-DETR，旨在提升定向目标检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的定向目标检测方法通常使用AP$_{50}$作为评估指标，但该指标对角度偏差容忍度较高，不适合高精度检测任务，因此作者主张采用更精确的AP$_{75}$作为评估标准。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的定向目标检测器ARS-DETR，包括新的角度分类方法AR-CSL、旋转可变形注意力模块以及根据长宽比动态计算角度损失的权重系数。
AI.result: 在多个具有挑战性的数据集上进行的实验表明，ARS-DETR在高精度定向目标检测任务中表现出竞争力。
AI.conclusion: ARS-DETR通过改进角度分类、特征对齐和损失计算方式，在高精度定向目标检测中取得了良好的效果。

authors_text: Mengdi Chu,Keyu Zong,Xin Shu,Jiangtao Gong,Zicong Lu,Kaimin Guo,Xinyi Dai,Guyue Zhou
title: Work with AI and Work for AI: Autonomous Vehicle Safety Drivers' Lived Experiences
title_zh: 与人工智能合作并为人工智能工作：自动驾驶汽车安全驾驶员的生活经历
abstract: The development of Autonomous Vehicle (AV) has created a novel job, the safety driver, recruited from experienced drivers to supervise and operate AV in numerous driving missions. Safety drivers usually work with non-perfect AV in high-risk real-world traffic environments for road testing tasks. However, this group of workers is under-explored in the HCI community. To fill this gap, we conducted semi-structured interviews with 26 safety drivers. Our results present how safety drivers cope with defective algorithms and shape and calibrate their perceptions while working with AV. We found that, as front-line workers, safety drivers are forced to take risks accumulated from the AV industry upstream and are also confronting restricted self-development in working for AV development. We contribute the first empirical evidence of the lived experience of safety drivers, the first passengers in the development of AV, and also the grassroots workers for AV, which can shed light on future human-AI interaction research.
summary: The development of Autonomous Vehicle (AV) has created a novel job, the safety driver, recruited from experienced drivers to supervise and operate AV in numerous driving missions. Safety drivers usually work with non-perfect AV in high-risk real-world traffic environments for road testing tasks. However, this group of workers is under-explored in the HCI community. To fill this gap, we conducted semi-structured interviews with 26 safety drivers. Our results present how safety drivers cope with defective algorithms and shape and calibrate their perceptions while working with AV. We found that, as front-line workers, safety drivers are forced to take risks accumulated from the AV industry upstream and are also confronting restricted self-development in working for AV development. We contribute the first empirical evidence of the lived experience of safety drivers, the first passengers in the development of AV, and also the grassroots workers for AV, which can shed light on future human-AI interaction research.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 的发展创造了一个新的职位，即安全驾驶员，该职位由经验丰富的驾驶员招募，负责在众多驾驶任务中监督和操作自动驾驶汽车。安全驾驶员通常在高风险的现实交通环境中使用不完美的自动驾驶汽车来执行道路测试任务。然而，这组工作人员在 HCI 社区中尚未得到充分探索。为了填补这一空白，我们对 26 名安全驾驶员进行了半结构化访谈。我们的结果展示了安全驾驶员在使用自动驾驶汽车时如何应对有缺陷的算法以及塑造和校准他们的感知。我们发现，作为一线工作者，安全驾驶员被迫承担自动驾驶行业上游积累的风险，在自动驾驶发展中也面临着自我发展的限制。我们提供了安全驾驶员、自动驾驶开发中的第一批乘客以及自动驾驶基层工作者的生活体验的第一个经验证据，这可以为未来的人机交互研究提供启示。

AI.tldr: 本文通过研究自动驾驶安全驾驶员的实际工作体验，填补了人机交互领域对这一群体的研究空白。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶技术发展催生了安全驾驶员这一新型职业，但其工作风险与职业发展困境尚未被学术界充分关注。
AI.method: 采用半结构化访谈法对26名安全驾驶员进行深度访谈，分析其应对算法缺陷及调整认知的策略。
AI.result: 发现安全驾驶员需承担算法缺陷导致的风险，并面临职业发展空间受限的问题，首次揭示了该群体的生存状态。
AI.conclusion: 安全驾驶员作为自动驾驶技术的'第一乘客'，其经验为未来人机协作设计提供了重要参考依据。

We contribute the first empirical evidence of the lived experience of safety drivers, the first passengers in the development of AV, and also the grassroots workers for AV, which can shed light on future human-AI interaction research. 自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 的发展创造了一个新的职位，即安全驾驶员，该职位由经验丰富的驾驶员招募，负责在众多驾驶任务中监督和操作自动驾驶汽车。安全驾驶员通常在高风险的现实交通环境中使用不完美的自动驾驶汽车来执行道路测试任务。然而，这组工作人员在 HCI 社区中尚未得到充分探索。为了填补这一空白，我们对 26 名安全驾驶员进行了半结构化访谈。我们的结果展示了安全驾驶员在使用自动驾驶汽车时如何应对有缺陷的算法以及塑造和校准他们的感知。我们发现，作为一线工作者，安全驾驶员被迫承担自动驾驶行业上游积累的风险，在自动驾驶发展中也面临着自我发展的限制。我们提供了安全驾驶员、自动驾驶开发中的第一批乘客以及自动驾驶基层工作者的生活体验的第一个经验证据，这可以为未来的人机交互研究提供启示。 本文通过研究自动驾驶安全驾驶员的实际工作体验，填补了人机交互领域对这一群体的研究空白。 Mengdi Chu,Keyu Zong,Xin Shu,Jiangtao Gong,Zicong Lu,Kaimin Guo,Xinyi Dai,Guyue Zhou cs.HC

authors_text: Junheng Li,Quan Nguyen
title: Kinodynamics-based Pose Optimization for Humanoid Loco-manipulation
title_zh: 基于运动动力学的人形机器人姿势优化
comment: 8 pages, 9 figure, submitted to Humanoids 2023, supplementary video: https://youtu.be/iunrSQjQx4M
comments: 8 pages, 9 figure, submitted to Humanoids 2023, supplementary video: https://youtu.be/iunrSQjQx4M
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach for controlling humanoid robots to push heavy objects. The approach combines kinodynamics-based pose optimization and loco-manipulation model predictive control (MPC). The proposed pose optimization considers the object-robot dynamics model, robot kinematic constraints, and object parameters to plan the optimal pushing pose for the robot. The loco-manipulation MPC is used to track the optimal pose by coordinating pushing and ground reaction forces, ensuring accurate manipulation and stable locomotion. Numerical validation demonstrates the effectiveness of the framework, enabling the humanoid robot to push objects with various parameter setups. The pose optimization can be solved as a nonlinear programming (NLP) problem within an average of 250 ms. The proposed control scheme allows the humanoid robot to push objects weighing up to 20 kg (118$\%$ of the robot's mass). Additionally, it can recover the system from a 120 N lateral force disturbance applied for 0.3 s.
summary: This paper presents a novel approach for controlling humanoid robots to push heavy objects. The approach combines kinodynamics-based pose optimization and loco-manipulation model predictive control (MPC). The proposed pose optimization considers the object-robot dynamics model, robot kinematic constraints, and object parameters to plan the optimal pushing pose for the robot. The loco-manipulation MPC is used to track the optimal pose by coordinating pushing and ground reaction forces, ensuring accurate manipulation and stable locomotion. Numerical validation demonstrates the effectiveness of the framework, enabling the humanoid robot to push objects with various parameter setups. The pose optimization can be solved as a nonlinear programming (NLP) problem within an average of 250 ms. The proposed control scheme allows the humanoid robot to push objects weighing up to 20 kg (118$\%$ of the robot's mass). Additionally, it can recover the system from a 120 N lateral force disturbance applied for 0.3 s.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种控制人形机器人推动重物的新方法。该方法结合了基于运动动力学的姿态优化和局部操纵模型预测控制（MPC）。所提出的姿势优化考虑了物体-机器人动力学模型、机器人运动学约束和物体参数来规划机器人的最佳推动姿势。运动操纵MPC通过协调推力和地面反作用力来跟踪最佳姿态，确保精确操纵和稳定运动。数值验证证明了该框架的有效性，使人形机器人能够推动具有各种参数设置的物体。位姿优化可以作为非线性规划 (NLP) 问题在平均 250 毫秒内得到解决。所提出的控制方案允许人形机器人推动重达 20 kg 的物体（机器人质量的 118$\%$）。此外，它还可以使系统从施加 0.3 秒的 120 N 横向力扰动中恢复。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合运动学动力学姿态优化与移动操作模型预测控制（MPC）的方法，实现双足机器人推动重物的控制。
AI.motivation: 现有双足机器人操作重物时面临动态建模复杂、运动与操作协调困难等问题，需提升推动稳定性与抗干扰能力。
AI.method: 融合运动学动力学模型的非线性规划（NLP）姿态优化与协调地面反作用力的MPC控制，联合优化机器人姿态与力分布。
AI.result: 框架可在250ms内求解姿态优化，支持机器人推动达自重118%的20kg物体，并成功抵御120N持续0.3s的侧向扰动。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为双足机器人复杂环境下的重物操作提供了高效稳定的控制方案，验证了动态建模与协同控制的有效性。

authors_text: Su Bonan
title: The Robustness Verification of Linear Sound Quantum Classifiers
title_zh: 线性声量子分类器的鲁棒性验证
abstract: I present a quick and sound method for the robustness verification of a sort of quantum classifiers who are Linear Sound. Since quantum machine learning has been put into practice in relevant fields and Linear Sound Property, LSP is a pervasive property, the method could be universally applied. I implemented my method with a Quantum Convolutional Neural Network, QCNN using MindQuantum, Huawei and successfully verified its robustness when classifying MNIST dataset.
summary: I present a quick and sound method for the robustness verification of a sort of quantum classifiers who are Linear Sound. Since quantum machine learning has been put into practice in relevant fields and Linear Sound Property, LSP is a pervasive property, the method could be universally applied. I implemented my method with a Quantum Convolutional Neural Network, QCNN using MindQuantum, Huawei and successfully verified its robustness when classifying MNIST dataset.
abstract_zh: 我提出了一种快速可靠的方法来验证线性声音量子分类器的鲁棒性。由于量子机器学习已经在相关领域得到实践，而且线性声音性质、LSP是一种普遍性质，因此该方法可以普遍应用。我使用华为 MindQuantum 使用量子卷积神经网络 QCNN 实现了我的方法，并在对 MNIST 数据集进行分类时成功验证了其鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种快速且可靠的方法，用于验证具有线性声属性（LSP）的量子分类器的鲁棒性，并在MNIST数据集上通过量子卷积神经网络（QCNN）实现了验证。
AI.motivation: 量子机器学习已应用于实际领域，而线性声属性（LSP）作为常见特性，亟需一种通用的鲁棒性验证方法以确保其可靠性。
AI.method: 基于量子卷积神经网络（QCNN），利用MindQuantum和华为框架实现，针对线性声量子分类器设计鲁棒性验证方法。
AI.result: 成功验证了该方法在MNIST数据集分类任务中的有效性，证明了量子分类器的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法为量子分类器的鲁棒性验证提供了可行方案，且因LSP的普遍性具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Geunhyeok Yu,Minwoo Jeon,Hyoseok Hwang
title: Decision-BADGE: Decision-based Adversarial Batch Attack with Directional Gradient Estimation
title_zh: Decision-BADGE：基于决策的对抗性批量攻击与定向梯度估计
comment: 9 pages (7 pages except for references), 4 figures, 4 tables
comments: 9 pages (7 pages except for references), 4 figures, 4 tables
abstract: The susceptibility of deep neural networks (DNNs) to adversarial examples has prompted an increase in the deployment of adversarial attacks. Image-agnostic universal adversarial perturbations (UAPs) are much more threatening, but many limitations exist to implementing UAPs in real-world scenarios where only binary decisions are returned. In this research, we propose Decision-BADGE, a novel method to craft universal adversarial perturbations for executing decision-based black-box attacks. To optimize perturbation with decisions, we addressed two challenges, namely the magnitude and the direction of the gradient. First, we use batch loss, differences from distributions of ground truth, and accumulating decisions in batches to determine the magnitude of the gradient. This magnitude is applied in the direction of the revised simultaneous perturbation stochastic approximation (SPSA) to update the perturbation. This simple yet efficient method can be easily extended to score-based attacks as well as targeted attacks. Experimental validation across multiple victim models demonstrates that the Decision-BADGE outperforms existing attack methods, even image-specific and score-based attacks. In particular, our proposed method shows a superior success rate with less training time. The research also shows that Decision-BADGE can successfully deceive unseen victim models and accurately target specific classes.
summary: The susceptibility of deep neural networks (DNNs) to adversarial examples has prompted an increase in the deployment of adversarial attacks. Image-agnostic universal adversarial perturbations (UAPs) are much more threatening, but many limitations exist to implementing UAPs in real-world scenarios where only binary decisions are returned. In this research, we propose Decision-BADGE, a novel method to craft universal adversarial perturbations for executing decision-based black-box attacks. To optimize perturbation with decisions, we addressed two challenges, namely the magnitude and the direction of the gradient. First, we use batch loss, differences from distributions of ground truth, and accumulating decisions in batches to determine the magnitude of the gradient. This magnitude is applied in the direction of the revised simultaneous perturbation stochastic approximation (SPSA) to update the perturbation. This simple yet efficient method can be easily extended to score-based attacks as well as targeted attacks. Experimental validation across multiple victim models demonstrates that the Decision-BADGE outperforms existing attack methods, even image-specific and score-based attacks. In particular, our proposed method shows a superior success rate with less training time. The research also shows that Decision-BADGE can successfully deceive unseen victim models and accurately target specific classes.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）对对抗性例子的敏感性促使对抗性攻击的部署增加。与图像无关的通用对抗性扰动 (UAP) 更具威胁性，但在仅返回二元决策的现实场景中实施 UAP 存在许多限制。在这项研究中，我们提出了 Decision-BADGE，这是一种创建通用对抗性扰动以执行基于决策的黑盒攻击的新方法。为了优化决策扰动，我们解决了两个挑战，即梯度的大小和方向。首先，我们使用批量损失、与地面实况分布的差异以及批量累积决策来确定梯度的大小。该幅度应用于修正的同时扰动随机近似（SPSA）的方向以更新扰动。这种简单而有效的方法可以轻松扩展到基于分数的攻击以及有针对性的攻击。跨多个受害者模型的实验验证表明，Decision-BADGE 优于现有的攻击方法，甚至优于特定于图像和基于分数的攻击。特别是，我们提出的方法显示出较高的成功率和更少的训练时间。研究还表明，Decision-BADGE 可以成功欺骗看不见的受害者模型，并准确地针对特定类别。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于决策的对抗性批量攻击方法Decision-BADGE，用于生成通用对抗扰动以执行黑盒攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有通用对抗扰动（UAPs）在仅返回二进制决策的现实场景中存在实施限制，需开发更有效的黑盒攻击方法。
AI.method: 通过批量损失、真实分布差异及批量决策累积确定梯度幅度，并结合改进的SPSA方向更新扰动，适用于得分型和定向攻击。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个受害者模型上成功率更高，训练时间更短，能有效欺骗未见过的模型并精准目标特定类别。
AI.conclusion: Decision-BADGE有效解决了决策型黑盒攻击中的梯度方向与幅度问题，展示了在对抗样本生成中的优越性。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种基于决策的对抗性批量攻击方法Decision-BADGE，用于生成通用对抗扰动以执行黑盒攻击。
