search_text: Decision-BADGE: Decision-based Adversarial Batch Attack with Directional Gradient Estimation Decision-BADGE：基于决策的对抗性批量攻击与定向梯度估计 The susceptibility of deep neural networks (DNNs) to adversarial examples has prompted an increase in the deployment of adversarial attacks. Image-agnostic universal adversarial perturbations (UAPs) are much more threatening, but many limitations exist to implementing UAPs in real-world scenarios where only binary decisions are returned. In this research, we propose Decision-BADGE, a novel method to craft universal adversarial perturbations for executing decision-based black-box attacks. To optimize perturbation with decisions, we addressed two challenges, namely the magnitude and the direction of the gradient. First, we use batch loss, differences from distributions of ground truth, and accumulating decisions in batches to determine the magnitude of the gradient. This magnitude is applied in the direction of the revised simultaneous perturbation stochastic approximation (SPSA) to update the perturbation. This simple yet efficient method can be easily extended to score-based attacks as well as targeted attacks. Experimental validation across multiple victim models demonstrates that the Decision-BADGE outperforms existing attack methods, even image-specific and score-based attacks. In particular, our proposed method shows a superior success rate with less training time. The research also shows that Decision-BADGE can successfully deceive unseen victim models and accurately target specific classes. 深度神经网络（DNN）对对抗性例子的敏感性促使对抗性攻击的部署增加。与图像无关的通用对抗性扰动 (UAP) 更具威胁性，但在仅返回二元决策的现实场景中实施 UAP 存在许多限制。在这项研究中，我们提出了 Decision-BADGE，这是一种创建通用对抗性扰动以执行基于决策的黑盒攻击的新方法。为了优化决策扰动，我们解决了两个挑战，即梯度的大小和方向。首先，我们使用批量损失、与地面实况分布的差异以及批量累积决策来确定梯度的大小。该幅度应用于修正的同时扰动随机近似（SPSA）的方向以更新扰动。这种简单而有效的方法可以轻松扩展到基于分数的攻击以及有针对性的攻击。跨多个受害者模型的实验验证表明，Decision-BADGE 优于现有的攻击方法，甚至优于特定于图像和基于分数的攻击。特别是，我们提出的方法显示出较高的成功率和更少的训练时间。研究还表明，Decision-BADGE 可以成功欺骗看不见的受害者模型，并准确地针对特定类别。 提出一种基于决策的对抗性批量攻击方法Decision-BADGE，用于生成通用对抗扰动以执行黑盒攻击。 Geunhyeok Yu,Minwoo Jeon,Hyoseok Hwang cs.CV

authors_text: Umais Zahid,Qinghai Guo,Karl Friston,Zafeirios Fountas
title: Curvature-Sensitive Predictive Coding with Approximate Laplace Monte Carlo
title_zh: 使用近似拉普拉斯蒙特卡罗的曲率敏感预测编码
abstract: Predictive coding (PC) accounts of perception now form one of the dominant computational theories of the brain, where they prescribe a general algorithm for inference and learning over hierarchical latent probabilistic models. Despite this, they have enjoyed little export to the broader field of machine learning, where comparative generative modelling techniques have flourished. In part, this has been due to the poor performance of models trained with PC when evaluated by both sample quality and marginal likelihood. By adopting the perspective of PC as a variational Bayes algorithm under the Laplace approximation, we identify the source of these deficits to lie in the exclusion of an associated Hessian term in the PC objective function, which would otherwise regularise the sharpness of the probability landscape and prevent over-certainty in the approximate posterior. To remedy this, we make three primary contributions: we begin by suggesting a simple Monte Carlo estimated evidence lower bound which relies on sampling from the Hessian-parameterised variational posterior. We then derive a novel block diagonal approximation to the full Hessian matrix that has lower memory requirements and favourable mathematical properties. Lastly, we present an algorithm that combines our method with standard PC to reduce memory complexity further. We evaluate models trained with our approach against the standard PC framework on image benchmark datasets. Our approach produces higher log-likelihoods and qualitatively better samples that more closely capture the diversity of the data-generating distribution.
summary: Predictive coding (PC) accounts of perception now form one of the dominant computational theories of the brain, where they prescribe a general algorithm for inference and learning over hierarchical latent probabilistic models. Despite this, they have enjoyed little export to the broader field of machine learning, where comparative generative modelling techniques have flourished. In part, this has been due to the poor performance of models trained with PC when evaluated by both sample quality and marginal likelihood. By adopting the perspective of PC as a variational Bayes algorithm under the Laplace approximation, we identify the source of these deficits to lie in the exclusion of an associated Hessian term in the PC objective function, which would otherwise regularise the sharpness of the probability landscape and prevent over-certainty in the approximate posterior. To remedy this, we make three primary contributions: we begin by suggesting a simple Monte Carlo estimated evidence lower bound which relies on sampling from the Hessian-parameterised variational posterior. We then derive a novel block diagonal approximation to the full Hessian matrix that has lower memory requirements and favourable mathematical properties. Lastly, we present an algorithm that combines our method with standard PC to reduce memory complexity further. We evaluate models trained with our approach against the standard PC framework on image benchmark datasets. Our approach produces higher log-likelihoods and qualitatively better samples that more closely capture the diversity of the data-generating distribution.
abstract_zh: 感知的预测编码（PC）帐户现在形成了大脑的主要计算理论之一，它们规定了一种用于推理和学习分层潜在概率模型的通用算法。尽管如此，它们却很少向更广泛的机器学习领域出口，而比较生成建模技术在该领域蓬勃发展。部分原因是，在通过样本质量和边际似然进行评估时，使用 PC 训练的模型表现不佳。通过采用 PC 的视角作为拉普拉斯近似下的变分贝叶斯算法，我们发现这些缺陷的根源在于排除 PC 目标函数中的相关 Hessian 项，否则该项会正则概率景观的锐度并防止近似后验的过度确定性。为了解决这个问题，我们做出了三个主要贡献：我们首先建议一个简单的蒙特卡罗估计证据下界，它依赖于从 Hessian 参数化变分后验中采样。然后，我们推导了一种新颖的完整 Hessian 矩阵的块对角近似，该矩阵具有较低的内存需求和良好的数学特性。最后，我们提出了一种将我们的方法与标准 PC 相结合的算法，以进一步降低内存复杂性。我们根据图像基准数据集上的标准 PC 框架评估使用我们的方法训练的模型。我们的方法产生更高的对数似然和质量更好的样本，更紧密地捕捉数据生成分布的多样性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合近似拉普拉斯蒙特卡洛方法的曲率敏感预测编码框架，以改进传统预测编码在生成模型中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统预测编码在机器学习领域应用受限，因其在样本质量和边缘似然评估中表现不佳，主要问题源于目标函数中未包含海森矩阵项导致的后验分布过拟合。
AI.method: 提出三方面改进：1）基于海森参数化变分后验的蒙特卡洛证据下界估计；2）设计低内存需求的块对角海森矩阵近似方法；3）结合标准预测编码的内存优化算法。
AI.result: 在图像基准数据集上验证，新方法显著提升对数似然值并生成更贴近数据分布多样性的高质量样本。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入海森矩阵曲率信息，改进后的预测编码框架有效解决了传统方法的过确定性问题，在生成模型任务中展现出更优性能。

authors_text: Lin Zhang,Xin Li,Dongliang He,Errui Ding,Zhaoxiang Zhang
title: LMR: A Large-Scale Multi-Reference Dataset for Reference-based Super-Resolution
title_zh: LMR：用于基于参考的超分辨率的大规模多参考数据集
abstract: It is widely agreed that reference-based super-resolution (RefSR) achieves superior results by referring to similar high quality images, compared to single image super-resolution (SISR). Intuitively, the more references, the better performance. However, previous RefSR methods have all focused on single-reference image training, while multiple reference images are often available in testing or practical applications. The root cause of such training-testing mismatch is the absence of publicly available multi-reference SR training datasets, which greatly hinders research efforts on multi-reference super-resolution. To this end, we construct a large-scale, multi-reference super-resolution dataset, named LMR. It contains 112,142 groups of 300x300 training images, which is 10x of the existing largest RefSR dataset. The image size is also much larger. More importantly, each group is equipped with 5 reference images with different similarity levels. Furthermore, we propose a new baseline method for multi-reference super-resolution: MRefSR, including a Multi-Reference Attention Module (MAM) for feature fusion of an arbitrary number of reference images, and a Spatial Aware Filtering Module (SAFM) for the fused feature selection. The proposed MRefSR achieves significant improvements over state-of-the-art approaches on both quantitative and qualitative evaluations. Our code and data would be made available soon.
summary: It is widely agreed that reference-based super-resolution (RefSR) achieves superior results by referring to similar high quality images, compared to single image super-resolution (SISR). Intuitively, the more references, the better performance. However, previous RefSR methods have all focused on single-reference image training, while multiple reference images are often available in testing or practical applications. The root cause of such training-testing mismatch is the absence of publicly available multi-reference SR training datasets, which greatly hinders research efforts on multi-reference super-resolution. To this end, we construct a large-scale, multi-reference super-resolution dataset, named LMR. It contains 112,142 groups of 300x300 training images, which is 10x of the existing largest RefSR dataset. The image size is also much larger. More importantly, each group is equipped with 5 reference images with different similarity levels. Furthermore, we propose a new baseline method for multi-reference super-resolution: MRefSR, including a Multi-Reference Attention Module (MAM) for feature fusion of an arbitrary number of reference images, and a Spatial Aware Filtering Module (SAFM) for the fused feature selection. The proposed MRefSR achieves significant improvements over state-of-the-art approaches on both quantitative and qualitative evaluations. Our code and data would be made available soon.
abstract_zh: 人们普遍认为，与单​​图像超分辨率 (SISR) 相比，基于参考的超分辨率 (RefSR) 通过参考类似的高质量图像获得了更好的结果。直观上，引用越多，性能就越好。然而，之前的RefSR方法都集中在单参考图像训练上，而在测试或实际应用中通常可以使用多个参考图像。这种训练与测试不匹配的根本原因是缺乏公开的多参考SR训练数据集，这极大地阻碍了多参考超分辨率的研究工作。为此，我们构建了一个大规模、多参考超分辨率数据集，命名为LMR。它包含 112,142 组 300x300 训练图像，是现有最大 RefSR 数据集的 10 倍。图像尺寸也大得多。更重要的是，每组都配备了 5 张不同相似度的参考图像。此外，我们提出了一种新的多参考超分辨率基线方法：MRefSR，包括用于任意数量参考图像特征融合的多参考注意模块（MAM）和用于融合特征选择的空间感知过滤模块（SAFM）。所提出的 MRefSR 在定量和定性评估方面均比最先进的方法取得了显着改进。我们的代码和数据很快就会提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个大规模多参考超分辨率数据集LMR，并设计了多参考超分辨率方法MRefSR，以解决现有方法在训练与测试阶段参考数量不匹配的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于参考的超分辨率方法仅使用单参考图像训练，而实际应用中测试时通常有多个参考图像，导致训练-测试不匹配。缺乏公开的多参考训练数据集严重阻碍了相关研究。
AI.method: 构建包含112,142组300x300图像的LMR数据集，每组含5个不同相似度的参考图像；提出MRefSR方法，包含多参考注意力模块（MAM）和空间感知滤波模块（SAFM）。
AI.result: MRefSR在定量和定性评估中均显著优于现有方法，代码和数据即将公开。
AI.conclusion: LMR数据集填补了多参考超分辨率领域的空白，MRefSR方法验证了多参考融合的有效性，推动了该方向的研究进展。

motivation: 现有基于参考的超分辨率方法仅使用单参考图像训练，而实际应用中测试时通常有多个参考图像，导致训练-测试不匹配。缺乏公开的多参考训练数据集严重阻碍了相关研究。
method: 构建包含112,142组300x300图像的LMR数据集，每组含5个不同相似度的参考图像；提出MRefSR方法，包含多参考注意力模块（MAM）和空间感知滤波模块（SAFM）。
result: MRefSR在定量和定性评估中均显著优于现有方法，代码和数据即将公开。
conclusion: LMR数据集填补了多参考超分辨率领域的空白，MRefSR方法验证了多参考融合的有效性，推动了该方向的研究进展。
search_text: LMR: A Large-Scale Multi-Reference Dataset for Reference-based Super-Resolution LMR：用于基于参考的超分辨率的大规模多参考数据集 It is widely agreed that reference-based super-resolution (RefSR) achieves superior results by referring to similar high quality images, compared to single image super-resolution (SISR). Intuitively, the more references, the better performance. However, previous RefSR methods have all focused on single-reference image training, while multiple reference images are often available in testing or practical applications. The root cause of such training-testing mismatch is the absence of publicly available multi-reference SR training datasets, which greatly hinders research efforts on multi-reference super-resolution. To this end, we construct a large-scale, multi-reference super-resolution dataset, named LMR. It contains 112,142 groups of 300x300 training images, which is 10x of the existing largest RefSR dataset. The image size is also much larger. More importantly, each group is equipped with 5 reference images with different similarity levels. Furthermore, we propose a new baseline method for multi-reference super-resolution: MRefSR, including a Multi-Reference Attention Module (MAM) for feature fusion of an arbitrary number of reference images, and a Spatial Aware Filtering Module (SAFM) for the fused feature selection. The proposed MRefSR achieves significant improvements over state-of-the-art approaches on both quantitative and qualitative evaluations. Our code and data would be made available soon. 人们普遍认为，与单​​图像超分辨率 (SISR) 相比，基于参考的超分辨率 (RefSR) 通过参考类似的高质量图像获得了更好的结果。直观上，引用越多，性能就越好。然而，之前的RefSR方法都集中在单参考图像训练上，而在测试或实际应用中通常可以使用多个参考图像。这种训练与测试不匹配的根本原因是缺乏公开的多参考SR训练数据集，这极大地阻碍了多参考超分辨率的研究工作。为此，我们构建了一个大规模、多参考超分辨率数据集，命名为LMR。它包含 112,142 组 300x300 训练图像，是现有最大 RefSR 数据集的 10 倍。图像尺寸也大得多。更重要的是，每组都配备了 5 张不同相似度的参考图像。此外，我们提出了一种新的多参考超分辨率基线方法：MRefSR，包括用于任意数量参考图像特征融合的多参考注意模块（MAM）和用于融合特征选择的空间感知过滤模块（SAFM）。所提出的 MRefSR 在定量和定性评估方面均比最先进的方法取得了显着改进。我们的代码和数据很快就会提供。 本文提出一个大规模多参考超分辨率数据集LMR，并设计了多参考超分辨率方法MRefSR，以解决现有方法在训练与测试阶段参考数量不匹配的问题。 Lin Zhang,Xin Li,Dongliang He,Errui Ding,Zhaoxiang Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaoxiang Han,Yang Chen,Qiaohong Liu,Yiman Liu,Keyan Chen,Yuanjie Lin,Weikun Zhang
title: Reconstruction of Cardiac Cine MRI Using Motion-Guided Deformable Alignment and Multi-Resolution Fusion
title_zh: 使用运动引导变形对准和多分辨率融合重建心脏电影 MRI
abstract: Cardiac cine magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is one of the important means to assess cardiac functions and vascular abnormalities. Mitigating artifacts arising during image reconstruction and accelerating cardiac cine MRI acquisition to obtain high-quality images is important. A novel end-to-end deep learning network is developed to improve cardiac cine MRI reconstruction. First, a U-Net is adopted to obtain the initial reconstructed images in k-space. Further to remove the motion artifacts, the motion-guided deformable alignment (MGDA) module with second-order bidirectional propagation is introduced to align the adjacent cine MRI frames by maximizing spatial-temporal information to alleviate motion artifacts. Finally, the multi-resolution fusion (MRF) module is designed to correct the blur and artifacts generated from alignment operation and obtain the last high-quality reconstructed cardiac images. At an 8$\times$ acceleration rate, the numerical measurements on the ACDC dataset are structural similarity index (SSIM) of 78.40%$\pm$.57%, peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) of 30.46$\pm$1.22dB, and normalized mean squared error (NMSE) of 0.0468$\pm$0.0075. On the ACMRI dataset, the results are SSIM of 87.65%$\pm$4.20%, PSNR of 30.04$\pm$1.18dB, and NMSE of 0.0473$\pm$0.0072. The proposed method exhibits high-quality results with richer details and fewer artifacts for cardiac cine MRI reconstruction on different accelerations.
summary: Cardiac cine magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is one of the important means to assess cardiac functions and vascular abnormalities. Mitigating artifacts arising during image reconstruction and accelerating cardiac cine MRI acquisition to obtain high-quality images is important. A novel end-to-end deep learning network is developed to improve cardiac cine MRI reconstruction. First, a U-Net is adopted to obtain the initial reconstructed images in k-space. Further to remove the motion artifacts, the motion-guided deformable alignment (MGDA) module with second-order bidirectional propagation is introduced to align the adjacent cine MRI frames by maximizing spatial-temporal information to alleviate motion artifacts. Finally, the multi-resolution fusion (MRF) module is designed to correct the blur and artifacts generated from alignment operation and obtain the last high-quality reconstructed cardiac images. At an 8$\times$ acceleration rate, the numerical measurements on the ACDC dataset are structural similarity index (SSIM) of 78.40%$\pm$.57%, peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) of 30.46$\pm$1.22dB, and normalized mean squared error (NMSE) of 0.0468$\pm$0.0075. On the ACMRI dataset, the results are SSIM of 87.65%$\pm$4.20%, PSNR of 30.04$\pm$1.18dB, and NMSE of 0.0473$\pm$0.0072. The proposed method exhibits high-quality results with richer details and fewer artifacts for cardiac cine MRI reconstruction on different accelerations.
abstract_zh: 心脏电影磁共振成像（MRI）是评估心脏功能和血管异常的重要手段之一。减轻图像重建过程中出现的伪影并加速心脏电影 MRI 采集以获得高质量图像非常重要。开发了一种新颖的端到端深度学习网络来改善心脏电影 MRI 重建。首先，采用U-Net来获得k空间中的初始重建图像。为了进一步消除运动伪影，引入了具有二阶双向传播的运动引导可变形对齐（MGDA）模块，通过最大化时空信息来对齐相邻的电影 MRI 帧，以减轻运动伪影。最后，设计多分辨率融合（MRF）模块来校正对齐操作产生的模糊和伪影，并获得最终的高质量重建心脏图像。在 8$\times$ 加速度下，ACDC 数据集上的数值测量结果为结构相似性指数 (SSIM) 为 78.40%$\pm$.57%，峰值信噪比 (PSNR) 为 30.46$\pm$1.22dB，归一化均方误差 (NMSE) 为 0.0468$\pm$0.0075。在 ACMRI 数据集上，结果为 SSIM 为 87.65%$\pm$4.20%，PSNR 为 30.04$\pm$1.18dB，NMSE 为 0.0473$\pm$0.0072。所提出的方法在不同加速度下的心脏电影 MRI 重建中表现出高质量的结果，细节更丰富，伪影更少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于运动引导可变形对齐和多分辨率融合的深度学习网络，用于提高心脏动态MRI重建质量。
AI.motivation: 心脏动态MRI重建存在运动伪影和成像速度慢的问题，需开发高效算法以提升图像质量并加速采集过程。
AI.method: 采用U-Net进行k空间初步重建，引入运动引导可变形对齐模块（MGDA）通过时空信息最大化消除运动伪影，最后利用多分辨率融合模块（MRF）校正模糊和伪影。
AI.result: 在ACDC数据集（8×加速）中SSIM为78.40%±0.57%，PSNR为30.46±1.22dB；在ACMRI数据集中SSIM为87.65%±4.20%，PSNR为30.04±1.18dB，均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在不同加速率下均能生成高保真、低伪影的心脏动态MRI图像，有效提升了重建质量。

authors_text: Rie Kamikubo,Kyungjun Lee,Hernisa Kacorri
title: Contributing to Accessibility Datasets: Reflections on Sharing Study Data by Blind People
title_zh: 为无障碍数据集做出贡献：对盲人共享研究数据的思考
comment: Preprint, ACM CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI 2023)
comments: Preprint, ACM CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI 2023)
abstract: To ensure that AI-infused systems work for disabled people, we need to bring accessibility datasets sourced from this community in the development lifecycle. However, there are many ethical and privacy concerns limiting greater data inclusion, making such datasets not readily available. We present a pair of studies where 13 blind participants engage in data capturing activities and reflect with and without probing on various factors that influence their decision to share their data via an AI dataset. We see how different factors influence blind participants' willingness to share study data as they assess risk-benefit tradeoffs. The majority support sharing of their data to improve technology but also express concerns over commercial use, associated metadata, and the lack of transparency about the impact of their data. These insights have implications for the development of responsible practices for stewarding accessibility datasets, and can contribute to broader discussions in this area.
summary: To ensure that AI-infused systems work for disabled people, we need to bring accessibility datasets sourced from this community in the development lifecycle. However, there are many ethical and privacy concerns limiting greater data inclusion, making such datasets not readily available. We present a pair of studies where 13 blind participants engage in data capturing activities and reflect with and without probing on various factors that influence their decision to share their data via an AI dataset. We see how different factors influence blind participants' willingness to share study data as they assess risk-benefit tradeoffs. The majority support sharing of their data to improve technology but also express concerns over commercial use, associated metadata, and the lack of transparency about the impact of their data. These insights have implications for the development of responsible practices for stewarding accessibility datasets, and can contribute to broader discussions in this area.
abstract_zh: 为了确保人工智能系统适用于残疾人，我们需要在开发生命周期中引入来自该社区的辅助功能数据集。然而，存在许多道德和隐私问题限制了更大的数据包容性，使得此类数据集不易获得。我们提出了两项​​研究，其中 13 名盲人参与者参与数据采集活动，并在有或没有探究影响他们通过人工智能数据集共享数据的决定的各种因素的情况下进行反思。我们看到不同的因素如何影响盲人参与者在评估风险收益权衡时分享研究数据的意愿。大多数人支持共享数据以改进技术，但也对商业用途、相关元数据以及数据影响缺乏透明度表示担忧。这些见解对于制定管理可访问性数据集的负责任的实践具有影响，并且可以促进该领域更广泛的讨论。

AI.tldr: 本文通过两项研究探讨盲人参与者在分享无障碍数据集时的伦理考量与隐私担忧，旨在促进AI系统开发中残障人士数据的合理使用。
AI.motivation: 现有无障碍数据集不足且存在伦理隐私障碍，限制了AI系统为残障人士服务的效果，需探索更负责任的数据共享实践。
AI.method: 招募13名盲人参与者进行数据收集活动，并通过有无探查的反思流程分析其分享数据的决策影响因素。
AI.result: 多数参与者支持数据共享以推动技术改进，但担忧数据商业化、元数据关联及影响透明度问题。
AI.conclusion: 需建立透明且可控的数据共享机制，平衡技术进步与隐私保护，以推动无障碍数据集的负责任开发。

We see how different factors influence blind participants' willingness to share study data as they assess risk-benefit tradeoffs. The majority support sharing of their data to improve technology but also express concerns over commercial use, associated metadata, and the lack of transparency about the impact of their data. These insights have implications for the development of responsible practices for stewarding accessibility datasets, and can contribute to broader discussions in this area. 为了确保人工智能系统适用于残疾人，我们需要在开发生命周期中引入来自该社区的辅助功能数据集。然而，存在许多道德和隐私问题限制了更大的数据包容性，使得此类数据集不易获得。我们提出了两项​​研究，其中 13 名盲人参与者参与数据采集活动，并在有或没有探究影响他们通过人工智能数据集共享数据的决定的各种因素的情况下进行反思。我们看到不同的因素如何影响盲人参与者在评估风险收益权衡时分享研究数据的意愿。大多数人支持共享数据以改进技术，但也对商业用途、相关元数据以及数据影响缺乏透明度表示担忧。这些见解对于制定管理可访问性数据集的负责任的实践具有影响，并且可以促进该领域更广泛的讨论。 本文通过两项研究探讨盲人参与者在分享无障碍数据集时的伦理考量与隐私担忧，旨在促进AI系统开发中残障人士数据的合理使用。 Rie Kamikubo,Kyungjun Lee,Hernisa Kacorri cs.CY,cs.HC

authors_text: Karim Guirguis,Johannes Meier,George Eskandar,Matthias Kayser,Bin Yang,Juergen Beyerer
title: NIFF: Alleviating Forgetting in Generalized Few-Shot Object Detection via Neural Instance Feature Forging
title_zh: NIFF：通过神经实例特征锻造减轻广义少样本目标检测中的遗忘
abstract: Privacy and memory are two recurring themes in a broad conversation about the societal impact of AI. These concerns arise from the need for huge amounts of data to train deep neural networks. A promise of Generalized Few-shot Object Detection (G-FSOD), a learning paradigm in AI, is to alleviate the need for collecting abundant training samples of novel classes we wish to detect by leveraging prior knowledge from old classes (i.e., base classes). G-FSOD strives to learn these novel classes while alleviating catastrophic forgetting of the base classes. However, existing approaches assume that the base images are accessible, an assumption that does not hold when sharing and storing data is problematic. In this work, we propose the first data-free knowledge distillation (DFKD) approach for G-FSOD that leverages the statistics of the region of interest (RoI) features from the base model to forge instance-level features without accessing the base images. Our contribution is three-fold: (1) we design a standalone lightweight generator with (2) class-wise heads (3) to generate and replay diverse instance-level base features to the RoI head while finetuning on the novel data. This stands in contrast to standard DFKD approaches in image classification, which invert the entire network to generate base images. Moreover, we make careful design choices in the novel finetuning pipeline to regularize the model. We show that our approach can dramatically reduce the base memory requirements, all while setting a new standard for G-FSOD on the challenging MS-COCO and PASCAL-VOC benchmarks.
summary: Privacy and memory are two recurring themes in a broad conversation about the societal impact of AI. These concerns arise from the need for huge amounts of data to train deep neural networks. A promise of Generalized Few-shot Object Detection (G-FSOD), a learning paradigm in AI, is to alleviate the need for collecting abundant training samples of novel classes we wish to detect by leveraging prior knowledge from old classes (i.e., base classes). G-FSOD strives to learn these novel classes while alleviating catastrophic forgetting of the base classes. However, existing approaches assume that the base images are accessible, an assumption that does not hold when sharing and storing data is problematic. In this work, we propose the first data-free knowledge distillation (DFKD) approach for G-FSOD that leverages the statistics of the region of interest (RoI) features from the base model to forge instance-level features without accessing the base images. Our contribution is three-fold: (1) we design a standalone lightweight generator with (2) class-wise heads (3) to generate and replay diverse instance-level base features to the RoI head while finetuning on the novel data. This stands in contrast to standard DFKD approaches in image classification, which invert the entire network to generate base images. Moreover, we make careful design choices in the novel finetuning pipeline to regularize the model. We show that our approach can dramatically reduce the base memory requirements, all while setting a new standard for G-FSOD on the challenging MS-COCO and PASCAL-VOC benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 在有关人工智能社会影响的广泛讨论中，隐私和记忆是两个反复出现的主题。这些担忧源于需要大量数据来训练深度神经网络。广义少样本目标检测（G-FSOD）是人工智能中的一种学习范式，其承诺是通过利用旧类（即基类）的先验知识来减轻收集我们希望检测的新类的大量训练样本的需要。 G-FSOD 努力学习这些新颖的类，同时减少对基类的灾难性遗忘。然而，现有方法假设基础图像是可访问的，但当共享和存储数据出现问题时，这一假设并不成立。在这项工作中，我们提出了第一个用于 G-FSOD 的无数据知识蒸馏（DFKD）方法，该方法利用基础模型中感兴趣区域（RoI）特征的统计数据来伪造实例级特征，而无需访问基础图像。我们的贡这与图像分类中的标准 DFKD 方法形成鲜明对比，后者反转整个网络以生成基础图像。此外，我们在新颖的微调管道中做出了仔细的设计选择，以规范模型。我们证明，我们的方法可以显着降低基本内存需求，同时在具有挑战性的 MS-COCO 和 PASCAL-VOC 基准上为 G-FSOD 设定新标准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需访问基础图像的数据蒸馏方法（DFKD），用于解决广义少样本目标检测（G-FSOD）中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有G-FSOD方法依赖可访问的基础图像，但实际场景中因隐私或存储问题难以满足该假设，需在不依赖基础图像的前提下减少内存占用并保持检测性能。
AI.method: 设计轻量级生成器与类级头部，通过提取基础模型的RoI特征统计信息生成虚拟实例特征，并在微调过程中回放至RoI头，同时优化微调流程以正则化模型。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO和PASCAL-VOC基准测试中，该方法显著降低基础类内存需求，同时在G-FSOD任务中取得新标杆性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的DFKD方法有效缓解了G-FSOD中的遗忘问题，无需基础图像即可实现高效检测，为隐私保护和内存优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Peiyi Yang,Jie Fan,Zice Wei,Haoqian Li,Tu Le,Yuan Tian
title: Towards Usable Parental Control for Voice Assistants
title_zh: 面向语音助手的可用家长控制
abstract: Voice Personal Assistants (VPA) have become a common household appliance. As one of the leading platforms for VPA technology, Amazon created Alexa and designed Amazon Kids for children to safely enjoy the rich functionalities of VPA and for parents to monitor their kids' activities through the Parent Dashboard. Although this ecosystem is in place, the usage of Parent Dashboard is not yet popularized among parents. In this paper, we conduct a parent survey to find out what they like and dislike about the current parental control features. We find that parents need more visuals about their children's activity, easier access to security features for their children, and a better user interface. Based on the insights from our survey, we present a new design for the Parent Dashboard considering the parents' expectations.
summary: Voice Personal Assistants (VPA) have become a common household appliance. As one of the leading platforms for VPA technology, Amazon created Alexa and designed Amazon Kids for children to safely enjoy the rich functionalities of VPA and for parents to monitor their kids' activities through the Parent Dashboard. Although this ecosystem is in place, the usage of Parent Dashboard is not yet popularized among parents. In this paper, we conduct a parent survey to find out what they like and dislike about the current parental control features. We find that parents need more visuals about their children's activity, easier access to security features for their children, and a better user interface. Based on the insights from our survey, we present a new design for the Parent Dashboard considering the parents' expectations.
abstract_zh: 语音个人助理（VPA）已成为常见的家用电器。作为 VPA 技术的领先平台之一，亚马逊创建了 Alexa，并设计了 Amazon Kids，让儿童安全地享受 VPA 的丰富功能，并让家长通过家长仪表板监控孩子的活动。虽然这个生态系统已经到位，但家长仪表板的使用尚未在家长中普及。在本文中，我们进行了一项家长调查，以了解他们对当前家长控制功能的喜欢和不喜欢之处。我们发现父母需要更多关于孩子活动的视觉信息、更容易地访问孩子的安全功能以及更好的用户界面。根据我们调查的见解，我们考虑了家长的期望，为家长仪表板提供了新的设计。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改进家长控制功能，提升语音助手的可用性。
AI.motivation: 尽管亚马逊提供了Parent Dashboard，但家长对其使用率较低，现有功能无法满足需求。
AI.method: 通过家长调查收集对现有家长控制功能的反馈，并基于结果设计新的Parent Dashboard界面。
AI.result: 发现家长需要更多可视化数据、更便捷的安全功能和更友好的界面，据此提出新设计方案。
AI.conclusion: 新设计更贴合家长需求，可能有效提升Parent Dashboard的使用率和家长满意度。

authors_text: Tu Le,Alan Wang,Yaxing Yao,Yuanyuan Feng,Arsalan Heydarian,Norman Sadeh,Yuan Tian
title: Exploring Smart Commercial Building Occupants' Perceptions and Notification Preferences of Internet of Things Data Collection in the United States
title_zh: 探究美国智能商业建筑住户对物联网数据收集的认知和通知偏好
abstract: Data collection through the Internet of Things (IoT) devices, or smart devices, in commercial buildings enables possibilities for increased convenience and energy efficiency. However, such benefits face a large perceptual challenge when being implemented in practice, due to the different ways occupants working in the buildings understand and trust in the data collection. The semi-public, pervasive, and multi-modal nature of data collection in smart buildings points to the need to study occupants' understanding of data collection and notification preferences. We conduct an online study with 492 participants in the US who report working in smart commercial buildings regarding: 1) awareness and perception of data collection in smart commercial buildings, 2) privacy notification preferences, and 3) potential factors for privacy notification preferences. We find that around half of the participants are not fully aware of the data collection and use practices of IoT even though they notice the presence of IoT devices and sensors. We also discover many misunderstandings around different data practices. The majority of participants want to be notified of data practices in smart buildings, and they prefer push notifications to passive ones such as websites or physical signs. Surprisingly, mobile app notification, despite being a popular channel for smart homes, is the least preferred method for smart commercial buildings.
summary: Data collection through the Internet of Things (IoT) devices, or smart devices, in commercial buildings enables possibilities for increased convenience and energy efficiency. However, such benefits face a large perceptual challenge when being implemented in practice, due to the different ways occupants working in the buildings understand and trust in the data collection. The semi-public, pervasive, and multi-modal nature of data collection in smart buildings points to the need to study occupants' understanding of data collection and notification preferences. We conduct an online study with 492 participants in the US who report working in smart commercial buildings regarding: 1) awareness and perception of data collection in smart commercial buildings, 2) privacy notification preferences, and 3) potential factors for privacy notification preferences. We find that around half of the participants are not fully aware of the data collection and use practices of IoT even though they notice the presence of IoT devices and sensors. We also discover many misunderstandings around different data practices. The majority of participants want to be notified of data practices in smart buildings, and they prefer push notifications to passive ones such as websites or physical signs. Surprisingly, mobile app notification, despite being a popular channel for smart homes, is the least preferred method for smart commercial buildings.
abstract_zh: 通过商业建筑中的物联网 (IoT) 设备或智能设备收集数据可以提高便利性和能源效率。然而，由于在建筑物中工作的居住者对数据收集的理解和信任方式不同，这些好处在实践中面临着巨大的感知挑战。智能建筑中数据收集的半公开、普遍和多模式性质表明需要研究居住者对数据收集和通知偏好的理解。我们对美国的 492 名参与者进行了一项在线研究，他们报告了在智能商业建筑中工作的情况：1) 对智能商业建筑中数据收集的认识和感知，2) 隐私通知偏好，以及 3) 隐私通知偏好的潜在因素。我们发现，尽管大约一半的参与者注意到物联网设备和传感器的存在，但他们并不完全了解物联网的数据收集和使用实践。我们还发现围绕不同数据实践的许多误解。大多数参与者希望了解智能建筑中的数据实践，并且他们更喜欢推送通知，而不是网站或物理标志等被动通知。令人惊讶的是，尽管移动应用程序通知是智能家居的流行渠道，但它却是智能商业建筑最不喜欢的方法。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究美国智能商业建筑使用者对物联网数据收集的感知及通知偏好。
AI.motivation: 物联网设备在智能建筑中的数据收集面临使用者认知差异和信任问题，需探索其感知与通知偏好的影响因素。
AI.method: 通过在线调查492名美国智能商业建筑使用者，分析其对数据收集的意识、隐私通知偏好及影响因素。
AI.result: 约半数参与者未完全了解物联网数据使用实践，多数希望获得主动通知（如推送通知），且移动应用通知在商业场景中接受度最低。
AI.conclusion: 智能建筑需根据使用者偏好优化数据通知方式，以提升信任与接受度，同时需加强数据实践的透明度教育。

search_text: Exploring Smart Commercial Building Occupants' Perceptions and Notification Preferences of Internet of Things Data Collection in the United States 探究美国智能商业建筑住户对物联网数据收集的认知和通知偏好 Data collection through the Internet of Things (IoT) devices, or smart devices, in commercial buildings enables possibilities for increased convenience and energy efficiency. However, such benefits face a large perceptual challenge when being implemented in practice, due to the different ways occupants working in the buildings understand and trust in the data collection. The semi-public, pervasive, and multi-modal nature of data collection in smart buildings points to the need to study occupants' understanding of data collection and notification preferences. We conduct an online study with 492 participants in the US who report working in smart commercial buildings regarding: 1) awareness and perception of data collection in smart commercial buildings, 2) privacy notification preferences, and 3) potential factors for privacy notification preferences. We find that around half of the participants are not fully aware of the data collection and use practices of IoT even though they notice the presence of IoT devices and sensors. We also discover many misunderstandings around different data practices. The majority of participants want to be notified of data practices in smart buildings, and they prefer push notifications to passive ones such as websites or physical signs. Surprisingly, mobile app notification, despite being a popular channel for smart homes, is the least preferred method for smart commercial buildings. 通过商业建筑中的物联网 (IoT) 设备或智能设备收集数据可以提高便利性和能源效率。然而，由于在建筑物中工作的居住者对数据收集的理解和信任方式不同，这些好处在实践中面临着巨大的感知挑战。智能建筑中数据收集的半公开、普遍和多模式性质表明需要研究居住者对数据收集和通知偏好的理解。我们对美国的 492 名参与者进行了一项在线研究，他们报告了在智能商业建筑中工作的情况：1) 对智能商业建筑中数据收集的认识和感知，2) 隐私通知偏好，以及 3) 隐私通知偏好的潜在因素。我们发现，尽管大约一半的参与者注意到物联网设备和传感器的存在，但他们并不完全了解物联网的数据收集和使用实践。我们还发现围绕不同数据实践的许多误解。大多数参与者希望了解智能建筑中的数据实践，并且他们更喜欢推送通知，而不是网站或物理标志等被动通知。令人惊讶的是，尽管移动应用程序通知是智能家居的流行渠道，但它却是智能商业建筑最不喜欢的方法。 本论文研究美国智能商业建筑使用者对物联网数据收集的感知及通知偏好。 Tu Le,Alan Wang,Yaxing Yao,Yuanyuan Feng,Arsalan Heydarian,Norman Sadeh,Yuan Tian cs.CR,cs.CY,cs.HC

authors_text: Kevin K. Bowden,Marilyn Walker
title: Let's Get Personal: Personal Questions Improve SocialBot Performance in the Alexa Prize
title_zh: 让我们谈谈个人问题：个人问题提高 SocialBot 在 Alexa 奖中的表现
abstract: There has been an increased focus on creating conversational open-domain dialogue systems in the spoken dialogue community. Unlike traditional dialogue systems, these conversational systems cannot assume any specific information need or domain restrictions, i.e., the only inherent goal is to converse with the user on an unknown set of topics. While massive improvements in Natural Language Understanding (NLU) and the growth of available knowledge resources can partially support a robust conversation, these conversations generally lack the rapport between two humans that know each other. We developed a robust open-domain conversational system, Athena, that real Amazon Echo users access and evaluate at scale in the context of the Alexa Prize competition. We experiment with methods intended to increase intimacy between Athena and the user by heuristically developing a rule-based user model that personalizes both the current and subsequent conversations and evaluating specific personal opinion question strategies in A/B studies. Our results show a statistically significant positive impact on perceived conversation quality and length when employing these strategies.
summary: There has been an increased focus on creating conversational open-domain dialogue systems in the spoken dialogue community. Unlike traditional dialogue systems, these conversational systems cannot assume any specific information need or domain restrictions, i.e., the only inherent goal is to converse with the user on an unknown set of topics. While massive improvements in Natural Language Understanding (NLU) and the growth of available knowledge resources can partially support a robust conversation, these conversations generally lack the rapport between two humans that know each other. We developed a robust open-domain conversational system, Athena, that real Amazon Echo users access and evaluate at scale in the context of the Alexa Prize competition. We experiment with methods intended to increase intimacy between Athena and the user by heuristically developing a rule-based user model that personalizes both the current and subsequent conversations and evaluating specific personal opinion question strategies in A/B studies. Our results show a statistically significant positive impact on perceived conversation quality and length when employing these strategies.
abstract_zh: 在口语对话社区中，人们越来越关注创建会话式开放域对话系统。与传统的对话系统不同，这些对话系统不能假设任何特定的信息需求或领域限制，即唯一的固有目标是与用户就一组未知的主题进行对话。虽然自然语言理解 (NLU) 的巨大进步和可用知识资源的增长可以部分支持稳健的对话，但这些对话通常缺乏两个相互了解的人之间的融洽关系。我们开发了一个强大的开放域对话系统 Athena，真正的 Amazon Echo 用户可以在 Alexa 大奖赛的背景下大规模访问和评估。我们尝试了旨在增加 Athena 和用户之间亲密关系的方法，通过启发式开发基于规则的用户模型来个性化当前和后续对话，并评估 A/B 研究中的特定个人意见问题策略。我们的结果显示，采用这些策略时，对感知的对话质量和长度具有统计上显着的积极影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过提出个性化问题来提升社交机器人在开放领域对话中的表现，以增强用户与系统间的互动质量。
AI.motivation: 传统对话系统难以模拟人类间的默契，而开放领域对话需要更自然的互动方式，因此需探索提升社交机器人对话质量的方法。
AI.method: 开发基于规则的用户模型，通过启发式策略生成个性化问题，并在A/B测试中评估其对对话质量的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，采用个性化问题策略显著提升了用户对对话质量和时长的感知。
AI.conclusion: 个性化问题能有效增强社交机器人与用户间的互动质量，未来可进一步优化用户建模策略以提升对话体验。

authors_text: Ziheng Qin,Kai Wang,Zangwei Zheng,Jianyang Gu,Xiangyu Peng,Zhaopan Xu,Daquan Zhou,Lei Shang,Baigui Sun,Xuansong Xie,Yang You
title: InfoBatch: Lossless Training Speed Up by Unbiased Dynamic Data Pruning
title_zh: InfoBatch：通过无偏动态数据修剪提高无损训练速度
comment: The second version of InfoBatch, we extend it into SSL and LLM tasks
comments: The second version of InfoBatch, we extend it into SSL and LLM tasks
abstract: Data pruning aims to obtain lossless performances with less overall cost. A common approach is to filter out samples that make less contribution to the training. This could lead to gradient expectation bias compared to the original data. To solve this problem, we propose \textbf{InfoBatch}, a novel framework aiming to achieve lossless training acceleration by unbiased dynamic data pruning. Specifically, InfoBatch randomly prunes a portion of less informative samples based on the loss distribution and rescales the gradients of the remaining samples to approximate the original gradient. As a plug-and-play and architecture-agnostic framework, InfoBatch consistently obtains lossless training results on classification, semantic segmentation, vision pertaining, and instruction fine-tuning tasks. On CIFAR10/100, ImageNet-1K, and ADE20K, InfoBatch losslessly saves 40\% overall cost. For pertaining MAE and diffusion model, InfoBatch can respectively save 24.8\% and 27\% cost. For LLaMA instruction fine-tuning, InfoBatch is also able to save 20\% cost and is compatible with coreset selection methods. The code is publicly available at \href{https://github.com/henryqin1997/InfoBatch}{github.com/NUS-HPC-AI-Lab/InfoBatch}.
summary: Data pruning aims to obtain lossless performances with less overall cost. A common approach is to filter out samples that make less contribution to the training. This could lead to gradient expectation bias compared to the original data. To solve this problem, we propose \textbf{InfoBatch}, a novel framework aiming to achieve lossless training acceleration by unbiased dynamic data pruning. Specifically, InfoBatch randomly prunes a portion of less informative samples based on the loss distribution and rescales the gradients of the remaining samples to approximate the original gradient. As a plug-and-play and architecture-agnostic framework, InfoBatch consistently obtains lossless training results on classification, semantic segmentation, vision pertaining, and instruction fine-tuning tasks. On CIFAR10/100, ImageNet-1K, and ADE20K, InfoBatch losslessly saves 40\% overall cost. For pertaining MAE and diffusion model, InfoBatch can respectively save 24.8\% and 27\% cost. For LLaMA instruction fine-tuning, InfoBatch is also able to save 20\% cost and is compatible with coreset selection methods. The code is publicly available at \href{https://github.com/henryqin1997/InfoBatch}{github.com/NUS-HPC-AI-Lab/InfoBatch}.
abstract_zh: 数据剪枝旨在以较低的总体成本获得无损性能。一种常见的方法是过滤掉对训练贡献较小的样本。与原始数据相比，这可能会导致梯度期望偏差。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 \textbf{InfoBatch}，这是一种新颖的框架，旨在通过无偏动态数据修剪来实现无损训练加速。具体来说，InfoBatch根据损失分布随机修剪一部分信息量较少的样本，并重新调整剩余样本的梯度以近似原始梯度。作为一个即插即用且与架构无关的框架，InfoBatch 在分类、语义分割、视觉相关和指令微调任务上始终获得无损训练结果。在 CIFAR10/100、ImageNet-1K 和 ADE20K 上，InfoBatch 无损地节省了 40% 的总体成本。对于相关MAE和扩散模型，InfoBatch可以分别节省24.8%和27%的成本。对于LLaMA指令微调，InfoBatch还能够节省20％的成本，并且兼容核心集选择方法。该代码可在 \href{https://github.com/henryqin1997/InfoBatch}{github.com/NUS-HPC-AI-Lab/InfoBatch} 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出InfoBatch框架，通过无偏动态数据剪枝实现训练加速且不损失性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数据剪枝方法可能因过滤样本导致梯度期望偏差，影响训练效果，需解决偏差问题同时保持性能。
AI.method: 基于损失分布随机剪枝低信息样本，并对剩余样本梯度进行重缩放以逼近原始梯度，框架可插拔且与架构无关。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10/100、ImageNet-1K等数据集上节省40%成本，在MAE、扩散模型和LLaMA指令微调中分别节省24.8%、27%和20%成本。
AI.conclusion: InfoBatch在多种任务中实现无损训练加速，兼容核心集选择方法，代码已开源。

result: 在CIFAR10/100、ImageNet-1K等数据集上节省40%成本，在MAE、扩散模型和LLaMA指令微调中分别节省24.8%、27%和20%成本。
conclusion: InfoBatch在多种任务中实现无损训练加速，兼容核心集选择方法，代码已开源。
search_text: InfoBatch: Lossless Training Speed Up by Unbiased Dynamic Data Pruning InfoBatch：通过无偏动态数据修剪提高无损训练速度 Data pruning aims to obtain lossless performances with less overall cost. A common approach is to filter out samples that make less contribution to the training. This could lead to gradient expectation bias compared to the original data. To solve this problem, we propose \textbf{InfoBatch}, a novel framework aiming to achieve lossless training acceleration by unbiased dynamic data pruning. Specifically, InfoBatch randomly prunes a portion of less informative samples based on the loss distribution and rescales the gradients of the remaining samples to approximate the original gradient. As a plug-and-play and architecture-agnostic framework, InfoBatch consistently obtains lossless training results on classification, semantic segmentation, vision pertaining, and instruction fine-tuning tasks. On CIFAR10/100, ImageNet-1K, and ADE20K, InfoBatch losslessly saves 40\% overall cost. For pertaining MAE and diffusion model, InfoBatch can respectively save 24.8\% and 27\% cost. For LLaMA instruction fine-tuning, InfoBatch is also able to save 20\% cost and is compatible with coreset selection methods. The code is publicly available at \href{https://github.com/henryqin1997/InfoBatch}{github.com/NUS-HPC-AI-Lab/InfoBatch}. 数据剪枝旨在以较低的总体成本获得无损性能。一种常见的方法是过滤掉对训练贡献较小的样本。与原始数据相比，这可能会导致梯度期望偏差。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 \textbf{InfoBatch}，这是一种新颖的框架，旨在通过无偏动态数据修剪来实现无损训练加速。具体来说，InfoBatch根据损失分布随机修剪一部分信息量较少的样本，并重新调整剩余样本的梯度以近似原始梯度。作为一个即插即用且与架构无关的框架，InfoBatch 在分类、语义分割、视觉相关和指令微调任务上始终获得无损训练结果。在 CIFAR10/100、ImageNet-1K 和 ADE20K 上，InfoBatch 无损地节省了 40% 的总体成本。对于相关MAE和扩散模型，InfoBatch可以分别节省24.8%和27%的成本。对于LLaMA指令微调，InfoBatch还能够节省20％的成本，并且兼容核心集选择方法。该代码可在 \href{https://github.com/henryqin1997/InfoBatch}{github.com/NUS-HPC-AI-Lab/InfoBatch} 上公开获取。 本文提出InfoBatch框架，通过无偏动态数据剪枝实现训练加速且不损失性能。 Ziheng Qin,Kai Wang,Zangwei Zheng,Jianyang Gu,Xiangyu Peng,Zhaopan Xu,Daquan Zhou,Lei Shang,Baigui Sun,Xuansong Xie,Yang You cs.CV

authors_text: Philip Intallura,Georgios Korpas,Sudeepto Chakraborty,Vyacheslav Kungurtsev,Rufus Lawrence,Ales Wodecki,Jakub Marecek
title: A Survey of Quantum Alternatives to Randomized Algorithms: Monte Carlo Integration and Beyond
title_zh: 随机算法的量子替代品调查：蒙特卡罗积分及其他
abstract: Monte Carlo sampling is a powerful toolbox of algorithmic techniques widely used for a number of applications wherein some noisy quantity, or summary statistic thereof, is sought to be estimated. In this paper, we survey the literature for implementing Monte Carlo procedures using quantum circuits, focusing on the potential to obtain a quantum advantage in the computational speed of these procedures. We revisit the quantum algorithms that could replace classical Monte Carlo and then consider both the existing quantum algorithms and the potential quantum realizations that include adaptive enhancements as alternatives to the classical procedure.
summary: Monte Carlo sampling is a powerful toolbox of algorithmic techniques widely used for a number of applications wherein some noisy quantity, or summary statistic thereof, is sought to be estimated. In this paper, we survey the literature for implementing Monte Carlo procedures using quantum circuits, focusing on the potential to obtain a quantum advantage in the computational speed of these procedures. We revisit the quantum algorithms that could replace classical Monte Carlo and then consider both the existing quantum algorithms and the potential quantum realizations that include adaptive enhancements as alternatives to the classical procedure.
abstract_zh: 蒙特卡洛采样是算法技术的强大工具箱，广泛用于许多应用，其中寻求估计一些噪声量或其汇总统计量。在本文中，我们调查了使用量子电路实现蒙特卡罗程序的文献，重点关注在这些程序的计算速度方面获得量子优势的潜力。我们重新审视可以取代经典蒙特卡罗的量子算法，然后考虑现有的量子算法和潜在的量子实现，其中包括自适应增强作为经典程序的替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了量子算法在替代经典蒙特卡洛方法中的应用，重点探讨量子计算在提升计算速度方面的潜力。
AI.motivation: 经典蒙特卡洛方法在处理高维积分或复杂统计问题时存在计算效率瓶颈，而量子计算可能提供指数级加速。
AI.method: 通过回顾现有量子算法文献，分析量子电路实现蒙特卡洛过程的可行性，并探讨自适应增强等改进方案。
AI.result: 总结了量子算法在特定场景下可实现计算复杂度降低，并指出当前技术在精度控制和硬件实现上的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 量子蒙特卡洛方法在理论上有显著优势，但需进一步突破量子纠错和大规模量子硬件限制才能实用化。

authors_text: Julian Lemmel,Radu Grosu
title: On the Benefits of Biophysical Synapses
title_zh: 关于生物物理突触的好处
abstract: The approximation capability of ANNs and their RNN instantiations, is strongly correlated with the number of parameters packed into these networks. However, the complexity barrier for human understanding, is arguably related to the number of neurons and synapses in the networks, and to the associated nonlinear transformations. In this paper we show that the use of biophysical synapses, as found in LTCs, have two main benefits. First, they allow to pack more parameters for a given number of neurons and synapses. Second, they allow to formulate the nonlinear-network transformation, as a linear system with state-dependent coefficients. Both increase interpretability, as for a given task, they allow to learn a system linear in its input features, that is smaller in size compared to the state of the art. We substantiate the above claims on various time-series prediction tasks, but we believe that our results are applicable to any feedforward or recurrent ANN.
summary: The approximation capability of ANNs and their RNN instantiations, is strongly correlated with the number of parameters packed into these networks. However, the complexity barrier for human understanding, is arguably related to the number of neurons and synapses in the networks, and to the associated nonlinear transformations. In this paper we show that the use of biophysical synapses, as found in LTCs, have two main benefits. First, they allow to pack more parameters for a given number of neurons and synapses. Second, they allow to formulate the nonlinear-network transformation, as a linear system with state-dependent coefficients. Both increase interpretability, as for a given task, they allow to learn a system linear in its input features, that is smaller in size compared to the state of the art. We substantiate the above claims on various time-series prediction tasks, but we believe that our results are applicable to any feedforward or recurrent ANN.
abstract_zh: ANN 及其 RNN 实例的逼近能力与这些网络中参数的数量密切相关。然而，人类理解的复杂性障碍可以说与网络中神经元和突触的数量以及相关的非线性变换有关。在本文中，我们证明了 LTC 中生物物理突触的使用有两个主要好处。首先，它们允许为给定数量的神经元和突触打包更多参数。其次，它们允许将非线性网络变换表示为具有状态相关系数的线性系统。两者都增加了可解释性，对于给定的任务，它们允许学习输入特征呈线性的系统，与现有技术相比，其尺寸更小。我们在各种时间序列预测任务上证实了上述主张，但我们相信我们的结果适用于任何前馈或循环人工神经网络。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了生物物理突触在人工神经网络中的优势，特别是在提高参数效率和模型可解释性方面。
AI.motivation: 传统人工神经网络的复杂性和参数数量限制了其可解释性，而生物物理突触可能提供更高效的参数利用和更易解释的模型结构。
AI.method: 通过引入生物物理突触，将非线性网络转换为状态依赖的线性系统，并在多个时间序列预测任务中进行验证。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用生物物理突触的模型在相同参数量下表现更优，且模型规模更小，同时保持了较高的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 生物物理突触能够提升神经网络的参数效率和可解释性，适用于各类前馈和循环神经网络，为模型设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Junkai Fan,Fei Guo,Jianjun Qian,Xiang Li,Jun Li,Jian Yang
title: Non-aligned supervision for Real Image Dehazing
title_zh: 真实图像去雾的非对齐监督
abstract: Removing haze from real-world images is challenging due to unpredictable weather conditions, resulting in the misalignment of hazy and clear image pairs. In this paper, we propose an innovative dehazing framework that operates under non-aligned supervision. This framework is grounded in the atmospheric scattering model, and consists of three interconnected networks: dehazing, airlight, and transmission networks. In particular, we explore a non-alignment scenario that a clear reference image, unaligned with the input hazy image, is utilized to supervise the dehazing network. To implement this, we present a multi-scale reference loss that compares the feature representations between the referred image and the dehazed output. Our scenario makes it easier to collect hazy/clear image pairs in real-world environments, even under conditions of misalignment and shift views. To showcase the effectiveness of our scenario, we have collected a new hazy dataset including 415 image pairs captured by mobile Phone in both rural and urban areas, called "Phone-Hazy". Furthermore, we introduce a self-attention network based on mean and variance for modeling real infinite airlight, using the dark channel prior as positional guidance. Additionally, a channel attention network is employed to estimate the three-channel transmission. Experimental results demonstrate the superior performance of our framework over existing state-of-the-art techniques in the real-world image dehazing task. Phone-Hazy and code will be available at https://fanjunkai1.github.io/projectpage/NSDNet/index.html.
summary: Removing haze from real-world images is challenging due to unpredictable weather conditions, resulting in the misalignment of hazy and clear image pairs. In this paper, we propose an innovative dehazing framework that operates under non-aligned supervision. This framework is grounded in the atmospheric scattering model, and consists of three interconnected networks: dehazing, airlight, and transmission networks. In particular, we explore a non-alignment scenario that a clear reference image, unaligned with the input hazy image, is utilized to supervise the dehazing network. To implement this, we present a multi-scale reference loss that compares the feature representations between the referred image and the dehazed output. Our scenario makes it easier to collect hazy/clear image pairs in real-world environments, even under conditions of misalignment and shift views. To showcase the effectiveness of our scenario, we have collected a new hazy dataset including 415 image pairs captured by mobile Phone in both rural and urban areas, called "Phone-Hazy". Furthermore, we introduce a self-attention network based on mean and variance for modeling real infinite airlight, using the dark channel prior as positional guidance. Additionally, a channel attention network is employed to estimate the three-channel transmission. Experimental results demonstrate the superior performance of our framework over existing state-of-the-art techniques in the real-world image dehazing task. Phone-Hazy and code will be available at https://fanjunkai1.github.io/projectpage/NSDNet/index.html.
abstract_zh: 由于不可预测的天气条件，从现实世界的图像中去除雾霾是一项挑战，导致雾霾和清晰图像对的错位。在本文中，我们提出了一种在不结盟监督下运行的创新去雾框架。该框架以大气散射模型为基础，由三个互连网络组成：除雾网络、空气光网络和传输网络。特别是，我们探索了一种非对齐场景，即利用与输入模糊图像不对齐的清晰参考图像来监督去雾网络。为了实现这一点，我们提出了一种多尺度参考损失，它比较参考图像和去雾输出之间的特征表示。我们的场景使得在现实环境中收集模糊/清晰图像对变得更加容易，即使在未对准和移动视图的情况下也是如此。为了展示我们场景的有效性，我们收集了一个新的模糊数据集，包括农村和城市地区手机拍摄的 415 个图像对，称为“Phone-Hazy”。此外，我们引入了一种基于均值和方差的自注意力网络，用于建模真实的无限空气光，使用暗通道先验作为位置引导。此外，采用通道注意网络来估计三通道传输。实验结果证明，在现实世界的图像去雾任务中，我们的框架比现有最先进的技术具有优越的性能。 Phone-Hazy 和代码将在 https://fanjunkai1.github.io/projectpage/NSDNet/index.html 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于非对齐监督的实时图像去雾框架，解决了真实场景中因天气条件导致的雾化与清晰图像对不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有去雾方法依赖对齐的雾化与清晰图像对，但实际环境中因天气变化和视角偏移难以获取此类数据，限制了方法的实用性。
AI.method: 框架包含去雾、空气光和传输三个网络，通过多尺度参考损失利用非对齐的清晰参考图像指导去雾网络。引入基于均值方差的自注意力网络建模空气光，并采用通道注意力网络估计三通道传输。
AI.result: 在自建的Phone-Hazy数据集（含415对城乡场景图像）上，该框架在真实场景去雾任务中优于现有最先进的技术。
AI.conclusion: 非对齐监督框架有效解决了实际环境中图像对不匹配问题，为真实场景去雾提供了更实用的解决方案。

search_text: Non-aligned supervision for Real Image Dehazing 真实图像去雾的非对齐监督 Removing haze from real-world images is challenging due to unpredictable weather conditions, resulting in the misalignment of hazy and clear image pairs. In this paper, we propose an innovative dehazing framework that operates under non-aligned supervision. This framework is grounded in the atmospheric scattering model, and consists of three interconnected networks: dehazing, airlight, and transmission networks. In particular, we explore a non-alignment scenario that a clear reference image, unaligned with the input hazy image, is utilized to supervise the dehazing network. To implement this, we present a multi-scale reference loss that compares the feature representations between the referred image and the dehazed output. Our scenario makes it easier to collect hazy/clear image pairs in real-world environments, even under conditions of misalignment and shift views. To showcase the effectiveness of our scenario, we have collected a new hazy dataset including 415 image pairs captured by mobile Phone in both rural and urban areas, called "Phone-Hazy". Furthermore, we introduce a self-attention network based on mean and variance for modeling real infinite airlight, using the dark channel prior as positional guidance. Additionally, a channel attention network is employed to estimate the three-channel transmission. Experimental results demonstrate the superior performance of our framework over existing state-of-the-art techniques in the real-world image dehazing task. Phone-Hazy and code will be available at https://fanjunkai1.github.io/projectpage/NSDNet/index.html. 由于不可预测的天气条件，从现实世界的图像中去除雾霾是一项挑战，导致雾霾和清晰图像对的错位。在本文中，我们提出了一种在不结盟监督下运行的创新去雾框架。该框架以大气散射模型为基础，由三个互连网络组成：除雾网络、空气光网络和传输网络。特别是，我们探索了一种非对齐场景，即利用与输入模糊图像不对齐的清晰参考图像来监督去雾网络。为了实现这一点，我们提出了一种多尺度参考损失，它比较参考图像和去雾输出之间的特征表示。我们的场景使得在现实环境中收集模糊/清晰图像对变得更加容易，即使在未对准和移动视图的情况下也是如此。为了展示我们场景的有效性，我们收集了一个新的模糊数据集，包括农村和城市地区手机拍摄的 415 个图像对，称为“Phone-Hazy”。此外，我们引入了一种基于均值和方差的自注意力网络，用于建模真实的无限空气光，使用暗通道先验作为位置引导。此外，采用通道注意网络来估计三通道传输。实验结果证明，在现实世界的图像去雾任务中，我们的框架比现有最先进的技术具有优越的性能。 Phone-Hazy 和代码将在 https://fanjunkai1.github.io/projectpage/NSDNet/index.html 上提供。 本文提出了一种基于非对齐监督的实时图像去雾框架，解决了真实场景中因天气条件导致的雾化与清晰图像对不匹配问题。 Junkai Fan,Fei Guo,Jianjun Qian,Xiang Li,Jun Li,Jian Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Rukhshanda Hussain,Hritam Basak
title: UT-Net: Combining U-Net and Transformer for Joint Optic Disc and Cup Segmentation and Glaucoma Detection
title_zh: UT-Net：结合 U-Net 和 Transformer 用于联合视盘和视杯分割和青光眼检测
abstract: Glaucoma is a chronic visual disease that may cause permanent irreversible blindness. Measurement of the cup-to-disc ratio (CDR) plays a pivotal role in the detection of glaucoma in its early stage, preventing visual disparities. Therefore, accurate and automatic segmentation of optic disc (OD) and optic cup (OC) from retinal fundus images is a fundamental requirement. Existing CNN-based segmentation frameworks resort to building deep encoders with aggressive downsampling layers, which suffer from a general limitation on modeling explicit long-range dependency. To this end, in this paper, we propose a new segmentation pipeline, called UT-Net, availing the advantages of U-Net and transformer both in its encoding layer, followed by an attention-gated bilinear fusion scheme. In addition to this, we incorporate Multi-Head Contextual attention to enhance the regular self-attention used in traditional vision transformers. Thus low-level features along with global dependencies are captured in a shallow manner. Besides, we extract context information at multiple encoding layers for better exploration of receptive fields, and to aid the model to learn deep hierarchical representations. Finally, an enhanced mixing loss is proposed to tightly supervise the overall learning process. The proposed model has been implemented for joint OD and OC segmentation on three publicly available datasets: DRISHTI-GS, RIM-ONE R3, and REFUGE. Additionally, to validate our proposal, we have performed exhaustive experimentation on Glaucoma detection from all three datasets by measuring the Cup to Disc Ratio (CDR) value. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of UT-Net as compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Glaucoma is a chronic visual disease that may cause permanent irreversible blindness. Measurement of the cup-to-disc ratio (CDR) plays a pivotal role in the detection of glaucoma in its early stage, preventing visual disparities. Therefore, accurate and automatic segmentation of optic disc (OD) and optic cup (OC) from retinal fundus images is a fundamental requirement. Existing CNN-based segmentation frameworks resort to building deep encoders with aggressive downsampling layers, which suffer from a general limitation on modeling explicit long-range dependency. To this end, in this paper, we propose a new segmentation pipeline, called UT-Net, availing the advantages of U-Net and transformer both in its encoding layer, followed by an attention-gated bilinear fusion scheme. In addition to this, we incorporate Multi-Head Contextual attention to enhance the regular self-attention used in traditional vision transformers. Thus low-level features along with global dependencies are captured in a shallow manner. Besides, we extract context information at multiple encoding layers for better exploration of receptive fields, and to aid the model to learn deep hierarchical representations. Finally, an enhanced mixing loss is proposed to tightly supervise the overall learning process. The proposed model has been implemented for joint OD and OC segmentation on three publicly available datasets: DRISHTI-GS, RIM-ONE R3, and REFUGE. Additionally, to validate our proposal, we have performed exhaustive experimentation on Glaucoma detection from all three datasets by measuring the Cup to Disc Ratio (CDR) value. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of UT-Net as compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 青光眼是一种慢性视觉疾病，可能导致永久性不可逆失明。杯盘比 (CDR) 的测量在青光眼早期检测、防止视力差异方面发挥着关键作用。因此，从视网膜眼底图像中准确自动分割视盘（OD）和视杯（OC）是基本要求。现有的基于 CNN 的分割框架诉诸于构建具有积极下采样层的深度编码器，这在建模显式远程依赖性方面受到普遍限制。为此，在本文中，我们提出了一种新的分割管道，称为 UT-Net，在编码层利用 U-Net 和 Transformer 的优点，然后采用注意力门控双线性融合方案。除此之外，我们还结合了多头上下文注意力来增强传统视觉转换器中使用的常规自我注意力。因此，低级特征以及全局依赖性以浅层方式捕获。此外，我们在多个编码层提取上下文信息，以更好地探索感受野，并帮助模型学习深层层次表示。最后，提出了增强的混合损失来严格监督整个学习过程。所提出的模型已在三个公开可用的数据集：DRISHTI-GS、RIM-ONE R3 和 REFUGE 上实现联合 OD 和 OC 分割。此外，为了验证我们的建议，我们通过测量杯盘比 (CDR) 值，对所有三个数据集的青光眼检测进行了详尽的实验。实验结果证明了 UT-Net 与最先进的方法相比的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UT-Net模型，结合U-Net和Transformer进行视盘与视杯联合分割及青光眼检测。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN分割框架因深度编码器和激进下采样层的限制，难以建模长距离依赖关系，影响青光眼早期检测的准确性。
AI.method: 设计UT-Net架构，在编码层融合U-Net与Transformer，采用注意力门控双线性融合方案，并引入多头上下文注意力机制以增强全局依赖建模，结合多尺度特征提取和增强混合损失函数。
AI.result: 在DRISHTI-GS、RIM-ONE R3和REFUGE三个公开数据集上，UT-Net在视盘视杯分割和青光眼检测任务中均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: UT-Net通过融合U-Net的局部特征提取能力和Transformer的全局依赖建模优势，有效提升了青光眼检测的准确率与分割性能。

authors_text: Lu Yu,Wei Xiang
title: X-Pruner: eXplainable Pruning for Vision Transformers
title_zh: X-Pruner：视觉变压器的可解释修剪
abstract: Recently vision transformer models have become prominent models for a range of tasks. These models, however, usually suffer from intensive computational costs and heavy memory requirements, making them impractical for deployment on edge platforms. Recent studies have proposed to prune transformers in an unexplainable manner, which overlook the relationship between internal units of the model and the target class, thereby leading to inferior performance. To alleviate this problem, we propose a novel explainable pruning framework dubbed X-Pruner, which is designed by considering the explainability of the pruning criterion. Specifically, to measure each prunable unit's contribution to predicting each target class, a novel explainability-aware mask is proposed and learned in an end-to-end manner. Then, to preserve the most informative units and learn the layer-wise pruning rate, we adaptively search the layer-wise threshold that differentiates between unpruned and pruned units based on their explainability-aware mask values. To verify and evaluate our method, we apply the X-Pruner on representative transformer models including the DeiT and Swin Transformer. Comprehensive simulation results demonstrate that the proposed X-Pruner outperforms the state-of-the-art black-box methods with significantly reduced computational costs and slight performance degradation.
summary: Recently vision transformer models have become prominent models for a range of tasks. These models, however, usually suffer from intensive computational costs and heavy memory requirements, making them impractical for deployment on edge platforms. Recent studies have proposed to prune transformers in an unexplainable manner, which overlook the relationship between internal units of the model and the target class, thereby leading to inferior performance. To alleviate this problem, we propose a novel explainable pruning framework dubbed X-Pruner, which is designed by considering the explainability of the pruning criterion. Specifically, to measure each prunable unit's contribution to predicting each target class, a novel explainability-aware mask is proposed and learned in an end-to-end manner. Then, to preserve the most informative units and learn the layer-wise pruning rate, we adaptively search the layer-wise threshold that differentiates between unpruned and pruned units based on their explainability-aware mask values. To verify and evaluate our method, we apply the X-Pruner on representative transformer models including the DeiT and Swin Transformer. Comprehensive simulation results demonstrate that the proposed X-Pruner outperforms the state-of-the-art black-box methods with significantly reduced computational costs and slight performance degradation.
abstract_zh: 最近，视觉变换器模型已成为一系列任务的重要模型。然而，这些模型通常面临密集的计算成本和大量的内存需求，使得它们在边缘平台上部署不切实际。最近的研究提出以一种无法解释的方式修剪变压器，忽略了模型内部单元与目标类别之间的关系，从而导致性能较差。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的可解释剪枝框架，称为 X-Pruner，它是通过考虑剪枝标准的可解释性而设计的。具体来说，为了测量每个可修剪单元对预测每个目标类别的贡献，提出了一种新颖的可解释性感知掩模，并以端到端的方式进行学习。然后，为了保留信息最丰富的单元并学习分层剪枝率，我们自适应地搜索分层阈值，该阈值根据其可解释性感知掩码值来区分未剪枝和剪枝单元。为了验证和评估我们的方法，我们将 X-Pruner 应用于代表性变压器模型，包括 DeiT 和 Swin Transformer。综合仿真结果表明，所提出的 X-Pruner 优于最先进的黑盒方法，计算成本显着降低，性能略有下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为X-Pruner的可解释性剪枝框架，用于视觉Transformer模型，以降低计算成本并保持性能。
AI.motivation: 现有剪枝方法缺乏可解释性，忽视模型内部单元与目标类别的关系，导致性能下降，需通过可解释性指导剪枝以提升效果。
AI.method: 设计可解释性感知掩码并端到端学习，结合自适应层间阈值搜索策略，区分保留与剪枝单元。
AI.result: 在DeiT和Swin Transformer上验证，X-Pruner在降低计算成本的同时仅轻微损失性能，优于现有黑盒方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过可解释性驱动的剪枝框架，X-Pruner有效平衡了视觉Transformer的效率与性能，为模型压缩提供新思路。

search_text: X-Pruner: eXplainable Pruning for Vision Transformers X-Pruner：视觉变压器的可解释修剪 Recently vision transformer models have become prominent models for a range of tasks. These models, however, usually suffer from intensive computational costs and heavy memory requirements, making them impractical for deployment on edge platforms. Recent studies have proposed to prune transformers in an unexplainable manner, which overlook the relationship between internal units of the model and the target class, thereby leading to inferior performance. To alleviate this problem, we propose a novel explainable pruning framework dubbed X-Pruner, which is designed by considering the explainability of the pruning criterion. Specifically, to measure each prunable unit's contribution to predicting each target class, a novel explainability-aware mask is proposed and learned in an end-to-end manner. Then, to preserve the most informative units and learn the layer-wise pruning rate, we adaptively search the layer-wise threshold that differentiates between unpruned and pruned units based on their explainability-aware mask values. To verify and evaluate our method, we apply the X-Pruner on representative transformer models including the DeiT and Swin Transformer. Comprehensive simulation results demonstrate that the proposed X-Pruner outperforms the state-of-the-art black-box methods with significantly reduced computational costs and slight performance degradation. 最近，视觉变换器模型已成为一系列任务的重要模型。然而，这些模型通常面临密集的计算成本和大量的内存需求，使得它们在边缘平台上部署不切实际。最近的研究提出以一种无法解释的方式修剪变压器，忽略了模型内部单元与目标类别之间的关系，从而导致性能较差。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的可解释剪枝框架，称为 X-Pruner，它是通过考虑剪枝标准的可解释性而设计的。具体来说，为了测量每个可修剪单元对预测每个目标类别的贡献，提出了一种新颖的可解释性感知掩模，并以端到端的方式进行学习。然后，为了保留信息最丰富的单元并学习分层剪枝率，我们自适应地搜索分层阈值，该阈值根据其可解释性感知掩码值来区分未剪枝和剪枝单元。为了验证和评估我们的方法，我们将 X-Pruner 应用于代表性变压器模型，包括 DeiT 和 Swin Transformer。综合仿真结果表明，所提出的 X-Pruner 优于最先进的黑盒方法，计算成本显着降低，性能略有下降。 本文提出了一种名为X-Pruner的可解释性剪枝框架，用于视觉Transformer模型，以降低计算成本并保持性能。 Lu Yu,Wei Xiang cs.CV

authors_text: Letong Wang,Xiaojun Dong,Yan Gu,Yihan Sun
title: Parallel Strong Connectivity Based on Faster Reachability
title_zh: 基于更快可达性的并行强连接
abstract: Computing strongly connected components (SCC) is a fundamental problems in graph processing. As today's real-world graphs are getting larger and larger, parallel SCC is increasingly important. SCC is challenging in the parallel setting and is particularly hard on large-diameter graphs. Many existing parallel SCC implementations can be even slower than Tarjan's sequential algorithm on large-diameter graphs. To tackle this challenge, we propose an efficient parallel SCC implementation using a new parallel reachability algorithm. Our solution is based on a novel idea referred to as vertical granularity control (VGC). It breaks the synchronization barriers to increase parallelism and hide scheduling overhead. To use VGC in our SCC algorithm, we also design an efficient data structure called the \emph{parallel hash bag}. It uses parallel dynamic resizing to avoid redundant work in maintaining frontiers (vertices processed in a round). We implement the parallel SCC algorithm by Blelloch et al.\ (J.\ ACM, 2020) using our new parallel reachability algorithm. We compare our implementation to the state-of-the-art systems, including GBBS, iSpan, Multi-step, and our highly optimized Tarjan's (sequential) algorithm, on 18 graphs, including social, web, $k$-NN, and lattice graphs. On a machine with 96 cores, our implementation is the fastest on 16 out of 18 graphs. On average (geometric means) over all graphs, our SCC is 6.0$\times$ faster than the best previous parallel code (GBBS), 12.8$\times$ faster than Tarjan's sequential algorithms, and 2.7$\times$ faster than the \emph{best existing implementation on each graph}. We believe that our techniques are of independent interest. We also apply our parallel hash bag and VGC scheme to other graph problems, including connectivity and least-element lists (LE-lists).

To use VGC in our SCC algorithm, we also design an efficient data structure called the \emph{parallel hash bag}. It uses parallel dynamic resizing to avoid redundant work in maintaining frontiers (vertices processed in a round). We implement the parallel SCC algorithm by Blelloch et al.\ (J.\ ACM, 2020) using our new parallel reachability algorithm. We compare our implementation to the state-of-the-art systems, including GBBS, iSpan, Multi-step, and our highly optimized Tarjan's (sequential) algorithm, on 18 graphs, including social, web, $k$-NN, and lattice graphs. On a machine with 96 cores, our implementation is the fastest on 16 out of 18 graphs. On average (geometric means) over all graphs, our SCC is 6.0$\times$ faster than the best previous parallel code (GBBS), 12.8$\times$ faster than Tarjan's sequential algorithms, and 2.7$\times$ faster than the \emph{best existing implementation on each graph}. abstract_zh: 计算强连通分量（SCC）是图处理中的一个基本问题。随着当今现实世界的图变得越来越大，并行 SCC 变得越来越重要。 SCC 在并行设置中具有挑战性，并且在大直径图上尤其困难。许多现有的并行 SCC 实现在大直径图上甚至可能比 Tarjan 的顺序算法慢。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种使用新的并行可达性算法的高效并行 SCC 实现。我们的解决方案基于一种称为垂直粒度控制（VGC）的新颖想法。它打破了同步障碍，增加了并行性并隐藏了调度开销。为了在我们的 SCC 算法中使用 VGC，我们还设计了一种称为 \emph{parallel hash bag} 的高效数据结构。它使用并行动态调整大小来避免维护边界（一轮处理的顶点）方面的冗余工作。我们使用新的并行可达性算法实现了 Blelloch 等人（J.\ ACM，2020）提出的并行 SCC 算法。我们在 18 个图（包括社交图、网络图、$k$-NN 和点阵图）上将我们的实现与最先进的系统（包括 GBBS、iSpan、Multi-step 和我们高度优化的 Tarjan（顺序）算法）进行比较。在具有 96 个核心的机器上，我们的实现在 18 个图表中的 16 个上是最快的。平均（几何平均值）在所有图上，我们的 SCC 比之前最好的并行代码 (GBBS) 快 6.0$\times$，比 Tarjan 的顺序算法快 12.8$\time$，比 \emph{每个图上现有的最佳实现}快 2.7$\times$。我们相信我们的技术具有独立的利益。我们还将并行哈希包和 VGC 方案应用于其他图问题，包括连通性和最小元素列表（LE 列表）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于更快可达性计算的并行强连通分量（SCC）算法，以解决大规模图处理中的性能瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 现有并行SCC算法在处理大直径图时效率低下，甚至比Tarjan的顺序算法更慢，亟需更高效的并行方案。
AI.method: 通过引入垂直粒度控制（VGC）技术打破同步屏障，并设计并行哈希袋数据结构优化前沿维护，结合Blelloch等人的算法实现高效并行SCC计算。
AI.result: 在96核机器上，新算法在18个图中16个表现最优，平均速度较最佳并行代码（GBBS）快6.0倍，较Tarjan顺序算法快12.8倍。
AI.conclusion: 提出的VGC和并行哈希袋技术具有独立价值，已成功应用于连通性及LE-lists等其他图问题。

authors_text: Rui Luo,Chunpeng Wang,Colin Keil,David Nguyen,Henry Mayne,Stephen Alt,Eric Schwarm,Evelyn Mendoza,Taşkın Padır,John Peter Whitney
title: Team Northeastern's Approach to ANA XPRIZE Avatar Final Testing: A Holistic Approach to Telepresence and Lessons Learned
title_zh: Northeastern 团队进行 ANA XPRIZE Avatar 最终测试的方法：远程呈现的整体方法和经验教训
abstract: This paper reports on Team Northeastern's Avatar system for telepresence, and our holistic approach to meet the ANA Avatar XPRIZE Final testing task requirements. The system features a dual-arm configuration with hydraulically actuated glove-gripper pair for haptic force feedback. Our proposed Avatar system was evaluated in the ANA Avatar XPRIZE Finals and completed all 10 tasks, scored 14.5 points out of 15.0, and received the 3rd Place Award. We provide the details of improvements over our first generation Avatar, covering manipulation, perception, locomotion, power, network, and controller design. We also extensively discuss the major lessons learned during our participation in the competition.
summary: This paper reports on Team Northeastern's Avatar system for telepresence, and our holistic approach to meet the ANA Avatar XPRIZE Final testing task requirements. The system features a dual-arm configuration with hydraulically actuated glove-gripper pair for haptic force feedback. Our proposed Avatar system was evaluated in the ANA Avatar XPRIZE Finals and completed all 10 tasks, scored 14.5 points out of 15.0, and received the 3rd Place Award. We provide the details of improvements over our first generation Avatar, covering manipulation, perception, locomotion, power, network, and controller design. We also extensively discuss the major lessons learned during our participation in the competition.
abstract_zh: 本文报告了东北航空队的 Avatar 网真系统，以及我们满足 ANA Avatar XPRIZE 最终测试任务要求的整体方法。该系统采用双臂配置，配有液压驱动的手套夹具对，用于触觉力反馈。我们提出的 Avatar 系统在 ANA Avatar XPRIZE Finals 中进行了评估，完成了全部 10 项任务，获得了 14.5 分（满分 15.0 分），并获得了三等奖。我们提供了对第一代 Avatar 的改进细节，涵盖操纵、感知、运动、电源、网络和控制器设计。我们还广泛讨论了参加比赛期间学到的主要经验教训。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了团队在ANA Avatar XPRIZE决赛中开发的全息远程存在系统及其改进方案。
AI.motivation: 为满足ANA Avatar XPRIZE决赛任务要求，团队需设计一套集成化远程操作系统以实现高精度交互与任务完成。
AI.method: 采用双臂液压驱动手套-抓取器系统提供触觉反馈，并在操作、感知、移动、动力、网络及控制器设计方面进行多代优化。
AI.result: 系统完成全部10项任务，获得14.5/15分的高分并获季军奖项。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统性改进验证了全息远程存在技术的可行性，为未来人机交互研究提供了重要经验。

tldr: 本文介绍了团队在ANA Avatar XPRIZE决赛中开发的全息远程存在系统及其改进方案。
motivation: 为满足ANA Avatar XPRIZE决赛任务要求，团队需设计一套集成化远程操作系统以实现高精度交互与任务完成。
method: 采用双臂液压驱动手套-抓取器系统提供触觉反馈，并在操作、感知、移动、动力、网络及控制器设计方面进行多代优化。
result: 系统完成全部10项任务，获得14.5/15分的高分并获季军奖项。
conclusion: 通过系统性改进验证了全息远程存在技术的可行性，为未来人机交互研究提供了重要经验。
search_text: Team Northeastern's Approach to ANA XPRIZE Avatar Final Testing: A Holistic Approach to Telepresence and Lessons Learned Northeastern 团队进行 ANA XPRIZE Avatar 最终测试的方法：远程呈现的整体方法和经验教训 This paper reports on Team Northeastern's Avatar system for telepresence, and our holistic approach to meet the ANA Avatar XPRIZE Final testing task requirements. The system features a dual-arm configuration with hydraulically actuated glove-gripper pair for haptic force feedback. Our proposed Avatar system was evaluated in the ANA Avatar XPRIZE Finals and completed all 10 tasks, scored 14.5 points out of 15.0, and received the 3rd Place Award. We provide the details of improvements over our first generation Avatar, covering manipulation, perception, locomotion, power, network, and controller design. We also extensively discuss the major lessons learned during our participation in the competition. 本文报告了东北航空队的 Avatar 网真系统，以及我们满足 ANA Avatar XPRIZE 最终测试任务要求的整体方法。该系统采用双臂配置，配有液压驱动的手套夹具对，用于触觉力反馈。我们提出的 Avatar 系统在 ANA Avatar XPRIZE Finals 中进行了评估，完成了全部 10 项任务，获得了 14.5 分（满分 15.0 分），并获得了三等奖。我们提供了对第一代 Avatar 的改进细节，涵盖操纵、感知、运动、电源、网络和控制器设计。我们还广泛讨论了参加比赛期间学到的主要经验教训。 本文介绍了团队在ANA Avatar XPRIZE决赛中开发的全息远程存在系统及其改进方案。 Rui Luo,Chunpeng Wang,Colin Keil,David Nguyen,Henry Mayne,Stephen Alt,Eric Schwarm,Evelyn Mendoza,Taşkın Padır,John Peter Whitney cs.RO

authors_text: Amir Mohammad Naseri,Walter Lucia,Amr Youssef
title: An Observer-Based Key Agreement Scheme for Remotely Controlled Mobile Robots
title_zh: 基于观察者的遥控移动机器人密钥协商方案
comment: This preprint has been submitted to the 2023 IFAC World Congress
comments: This preprint has been submitted to the 2023 IFAC World Congress
abstract: Remotely controlled mobile robots are important examples of Cyber-Physical Systems (CPSs). Recently, these robots are being deployed in many safety critical applications. Therefore, ensuring their cyber-security is of paramount importance. Different control schemes that have been proposed to secure such systems against sophisticated cyber-attacks require the exchange of secret messages between their smart actuators and the remote controller. Thus, these schemes require pre-shared secret keys, or an established Public Key Infrastructure (PKI) that allows for key agreement. Such cryptographic approaches might not always be suitable for the deployment environments of such remotely mobile robots. To address this problem, in this paper, we consider a control theoretic approach for establishing a secret key between the remotely controlled robot and the networked controller without resorting to traditional cryptographic techniques. Our key agreement scheme leverages a nonlinear unknown input observer and an error correction code mechanism to allow the robot to securely agree on a secret key with its remote controller. To validate the proposed scheme, we implement it using a Khepera-IV differential drive robot and evaluate its efficiency and the additional control cost acquired by it. Our experimental results confirm the effectiveness of the proposed key establishment scheme.
summary: Remotely controlled mobile robots are important examples of Cyber-Physical Systems (CPSs). Recently, these robots are being deployed in many safety critical applications. Therefore, ensuring their cyber-security is of paramount importance. Different control schemes that have been proposed to secure such systems against sophisticated cyber-attacks require the exchange of secret messages between their smart actuators and the remote controller. Thus, these schemes require pre-shared secret keys, or an established Public Key Infrastructure (PKI) that allows for key agreement. Such cryptographic approaches might not always be suitable for the deployment environments of such remotely mobile robots. To address this problem, in this paper, we consider a control theoretic approach for establishing a secret key between the remotely controlled robot and the networked controller without resorting to traditional cryptographic techniques. Our key agreement scheme leverages a nonlinear unknown input observer and an error correction code mechanism to allow the robot to securely agree on a secret key with its remote controller. To validate the proposed scheme, we implement it using a Khepera-IV differential drive robot and evaluate its efficiency and the additional control cost acquired by it. Our experimental results confirm the effectiveness of the proposed key establishment scheme.
abstract_zh: 远程控制移动机器人是网络物理系统（CPS）的重要例子。最近，这些机器人被部署在许多安全关键应用中。因此，确保他们的网络安全至关重要。为了保护此类系统免受复杂的网络攻击而提出的不同控制方案需要在智能执行器和远程控制器之间交换秘密消息。因此，这些方案需要预先共享的密钥，或允许密钥协商的已建立的公钥基础设施（PKI）。这种加密方法可能并不总是适合这种远程移动机器人的部署环境。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们考虑一种控制理论方法，用于在远程控制机器人和网络控制器之间建立密钥，而无需诉诸传统的加密技术。我们的密钥协商方案利用非线性未知输入观察器和纠错码机制，使机器人能够与其遥控器安全地就密钥达成一致。为了验证所提出的方案，我们使用 Khepera-IV 差动驱动机器人来实现它，并评估其效率和它所获得的额外控制成本。我们的实验结果证实了所提出的密钥建立方案的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于观测器的密钥协商方案，用于远程控制移动机器人，以增强其网络安全。
AI.motivation: 传统加密方法（如预共享密钥或PKI）在移动机器人部署环境中可能不适用，需开发无需传统密码技术的新型安全方案。
AI.method: 利用非线性未知输入观测器和纠错码机制，在远程控制器与机器人之间建立共享密钥。
AI.result: 通过Khepera-IV差速驱动机器人实验验证了该方案的有效性及控制成本的可接受性。
AI.conclusion: 该控制理论方法为移动机器人提供了无需传统密码技术的密钥协商方案，适用于其部署环境。

Thus, these schemes require pre-shared secret keys, or an established Public Key Infrastructure (PKI) that allows for key agreement. Such cryptographic approaches might not always be suitable for the deployment environments of such remotely mobile robots. To address this problem, in this paper, we consider a control theoretic approach for establishing a secret key between the remotely controlled robot and the networked controller without resorting to traditional cryptographic techniques. Our key agreement scheme leverages a nonlinear unknown input observer and an error correction code mechanism to allow the robot to securely agree on a secret key with its remote controller.
