authors_text: Behnam Khojasteh,Friedrich Solowjow,Sebastian Trimpe,Katherine J. Kuchenbecker
title: Multimodal Multi-User Surface Recognition with the Kernel Two-Sample Test
title_zh: 采用内核二样本测试的多模态多用户表面识别
abstract: Machine learning and deep learning have been used extensively to classify physical surfaces through images and time-series contact data. However, these methods rely on human expertise and entail the time-consuming processes of data and parameter tuning. To overcome these challenges, we propose an easily implemented framework that can directly handle heterogeneous data sources for classification tasks. Our data-versus-data approach automatically quantifies distinctive differences in distributions in a high-dimensional space via kernel two-sample testing between two sets extracted from multimodal data (e.g., images, sounds, haptic signals). We demonstrate the effectiveness of our technique by benchmarking against expertly engineered classifiers for visual-audio-haptic surface recognition due to the industrial relevance, difficulty, and competitive baselines of this application; ablation studies confirm the utility of key components of our pipeline. As shown in our open-source code, we achieve 97.2% accuracy on a standard multi-user dataset with 108 surface classes, outperforming the state-of-the-art machine-learning algorithm by 6% on a more difficult version of the task. The fact that our classifier obtains this performance with minimal data processing in the standard algorithm setting reinforces the powerful nature of kernel methods for learning to recognize complex patterns.
summary: Machine learning and deep learning have been used extensively to classify physical surfaces through images and time-series contact data. However, these methods rely on human expertise and entail the time-consuming processes of data and parameter tuning. To overcome these challenges, we propose an easily implemented framework that can directly handle heterogeneous data sources for classification tasks. Our data-versus-data approach automatically quantifies distinctive differences in distributions in a high-dimensional space via kernel two-sample testing between two sets extracted from multimodal data (e.g., images, sounds, haptic signals). We demonstrate the effectiveness of our technique by benchmarking against expertly engineered classifiers for visual-audio-haptic surface recognition due to the industrial relevance, difficulty, and competitive baselines of this application; ablation studies confirm the utility of key components of our pipeline. As shown in our open-source code, we achieve 97.2% accuracy on a standard multi-user dataset with 108 surface classes, outperforming the state-of-the-art machine-learning algorithm by 6% on a more difficult version of the task. The fact that our classifier obtains this performance with minimal data processing in the standard algorithm setting reinforces the powerful nature of kernel methods for learning to recognize complex patterns.
abstract_zh: 机器学习和深度学习已被广​​泛用于通过图像和时间序列接触数据对物理表面进行分类。然而，这些方法依赖于人类的专业知识，并且需要耗时的数据和参数调整过程。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了一个易于实现的框架，可以直接处理分类任务的异构数据源。我们的数据与数据方法通过从多模态数据（例如图像、声音、触觉信号）提取的两组之间进行内核双样本测试，自动量化高维空间中分布的显着差异。由于该应用程序的工业相关性、难度和竞争基线，我们通过与专门设计的用于视觉-音频-触觉表面识别的分类器进行基准测试来证明我们技术的有效性；消融研究证实了我们管道关键部件的实用性。正如我们的开源代码所示，我们在具有 108 个表面类别的标准多用户数据集上实现了 97.2% 的准确率，在更困难的任务版本上比最先进的机器学习算法高出 6%。事实上，我们的分类器在标准算法设置中以最少的数据处理获得了这种性能，这一事实强化了核方法用于学习识别复杂模式的强大性质。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于核两样本检验的多模态多用户表面识别框架
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖人工特征工程和耗时的数据调参，难以自动化处理多模态异构数据
AI.method: 通过核两样本检验直接比较多模态数据（图像/声音/触觉）的分布差异，无需复杂预处理和参数调优
AI.result: 在标准多用户数据集上达到97.2%准确率，较最佳现有算法提升6%
AI.conclusion: 核方法在少处理条件下仍能有效识别复杂模式，验证了其在工业场景中的应用潜力

authors_text: Seita Nojiri,Toshihiro Nishimura,Kenjiro Tadakuma,Tetsuyou Watanabe
title: Flexible and slim device switching air blowing and suction by a single airflow control
title_zh: 灵活、纤薄的设备通过单一气流控制切换吹风和吸气
abstract: This study proposes a soft robotic device with a slim and flexible body that switches between air blowing and suction with a single airflow control. Suction is achieved by jet flow entraining surrounding air, and blowing is achieved by blocking and reversing jet flow. The thin and flexible flap gate enables the switching. Air flow is blocked while the gate is closed and passes through while the gate is open. The opening and closing of the flap gate are controlled by the expansion of the inflatable chambers installed near the gate. The extent of expansion is determined by the upstream static pressure. Therefore, the gate can be controlled by the input airflow rate. The dimensions of the flap gate are introduced as a design parameter, and we show that the parameter contributes to the blowing and suction capacities. We also experimentally demonstrate that the proposed device is available for a variable friction system and an end effector for picking up a thin object covered with dust.
summary: This study proposes a soft robotic device with a slim and flexible body that switches between air blowing and suction with a single airflow control. Suction is achieved by jet flow entraining surrounding air, and blowing is achieved by blocking and reversing jet flow. The thin and flexible flap gate enables the switching. Air flow is blocked while the gate is closed and passes through while the gate is open. The opening and closing of the flap gate are controlled by the expansion of the inflatable chambers installed near the gate. The extent of expansion is determined by the upstream static pressure. Therefore, the gate can be controlled by the input airflow rate. The dimensions of the flap gate are introduced as a design parameter, and we show that the parameter contributes to the blowing and suction capacities. We also experimentally demonstrate that the proposed device is available for a variable friction system and an end effector for picking up a thin object covered with dust.
abstract_zh: 这项研究提出了一种柔软的机器人设备，其机身纤薄而灵活，可通过单一气流控制在吹气和抽吸之间切换。吸力是通过射流夹带周围空气来实现的，吹气是通过阻挡和反转射流来实现的。薄而灵活的翻板闸门可以实现切换。闸门关闭时气流被阻挡，闸门打开时气流通过。翻板闸门的打开和关闭是通过安装在闸门附近的充气室的膨胀来控制的。膨胀的程度由上游静压决定。因此，浇口可以通过输入气流速率来控制。翻板闸门的尺寸被引入作为设计参数，我们表明该参数对吹气和吸气能力有影响。我们还通过实验证明，所提出的设备可用于可变摩擦系统和末端执行器，用于拾取覆盖着灰尘的薄物体。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种柔性且纤薄的软体机器人装置，通过单一气流控制实现吹气与吸气的切换。
AI.motivation: 传统气动装置通常需要独立的控制系统实现吹气与吸气功能，而本研究旨在开发一种更紧凑、灵活且能通过单一气流控制实现双向功能的装置。
AI.method: 通过设计可开合的薄型翻板门和附近的充气腔室，利用气流静压控制翻板门的开闭状态，从而实现气流方向的切换与功能转换。
AI.result: 实验验证了该装置在可变摩擦系统中的适用性，并成功用于抓取覆盖灰尘的薄型物体，证明了其功能有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该装置通过优化翻板门尺寸等设计参数，实现了单一气流控制下的吹吸切换，为柔性机器人应用提供了新思路。

search_text: Flexible and slim device switching air blowing and suction by a single airflow control 灵活、纤薄的设备通过单一气流控制切换吹风和吸气 This study proposes a soft robotic device with a slim and flexible body that switches between air blowing and suction with a single airflow control. Suction is achieved by jet flow entraining surrounding air, and blowing is achieved by blocking and reversing jet flow. The thin and flexible flap gate enables the switching. Air flow is blocked while the gate is closed and passes through while the gate is open. The opening and closing of the flap gate are controlled by the expansion of the inflatable chambers installed near the gate. The extent of expansion is determined by the upstream static pressure. Therefore, the gate can be controlled by the input airflow rate. The dimensions of the flap gate are introduced as a design parameter, and we show that the parameter contributes to the blowing and suction capacities. We also experimentally demonstrate that the proposed device is available for a variable friction system and an end effector for picking up a thin object covered with dust. 这项研究提出了一种柔软的机器人设备，其机身纤薄而灵活，可通过单一气流控制在吹气和抽吸之间切换。吸力是通过射流夹带周围空气来实现的，吹气是通过阻挡和反转射流来实现的。薄而灵活的翻板闸门可以实现切换。闸门关闭时气流被阻挡，闸门打开时气流通过。翻板闸门的打开和关闭是通过安装在闸门附近的充气室的膨胀来控制的。膨胀的程度由上游静压决定。因此，浇口可以通过输入气流速率来控制。翻板闸门的尺寸被引入作为设计参数，我们表明该参数对吹气和吸气能力有影响。我们还通过实验证明，所提出的设备可用于可变摩擦系统和末端执行器，用于拾取覆盖着灰尘的薄物体。 该论文提出了一种柔性且纤薄的软体机器人装置，通过单一气流控制实现吹气与吸气的切换。 Seita Nojiri,Toshihiro Nishimura,Kenjiro Tadakuma,Tetsuyou Watanabe cs.RO

authors_text: Alisa Allaire,Christopher G. Atkeson
title: Learning Exploration Strategies to Solve Real-World Marble Runs
title_zh: 学习探索策略来解决现实世界的弹珠游戏问题
abstract: Tasks involving locally unstable or discontinuous dynamics (such as bifurcations and collisions) remain challenging in robotics, because small variations in the environment can have a significant impact on task outcomes. For such tasks, learning a robust deterministic policy is difficult. We focus on structuring exploration with multiple stochastic policies based on a mixture of experts (MoE) policy representation that can be efficiently adapted. The MoE policy is composed of stochastic sub-policies that allow exploration of multiple distinct regions of the action space (or strategies) and a high-level selection policy to guide exploration towards the most promising regions. We develop a robot system to evaluate our approach in a real-world physical problem solving domain. After training the MoE policy in simulation, online learning in the real world demonstrates efficient adaptation within just a few dozen attempts, with a minimal sim2real gap. Our results confirm that representing multiple strategies promotes efficient adaptation in new environments and strategies learned under different dynamics can still provide useful information about where to look for good strategies.
summary: Tasks involving locally unstable or discontinuous dynamics (such as bifurcations and collisions) remain challenging in robotics, because small variations in the environment can have a significant impact on task outcomes. For such tasks, learning a robust deterministic policy is difficult. We focus on structuring exploration with multiple stochastic policies based on a mixture of experts (MoE) policy representation that can be efficiently adapted. The MoE policy is composed of stochastic sub-policies that allow exploration of multiple distinct regions of the action space (or strategies) and a high-level selection policy to guide exploration towards the most promising regions. We develop a robot system to evaluate our approach in a real-world physical problem solving domain. After training the MoE policy in simulation, online learning in the real world demonstrates efficient adaptation within just a few dozen attempts, with a minimal sim2real gap. Our results confirm that representing multiple strategies promotes efficient adaptation in new environments and strategies learned under different dynamics can still provide useful information about where to look for good strategies.
abstract_zh: 涉及局部不稳定或不连续动力学（例如分叉和碰撞）的任务在机器人技术中仍然具有挑战性，因为环境的微小变化可能会对任务结果产生重大影响。对于此类任务，学习稳健的确定性策略很困难。我们专注于利用基于可有效适应的混合专家 (MoE) 策略表示的多种随机策略来构建探索。 MoE 策略由允许探索行动空间（或策略）的多个不同区域的随机子策略和指导探索最有希望的区域的高级选择策略组成。我们开发了一个机器人系统来评估我们在现实世界物理问题解决领域中的方法。在模拟中训练 MoE 策略后，现实世界中的在线学习只需几十次尝试即可实现高效适应，并且 sim2real 差距最小。我们的结果证实，代表多种策略可以促进新环境中的有效适应，并且在不同动态下学习的策略仍然可以提供有关在哪里寻找良好策略的有用信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于专家混合（MoE）策略的方法，通过多个随机子策略和高层选择策略，解决现实世界中存在不稳定动力学的大理石跑酷任务。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中涉及不连续动力学的任务（如碰撞）因环境微小变化导致结果显著波动，传统确定性策略难以应对，需探索更鲁棒的策略学习方法。
AI.method: 设计混合专家策略（MoE），包含多个探索不同动作空间区域的随机子策略及高层选择策略，结合模拟训练与真实环境在线学习，减少模拟到现实的差距。
AI.result: 在真实物理环境中，该方法仅需数十次尝试即可高效适应，验证了多策略表示对新环境适应的有效性，不同动力学下的策略仍能提供有用信息。
AI.conclusion: 多策略表示能促进新环境的高效适应，不同动力学条件下学习的策略可为探索优质策略提供指导，适用于现实世界复杂任务。

authors_text: Toshihiro Nishimura,Tsubasa Muryoe,Tetsuyou Watanabe
title: High-payload and self-adaptive robotic hand with 1-degree-of-freedom translation/rotation switching mechanism
title_zh: 具有1自由度平移/旋转切换机构的高负载自适应机械手
abstract: This study proposes a novel robotic hand that can achieve self-adaptive grasping and a large payload (over 20 kg) with a single actuator. Accordingly, two novel mechanisms, an actuation system with self-motion switching and a self-adaptive finger with a self-locking mechanism, are installed in a 1-degree-of-freedom robotic hand. The actuation system switches the output motion from translational to rotational according to the applied external load. The finger is bent by inserting a flexible shaft inside it. Its bending posture can conform to the shape of the object owing to the flexible shaft, and the posture is fixed by a self-locking mechanism, which can be released by the rotational motion of the actuation system. This study presents a mechanical analysis of these mechanisms to achieve the desired behavior. The analysis was validated experimentally, and a robotic hand with these mechanisms were evaluated using grasping tests.
summary: This study proposes a novel robotic hand that can achieve self-adaptive grasping and a large payload (over 20 kg) with a single actuator. Accordingly, two novel mechanisms, an actuation system with self-motion switching and a self-adaptive finger with a self-locking mechanism, are installed in a 1-degree-of-freedom robotic hand. The actuation system switches the output motion from translational to rotational according to the applied external load. The finger is bent by inserting a flexible shaft inside it. Its bending posture can conform to the shape of the object owing to the flexible shaft, and the posture is fixed by a self-locking mechanism, which can be released by the rotational motion of the actuation system. This study presents a mechanical analysis of these mechanisms to achieve the desired behavior. The analysis was validated experimentally, and a robotic hand with these mechanisms were evaluated using grasping tests.
abstract_zh: 这项研究提出了一种新型机器人手，可以通过单个执行器实现自适应抓取和大有效负载（超过20公斤）。因此，在1自由度机械手上安装了两种新颖的机构，即具有自运动切换的致动系统和具有自锁机构的自适应手指。驱动系统根据施加的外部负载将输出运动从平移切换为旋转。通过将柔性轴插入其中来弯曲手指。由于有软轴，其弯曲姿势可以符合物体的形状，并且通过自锁机构固定姿势，可以通过致动系统的旋转运动来释放该姿势。这项研究对这些机制进行了机械分析，以实现所需的行为。该分析经过实验验证，并使用抓取测试评估具有这些机制的机械手。

AI.tldr: 设计一种高负载且自适应的机械手，通过单个执行器和两种新型机制实现自适应抓取和大负载能力。
AI.motivation: 传统机械手难以兼顾高负载和自适应抓取，且结构复杂，需简化设计并提升性能。
AI.method: 设计并整合自适应驱动系统和自锁手指，通过机械分析和实验验证其性能。
AI.result: 实验验证了机制的有效性，机械手通过抓取测试，能够实现自适应抓取和大负载。
AI.conclusion: 该设计实现了高负载和自适应抓取，结构简单，为复杂任务应用提供了可行方案。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该设计实现了高负载和自适应抓取，结构简单，为复杂任务应用提供了可行方案。

tldr: 设计一种高负载且自适应的机械手，通过单个执行器和两种新型机制实现自适应抓取和大负载能力。
motivation: 传统机械手难以兼顾高负载和自适应抓取，且结构复杂，需简化设计并提升性能。
method: 设计并整合自适应驱动系统和自锁手指，通过机械分析和实验验证其性能。
result: 实验验证了机制的有效性，机械手通过抓取测试，能够实现自适应抓取和大负载。
conclusion: 该设计实现了高负载和自适应抓取，结构简单，为复杂任务应用提供了可行方案。
search_text: High-payload and self-adaptive robotic hand with 1-degree-of-freedom translation/rotation switching mechanism 具有1自由度平移/旋转切换机构的高负载自适应机械手 This study proposes a novel robotic hand that can achieve self-adaptive grasping and a large payload (over 20 kg) with a single actuator. Accordingly, two novel mechanisms, an actuation system with self-motion switching and a self-adaptive finger with a self-locking mechanism, are installed in a 1-degree-of-freedom robotic hand. The actuation system switches the output motion from translational to rotational according to the applied external load. The finger is bent by inserting a flexible shaft inside it. Its bending posture can conform to the shape of the object owing to the flexible shaft, and the posture is fixed by a self-locking mechanism, which can be released by the rotational motion of the actuation system. This study presents a mechanical analysis of these mechanisms to achieve the desired behavior. The analysis was validated experimentally, and a robotic hand with these mechanisms were evaluated using grasping tests. 这项研究提出了一种新型机器人手，可以通过单个执行器实现自适应抓取和大有效负载（超过20公斤）。因此，在1自由度机械手上安装了两种新颖的机构，即具有自运动切换的致动系统和具有自锁机构的自适应手指。驱动系统根据施加的外部负载将输出运动从平移切换为旋转。通过将柔性轴插入其中来弯曲手指。由于有软轴，其弯曲姿势可以符合物体的形状，并且通过自锁机构固定姿势，可以通过致动系统的旋转运动来释放该姿势。这项研究对这些机制进行了机械分析，以实现所需的行为。该分析经过实验验证，并使用抓取测试评估具有这些机制的机械手。 设计一种高负载且自适应的机械手，通过单个执行器和两种新型机制实现自适应抓取和大负载能力。 Toshihiro Nishimura,Tsubasa Muryoe,Tetsuyou Watanabe cs.RO

authors_text: Sanyam Vyas,John Hannay,Andrew Bolton,Professor Pete Burnap
title: Automated Cyber Defence: A Review
title_zh: 自动网络防御：回顾
abstract: Within recent times, cybercriminals have curated a variety of organised and resolute cyber attacks within a range of cyber systems, leading to consequential ramifications to private and governmental institutions. Current security-based automation and orchestrations focus on automating fixed purpose and hard-coded solutions, which are easily surpassed by modern-day cyber attacks. Research within Automated Cyber Defence will allow the development and enabling intelligence response by autonomously defending networked systems through sequential decision-making agents. This article comprehensively elaborates the developments within Automated Cyber Defence through a requirement analysis divided into two sub-areas, namely, automated defence and attack agents and Autonomous Cyber Operation (ACO) Gyms. The requirement analysis allows the comparison of automated agents and highlights the importance of ACO Gyms for their continual development. The requirement analysis is also used to critique ACO Gyms with an overall aim to develop them for deploying automated agents within real-world networked systems. Relevant future challenges were addressed from the overall analysis to accelerate development within the area of Automated Cyber Defence.
summary: Within recent times, cybercriminals have curated a variety of organised and resolute cyber attacks within a range of cyber systems, leading to consequential ramifications to private and governmental institutions. Current security-based automation and orchestrations focus on automating fixed purpose and hard-coded solutions, which are easily surpassed by modern-day cyber attacks. Research within Automated Cyber Defence will allow the development and enabling intelligence response by autonomously defending networked systems through sequential decision-making agents. This article comprehensively elaborates the developments within Automated Cyber Defence through a requirement analysis divided into two sub-areas, namely, automated defence and attack agents and Autonomous Cyber Operation (ACO) Gyms. The requirement analysis allows the comparison of automated agents and highlights the importance of ACO Gyms for their continual development. The requirement analysis is also used to critique ACO Gyms with an overall aim to develop them for deploying automated agents within real-world networked systems. Relevant future challenges were addressed from the overall analysis to accelerate development within the area of Automated Cyber Defence.
abstract_zh: 近年来，网络犯罪分子在一系列网络系统内策划了各种有组织、坚决的网络攻击，对私人和政府机构造成了相应的影响。当前基于安全的自动化和编排侧重于自动化固定用途和硬编码解决方案，这些解决方案很容易被现代网络攻击超越。自动网络防御领域的研究将允许通过顺序决策代理自主防御网络系统来开发和实现情报响应。本文通过需求分析，分为两个子领域，即自动化防御和攻击代理以及自主网络操作（ACO）健身房，全面阐述了自动化网络防御的发展。需求分析允许对自动化代理进行比较，并强调 ACO Gyms 对于其持续发展的重要性。需求分析还用于批评 ACO Gyms，总体目标是开发它们以在现实世界的网络系统中部署自动化代理。通过整体分析解决了未来的相关挑战，以加速自动化网络防御领域的发展。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了自动化网络防御的发展，重点分析了自动化防御代理、攻击代理及自主网络操作（ACO）训练场的需求。
AI.motivation: 当前网络安全自动化方案依赖固定规则，难以应对现代复杂攻击，需通过智能代理和训练场提升防御能力。
AI.method: 通过需求分析划分两个子领域，对比自动化代理特性，并对ACO训练场进行批判性评估以指导改进。
AI.result: 明确了自动化代理与ACO训练场的发展需求，指出现有训练场需优化以支持真实网络环境部署。
AI.conclusion: 需解决自动化防御的未来挑战，推动智能代理与训练场技术在实际网络中的应用落地。

authors_text: Karthik Shetty,Annette Birkhold,Srikrishna Jaganathan,Norbert Strobel,Bernhard Egger,Markus Kowarschik,Andreas Maier
title: BOSS: Bones, Organs and Skin Shape Model
title_zh: BOSS：骨骼、器官和皮肤形状模型
abstract: Objective: A digital twin of a patient can be a valuable tool for enhancing clinical tasks such as workflow automation, patient-specific X-ray dose optimization, markerless tracking, positioning, and navigation assistance in image-guided interventions. However, it is crucial that the patient's surface and internal organs are of high quality for any pose and shape estimates. At present, the majority of statistical shape models (SSMs) are restricted to a small number of organs or bones or do not adequately represent the general population. Method: To address this, we propose a deformable human shape and pose model that combines skin, internal organs, and bones, learned from CT images. By modeling the statistical variations in a pose-normalized space using probabilistic PCA while also preserving joint kinematics, our approach offers a holistic representation of the body that can benefit various medical applications. Results: We assessed our model's performance on a registered dataset, utilizing the unified shape space, and noted an average error of 3.6 mm for bones and 8.8 mm for organs. To further verify our findings, we conducted additional tests on publicly available datasets with multi-part segmentations, which confirmed the effectiveness of our model. Conclusion: This works shows that anatomically parameterized statistical shape models can be created accurately and in a computationally efficient manner. Significance: The proposed approach enables the construction of shape models that can be directly applied to various medical applications, including biomechanics and reconstruction.

However, it is crucial that the patient's surface and internal organs are of high quality for any pose and shape estimates. At present, the majority of statistical shape models (SSMs) are restricted to a small number of organs or bones or do not adequately represent the general population. Method: To address this, we propose a deformable human shape and pose model that combines skin, internal organs, and bones, learned from CT images. By modeling the statistical variations in a pose-normalized space using probabilistic PCA while also preserving joint kinematics, our approach offers a holistic representation of the body that can benefit various medical applications. Results: We assessed our model's performance on a registered dataset, utilizing the unified shape space, and noted an average error of 3.6 mm for bones and 8.8 mm for organs. To further verify our findings, we conducted additional tests on publicly available datasets with multi-part segmentations, which confirmed the effectiveness of our model. Conclusion: This works shows that anatomically parameterized statistical shape models can be created accurately and in a computationally efficient manner. Significance: The proposed approach enables the construction of shape models that can be directly applied to various medical applications, including biomechanics and reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 目的：患者的数字双胞胎可以成为增强临床任务的宝贵工具，例如工作流程自动化、患者特定的 X 射线剂量优化、图像引导干预中的无标记跟踪、定位和导航辅助。然而，对于任何姿势和形状估计来说，患者的表面和内部器官的质量至关重要。目前，大多数统计形状模型（SSM）仅限于少数器官或骨骼，或者不能充分代表一般人群。方法：为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种可变形的人体形状和姿势模型，该模型结合了从 CT 图像中学习的皮肤、内脏器官和骨骼。通过使用概率 PCA 对姿势归一化空间中的统计变化进行建模，同时保留关节运动学，我们的方法提供了身体的整体表示，可以使各种医疗应用受益。结果：我们利用统一的形状空间在注册数据集上评估了模型的性能，发现骨骼的平均误差为 3.6 毫米，器官的平均误差为 8.8 毫米。为了进一步验证我们的发现，我们对具有多部分分割的公开数据集进行了额外的测试，这证实了我们模型的有效性。结论：这项工作表明，可以以计算有效的方式准确地创建解剖参数化统计形状模型。意义：所提出的方法可以构建可直接应用于各种医学应用（包括生物力学和重建）的形状模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合骨骼、器官和皮肤的可变形人体形状与姿势模型，用于提升医学影像引导干预等临床任务的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有统计形状模型（SSMs）通常仅涵盖有限器官或骨骼，且无法充分代表一般人群，难以满足临床对高质量表面和内部器官建模的需求。
AI.method: 基于CT图像，通过概率主成分分析（PCA）在归一化姿势空间建模统计变化，同时保留关节运动学，整合皮肤、器官和骨骼的变形模型。
AI.result: 在注册数据集上，骨骼平均误差为3.6mm，器官为8.8mm；公开数据集测试验证了模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: 解剖学参数化统计形状模型可被高效准确构建，适用于生物力学、重建等医疗场景。

ai_content.conclusion: 解剖学参数化统计形状模型可被高效准确构建，适用于生物力学、重建等医疗场景。

Significance: The proposed approach enables the construction of shape models that can be directly applied to various medical applications, including biomechanics and reconstruction. 目的：患者的数字双胞胎可以成为增强临床任务的宝贵工具，例如工作流程自动化、患者特定的 X 射线剂量优化、图像引导干预中的无标记跟踪、定位和导航辅助。然而，对于任何姿势和形状估计来说，患者的表面和内部器官的质量至关重要。目前，大多数统计形状模型（SSM）仅限于少数器官或骨骼，或者不能充分代表一般人群。方法：为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种可变形的人体形状和姿势模型，该模型结合了从 CT 图像中学习的皮肤、内脏器官和骨骼。通过使用概率 PCA 对姿势归一化空间中的统计变化进行建模，同时保留关节运动学，我们的方法提供了身体的整体表示，可以使各种医疗应用受益。结果：我们利用统一的形状空间在注册数据集上评估了模型的性能，发现骨骼的平均误差为 3.6 毫米，器官的平均误差为 8.8 毫米。为了进一步验证我们的发现，我们对具有多部分分割的公开数据集进行了额外的测试，这证实了我们模型的有效性。结论：这项工作表明，可以以计算有效的方式准确地创建解剖参数化统计形状模型。意义：所提出的方法可以构建可直接应用于各种医学应用（包括生物力学和重建）的形状模型。 本文提出一种结合骨骼、器官和皮肤的可变形人体形状与姿势模型，用于提升医学影像引导干预等临床任务的准确性。 Karthik Shetty,Annette Birkhold,Srikrishna Jaganathan,Norbert Strobel,Bernhard Egger,Markus Kowarschik,Andreas Maier cs.CV

authors_text: Amber Li,Tom Silver
title: Embodied Active Learning of Relational State Abstractions for Bilevel Planning
title_zh: 双层规划的关系状态抽象的体现主动学习
abstract: State abstraction is an effective technique for planning in robotics environments with continuous states and actions, long task horizons, and sparse feedback. In object-oriented environments, predicates are a particularly useful form of state abstraction because of their compatibility with symbolic planners and their capacity for relational generalization. However, to plan with predicates, the agent must be able to interpret them in continuous environment states (i.e., ground the symbols). Manually programming predicate interpretations can be difficult, so we would instead like to learn them from data. We propose an embodied active learning paradigm where the agent learns predicate interpretations through online interaction with an expert. For example, after taking actions in a block stacking environment, the agent may ask the expert: "Is On(block1, block2) true?" From this experience, the agent learns to plan: it learns neural predicate interpretations, symbolic planning operators, and neural samplers that can be used for bilevel planning. During exploration, the agent plans to learn: it uses its current models to select actions towards generating informative expert queries. We learn predicate interpretations as ensembles of neural networks and use their entropy to measure the informativeness of potential queries. We evaluate this approach in three robotic environments and find that it consistently outperforms six baselines while exhibiting sample efficiency in two key metrics: number of environment interactions, and number of queries to the expert. Code: https://tinyurl.com/active-predicates

In object-oriented environments, predicates are a particularly useful form of state abstraction because of their compatibility with symbolic planners and their capacity for relational generalization. During exploration, the agent plans to learn: it uses its current models to select actions towards generating informative expert queries. We learn predicate interpretations as ensembles of neural networks and use their entropy to measure the informativeness of potential queries. We evaluate this approach in three robotic environments and find that it consistently outperforms six baselines while exhibiting sample efficiency in two key metrics: number of environment interactions, and number of queries to the expert. Code: https://tinyurl.com/active-predicates
abstract_zh: 状态抽象是一种在具有连续状态和动作、长任务范围和稀疏反馈的机器人环境中进行规划的有效技术。在面向对象的环境中，谓词是一种特别有用的状态抽象形式，因为它们与符号规划器兼容并且具有关系泛化的能力。然而，要使用谓词进行规划，代理必须能够在连续的环境状态下解释它们（即，将符号接地）。手动编程谓词解释可能很困难，因此我们希望从数据中学习它们。我们提出了一种具体的主动学习范式，其中代理通过与专家的在线交互来学习谓词解释。例如，在块堆叠环境中采取操作后，代理可能会询问专家：“On(block1, block2) 为真吗？”从这个经验中，代理学习规划：它学习神经谓词解释、符号规划运算符和可用于双层规划的神经采样器。在探索过程中，代理计划学习：它使用当前模型来选择生成信息丰富的专家查询的操作。我们将谓词解释学习为神经网络的集合，并使用它们的熵来衡量潜在查询的信息量。我们在三个机器人环境中评估了这种方法，发现它始终优于六个基线，同时在两个关键指标上展示了样本效率：环境交互数量和专家查询数量。代码：https://tinyurl.com/active-predicates

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种具身主动学习方法，让智能体在机器人环境中学习关系状态抽象，用于双层规划任务。
AI.motivation: 传统手动编程谓词解释困难，且需适应连续状态空间与稀疏反馈的复杂环境，需从数据中自动学习符号与连续状态的映射关系。
AI.method: 结合神经网络与符号规划，通过主动学习机制向专家提问获取信息，使用神经网络集成与熵值评估查询信息量，实现谓词解释、规划算子与采样器的联合学习。
AI.result: 在三个机器人环境中显著优于六个基线方法，样本效率在环境交互次数和专家查询次数上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了关系状态抽象的自动学习，为复杂机器人任务的双层规划提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Nicholas Konz,Maciej A. Mazurowski
title: Reverse Engineering Breast MRIs: Predicting Acquisition Parameters Directly from Images
title_zh: 乳腺 MRI 逆向工程：直接从图像预测采集参数
comment: Paper accepted at MIDL 2023. Code available at https://github.com/mazurowski-lab/MRI-IAP-prediction
comments: Paper accepted at MIDL 2023. Code available at https://github.com/mazurowski-lab/MRI-IAP-prediction
abstract: The image acquisition parameters (IAPs) used to create MRI scans are central to defining the appearance of the images. Deep learning models trained on data acquired using certain parameters might not generalize well to images acquired with different parameters. Being able to recover such parameters directly from an image could help determine whether a deep learning model is applicable, and could assist with data harmonization and/or domain adaptation. Here, we introduce a neural network model that can predict many complex IAPs used to generate an MR image with high accuracy solely using the image, with a single forward pass. These predicted parameters include field strength, echo and repetition times, acquisition matrix, scanner model, scan options, and others. Even challenging parameters such as contrast agent type can be predicted with good accuracy. We perform a variety of experiments and analyses of our model's ability to predict IAPs on many MRI scans of new patients, and demonstrate its usage in a realistic application. Predicting IAPs from the images is an important step toward better understanding the relationship between image appearance and IAPs. This in turn will advance the understanding of many concepts related to the generalizability of neural network models on medical images, including domain shift, domain adaptation, and data harmonization.
summary: The image acquisition parameters (IAPs) used to create MRI scans are central to defining the appearance of the images. Deep learning models trained on data acquired using certain parameters might not generalize well to images acquired with different parameters. Being able to recover such parameters directly from an image could help determine whether a deep learning model is applicable, and could assist with data harmonization and/or domain adaptation. Here, we introduce a neural network model that can predict many complex IAPs used to generate an MR image with high accuracy solely using the image, with a single forward pass. These predicted parameters include field strength, echo and repetition times, acquisition matrix, scanner model, scan options, and others. Even challenging parameters such as contrast agent type can be predicted with good accuracy. We perform a variety of experiments and analyses of our model's ability to predict IAPs on many MRI scans of new patients, and demonstrate its usage in a realistic application. Predicting IAPs from the images is an important step toward better understanding the relationship between image appearance and IAPs. This in turn will advance the understanding of many concepts related to the generalizability of neural network models on medical images, including domain shift, domain adaptation, and data harmonization.
abstract_zh: 用于创建 MRI 扫描的图像采集参数 (IAP) 对于定义图像外观至关重要。使用某些参数获取的数据训练的深度学习模型可能无法很好地推广到使用不同参数获取的图像。能够直接从图像中恢复此类参数可以帮助确定深度学习模型是否适用，并且可以帮助数据协调和/或领域适应。在这里，我们介绍了一种神经网络模型，该模型可以仅使用图像通过一次前向传递来预测许多复杂的 IAP，这些 IAP 用于生成高精度的 MR 图像。这些预测参数包括场强、回波和重复时间、采集矩阵、扫描仪型号、扫描选项等。即使具有挑战性的参数（例如造影剂类型）也可以高精度预测。我们对我们的模型在新患者的许多 MRI 扫描中预测 IAP 的能力进行了各种实验和分析，并展示了其在实际应用中的用途。从图像预测 IAP 是更好地理解图像外观和 IAP 之间关系的重要一步。这反过来将促进对与医学图像神经网络模型的泛化性相关的许多概念的理解，包括域转移、域适应和数据协调。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种神经网络模型，通过乳腺MRI图像直接预测其图像采集参数（IAPs），以解决深度学习模型泛化性和数据协调问题。
AI.motivation: MRI图像采集参数影响模型泛化能力，参数差异导致模型性能下降，需通过预测参数实现数据协调与领域适应。
AI.method: 设计神经网络模型，通过单次前向传播直接从MRI图像预测包括磁场强度、扫描仪型号、对比剂类型等复杂参数。
AI.result: 模型在新患者MRI数据上实现高精度预测，成功应用于实际场景，验证了参数预测对领域适应和数据协调的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 参数预测为理解图像与参数关系提供新途径，有助于提升医学图像分析中模型的泛化能力与跨领域适应性。

authors_text: Yulei Qiu,Jihong Zhu,Cosimo Della Santina,Michael Gienger,Jens Kober
title: Robotic Fabric Flattening with Wrinkle Direction Detection
title_zh: 具有皱纹方向检测功能的机器人织物整平
comment: Accepted by the 18th International Symposium on Experimental Robotics (ISER 2023)
comments: Accepted by the 18th International Symposium on Experimental Robotics (ISER 2023)
abstract: Deformable Object Manipulation (DOM) is an important field of research as it contributes to practical tasks such as automatic cloth handling, cable routing, surgical operation, etc. Perception is considered one of the major challenges in DOM due to the complex dynamics and high degree of freedom of deformable objects. In this paper, we develop a novel image-processing algorithm based on Gabor filters to extract useful features from cloth, and based on this, devise a strategy for cloth flattening tasks. We also evaluate the overall framework experimentally and compare it with three human operators. The results show that our algorithm can determine the direction of wrinkles on the cloth accurately in simulation as well as in real robot experiments. Furthermore, our dewrinkling strategy compares favorably to baseline methods. The experiment video is available on https://sites.google.com/view/robotic-fabric-flattening/home
summary: Deformable Object Manipulation (DOM) is an important field of research as it contributes to practical tasks such as automatic cloth handling, cable routing, surgical operation, etc. Perception is considered one of the major challenges in DOM due to the complex dynamics and high degree of freedom of deformable objects. In this paper, we develop a novel image-processing algorithm based on Gabor filters to extract useful features from cloth, and based on this, devise a strategy for cloth flattening tasks. We also evaluate the overall framework experimentally and compare it with three human operators. The results show that our algorithm can determine the direction of wrinkles on the cloth accurately in simulation as well as in real robot experiments. Furthermore, our dewrinkling strategy compares favorably to baseline methods. The experiment video is available on https://sites.google.com/view/robotic-fabric-flattening/home
abstract_zh: 可变形物体操纵（DOM）是一个重要的研究领域，因为它有助于自动布料处理、电缆布线、外科手术等实际任务。由于可变形物体的复杂动力学和高自由度，感知被认为是 DOM 的主要挑战之一。在本文中，我们开发了一种基于 Gabor 滤波器的新型图像处理算法，以从布料中提取有用的特征，并在此基础上设计了布料展平任务的策略。我们还通过实验评估了整体框架，并将其与三个人类操作员进行了比较。结果表明，我们的算法可以在模拟以及真实的机器人实验中准确地确定布料上的皱纹方向。此外，我们的除皱策略优于基线方法。实验视频可在 https://sites.google.com/view/robotic-fabric-flattening/home 上观看

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Gabor滤波器的图像处理算法，用于检测布料褶皱方向并实现机器人布料展平。
AI.motivation: 可变形物体操作（DOM）在工业和医疗等领域具有重要应用，但其感知难题（如复杂动态和高自由度）长期制约任务效率。
AI.method: 开发基于Gabor滤波器的特征提取算法，结合褶皱方向检测设计展平策略，并通过实验对比人类操作员验证效果。
AI.result: 算法在仿真和实际机器人实验中均能准确检测褶皱方向，去褶策略性能优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了布料展平中的感知问题，为机器人处理柔性物体提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Laura Zheng,Julio Poveda,James Mullen,Shreelekha Revankar,Ming C. Lin
title: Towards Driving Policies with Personality: Modeling Behavior and Style in Risky Scenarios via Data Collection in Virtual Reality
title_zh: 以个性化推动政策：通过虚拟现实中的数据收集对危险场景中的行为和风格进行建模
abstract: Autonomous driving research currently faces data sparsity in representation of risky scenarios. Such data is both difficult to obtain ethically in the real world, and unreliable to obtain via simulation. Recent advances in virtual reality (VR) driving simulators lower barriers to tackling this problem in simulation. We propose the first data collection framework for risky scenario driving data from real humans using VR, as well as accompanying numerical driving personality characterizations. We validate the resulting dataset with statistical analyses and model driving behavior with an eight-factor personality vector based on the Multi-dimensional Driving Style Inventory (MDSI). Our method, dataset, and analyses show that realistic driving personalities can be modeled without deep learning or large datasets to complement autonomous driving research.
summary: Autonomous driving research currently faces data sparsity in representation of risky scenarios. Such data is both difficult to obtain ethically in the real world, and unreliable to obtain via simulation. Recent advances in virtual reality (VR) driving simulators lower barriers to tackling this problem in simulation. We propose the first data collection framework for risky scenario driving data from real humans using VR, as well as accompanying numerical driving personality characterizations. We validate the resulting dataset with statistical analyses and model driving behavior with an eight-factor personality vector based on the Multi-dimensional Driving Style Inventory (MDSI). Our method, dataset, and analyses show that realistic driving personalities can be modeled without deep learning or large datasets to complement autonomous driving research.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶研究目前面临着风险场景表征的数据稀疏性。这些数据在现实世界中很难以合乎道德的方式获得，而且通过模拟获得也不可靠。虚拟现实 (VR) 驾驶模拟器的最新进展降低了在模拟中解决这一问题的障碍。我们提出了第一个数据收集框架，用于使用 VR 来收集真实人类的危险场景驾驶数据，以及伴随的数字驾驶个性特征。我们通过统计分析验证生成的数据集，并使用基于多维驾驶风格清单 (MDSI) 的八因素个性向量对驾驶行为进行建模。我们的方法、数据集和分析表明，无需深度学习或大型数据集即可对真实的驾驶个性进行建模，以补充自动驾驶研究。

AI.tldr: 通过虚拟现实收集危险场景下的驾驶数据，并建立基于个性特征的驾驶行为模型以补充自动驾驶研究。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶研究面临危险场景数据稀缺的问题，真实世界数据难以获取且模拟数据不可靠，需探索新方法。
AI.method: 设计VR驾驶数据收集框架，结合多维驾驶风格库存（MDSI）的八因素个性向量进行统计分析建模。
AI.result: 验证了无需深度学习或大数据集即可建模真实驾驶个性，为自动驾驶提供了新的行为分析数据支持。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过VR获取的个性化驾驶数据及分析模型，为自动驾驶策略研究提供了有效补充途径。

authors_text: Varsha Suresh,Desmond C. Ong
title: Using Positive Matching Contrastive Loss with Facial Action Units to mitigate bias in Facial Expression Recognition
title_zh: 使用面部动作单元的正匹配对比损失来减轻面部表情识别中的偏差
comment: ef:10th International Conference on Affective Computing and Intelligent Interaction (ACII), 2022
comments: ef:10th International Conference on Affective Computing and Intelligent Interaction (ACII), 2022
abstract: Machine learning models automatically learn discriminative features from the data, and are therefore susceptible to learn strongly-correlated biases, such as using protected attributes like gender and race. Most existing bias mitigation approaches aim to explicitly reduce the model's focus on these protected features. In this work, we propose to mitigate bias by explicitly guiding the model's focus towards task-relevant features using domain knowledge, and we hypothesize that this can indirectly reduce the dependence of the model on spurious correlations it learns from the data. We explore bias mitigation in facial expression recognition systems using facial Action Units (AUs) as the task-relevant feature. To this end, we introduce Feature-based Positive Matching Contrastive Loss which learns the distances between the positives of a sample based on the similarity between their corresponding AU embeddings. We compare our approach with representative baselines and show that incorporating task-relevant features via our method can improve model fairness at minimal cost to classification performance.
summary: Machine learning models automatically learn discriminative features from the data, and are therefore susceptible to learn strongly-correlated biases, such as using protected attributes like gender and race. Most existing bias mitigation approaches aim to explicitly reduce the model's focus on these protected features. In this work, we propose to mitigate bias by explicitly guiding the model's focus towards task-relevant features using domain knowledge, and we hypothesize that this can indirectly reduce the dependence of the model on spurious correlations it learns from the data. We explore bias mitigation in facial expression recognition systems using facial Action Units (AUs) as the task-relevant feature. To this end, we introduce Feature-based Positive Matching Contrastive Loss which learns the distances between the positives of a sample based on the similarity between their corresponding AU embeddings. We compare our approach with representative baselines and show that incorporating task-relevant features via our method can improve model fairness at minimal cost to classification performance.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型会自动从数据中学习歧视性特征，因此很容易学习强相关的偏见，例如使用性别和种族等受保护的属性。大多数现有的偏差缓解方法旨在明确减少模型对这些受保护特征的关注。在这项工作中，我们建议通过使用领域知识明确引导模型将注意力集中在与任务相关的特征上来减轻偏差，并且我们假设这可以间接减少模型对其从数据中学习的虚假相关性的依赖。我们使用面部动作单元（AU）作为任务相关特征来探索面部表情识别系统中的偏见缓解。为此，我们引入了基于特征的正匹配对比损失，它根据相应 AU 嵌入之间的相似性来学习样本正样本之间的距离。我们将我们的方法与代表性基线进行比较，并表明通过我们的方法合并与任务相关的特征可以以最小的分类性能成本提高模型的公平性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合正匹配对比损失和面部动作单元的方法，以减轻面部表情识别中的偏见。
AI.motivation: 现有方法直接减少模型对受保护属性的依赖，但可能影响分类性能。本文认为通过引导模型关注任务相关特征（如面部动作单元）可间接减少偏见，从而在保持性能的同时提升公平性。
AI.method: 引入基于特征的正匹配对比损失，通过比较样本的AU嵌入相似性来学习正样本间的距离，引导模型关注任务相关特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在提升模型公平性的同时，对分类性能的影响极小。
AI.conclusion: 通过引导模型关注任务相关特征可有效减轻偏见，且保持分类性能，为公平性研究提供新思路。

search_text: Using Positive Matching Contrastive Loss with Facial Action Units to mitigate bias in Facial Expression Recognition 使用面部动作单元的正匹配对比损失来减轻面部表情识别中的偏差 Machine learning models automatically learn discriminative features from the data, and are therefore susceptible to learn strongly-correlated biases, such as using protected attributes like gender and race. Most existing bias mitigation approaches aim to explicitly reduce the model's focus on these protected features. In this work, we propose to mitigate bias by explicitly guiding the model's focus towards task-relevant features using domain knowledge, and we hypothesize that this can indirectly reduce the dependence of the model on spurious correlations it learns from the data. We explore bias mitigation in facial expression recognition systems using facial Action Units (AUs) as the task-relevant feature. To this end, we introduce Feature-based Positive Matching Contrastive Loss which learns the distances between the positives of a sample based on the similarity between their corresponding AU embeddings. We compare our approach with representative baselines and show that incorporating task-relevant features via our method can improve model fairness at minimal cost to classification performance. 机器学习模型会自动从数据中学习歧视性特征，因此很容易学习强相关的偏见，例如使用性别和种族等受保护的属性。大多数现有的偏差缓解方法旨在明确减少模型对这些受保护特征的关注。在这项工作中，我们建议通过使用领域知识明确引导模型将注意力集中在与任务相关的特征上来减轻偏差，并且我们假设这可以间接减少模型对其从数据中学习的虚假相关性的依赖。我们使用面部动作单元（AU）作为任务相关特征来探索面部表情识别系统中的偏见缓解。为此，我们引入了基于特征的正匹配对比损失，它根据相应 AU 嵌入之间的相似性来学习样本正样本之间的距离。我们将我们的方法与代表性基线进行比较，并表明通过我们的方法合并与任务相关的特征可以以最小的分类性能成本提高模型的公平性。 本文提出一种结合正匹配对比损失和面部动作单元的方法，以减轻面部表情识别中的偏见。 Varsha Suresh,Desmond C. Ong cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Marc Aiguier,Isabelle Bloch,Salim Nibouche,Ramon Pino Perez
title: Morpho-logic from a Topos Perspective: Application to symbolic AI
title_zh: 拓扑学角度的形态逻辑：在符号人工智能中的应用
abstract: Modal logics have proved useful for many reasoning tasks in symbolic artificial intelligence (AI), such as belief revision, spatial reasoning, among others. On the other hand, mathematical morphology (MM) is a theory for non-linear analysis of structures, that was widely developed and applied in image analysis. Its mathematical bases rely on algebra, complete lattices, topology. Strong links have been established between MM and mathematical logics, mostly modal logics. In this paper, we propose to further develop and generalize this link between mathematical morphology and modal logic from a topos perspective, i.e. categorial structures generalizing space, and connecting logics, sets and topology. Furthermore, we rely on the internal language and logic of topos. We define structuring elements, dilations and erosions as morphisms. Then we introduce the notion of structuring neighborhoods, and show that the dilations and erosions based on them lead to a constructive modal logic, for which a sound and complete proof system is proposed. We then show that the modal logic thus defined (called morpho-logic here), is well adapted to define concrete and efficient operators for revision, merging, and abduction of new knowledge, or even spatial reasoning.
summary: Modal logics have proved useful for many reasoning tasks in symbolic artificial intelligence (AI), such as belief revision, spatial reasoning, among others. On the other hand, mathematical morphology (MM) is a theory for non-linear analysis of structures, that was widely developed and applied in image analysis. Its mathematical bases rely on algebra, complete lattices, topology. Strong links have been established between MM and mathematical logics, mostly modal logics. In this paper, we propose to further develop and generalize this link between mathematical morphology and modal logic from a topos perspective, i.e. categorial structures generalizing space, and connecting logics, sets and topology. Furthermore, we rely on the internal language and logic of topos. We define structuring elements, dilations and erosions as morphisms. Then we introduce the notion of structuring neighborhoods, and show that the dilations and erosions based on them lead to a constructive modal logic, for which a sound and complete proof system is proposed. We then show that the modal logic thus defined (called morpho-logic here), is well adapted to define concrete and efficient operators for revision, merging, and abduction of new knowledge, or even spatial reasoning.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，模态逻辑对于符号人工智能 (AI) 中的许多推理任务非常有用，例如信念修正、空间推理等。另一方面，数学形态学（MM）是一种结构非线性分析理论，在图像分析中得到了广泛的发展和应用。它的数学基础依赖于代数、完备格、拓扑。 MM 和数理逻辑（主要是模态逻辑）之间已经建立了紧密的联系。在本文中，我们建议从拓扑的角度进一步发展和概括数学形态学和模态逻辑之间的联系，即概括空间的范畴结构，以及连接逻辑、集合和拓扑。此外，我们依赖拓扑的内部语言和逻辑。我们将结构元素、膨胀和腐蚀定义为态射。然后我们引入了构造邻域的概念，并证明基于它们的膨胀和腐蚀导致了构造性模态逻辑，并为此提出了健全且完整的证明系统。然后，我们表明，如此定义的模态逻辑（这里称为形态逻辑）非常适合定义具体且有效的运算符，用于修订、合并和推断新知识，甚至空间推理。

AI.tldr: 本文从拓扑斯视角出发，将数学形态学与模态逻辑结合，提出一种适用于符号人工智能的新型逻辑系统——形态逻辑（morpho-logic）。
AI.motivation: 数学形态学在图像分析中广泛应用，而模态逻辑在符号AI中用于信念修订等任务。两者存在潜在联系，但需通过拓扑斯理论进一步系统化整合。
AI.method: 基于拓扑斯的内部语言，将结构元素、膨胀/腐蚀操作定义为范畴论中的态射，引入结构邻域概念，并构建构造性模态逻辑的完备证明系统。
AI.result: 提出形态逻辑（morpho-logic）并证明其完备性，该逻辑可高效实现知识修订、空间推理等符号AI核心任务。
AI.conclusion: 形态逻辑通过拓扑斯理论成功融合数学形态学与模态逻辑，为符号AI提供了新的形式化工具和计算框架。

authors_text: Peihan Li,Lifeng Zhou
title: Assignment Algorithms for Multi-Robot Multi-Target Tracking with Sufficient and Limited Sensing Capability
title_zh: 具有充足和有限感知能力的多机器人多目标跟踪分配算法
abstract: We study the problem of assigning robots with actions to track targets. The objective is to optimize the robot team's tracking quality which can be defined as the reduction in the uncertainty of the targets' states. Specifically, we consider two assignment problems given the different sensing capabilities of the robots. In the first assignment problem, a single robot is sufficient to track a target. To this end, we present a greedy algorithm (Algorithm 1) that assigns a robot with its action to each target. We prove that the greedy algorithm has a 1/2 approximation bound and runs in polynomial time. Then, we study the second assignment problem where two robots are necessary to track a target. We design another greedy algorithm (Algorithm 2) that assigns a pair of robots with their actions to each target. We prove that the greedy algorithm achieves a 1/3 approximation bound and has a polynomial running time. Moreover, we illustrate the performance of the two greedy algorithms in the ROS-Gazebo environment where the tracking patterns of one robot following one target using Algorithm 1 and two robots following one target using Algorithm 2 are clearly observed. Further, we conduct extensive comparisons to demonstrate that the two greedy algorithms perform close to their optimal counterparts and much better than their respective (1/2 and 1/3) approximation bounds.
summary: We study the problem of assigning robots with actions to track targets. The objective is to optimize the robot team's tracking quality which can be defined as the reduction in the uncertainty of the targets' states. Specifically, we consider two assignment problems given the different sensing capabilities of the robots. In the first assignment problem, a single robot is sufficient to track a target. To this end, we present a greedy algorithm (Algorithm 1) that assigns a robot with its action to each target. We prove that the greedy algorithm has a 1/2 approximation bound and runs in polynomial time. Then, we study the second assignment problem where two robots are necessary to track a target. We design another greedy algorithm (Algorithm 2) that assigns a pair of robots with their actions to each target. We prove that the greedy algorithm achieves a 1/3 approximation bound and has a polynomial running time. Moreover, we illustrate the performance of the two greedy algorithms in the ROS-Gazebo environment where the tracking patterns of one robot following one target using Algorithm 1 and two robots following one target using Algorithm 2 are clearly observed. Further, we conduct extensive comparisons to demonstrate that the two greedy algorithms perform close to their optimal counterparts and much better than their respective (1/2 and 1/3) approximation bounds.
abstract_zh: 我们研究分配机器人跟踪目标的问题。目标是优化机器人团队的跟踪质量，这可以定义为目标状态不确定性的减少。具体来说，考虑到机器人的不同传感能力，我们考虑两个分配问题。在第一个分配问题中，单个机器人足以跟踪目标。为此，我们提出了一种贪婪算法（算法 1），该算法为每个目标分配一个机器人及其动作。我们证明贪心算法具有 1/2 近似界限并且在多项式时间内运行。然后，我们研究第二个分配问题，其中需要两个机器人来跟踪目标。我们设计了另一种贪婪算法（算法 2），它将一对机器人及其动作分配给每个目标。我们证明贪心算法达到了 1/3 近似界限并且具有多项式运行时间。此外，我们还说明了两种贪婪算法在 ROS-Gazebo 环境中的性能，其中可以清楚地观察到使用算法 1 跟踪一个目标的一个机器人和使用算法 2 跟踪一个目标的两个机器人的跟踪模式。此外，我们进行了广泛的比较，以证明这两种贪婪算法的性能接近其最佳算法，并且比它们各自的（1/2 和 1/3）近似边界好得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种贪心算法解决多机器人在充足和有限感知能力下的多目标跟踪分配问题，分别处理单机器人和双机器人跟踪目标的场景。
AI.motivation: 优化多机器人团队的跟踪质量，通过减少目标状态不确定性，解决不同感知能力下机器人与目标的高效分配问题。
AI.method: 设计两种贪心算法（Algorithm 1和Algorithm 2），分别针对单机器人和双机器人跟踪需求，证明其近似比（1/2和1/3）及多项式时间复杂度，并在ROS-Gazebo环境中验证性能。
AI.result: 实验表明两种算法性能接近最优解，显著优于理论近似下限，且能清晰展示单/双机器人跟踪模式。
AI.conclusion: 提出的贪心算法在资源受限和充足感知场景下均能有效分配机器人任务，为多目标跟踪提供高效解决方案。

We prove that the greedy algorithm achieves a 1/3 approximation bound and has a polynomial running time. Moreover, we illustrate the performance of the two greedy algorithms in the ROS-Gazebo environment where the tracking patterns of one robot following one target using Algorithm 1 and two robots following one target using Algorithm 2 are clearly observed. Further, we conduct extensive comparisons to demonstrate that the two greedy algorithms perform close to their optimal counterparts and much better than their respective (1/2 and 1/3) approximation bounds. 我们研究分配机器人跟踪目标的问题。目标是优化机器人团队的跟踪质量，这可以定义为目标状态不确定性的减少。具体来说，考虑到机器人的不同传感能力，我们考虑两个分配问题。在第一个分配问题中，单个机器人足以跟踪目标。为此，我们提出了一种贪婪算法（算法 1），该算法为每个目标分配一个机器人及其动作。我们证明贪心算法具有 1/2 近似界限并且在多项式时间内运行。然后，我们研究第二个分配问题，其中需要两个机器人来跟踪目标。我们设计了另一种贪婪算法（算法 2），它将一对机器人及其动作分配给每个目标。我们证明贪心算法达到了 1/3 近似界限并且具有多项式运行时间。此外，我们还说明了两种贪婪算法在 ROS-Gazebo 环境中的性能，其中可以清楚地观察到使用算法 1 跟踪一个目标的一个机器人和使用算法 2 跟踪一个目标的两个机器人的跟踪模式。此外，我们进行了广泛的比较，以证明这两种贪婪算法的性能接近其最佳算法，并且比它们各自的（1/2 和 1/3）近似边界好得多。 本文提出两种贪心算法解决多机器人在充足和有限感知能力下的多目标跟踪分配问题，分别处理单机器人和双机器人跟踪目标的场景。 Peihan Li,Lifeng Zhou cs.RO

authors_text: Timothy Chase Jr,Chris Gnam,John Crassidis,Karthik Dantu
title: You Only Crash Once: Improved Object Detection for Real-Time, Sim-to-Real Hazardous Terrain Detection and Classification for Autonomous Planetary Landings
title_zh: 你只会坠毁一次：改进对象检测，实现实时、模拟到真实的危险地形检测和自主行星着陆分类
comment: To be published in proceedings of AAS/AIAA Astrodynamics Specialist Conference 2022
comments: To be published in proceedings of AAS/AIAA Astrodynamics Specialist Conference 2022
abstract: The detection of hazardous terrain during the planetary landing of spacecraft plays a critical role in assuring vehicle safety and mission success. A cheap and effective way of detecting hazardous terrain is through the use of visual cameras, which ensure operational ability from atmospheric entry through touchdown. Plagued by resource constraints and limited computational power, traditional techniques for visual hazardous terrain detection focus on template matching and registration to pre-built hazard maps. Although successful on previous missions, this approach is restricted to the specificity of the templates and limited by the fidelity of the underlying hazard map, which both require extensive pre-flight cost and effort to obtain and develop. Terrestrial systems that perform a similar task in applications such as autonomous driving utilize state-of-the-art deep learning techniques to successfully localize and classify navigation hazards. Advancements in spacecraft co-processors aimed at accelerating deep learning inference enable the application of these methods in space for the first time. In this work, we introduce You Only Crash Once (YOCO), a deep learning-based visual hazardous terrain detection and classification technique for autonomous spacecraft planetary landings. Through the use of unsupervised domain adaptation we tailor YOCO for training by simulation, removing the need for real-world annotated data and expensive mission surveying phases. We further improve the transfer of representative terrain knowledge between simulation and the real world through visual similarity clustering. We demonstrate the utility of YOCO through a series of terrestrial and extraterrestrial simulation-to-real experiments and show substantial improvements toward the ability to both detect and accurately classify instances of planetary terrain.

A cheap and effective way of detecting hazardous terrain is through the use of visual cameras, which ensure operational ability from atmospheric entry through touchdown. Although successful on previous missions, this approach is restricted to the specificity of the templates and limited by the fidelity of the underlying hazard map, which both require extensive pre-flight cost and effort to obtain and develop. Terrestrial systems that perform a similar task in applications such as autonomous driving utilize state-of-the-art deep learning techniques to successfully localize and classify navigation hazards. Advancements in spacecraft co-processors aimed at accelerating deep learning inference enable the application of these methods in space for the first time. In this work, we introduce You Only Crash Once (YOCO), a deep learning-based visual hazardous terrain detection and classification technique for autonomous spacecraft planetary landings. Through the use of unsupervised domain adaptation we tailor YOCO for training by simulation, removing the need for real-world annotated data and expensive mission surveying phases. We further improve the transfer of representative terrain knowledge between simulation and the real world through visual similarity clustering. We demonstrate the utility of YOCO through a series of terrestrial and extraterrestrial simulation-to-real experiments and show substantial improvements toward the ability to both detect and accurately classify instances of planetary terrain.
abstract_zh: 航天器行星着陆期间危险地形的检测对于确保飞行器安全和任务成功起着至关重要的作用。检测危险地形的一种廉价而有效的方法是使用视觉摄像机，它确保从进入大气层到着陆的操作能力。受资源限制和计算能力有限的困扰，视觉危险地形检测的传统技术侧重于模板匹配和注册到预先构建的危险地图。尽管在之前的任务中取得了成功，但这种方法受到模板的特殊性和潜在危险地图的保真度的限制，这两者都需要大量的飞行前成本和努力来获取和开发。在自动驾驶等应用中执行类似任务的地面系统利用最先进的深度学习技术来成功定位和分类导航危险。旨在加速深度学习推理的航天器协处理器的进步首次使这些方法能够在太空中应用。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 You Only Crash Once (YOCO)，这是一种基于深度学习的视觉危险地形检测和分类技术，用于自主航天器行星着陆。通过使用无监督领域适应，我们通过模拟定制 YOCO 进行训练，从而消除了对现实世界注释数据和昂贵的任务测量阶段的需要。我们通过视觉相似度聚类进一步改进了模拟与现实世界之间代表性地形知识的传输。我们通过一系列陆地和外星模拟真实实验展示了 YOCO 的实用性，并展示了 YOCO 在检测和准确分类行星地形实例的能力方面的重大改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的视觉方法YOCO，用于自主航天器行星着陆时的危险地形实时检测与分类。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖模板匹配和预构建危险地图，受限于计算资源和预飞行数据获取成本，难以适应复杂地形变化。
AI.method: 通过无监督域适应技术，利用仿真数据训练模型，结合视觉相似性聚类提升仿真与真实环境间的知识迁移能力。
AI.result: 在地表和外星体仿真-真实实验中验证了YOCO的有效性，显著提升了危险地形检测与分类的准确性。
AI.conclusion: YOCO为自主行星着陆提供了高效、低成本的危险地形识别方案，减少了对预飞行数据的依赖并提升了实时性能。

authors_text: Pengyu Chu,Zhaojian Li,Kaixiang Zhang,Dong Chen,Kyle Lammers,Renfu Lu
title: O2RNet: Occluder-Occludee Relational Network for Robust Apple Detection in Clustered Orchard Environments
title_zh: O2RNet：遮挡物-被遮挡物关系网络，用于集群果园环境中的鲁棒苹果检测
abstract: Automated apple harvesting has attracted significant research interest in recent years due to its potential to revolutionize the apple industry, addressing the issues of shortage and high costs in labor. One key technology to fully enable efficient automated harvesting is accurate and robust apple detection, which is challenging due to complex orchard environments that involve varying lighting conditions and foliage/branch occlusions. Furthermore, clustered apples are common in the orchard, which brings additional challenges as the clustered apples may be identified as one apple. This will cause issues in localization for subsequent robotic operations. In this paper, we present the development of a novel deep learning-based apple detection framework, Occluder-Occludee Relational Network (O2RNet), for robust detection of apples in such clustered environments. This network exploits the occuluder-occludee relationship modeling head by introducing a feature expansion structure to enable the combination of layered traditional detectors to split clustered apples and foliage occlusions. More specifically, we collect a comprehensive apple orchard image dataset under different lighting conditions (overcast, front lighting, and back lighting) with frequent apple occlusions. We then develop a novel occlusion-aware network for apple detection, in which a feature expansion structure is incorporated into the convolutional neural networks to extract additional features generated by the original network for occluded apples. Comprehensive evaluations are performed, which show that the developed O2RNet outperforms state-of-the-art models with a higher accuracy of 94\% and a higher F1-score of 0.88 on apple detection.
summary: Automated apple harvesting has attracted significant research interest in recent years due to its potential to revolutionize the apple industry, addressing the issues of shortage and high costs in labor. One key technology to fully enable efficient automated harvesting is accurate and robust apple detection, which is challenging due to complex orchard environments that involve varying lighting conditions and foliage/branch occlusions. Furthermore, clustered apples are common in the orchard, which brings additional challenges as the clustered apples may be identified as one apple. This will cause issues in localization for subsequent robotic operations. In this paper, we present the development of a novel deep learning-based apple detection framework, Occluder-Occludee Relational Network (O2RNet), for robust detection of apples in such clustered environments. This network exploits the occuluder-occludee relationship modeling head by introducing a feature expansion structure to enable the combination of layered traditional detectors to split clustered apples and foliage occlusions. More specifically, we collect a comprehensive apple orchard image dataset under different lighting conditions (overcast, front lighting, and back lighting) with frequent apple occlusions. We then develop a novel occlusion-aware network for apple detection, in which a feature expansion structure is incorporated into the convolutional neural networks to extract additional features generated by the original network for occluded apples. Comprehensive evaluations are performed, which show that the developed O2RNet outperforms state-of-the-art models with a higher accuracy of 94\% and a higher F1-score of 0.88 on apple detection.
abstract_zh: 近年来，自动化苹果采摘因其具有彻底改变苹果产业、解决劳动力短缺和高成本问题的潜力而引起了人们的广泛研究兴趣。完全实现高效自动化采收的一项关键技术是准确而强大的苹果检测，由于复杂的果园环境涉及不同的光照条件和树叶/树枝遮挡，这一技术具有挑战性。此外，果园中簇状苹果很常见，这带来了额外的挑战，因为簇状苹果可能被识别为一个苹果。这将导致后续机器人操作的定位问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的新型苹果检测框架的开发，即遮挡物-被遮挡物关系网络（O2RNet），用于在此类集群环境中对苹果进行稳健检测。该网络通过引入特征扩展结构来利用遮挡物-被遮挡物关系建模头，使分层传统检测器的组合能够分割集群的苹果和树叶遮挡。更具体地说，我们收集了不同照明条件（阴天、正面照明和背光）下频繁出现苹果遮挡的综合苹果园图像数据集。然后，我们开发了一种用于苹果检测的新型遮挡感知网络，其中将特征扩展结构合并到卷积神经网络中，以提取原始网络为遮挡苹果生成的附加特征。综合评估表明，所开发的 O2RNet 在苹果检测方面优于最先进的模型，准确率高达 94%，F1 分数高达 0.88。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为O2RNet的深度学习框架，用于在复杂果园环境中实现对密集分布苹果的鲁棒检测。
AI.motivation: 自动化苹果采摘需要解决果园中光照变化、枝叶遮挡及苹果密集分布导致的检测难题，传统方法难以准确识别被遮挡或聚集的苹果。
AI.method: 设计了基于遮挡关系建模的O2RNet网络，引入特征扩展结构结合多层传统检测器，通过采集不同光照条件下的果园图像数据集训练遮挡感知模型。
AI.result: 在测试中O2RNet达到94%的检测准确率和0.88的F1分数，优于现有先进模型。
AI.conclusion: O2RNet通过建模遮挡关系有效解决了密集果园中苹果检测的挑战，为自动化采摘提供了可靠的技术支持。

More specifically, we collect a comprehensive apple orchard image dataset under different lighting conditions (overcast, front lighting, and back lighting) with frequent apple occlusions. We then develop a novel occlusion-aware network for apple detection, in which a feature expansion structure is incorporated into the convolutional neural networks to extract additional features generated by the original network for occluded apples. Comprehensive evaluations are performed, which show that the developed O2RNet outperforms state-of-the-art models with a higher accuracy of 94\% and a higher F1-score of 0.88 on apple detection. 近年来，自动化苹果采摘因其具有彻底改变苹果产业、解决劳动力短缺和高成本问题的潜力而引起了人们的广泛研究兴趣。完全实现高效自动化采收的一项关键技术是准确而强大的苹果检测，由于复杂的果园环境涉及不同的光照条件和树叶/树枝遮挡，这一技术具有挑战性。此外，果园中簇状苹果很常见，这带来了额外的挑战，因为簇状苹果可能被识别为一个苹果。这将导致后续机器人操作的定位问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的新型苹果检测框架的开发，即遮挡物-被遮挡物关系网络（O2RNet），用于在此类集群环境中对苹果进行稳健检测。该网络通过引入特征扩展结构来利用遮挡物-被遮挡物关系建模头，使分层传统检测器的组合能够分割集群的苹果和树叶遮挡。更具体地说，我们收集了不同照明条件（阴天、正面照明和背光）下频繁出现苹果遮挡的综合苹果园图像数据集。然后，我们开发了一种用于苹果检测的新型遮挡感知网络，其中将特征扩展结构合并到卷积神经网络中，以提取原始网络为遮挡苹果生成的附加特征。综合评估表明，所开发的 O2RNet 在苹果检测方面优于最先进的模型，准确率高达 94%，F1 分数高达 0.88。 本文提出了一种名为O2RNet的深度学习框架，用于在复杂果园环境中实现对密集分布苹果的鲁棒检测。 Pengyu Chu,Zhaojian Li,Kaixiang Zhang,Dong Chen,Kyle Lammers,Renfu Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Georgios Andreadis,Peter A. N. Bosman,Tanja Alderliesten
title: MOREA: a GPU-accelerated Evolutionary Algorithm for Multi-Objective Deformable Registration of 3D Medical Images
title_zh: MOREA：用于 3D 医学图像多目标变形配准的 GPU 加速进化算法
abstract: Finding a realistic deformation that transforms one image into another, in case large deformations are required, is considered a key challenge in medical image analysis. Having a proper image registration approach to achieve this could unleash a number of applications requiring information to be transferred between images. Clinical adoption is currently hampered by many existing methods requiring extensive configuration effort before each use, or not being able to (realistically) capture large deformations. A recent multi-objective approach that uses the Multi-Objective Real-Valued Gene-pool Optimal Mixing Evolutionary Algorithm (MO-RV-GOMEA) and a dual-dynamic mesh transformation model has shown promise, exposing the trade-offs inherent to image registration problems and modeling large deformations in 2D. This work builds on this promise and introduces MOREA: the first evolutionary algorithm-based multi-objective approach to deformable registration of 3D images capable of tackling large deformations. MOREA includes a 3D biomechanical mesh model for physical plausibility and is fully GPU-accelerated. We compare MOREA to two state-of-the-art approaches on abdominal CT scans of 4 cervical cancer patients, with the latter two approaches configured for the best results per patient. Without requiring per-patient configuration, MOREA significantly outperforms these approaches on 3 of the 4 patients that represent the most difficult cases.
summary: Finding a realistic deformation that transforms one image into another, in case large deformations are required, is considered a key challenge in medical image analysis. Having a proper image registration approach to achieve this could unleash a number of applications requiring information to be transferred between images. Clinical adoption is currently hampered by many existing methods requiring extensive configuration effort before each use, or not being able to (realistically) capture large deformations. A recent multi-objective approach that uses the Multi-Objective Real-Valued Gene-pool Optimal Mixing Evolutionary Algorithm (MO-RV-GOMEA) and a dual-dynamic mesh transformation model has shown promise, exposing the trade-offs inherent to image registration problems and modeling large deformations in 2D. This work builds on this promise and introduces MOREA: the first evolutionary algorithm-based multi-objective approach to deformable registration of 3D images capable of tackling large deformations. MOREA includes a 3D biomechanical mesh model for physical plausibility and is fully GPU-accelerated. We compare MOREA to two state-of-the-art approaches on abdominal CT scans of 4 cervical cancer patients, with the latter two approaches configured for the best results per patient. Without requiring per-patient configuration, MOREA significantly outperforms these approaches on 3 of the 4 patients that represent the most difficult cases.
abstract_zh: 在需要大变形的情况下，找到将一幅图像转换为另一幅图像的真实变形被认为是医学图像分析中的一个关键挑战。拥有适当的图像配准方法来实现这一点可能会释放出许多需要在图像之间传输信息的应用程序。目前，许多现有方法需要在每次使用前进行大量配置工作，或者无法（实际）捕获大变形，这阻碍了临床采用。最近一种使用多目标实值基因库最优混合进化算法 (MO-RV-GOMEA) 和双动态网格变换模型的多目标方法已显示出前景，揭示了图像配准问题固有的权衡，并在 2D 中对大变形进行建模。这项工作建立在这一承诺的基础上，并引入了 MOREA：第一个基于进化算法的多目标方法，用于 3D 图像的变形配准，能够处理大变形。 MOREA 包含一个 3D 生物力学网格模型，可实现物理合理性，并且完全由 GPU 加速。我们将 MOREA 与对 4 名宫颈癌患者进行腹部 CT 扫描的两种最先进方法进行比较，后两种方法针对每位患者的最佳结果进行了配置。无需针对每个患者进行配置，对于代表最困难病例的 4 名患者中的 3 名，MOREA 的性能显着优于这些方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MOREA，一种基于进化算法的多目标三维医学图像可变形配准方法，通过GPU加速解决大变形问题。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像配准方法配置复杂或无法有效处理大变形，限制了临床应用。需开发更高效且无需复杂配置的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合多目标进化算法MO-RV-GOMEA与3D生物力学网格模型，采用GPU加速计算，并引入双动态网格变换模型以捕捉大变形。
AI.result: 在4例腹部CT扫描数据中，MOREA无需逐患者配置即可显著优于现有方法，尤其在3例最难病例中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: MOREA作为首个GPU加速的多目标3D配准算法，有效解决了大变形配准难题，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Arthur Moreau,Nathan Piasco,Moussab Bennehar,Dzmitry Tsishkou,Bogdan Stanciulescu,Arnaud de La Fortelle
title: CROSSFIRE: Camera Relocalization On Self-Supervised Features from an Implicit Representation
title_zh: CROSSFIRE：来自隐式表示的自监督特征的相机重新定位
abstract: Beyond novel view synthesis, Neural Radiance Fields are useful for applications that interact with the real world. In this paper, we use them as an implicit map of a given scene and propose a camera relocalization algorithm tailored for this representation. The proposed method enables to compute in real-time the precise position of a device using a single RGB camera, during its navigation. In contrast with previous work, we do not rely on pose regression or photometric alignment but rather use dense local features obtained through volumetric rendering which are specialized on the scene with a self-supervised objective. As a result, our algorithm is more accurate than competitors, able to operate in dynamic outdoor environments with changing lightning conditions and can be readily integrated in any volumetric neural renderer.
summary: Beyond novel view synthesis, Neural Radiance Fields are useful for applications that interact with the real world. In this paper, we use them as an implicit map of a given scene and propose a camera relocalization algorithm tailored for this representation. The proposed method enables to compute in real-time the precise position of a device using a single RGB camera, during its navigation. In contrast with previous work, we do not rely on pose regression or photometric alignment but rather use dense local features obtained through volumetric rendering which are specialized on the scene with a self-supervised objective. As a result, our algorithm is more accurate than competitors, able to operate in dynamic outdoor environments with changing lightning conditions and can be readily integrated in any volumetric neural renderer.
abstract_zh: 除了新颖的视图合成之外，神经辐射场对于与现实世界交互的应用程序也很有用。在本文中，我们将它们用作给定场景的隐式地图，并提出了一种针对这种表示形式定制的相机重定位算法。所提出的方法能够使用单个 RGB 摄像头实时计算设备在导航过程中的精确位置。 In contrast with previous work, we do not rely on pose regression or photometric alignment but rather use dense local features obtained through volumetric rendering which are specialized on the scene with a self-supervised objective. As a result, our algorithm is more accurate than competitors, able to operate in dynamic outdoor environments with changing lightning conditions and can be readily integrated in any volumetric neural renderer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CROSSFIRE方法，利用神经辐射场（NeRF）的隐式表示和自监督特征，实现单目RGB相机的实时相机重定位。
AI.motivation: 传统相机重定位方法依赖姿态回归或光度对齐，难以适应动态户外环境的光照变化。本文旨在开发一种更鲁棒、无需人工标注的实时定位方案。
AI.method: 通过体积渲染生成场景的密集局部特征，结合自监督目标训练隐式表示，直接基于特征匹配实现相机位姿估计，无需显式姿态回归。
AI.result: 在动态户外场景中实现亚厘米级定位精度，优于现有方法，且可无缝集成至任意体积神经渲染框架。
AI.conclusion: CROSSFIRE验证了自监督隐式特征在动态环境中的有效性，为实时视觉定位提供了新范式。

authors_text: Zhaoyi Zhou,Zaiwei Chen,Yiheng Lin,Adam Wierman
title: Convergence Rates for Localized Actor-Critic in Networked Markov Potential Games
title_zh: 网络马尔可夫势博弈中局部演员-批评家的收敛率
abstract: We introduce a class of networked Markov potential games in which agents are associated with nodes in a network. Each agent has its own local potential function, and the reward of each agent depends only on the states and actions of the agents within a neighborhood. In this context, we propose a localized actor-critic algorithm. The algorithm is scalable since each agent uses only local information and does not need access to the global state. Further, the algorithm overcomes the curse of dimensionality through the use of function approximation. Our main results provide finite-sample guarantees up to a localization error and a function approximation error. Specifically, we achieve an $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\tildeε^{-4})$ sample complexity measured by the averaged Nash regret. This is the first finite-sample bound for multi-agent competitive games that does not depend on the number of agents.
summary: We introduce a class of networked Markov potential games in which agents are associated with nodes in a network. Each agent has its own local potential function, and the reward of each agent depends only on the states and actions of the agents within a neighborhood. In this context, we propose a localized actor-critic algorithm. The algorithm is scalable since each agent uses only local information and does not need access to the global state. Further, the algorithm overcomes the curse of dimensionality through the use of function approximation. Our main results provide finite-sample guarantees up to a localization error and a function approximation error. Specifically, we achieve an $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\tildeε^{-4})$ sample complexity measured by the averaged Nash regret. This is the first finite-sample bound for multi-agent competitive games that does not depend on the number of agents.
abstract_zh: 我们引入一类网络马尔可夫势博弈，其中代理与网络中的节点相关联。每个智能体都有自己的局部势函数，每个智能体的奖励仅取决于邻域内智能体的状态和动作。在这种情况下，我们提出了一种本地化的演员批评算法。该算法是可扩展的，因为每个代理仅使用本地信息并且不需要访问全局状态。此外，该算法通过使用函数逼近克服了维数灾难。我们的主要结果提供了有限样本保证，直至定位误差和函数逼近误差。具体来说，我们实现了通过平均纳什后悔来衡量的 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\tildeε^{-4})$ 样本复杂度。这是第一个不依赖于代理数量的多代理竞争游戏的有限样本界限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于网络化马尔可夫势博弈的本地化Actor-Critic算法，实现了与代理数量无关的有限样本收敛保证。
AI.motivation: 传统多智能体博弈算法面临可扩展性差、维度灾难和样本复杂度依赖代理数量等挑战，需设计无需全局信息且具备高效收敛性的分布式算法。
AI.method: 基于本地势函数设计本地化Actor-Critic框架，结合函数逼近技术，利用网络邻域信息进行局部更新，避免全局状态依赖。
AI.result: 首次证明了样本复杂度为~O(ε⁻⁴)的有限样本界，且收敛性不依赖代理数量，克服了维度灾难问题。
AI.conclusion: 该算法通过局部信息交互和函数逼近，在保证收敛性的同时实现了高效可扩展的多智能体博弈求解方案。

search_text: Convergence Rates for Localized Actor-Critic in Networked Markov Potential Games 网络马尔可夫势博弈中局部演员-批评家的收敛率 We introduce a class of networked Markov potential games in which agents are associated with nodes in a network. Each agent has its own local potential function, and the reward of each agent depends only on the states and actions of the agents within a neighborhood. In this context, we propose a localized actor-critic algorithm. The algorithm is scalable since each agent uses only local information and does not need access to the global state. Further, the algorithm overcomes the curse of dimensionality through the use of function approximation. Our main results provide finite-sample guarantees up to a localization error and a function approximation error. Specifically, we achieve an $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\tildeε^{-4})$ sample complexity measured by the averaged Nash regret. This is the first finite-sample bound for multi-agent competitive games that does not depend on the number of agents. 我们引入一类网络马尔可夫势博弈，其中代理与网络中的节点相关联。每个智能体都有自己的局部势函数，每个智能体的奖励仅取决于邻域内智能体的状态和动作。在这种情况下，我们提出了一种本地化的演员批评算法。该算法是可扩展的，因为每个代理仅使用本地信息并且不需要访问全局状态。此外，该算法通过使用函数逼近克服了维数灾难。我们的主要结果提供了有限样本保证，直至定位误差和函数逼近误差。具体来说，我们实现了通过平均纳什后悔来衡量的 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\tildeε^{-4})$ 样本复杂度。这是第一个不依赖于代理数量的多代理竞争游戏的有限样本界限。 本文提出了一种适用于网络化马尔可夫势博弈的本地化Actor-Critic算法，实现了与代理数量无关的有限样本收敛保证。 Zhaoyi Zhou,Zaiwei Chen,Yiheng Lin,Adam Wierman cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Matthias Cosler,Christopher Hahn,Daniel Mendoza,Frederik Schmitt,Caroline Trippel
title: nl2spec: Interactively Translating Unstructured Natural Language to Temporal Logics with Large Language Models
title_zh: nl2spec：使用大型语言模型将非结构化自然语言交互式翻译为时态逻辑
abstract: A rigorous formalization of desired system requirements is indispensable when performing any verification task. This often limits the application of verification techniques, as writing formal specifications is an error-prone and time-consuming manual task. To facilitate this, we present nl2spec, a framework for applying Large Language Models (LLMs) to derive formal specifications (in temporal logics) from unstructured natural language. In particular, we introduce a new methodology to detect and resolve the inherent ambiguity of system requirements in natural language: we utilize LLMs to map subformulas of the formalization back to the corresponding natural language fragments of the input. Users iteratively add, delete, and edit these sub-translations to amend erroneous formalizations, which is easier than manually redrafting the entire formalization. The framework is agnostic to specific application domains and can be extended to similar specification languages and new neural models. We perform a user study to obtain a challenging dataset, which we use to run experiments on the quality of translations. We provide an open-source implementation, including a web-based frontend.
summary: A rigorous formalization of desired system requirements is indispensable when performing any verification task. This often limits the application of verification techniques, as writing formal specifications is an error-prone and time-consuming manual task. To facilitate this, we present nl2spec, a framework for applying Large Language Models (LLMs) to derive formal specifications (in temporal logics) from unstructured natural language. In particular, we introduce a new methodology to detect and resolve the inherent ambiguity of system requirements in natural language: we utilize LLMs to map subformulas of the formalization back to the corresponding natural language fragments of the input. Users iteratively add, delete, and edit these sub-translations to amend erroneous formalizations, which is easier than manually redrafting the entire formalization. The framework is agnostic to specific application domains and can be extended to similar specification languages and new neural models. We perform a user study to obtain a challenging dataset, which we use to run experiments on the quality of translations. We provide an open-source implementation, including a web-based frontend.
abstract_zh: A rigorous formalization of desired system requirements is indispensable when performing any verification task. This often limits the application of verification techniques, as writing formal specifications is an error-prone and time-consuming manual task.为了促进这一点，我们提出了 nl2spec，一个应用大型语言模型 (LLM) 从非结构化自然语言导出形式规范（在时间逻辑中）的框架。特别是，我们引入了一种新的方法来检测和解决自然语言中系统需求的固有模糊性：我们利用 LLM 将形式化的子公式映射回输入的相应自然语言片段。用户迭代地添加、删除和编辑这些子翻译来修改错误的形式化，这比手动重新起草整个形式化更容易。 The framework is agnostic to specific application domains and can be extended to similar specification languages and new neural models. We perform a user study to obtain a challenging dataset, which we use to run experiments on the quality of translations. We provide an open-source implementation, including a web-based frontend.

AI.tldr: 本文提出nl2spec框架，利用大语言模型将非结构化自然语言交互式转换为时序逻辑规范，通过子公式与自然语言片段的映射解决系统需求歧义问题。
AI.motivation: 系统验证需要严格形式化规范，但手动编写规范耗时且易出错，限制了验证技术的应用。
AI.method: 通过LLMs将形式化子公式映射回自然语言片段，用户迭代修正子翻译而非重写整体规范，框架支持跨领域扩展。
AI.result: 构建挑战性数据集验证翻译质量，开源实现包含网页前端，证明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: nl2spec通过交互式修正机制提升了自然语言到形式规范的转换效率，为验证任务提供了可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Yasser G. Alqaham,Jing Cheng,Zhenyu Gan
title: Energetic Analysis on the Optimal Bounding Gaits of Quadrupedal Robots
title_zh: 四足机器人最佳弹跳步态的能量分析
abstract: It is often overlooked by roboticists when designing locomotion controllers for their legged machines, that energy consumption plays an important role in selecting the best gaits for locomotion at high speeds or over long distances. The purpose of this study is to examine four similar asymmetrical quadrupedal gaits that are frequently observed in legged animals in nature. To understand how a specific footfall pattern will change the energetics of a legged system, we first developed a full body model of a quadrupedal robot called A1. And for each gait we created a hybrid system with desired footfall sequence and rigid impacts. In order to find the most energy efficient gait, we used optimal control methods to formulate the problem as a trajectory optimization problem with proper constraints and objective function. This problem was implemented and solved in a nonlinear programming framework called FROST. Based on the optimized trajectories for each gait, we investigated the values of cost of transport and the work done by all joints. Moreover, we analyzed the exchange of angular momentum in different components of the system during the whole stride cycle. According to the simulation results, bounding with two flight phases is likely to be the most energy efficient gait for A1 across a wide range of speed.
summary: It is often overlooked by roboticists when designing locomotion controllers for their legged machines, that energy consumption plays an important role in selecting the best gaits for locomotion at high speeds or over long distances. The purpose of this study is to examine four similar asymmetrical quadrupedal gaits that are frequently observed in legged animals in nature. To understand how a specific footfall pattern will change the energetics of a legged system, we first developed a full body model of a quadrupedal robot called A1. And for each gait we created a hybrid system with desired footfall sequence and rigid impacts. In order to find the most energy efficient gait, we used optimal control methods to formulate the problem as a trajectory optimization problem with proper constraints and objective function. This problem was implemented and solved in a nonlinear programming framework called FROST. Based on the optimized trajectories for each gait, we investigated the values of cost of transport and the work done by all joints. Moreover, we analyzed the exchange of angular momentum in different components of the system during the whole stride cycle. According to the simulation results, bounding with two flight phases is likely to be the most energy efficient gait for A1 across a wide range of speed.
abstract_zh: 在为腿式机器设计运动控制器时，机器人专家经常忽视能源消耗在选择高速或长距离运动的最佳步态方面起着重要作用。本研究的目的是检查自然界中有腿动物中常见的四种类似的不对称四足步态。为了了解特定的脚步模式将如何改变腿部系统的能量，我们首先开发了一个名为 A1 的四足机器人的全身模型。对于每种步态，我们创建了一个具有所需脚步顺序和刚性冲击的混合系统。为了找到最节能的步态，我们使用最优控制方法将问题表述为具有适当约束和目标函数的轨迹优化问题。这个问题是在称为 FROST 的非线性编程框架中实现和解决的。基于每个步态的优化轨迹，我们研究了运输成本的值和所有关节所做的工作。此外，我们分析了整个跨步周期中系统不同组件的角动量交换。根据模拟结果，两个飞行阶段的跳跃可能是 A1 在很宽的速度范围内最节能的步态。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了四足机器人在不同速度下的最优步态，以实现能量效率最大化。
AI.motivation: 在设计四足机器人的运动控制器时，通常忽略了能量消耗对选择最佳步态的重要性，特别是在高速或长距离运动中。
AI.method: 作者开发了一个四足机器人A1的全身模型，并为每种步态创建了一个混合系统。通过最优控制方法，将问题转化为轨迹优化问题，并在非线性规划框架FROST中实现和求解。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，具有两个飞行阶段的跳跃步态在A1机器人在广泛的速度范围内最节能。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过能量分析确定了四足机器人在不同速度下的最优步态，为未来四足机器人运动控制器的设计提供了参考。
