Moreover, we analyzed the exchange of angular momentum in different components of the system during the whole stride cycle. According to the simulation results, bounding with two flight phases is likely to be the most energy efficient gait for A1 across a wide range of speed. 在为腿式机器设计运动控制器时，机器人专家经常忽视能源消耗在选择高速或长距离运动的最佳步态方面起着重要作用。本研究的目的是检查自然界中有腿动物中常见的四种类似的不对称四足步态。为了了解特定的脚步模式将如何改变腿部系统的能量，我们首先开发了一个名为 A1 的四足机器人的全身模型。对于每种步态，我们创建了一个具有所需脚步顺序和刚性冲击的混合系统。为了找到最节能的步态，我们使用最优控制方法将问题表述为具有适当约束和目标函数的轨迹优化问题。这个问题是在称为 FROST 的非线性编程框架中实现和解决的。基于每个步态的优化轨迹，我们研究了运输成本的值和所有关节所做的工作。此外，我们分析了整个跨步周期中系统不同组件的角动量交换。根据模拟结果，两个飞行阶段的跳跃可能是 A1 在很宽的速度范围内最节能的步态。 本文研究了四足机器人在不同速度下的最优步态，以实现能量效率最大化。 Yasser G. Alqaham,Jing Cheng,Zhenyu Gan cs.RO

authors_text: Jiayu Ding,Zhenyu Gan
title: Breaking Symmetries Leads to Diverse Quadrupedal Gaits
title_zh: 打破对称性导致多样化的四足步态
comment: Please refer to the published version to cite this paper
comments: Please refer to the published version to cite this paper
abstract: Symmetry manifests itself in legged locomotion in a variety of ways. No matter where a legged system begins to move periodically, the torso and limbs coordinate with each other's movements in a similar manner. Also, in many gaits observed in nature, the legs on both sides of the torso move in exactly the same way, sometimes they are just half a period out of phase. Furthermore, when some animals move forward and backward, their movements are strikingly similar as if the time had been reversed. This work aims to generalize these phenomena and propose formal definitions of symmetries in legged locomotion using group theory terminology. Symmetries in some common quadrupedal gaits such as pronking, bounding, half-bounding, and galloping have been discussed. Moreover, a spring-mass model has been used to demonstrate how breaking symmetries can alter gaits in a legged system. Studying the symmetries may provide insight into which gaits may be suitable for a particular robotic design, or may enable roboticists to design more agile and efficient robot controllers by using certain gaits.

No matter where a legged system begins to move periodically, the torso and limbs coordinate with each other's movements in a similar manner. Furthermore, when some animals move forward and backward, their movements are strikingly similar as if the time had been reversed. This work aims to generalize these phenomena and propose formal definitions of symmetries in legged locomotion using group theory terminology. Symmetries in some common quadrupedal gaits such as pronking, bounding, half-bounding, and galloping have been discussed. Moreover, a spring-mass model has been used to demonstrate how breaking symmetries can alter gaits in a legged system. Studying the symmetries may provide insight into which gaits may be suitable for a particular robotic design, or may enable roboticists to design more agile and efficient robot controllers by using certain gaits.
abstract_zh: 对称性以多种方式体现在腿部运动中。无论腿部系统在何处开始周期性移动，躯干和四肢都会以类似的方式协调彼此的运动。而且，在自然界观察到的许多步态中，躯干两侧的腿以完全相同的方式移动，有时它们只是异相半个周期。而且，有些动物在前进和后退时，动作惊人地相似，就好像时间倒转了一样。这项工作旨在概括这些现象，并使用群论术语提出腿运动对称性的正式定义。一些常见的四足动物步态的对称性已经被讨论，例如前冲、跳跃、半跳跃和驰骋。此外，弹簧质量模型已被用来演示对称性破缺如何改变腿系统的步态。研究对称性可以深入了解哪些步态可能适合特定的机器人设计，或者可以使机器人专家能够通过使用某些步态来设计更敏捷、更高效的机器人控制器。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过群论术语形式化定义腿式运动中的对称性，并探讨打破对称性如何改变四足动物的步态。
AI.motivation: 研究自然界的步态对称性可为机器人设计提供理论支持，帮助开发更敏捷高效的控制策略。
AI.method: 采用群论分析四足动物常见步态（如跳跃、奔跑等）的对称性，并通过弹簧-质量模型模拟打破对称性对步态的影响。
AI.result: 明确了多种四足步态的对称性特征，并验证了打破对称性可导致步态多样性变化。
AI.conclusion: 对称性分析为机器人步态设计提供了理论依据，有助于优化机械结构与控制算法。

authors_text: Vivek K. Adajania,Siqi Zhou,Arun Kumar Singh,Angela P. Schoellig
title: AMSwarm: An Alternating Minimization Approach for Safe Motion Planning of Quadrotor Swarms in Cluttered Environments
title_zh: AMSwarm：杂乱环境中四旋翼机群安全运动规划的交替最小化方法
abstract: This paper presents a scalable online algorithm to generate safe and kinematically feasible trajectories for quadrotor swarms. Existing approaches rely on linearizing Euclidean distance-based collision constraints and on axis-wise decoupling of kinematic constraints to reduce the trajectory optimization problem for each quadrotor to a quadratic program (QP). This conservative approximation often fails to find a solution in cluttered environments. We present a novel alternative that handles collision constraints without linearization and kinematic constraints in their quadratic form while still retaining the QP form. We achieve this by reformulating the constraints in a polar form and applying an Alternating Minimization algorithm to the resulting problem. Through extensive simulation results, we demonstrate that, as compared to Sequential Convex Programming (SCP) baselines, our approach achieves on average a 72% improvement in success rate, a 36% reduction in mission time, and a 42 times faster per-agent computation time. We also show that collision constraints derived from discrete-time barrier functions (BF) can be incorporated, leading to different safety behaviours without significant computational overhead. Moreover, our optimizer outperforms the state-of-the-art optimal control solver ACADO in handling BF constraints with a 31 times faster per-agent computation time and a 44% reduction in mission time on average. We experimentally validated our approach on a Crazyflie quadrotor swarm of up to 12 quadrotors. The code with supplementary material and video are released for reference.
summary: This paper presents a scalable online algorithm to generate safe and kinematically feasible trajectories for quadrotor swarms. Existing approaches rely on linearizing Euclidean distance-based collision constraints and on axis-wise decoupling of kinematic constraints to reduce the trajectory optimization problem for each quadrotor to a quadratic program (QP). This conservative approximation often fails to find a solution in cluttered environments. We present a novel alternative that handles collision constraints without linearization and kinematic constraints in their quadratic form while still retaining the QP form. We achieve this by reformulating the constraints in a polar form and applying an Alternating Minimization algorithm to the resulting problem. Through extensive simulation results, we demonstrate that, as compared to Sequential Convex Programming (SCP) baselines, our approach achieves on average a 72% improvement in success rate, a 36% reduction in mission time, and a 42 times faster per-agent computation time. We also show that collision constraints derived from discrete-time barrier functions (BF) can be incorporated, leading to different safety behaviours without significant computational overhead. Moreover, our optimizer outperforms the state-of-the-art optimal control solver ACADO in handling BF constraints with a 31 times faster per-agent computation time and a 44% reduction in mission time on average. We experimentally validated our approach on a Crazyflie quadrotor swarm of up to 12 quadrotors. The code with supplementary material and video are released for reference.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种可扩展的在线算法，为四旋翼飞行器群生成安全且运动学上可行的轨迹。 Existing approaches rely on linearizing Euclidean distance-based collision constraints and on axis-wise decoupling of kinematic constraints to reduce the trajectory optimization problem for each quadrotor to a quadratic program (QP).这种保守的近似通常无法在混乱的环境中找到解决方案。 We present a novel alternative that handles collision constraints without linearization and kinematic constraints in their quadratic form while still retaining the QP form.我们通过以极坐标形式重新表述约束并对所产生的问题应用交替最小化算法来实现这一点。 Through extensive simulation results, we demonstrate that, as compared to Sequential Convex Programming (SCP) baselines, our approach achieves on average a 72% improvement in success rate, a 36% reduction in mission time, and a 42 times faster per-agent computation time. We also show that collision constraints derived from discrete-time barrier functions (BF) can be incorporated, leading to different safety behaviours without significant computational overhead. Moreover, our optimizer outperforms the state-of-the-art optimal control solver ACADO in handling BF constraints with a 31 times faster per-agent computation time and a 44% reduction in mission time on average.我们在最多 12 架四旋翼飞行器的 Crazyflie 四旋翼飞行群上进行了实验验证我们的方法。附有补充材料和视频的代码已发布以供参考。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于四旋翼无人机群在复杂环境中安全运动规划的可扩展在线算法AMSwarm。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过线性化碰撞约束和解耦运动学约束来简化轨迹优化问题，但这种方法在复杂环境中容易失效，无法找到可行解。
AI.method: 通过将约束条件转换为极坐标形式，并应用交替最小化算法，避免线性化处理同时保持二次规划（QP）形式，从而更高效地处理碰撞和运动学约束。
AI.result: 相比SCP基线方法，成功率提升72%，任务时间减少36%，单机计算速度加快42倍；相比ACADO求解器，单机计算速度加快31倍，任务时间减少44%。实验在12架Crazyflie无人机上验证了该方法。
AI.conclusion: AMSwarm算法在复杂环境中实现了更高效、更安全的无人机群轨迹规划，且计算效率显著优于现有方法。

authors_text: Jian Wang,Jiarui Xing,Jason Druzgal,William M. Wells III,Miaomiao Zhang
title: MetaMorph: Learning Metamorphic Image Transformation With Appearance Changes
title_zh: MetaMorph：学习具有外观变化的变形图像变换
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures, Information Processing in Medical Imaging (IPMI) 2023
comments: 12 pages, 4 figures, Information Processing in Medical Imaging (IPMI) 2023
abstract: This paper presents a novel predictive model, MetaMorph, for metamorphic registration of images with appearance changes (i.e., caused by brain tumors). In contrast to previous learning-based registration methods that have little or no control over appearance-changes, our model introduces a new regularization that can effectively suppress the negative effects of appearance changing areas. In particular, we develop a piecewise regularization on the tangent space of diffeomorphic transformations (also known as initial velocity fields) via learned segmentation maps of abnormal regions. The geometric transformation and appearance changes are treated as joint tasks that are mutually beneficial. Our model MetaMorph is more robust and accurate when searching for an optimal registration solution under the guidance of segmentation, which in turn improves the segmentation performance by providing appropriately augmented training labels. We validate MetaMorph on real 3D human brain tumor magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) scans. Experimental results show that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art learning-based registration models. The proposed MetaMorph has great potential in various image-guided clinical interventions, e.g., real-time image-guided navigation systems for tumor removal surgery.
summary: This paper presents a novel predictive model, MetaMorph, for metamorphic registration of images with appearance changes (i.e., caused by brain tumors). In contrast to previous learning-based registration methods that have little or no control over appearance-changes, our model introduces a new regularization that can effectively suppress the negative effects of appearance changing areas. In particular, we develop a piecewise regularization on the tangent space of diffeomorphic transformations (also known as initial velocity fields) via learned segmentation maps of abnormal regions. The geometric transformation and appearance changes are treated as joint tasks that are mutually beneficial. Our model MetaMorph is more robust and accurate when searching for an optimal registration solution under the guidance of segmentation, which in turn improves the segmentation performance by providing appropriately augmented training labels. We validate MetaMorph on real 3D human brain tumor magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) scans. Experimental results show that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art learning-based registration models. The proposed MetaMorph has great potential in various image-guided clinical interventions, e.g., real-time image-guided navigation systems for tumor removal surgery.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的预测模型 MetaMorph，用于对具有外观变化（即由脑肿瘤引起）的图像进行变质配准。与之前基于学习的配准方法很少或根本无法控制外观变化相比，我们的模型引入了一种新的正则化，可以有效抑制外观变化区域的负面影响。特别是，我们通过学习异常区域的分割图，对微分同胚变换（也称为初始速度场）的切线空间进行分段正则化。几何变换和外观变化被视为互惠互利的联合任务。我们的模型 MetaMorph 在分割指导下搜索最佳配准解决方案时更加稳健和准确，从而通过提供适当增强的训练标签来提高分割性能。我们在真实 3D 人脑肿瘤磁共振成像 (MRI) 扫描上验证 MetaMorph。实验结果表明，我们的模型优于最先进的基于学习的注册模型。所提出的 MetaMorph 在各种图像引导临床干预中具有巨大潜力，例如用于肿瘤切除手术的实时图像引导导航系统。

search_text: MetaMorph: Learning Metamorphic Image Transformation With Appearance Changes MetaMorph：学习具有外观变化的变形图像变换 This paper presents a novel predictive model, MetaMorph, for metamorphic registration of images with appearance changes (i.e., caused by brain tumors). In contrast to previous learning-based registration methods that have little or no control over appearance-changes, our model introduces a new regularization that can effectively suppress the negative effects of appearance changing areas. In particular, we develop a piecewise regularization on the tangent space of diffeomorphic transformations (also known as initial velocity fields) via learned segmentation maps of abnormal regions. The geometric transformation and appearance changes are treated as joint tasks that are mutually beneficial. Our model MetaMorph is more robust and accurate when searching for an optimal registration solution under the guidance of segmentation, which in turn improves the segmentation performance by providing appropriately augmented training labels. We validate MetaMorph on real 3D human brain tumor magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) scans. Experimental results show that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art learning-based registration models. The proposed MetaMorph has great potential in various image-guided clinical interventions, e.g., real-time image-guided navigation systems for tumor removal surgery. 本文提出了一种新颖的预测模型 MetaMorph，用于对具有外观变化（即由脑肿瘤引起）的图像进行变质配准。与之前基于学习的配准方法很少或根本无法控制外观变化相比，我们的模型引入了一种新的正则化，可以有效抑制外观变化区域的负面影响。特别是，我们通过学习异常区域的分割图，对微分同胚变换（也称为初始速度场）的切线空间进行分段正则化。几何变换和外观变化被视为互惠互利的联合任务。我们的模型 MetaMorph 在分割指导下搜索最佳配准解决方案时更加稳健和准确，从而通过提供适当增强的训练标签来提高分割性能。我们在真实 3D 人脑肿瘤磁共振成像 (MRI) 扫描上验证 MetaMorph。实验结果表明，我们的模型优于最先进的基于学习的注册模型。所提出的 MetaMorph 在各种图像引导临床干预中具有巨大潜力，例如用于肿瘤切除手术的实时图像引导导航系统。 本文提出了一种名为MetaMorph的新模型，用于处理由于脑肿瘤引起的图像外观变化的变形配准问题。 Jian Wang,Jiarui Xing,Jason Druzgal,William M. Wells III,Miaomiao Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Jorge Bacca,Emmanuel Martinez,Henry Arguello
title: Computational Spectral Imaging: A Contemporary Overview
title_zh: 计算光谱成像：当代概述
abstract: Spectral imaging collects and processes information along spatial and spectral coordinates quantified in discrete voxels, which can be treated as a 3D spectral data cube. The spectral images (SIs) allow identifying objects, crops, and materials in the scene through their spectral behavior. Since most spectral optical systems can only employ 1D or maximum 2D sensors, it is challenging to directly acquire the 3D information from available commercial sensors. As an alternative, computational spectral imaging (CSI) has emerged as a sensing tool where the 3D data can be obtained using 2D encoded projections. Then, a computational recovery process must be employed to retrieve the SI. CSI enables the development of snapshot optical systems that reduce acquisition time and provide low computational storage costs compared to conventional scanning systems. Recent advances in deep learning (DL) have allowed the design of data-driven CSI to improve the SI reconstruction or, even more, perform high-level tasks such as classification, unmixing, or anomaly detection directly from 2D encoded projections. This work summarises the advances in CSI, starting with SI and its relevance; continuing with the most relevant compressive spectral optical systems. Then, CSI with DL will be introduced, and the recent advances in combining the physical optical design with computational DL algorithms to solve high-level tasks.
summary: Spectral imaging collects and processes information along spatial and spectral coordinates quantified in discrete voxels, which can be treated as a 3D spectral data cube. The spectral images (SIs) allow identifying objects, crops, and materials in the scene through their spectral behavior. Since most spectral optical systems can only employ 1D or maximum 2D sensors, it is challenging to directly acquire the 3D information from available commercial sensors. As an alternative, computational spectral imaging (CSI) has emerged as a sensing tool where the 3D data can be obtained using 2D encoded projections. Then, a computational recovery process must be employed to retrieve the SI. CSI enables the development of snapshot optical systems that reduce acquisition time and provide low computational storage costs compared to conventional scanning systems. Recent advances in deep learning (DL) have allowed the design of data-driven CSI to improve the SI reconstruction or, even more, perform high-level tasks such as classification, unmixing, or anomaly detection directly from 2D encoded projections. This work summarises the advances in CSI, starting with SI and its relevance; continuing with the most relevant compressive spectral optical systems. Then, CSI with DL will be introduced, and the recent advances in combining the physical optical design with computational DL algorithms to solve high-level tasks.
abstract_zh: 光谱成像沿着以离散体素量化的空间和光谱坐标收集和处理信息，这些信息可以被视为 3D 光谱数据立方体。光谱图像 (SI) 允许通过光谱行为识别场景中的物体、农作物和材料。由于大多数光谱光学系统只能采用 1D 或最大 2D 传感器，因此直接从可用的商用传感器获取 3D 信息具有挑战性。作为替代方案，计算光谱成像 (CSI) 已成为一种传感工具，可以使用 2D 编码投影获取 3D 数据。然后，必须采用计算恢复过程来检索 SI。 CSI 支持快照光学系统的开发，与传统扫描系统相比，该系统可减少采集时间并提供较低的计算存储成本。深度学习 (DL) 的最新进展使得数据驱动的 CSI 设计能够改善 SI 重建，甚至可以直接从 2D 编码投影执行分类、分解或异常检测等高级任务。这项工作总结了 CSI 的进展，从 SI 及其相关性开始；继续最相关的压缩光谱光学系统。然后，将介绍 CSI 与 DL，以及将物理光学设计与计算 DL 算法相结合以解决高级任务的最新进展。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了计算光谱成像（CSI）的最新进展，重点介绍了基于深度学习的CSI方法及其在高阶任务中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统光谱成像系统难以直接获取3D光谱数据立方体，而计算光谱成像通过2D编码投影和计算恢复解决了这一问题，并需结合深度学习提升重建质量与任务性能。
AI.method: 系统梳理了光谱成像原理与压缩感知光学系统，分析了深度学习驱动的CSI方法，并探讨了物理光学设计与计算算法的融合策略。
AI.result: 总结了CSI在数据重建、分类、解混及异常检测等任务中的最新成果，强调了深度学习与光学设计结合的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 计算光谱成像通过深度学习显著提升了光谱数据处理效率与智能化水平，未来需进一步优化光学-算法协同设计以推动实际应用。

authors_text: Alankrita Bhatt,Nika Haghtalab,Abhishek Shetty
title: Smoothed Analysis of Sequential Probability Assignment
title_zh: 顺序概率分配的平滑分析
abstract: We initiate the study of smoothed analysis for the sequential probability assignment problem with contexts. We study information-theoretically optimal minmax rates as well as a framework for algorithmic reduction involving the maximum likelihood estimator oracle. Our approach establishes a general-purpose reduction from minimax rates for sequential probability assignment for smoothed adversaries to minimax rates for transductive learning. This leads to optimal (logarithmic) fast rates for parametric classes and classes with finite VC dimension. On the algorithmic front, we develop an algorithm that efficiently taps into the MLE oracle, for general classes of functions. We show that under general conditions this algorithmic approach yields sublinear regret.
summary: We initiate the study of smoothed analysis for the sequential probability assignment problem with contexts. We study information-theoretically optimal minmax rates as well as a framework for algorithmic reduction involving the maximum likelihood estimator oracle. Our approach establishes a general-purpose reduction from minimax rates for sequential probability assignment for smoothed adversaries to minimax rates for transductive learning. This leads to optimal (logarithmic) fast rates for parametric classes and classes with finite VC dimension. On the algorithmic front, we develop an algorithm that efficiently taps into the MLE oracle, for general classes of functions. We show that under general conditions this algorithmic approach yields sublinear regret.
abstract_zh: 我们启动了上下文顺序概率分配问题的平滑分析研究。我们研究信息理论上最优的最小最大速率以及涉及最大似然估计预言机的算法简化框架。我们的方法建立了从平滑对手的顺序概率分配的最小最大速率到转导学习的最小最大速率的通用降低。这导致参数类和具有有限 VC 维度的类的最佳（对数）快速速率。在算法方面，我们开发了一种算法，可以有效地利用 MLE 预言机来处理一般类型的函数。我们表明，在一般条件下，这种算法方法会产生次线性遗憾。

AI.tldr: 本文研究带有上下文的顺序概率分配问题的平滑分析，建立从平滑对手到归纳学习的通用还原框架，并开发基于MLE的高效算法。
AI.motivation: 传统在线学习理论在对抗性假设下可能过于保守，而平滑分析能更现实地评估算法性能，需结合上下文信息与统计学习理论进行改进。
AI.method: 通过构建从平滑对手的顺序概率分配到归纳学习的通用还原框架，结合最大似然估计器（MLE）设计算法，实现对复杂函数类的高效学习。
AI.result: 获得参数类和有限VC维类的最优对数快速率，提出次线性遗憾的通用算法，适用于广泛函数类。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为平滑分析提供了理论保证与实用算法，推动了在线学习与统计学习理论的融合发展。

tldr: 本文研究带有上下文的顺序概率分配问题的平滑分析，建立从平滑对手到归纳学习的通用还原框架，并开发基于MLE的高效算法。
motivation: 传统在线学习理论在对抗性假设下可能过于保守，而平滑分析能更现实地评估算法性能，需结合上下文信息与统计学习理论进行改进。

search_text: Smoothed Analysis of Sequential Probability Assignment 顺序概率分配的平滑分析 We initiate the study of smoothed analysis for the sequential probability assignment problem with contexts. We study information-theoretically optimal minmax rates as well as a framework for algorithmic reduction involving the maximum likelihood estimator oracle. Our approach establishes a general-purpose reduction from minimax rates for sequential probability assignment for smoothed adversaries to minimax rates for transductive learning. This leads to optimal (logarithmic) fast rates for parametric classes and classes with finite VC dimension. On the algorithmic front, we develop an algorithm that efficiently taps into the MLE oracle, for general classes of functions. We show that under general conditions this algorithmic approach yields sublinear regret. 我们启动了上下文顺序概率分配问题的平滑分析研究。我们研究信息理论上最优的最小最大速率以及涉及最大似然估计预言机的算法简化框架。我们的方法建立了从平滑对手的顺序概率分配的最小最大速率到转导学习的最小最大速率的通用降低。这导致参数类和具有有限 VC 维度的类的最佳（对数）快速速率。在算法方面，我们开发了一种算法，可以有效地利用 MLE 预言机来处理一般类型的函数。我们表明，在一般条件下，这种算法方法会产生次线性遗憾。 本文研究带有上下文的顺序概率分配问题的平滑分析，建立从平滑对手到归纳学习的通用还原框架，并开发基于MLE的高效算法。 Alankrita Bhatt,Nika Haghtalab,Abhishek Shetty cs.LG,cs.DS,cs.IT,stat.ML

authors_text: Zach Williams,Jushan Chen,Negar Mehr
title: Distributed Potential iLQR: Scalable Game-Theoretic Trajectory Planning for Multi-Agent Interactions
title_zh: 分布式势 iLQR：多智能体交互的可扩展博弈论轨迹规划
comment: 6 pages (excluding reference), 5 figures. Accepted by 2023 International Conference on Robotics and Automation
comments: 6 pages (excluding reference), 5 figures. Accepted by 2023 International Conference on Robotics and Automation
abstract: In this work, we develop a scalable, local trajectory optimization algorithm that enables robots to interact with other robots. It has been shown that agents' interactions can be successfully captured in game-theoretic formulations, where the interaction outcome can be best modeled via the equilibria of the underlying dynamic game. However, it is typically challenging to compute equilibria of dynamic games as it involves simultaneously solving a set of coupled optimal control problems. Existing solvers operate in a centralized fashion and do not scale up tractably to multiple interacting agents. We enable scalable distributed game-theoretic planning by leveraging the structure inherent in multi-agent interactions, namely, interactions belonging to the class of dynamic potential games. Since equilibria of dynamic potential games can be found by minimizing a single potential function, we can apply distributed and decentralized control techniques to seek equilibria of multi-agent interactions in a scalable and distributed manner. We compare the performance of our algorithm with a centralized interactive planner in a number of simulation studies and demonstrate that our algorithm results in better efficiency and scalability. We further evaluate our method in hardware experiments involving multiple quadcopters.
summary: In this work, we develop a scalable, local trajectory optimization algorithm that enables robots to interact with other robots. It has been shown that agents' interactions can be successfully captured in game-theoretic formulations, where the interaction outcome can be best modeled via the equilibria of the underlying dynamic game. However, it is typically challenging to compute equilibria of dynamic games as it involves simultaneously solving a set of coupled optimal control problems. Existing solvers operate in a centralized fashion and do not scale up tractably to multiple interacting agents. We enable scalable distributed game-theoretic planning by leveraging the structure inherent in multi-agent interactions, namely, interactions belonging to the class of dynamic potential games. Since equilibria of dynamic potential games can be found by minimizing a single potential function, we can apply distributed and decentralized control techniques to seek equilibria of multi-agent interactions in a scalable and distributed manner. We compare the performance of our algorithm with a centralized interactive planner in a number of simulation studies and demonstrate that our algorithm results in better efficiency and scalability. We further evaluate our method in hardware experiments involving multiple quadcopters.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们开发了一种可扩展的局部轨迹优化算法，使机器人能够与其他机器人交互。事实证明，代理的交互可以在博弈论公式中成功捕获，其中可以通过底层动态博弈的平衡对交互结果进行最佳建模。然而，计算动态博弈的均衡通常具有挑战性，因为它涉及同时解决一组耦合的最优控制问题。现有的求解器以集中式方式运行，并且无法轻松地扩展到多个交互代理。我们通过利用多智能体交互中固有的结构（即属于动态潜在博弈类的交互）来实现可扩展的分布式博弈论规划。由于动态势博弈的均衡可以通过最小化单个势函数来找到，因此我们可以应用分布式和分散控制技术以可扩展和分布式的方式寻求多智能体交互的均衡。我们在许多模拟研究中将我们的算法与集中式交互式规划器的性能进行了比较，并证明我们的算法具有更好的效率和可扩展性。我们在涉及多个四轴飞行器的硬件实验中进一步评估我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可扩展的分布式潜在iLQR算法，用于多智能体交互中的博弈论轨迹规划。
AI.motivation: 现有集中式求解器难以处理多智能体动态博弈的均衡计算问题，缺乏可扩展性。
AI.method: 利用动态潜在博弈的特性，通过单目标势函数优化，结合分布式iLQR控制技术实现去中心化规划。
AI.result: 仿真和四旋翼无人机实验证明，该算法在效率和可扩展性上优于集中式方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多智能体系统提供了高效、可扩展的博弈论轨迹规划解决方案。

authors_text: Anwesha Mohanty,Alistair Sutherland,Marija Bezbradica,Hossein Javidnia
title: High Fidelity Synthetic Face Generation for Rosacea Skin Condition from Limited Data
title_zh: 根据有限数据生成针对酒渣鼻皮肤状况的高保真合成面部
abstract: Similar to the majority of deep learning applications, diagnosing skin diseases using computer vision and deep learning often requires a large volume of data. However, obtaining sufficient data for particular types of facial skin conditions can be difficult due to privacy concerns. As a result, conditions like Rosacea are often understudied in computer-aided diagnosis. The limited availability of data for facial skin conditions has led to the investigation of alternative methods for computer-aided diagnosis. In recent years, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), mainly variants of StyleGANs, have demonstrated promising results in generating synthetic facial images. In this study, for the first time, a small dataset of Rosacea with 300 full-face images is utilized to further investigate the possibility of generating synthetic data. The preliminary experiments show how fine-tuning the model and varying experimental settings significantly affect the fidelity of the Rosacea features. It is demonstrated that $R_1$ Regularization strength helps achieve high-fidelity details. Additionally, this study presents qualitative evaluations of synthetic/generated faces by expert dermatologists and non-specialist participants. The quantitative evaluation is presented using a few validation metric(s). Furthermore a number of limitations and future directions are discussed. Code and generated dataset are available at: \url{https://github.com/thinkercache/stylegan2-ada-pytorch}
summary: Similar to the majority of deep learning applications, diagnosing skin diseases using computer vision and deep learning often requires a large volume of data. However, obtaining sufficient data for particular types of facial skin conditions can be difficult due to privacy concerns. As a result, conditions like Rosacea are often understudied in computer-aided diagnosis. The limited availability of data for facial skin conditions has led to the investigation of alternative methods for computer-aided diagnosis. In recent years, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), mainly variants of StyleGANs, have demonstrated promising results in generating synthetic facial images. In this study, for the first time, a small dataset of Rosacea with 300 full-face images is utilized to further investigate the possibility of generating synthetic data. The preliminary experiments show how fine-tuning the model and varying experimental settings significantly affect the fidelity of the Rosacea features. It is demonstrated that $R_1$ Regularization strength helps achieve high-fidelity details. Additionally, this study presents qualitative evaluations of synthetic/generated faces by expert dermatologists and non-specialist participants. The quantitative evaluation is presented using a few validation metric(s). Furthermore a number of limitations and future directions are discussed. Code and generated dataset are available at: \url{https://github.com/thinkercache/stylegan2-ada-pytorch}
abstract_zh: 与大多数深度学习应用类似，使用计算机视觉和深度学习诊断皮肤病通常需要大量数据。然而，由于隐私问题，获取特定类型面部皮肤状况的足够数据可能很困难。因此，像红斑痤疮这样的疾病在计算机辅助诊断中经常得不到充分研究。由于面部皮肤状况的数据有限，人们开始研究计算机辅助诊断的替代方法。近年来，生成对抗网络（GAN）（主要是 StyleGAN 的变体）在生成合成面部图像方面表现出了可喜的结果。在这项研究中，首次利用包含 300 张全脸图像的红斑痤疮小型数据集来进一步研究生成合成数据的可能性。初步实验表明，微调模型和改变实验设置如何显着影响酒渣鼻特征的保真度。事实证明，$R_1$ 正则化强度有助于实现高保真细节。此外，这项研究还提供了皮肤科医生专家和非专业参与者对合成/生成面孔的定性评估。使用一些验证指标来进行定量评估。此外还讨论了一些限制和未来的方向。代码和生成的数据集可在以下位置获取：\url{https://github.com/thinkercache/stylegan2-ada-pytorch}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于有限数据生成高保真度玫瑰痤疮皮肤面部图像的方法，利用生成对抗网络（GAN）解决皮肤病诊断中数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 皮肤病诊断需要大量数据，但隐私问题导致特定面部皮肤疾病（如玫瑰痤疮）数据稀缺，限制了计算机辅助诊断的研究进展。
AI.method: 使用包含300张全脸图像的小规模玫瑰痤疮数据集，基于StyleGAN变体进行模型微调，结合R1正则化优化生成效果，并通过专家和非专家的定性评估及定量指标验证结果。
AI.result: 实验表明R1正则化强度显著提升玫瑰痤疮特征的高保真度，生成的图像通过皮肤科专家和非专业人员的评估，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在有限数据下成功生成高质量玫瑰痤疮面部图像，为皮肤病计算机辅助诊断提供了可行的合成数据解决方案，但需进一步优化生成多样性与临床适用性。

Additionally, this study presents qualitative evaluations of synthetic/generated faces by expert dermatologists and non-specialist participants. Code and generated dataset are available at: \url{https://github.com/thinkercache/stylegan2-ada-pytorch} 与大多数深度学习应用类似，使用计算机视觉和深度学习诊断皮肤病通常需要大量数据。然而，由于隐私问题，获取特定类型面部皮肤状况的足够数据可能很困难。因此，像红斑痤疮这样的疾病在计算机辅助诊断中经常得不到充分研究。由于面部皮肤状况的数据有限，人们开始研究计算机辅助诊断的替代方法。近年来，生成对抗网络（GAN）（主要是 StyleGAN 的变体）在生成合成面部图像方面表现出了可喜的结果。在这项研究中，首次利用包含 300 张全脸图像的红斑痤疮小型数据集来进一步研究生成合成数据的可能性。初步实验表明，微调模型和改变实验设置如何显着影响酒渣鼻特征的保真度。事实证明，$R_1$ 正则化强度有助于实现高保真细节。此外，这项研究还提供了皮肤科医生专家和非专业参与者对合成/生成面孔的定性评估。使用一些验证指标来进行定量评估。此外还讨论了一些限制和未来的方向。代码和生成的数据集可在以下位置获取：\url{https://github.com/thinkercache/stylegan2-ada-pytorch} 本文提出了一种基于有限数据生成高保真度玫瑰痤疮皮肤面部图像的方法，利用生成对抗网络（GAN）解决皮肤病诊断中数据不足的问题。 Anwesha Mohanty,Alistair Sutherland,Marija Bezbradica,Hossein Javidnia cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Bilal Porgali,Vítor Albiero,Jordan Ryda,Cristian Canton Ferrer,Caner Hazirbas
title: The Casual Conversations v2 Dataset
title_zh: 休闲对话 v2 数据集
abstract: This paper introduces a new large consent-driven dataset aimed at assisting in the evaluation of algorithmic bias and robustness of computer vision and audio speech models in regards to 11 attributes that are self-provided or labeled by trained annotators. The dataset includes 26,467 videos of 5,567 unique paid participants, with an average of almost 5 videos per person, recorded in Brazil, India, Indonesia, Mexico, Vietnam, Philippines, and the USA, representing diverse demographic characteristics. The participants agreed for their data to be used in assessing fairness of AI models and provided self-reported age, gender, language/dialect, disability status, physical adornments, physical attributes and geo-location information, while trained annotators labeled apparent skin tone using the Fitzpatrick Skin Type and Monk Skin Tone scales, and voice timbre. Annotators also labeled for different recording setups and per-second activity annotations.
summary: This paper introduces a new large consent-driven dataset aimed at assisting in the evaluation of algorithmic bias and robustness of computer vision and audio speech models in regards to 11 attributes that are self-provided or labeled by trained annotators. The dataset includes 26,467 videos of 5,567 unique paid participants, with an average of almost 5 videos per person, recorded in Brazil, India, Indonesia, Mexico, Vietnam, Philippines, and the USA, representing diverse demographic characteristics. The participants agreed for their data to be used in assessing fairness of AI models and provided self-reported age, gender, language/dialect, disability status, physical adornments, physical attributes and geo-location information, while trained annotators labeled apparent skin tone using the Fitzpatrick Skin Type and Monk Skin Tone scales, and voice timbre. Annotators also labeled for different recording setups and per-second activity annotations.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一个新的大型同意驱动数据集，旨在协助评估计算机视觉和音频语音模型的算法偏差和鲁棒性，涉及自行提供或由训练有素的注释者标记的 11 个属性。该数据集包括 5,567 名独立付费参与者的 26,467 个视频，平均每人近 5 个视频，录制于巴西、印度、印度尼西亚、墨西哥、越南、菲律宾和美国，代表了不同的人口特征。参与者同意将他们的数据用于评估人工智能模型的公平性，并提供自我报告的年龄、性别、语言/方言、残疾状况、身体装饰、身体属性和地理位置信息，而训练有素的注释者则使用菲茨帕特里克皮肤类型和僧侣肤色量表以及音色来标记明显的肤色。注释器还标记了不同的记录设置和每秒活动注释。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Casual Conversations v2数据集，旨在通过11个属性评估计算机视觉和音频语音模型的算法偏见和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有AI模型在处理不同人口统计学特征时可能存在偏见，需构建包含多样化人口特征和标注数据的大型数据集以评估模型公平性。
AI.method: 收集26,467条来自7个国家的视频数据，包含参与者自报属性（年龄、性别等）及标注人员标注的皮肤色调（Fitzpatrick/ Monk量表）、声音音色等信息，并标注录音设置和秒级活动。
AI.result: 构建了包含5,567名参与者、平均每人4.76条视频的数据集，覆盖年龄、性别、语言、残疾状态等11个维度，提供多尺度标注信息。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为研究算法偏见和模型鲁棒性提供了多样化、标注精细的基准，有助于推动公平性导向的AI模型开发。

authors_text: Alexandra Bremers,Maria Teresa Parreira,Xuanyu Fang,Natalie Friedman,Adolfo Ramirez-Aristizabal,Alexandria Pabst,Mirjana Spasojevic,Michael Kuniavsky,Wendy Ju
title: The Bystander Affect Detection (BAD) Dataset for Failure Detection in HRI
title_zh: 用于 HRI 故障检测的旁观者影响检测 (BAD) 数据集
abstract: For a robot to repair its own error, it must first know it has made a mistake. One way that people detect errors is from the implicit reactions from bystanders -- their confusion, smirks, or giggles clue us in that something unexpected occurred. To enable robots to detect and act on bystander responses to task failures, we developed a novel method to elicit bystander responses to human and robot errors. Using 46 different stimulus videos featuring a variety of human and machine task failures, we collected a total of 2452 webcam videos of human reactions from 54 participants. To test the viability of the collected data, we used the bystander reaction dataset as input to a deep-learning model, BADNet, to predict failure occurrence. We tested different data labeling methods and learned how they affect model performance, achieving precisions above 90%. We discuss strategies to model bystander reactions and predict failure and how this approach can be used in real-world robotic deployments to detect errors and improve robot performance. As part of this work, we also contribute with the "Bystander Affect Detection" (BAD) dataset of bystander reactions, supporting the development of better prediction models.
summary: For a robot to repair its own error, it must first know it has made a mistake. One way that people detect errors is from the implicit reactions from bystanders -- their confusion, smirks, or giggles clue us in that something unexpected occurred. To enable robots to detect and act on bystander responses to task failures, we developed a novel method to elicit bystander responses to human and robot errors. Using 46 different stimulus videos featuring a variety of human and machine task failures, we collected a total of 2452 webcam videos of human reactions from 54 participants. To test the viability of the collected data, we used the bystander reaction dataset as input to a deep-learning model, BADNet, to predict failure occurrence. We tested different data labeling methods and learned how they affect model performance, achieving precisions above 90%. We discuss strategies to model bystander reactions and predict failure and how this approach can be used in real-world robotic deployments to detect errors and improve robot performance. As part of this work, we also contribute with the "Bystander Affect Detection" (BAD) dataset of bystander reactions, supporting the development of better prediction models.
abstract_zh: 对于机器人来说，要修复自己的错误，它必须首先知道自己犯了错误。人们发现错误的一种方法是通过旁观者的隐含反应——他们的困惑、傻笑或咯咯笑告诉我们发生了意外的事情。为了使机器人能够检测旁观者对任务失败的反应并采取行动，我们开发了一种新颖的方法来引发旁观者对人类和机器人错误的反应。使用 46 个不同的刺激视频，其中包含各种人类和机器任务失败的情况，我们从 54 名参与者收集了总共 2452 个人类反应的网络摄像头视频。为了测试所收集数据的可行性，我们使用旁观者反应数据集作为深度学习模型 BADNet 的输入来预测故障发生。我们测试了不同的数据标记方法并了解它们如何影响模型性能，实现了 90% 以上的精度。我们讨论了模拟旁观者反应和预测故障的策略，以及如何在现实世界的机器人部署中使用这种方法来检测错误并提高机器人性能。作为这项工作的一部分，我们还贡献了旁观者反应的“旁观者影响检测”（BAD）数据集，支持更好的预测模型的开发。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通过分析旁观者反应来检测人机交互（HRI）中任务失败的新方法，并构建了'Bystander Affect Detection'（BAD）数据集以支持相关模型开发。
AI.motivation: 机器人需要通过检测旁观者的非语言反应（如困惑、微笑）来识别自身错误，从而改进任务表现，但缺乏相关数据集和有效方法。
AI.method: 通过46个包含人类和机器人任务失败的刺激视频，收集54名参与者的2452段网络摄像头反应视频；使用深度学习模型BADNet进行失败预测，并测试不同标注方法对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 在不同标注方法下模型精度超过90%，验证了数据集有效性，并公开了BAD数据集以支持未来研究。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为机器人实时检测错误提供了新途径，BAD数据集可推动更精准的预测模型发展，提升实际应用场景中的机器人性能。

authors_text: Mengxiao Zhang,Fernando Beltran,Jiamou Liu
title: A Survey of Data Pricing for Data Marketplaces
title_zh: 数据市场数据定价调查
abstract: A data marketplace is an online venue that brings data owners, data brokers, and data consumers together and facilitates commoditisation of data amongst them. Data pricing, as a key function of a data marketplace, demands quantifying the monetary value of data. A considerable number of studies on data pricing can be found in literature. This paper attempts to comprehensively review the state-of-the-art on existing data pricing studies to provide a general understanding of this emerging research area. Our key contribution lies in a new taxonomy of data pricing studies that unifies different attributes determining data prices. The basis of our framework categorises these studies by the kind of market structure, be it sell-side, buy-side, or two-sided. Then in a sell-side market, the studies are further divided by query type, which defines the way a data consumer accesses data, while in a buy-side market, the studies are divided according to privacy notion, which defines the way to quantify privacy of data owners. In a two-sided market, both privacy notion and query type are used as criteria. We systematically examine the studies falling into each category in our taxonomy. Lastly, we discuss gaps within the existing research and define future research directions.
summary: A data marketplace is an online venue that brings data owners, data brokers, and data consumers together and facilitates commoditisation of data amongst them. Data pricing, as a key function of a data marketplace, demands quantifying the monetary value of data. A considerable number of studies on data pricing can be found in literature. This paper attempts to comprehensively review the state-of-the-art on existing data pricing studies to provide a general understanding of this emerging research area. Our key contribution lies in a new taxonomy of data pricing studies that unifies different attributes determining data prices. The basis of our framework categorises these studies by the kind of market structure, be it sell-side, buy-side, or two-sided. Then in a sell-side market, the studies are further divided by query type, which defines the way a data consumer accesses data, while in a buy-side market, the studies are divided according to privacy notion, which defines the way to quantify privacy of data owners. In a two-sided market, both privacy notion and query type are used as criteria. We systematically examine the studies falling into each category in our taxonomy. Lastly, we discuss gaps within the existing research and define future research directions.
abstract_zh: 数据市场是一个在线场所，它将数据所有者、数据经纪人和数据消费者聚集在一起，并促进他们之间的数据商品化。数据定价作为数据市场的关键功能，需要量化数据的货币价值。在文献中可以找到大量关于数据定价的研究。本文试图全面回顾现有数据定价研究的最新进展，以提供对这一新兴研究领域的总体了解。我们的主要贡献在于数据定价研究的新分类法，该分类法统一了决定数据价格的不同属性。我们框架的基础是根据市场结构的类型对这些研究进行分类，无论是卖方、买方还是双边。然后，在卖方市场中，研究进一步按查询类型划分，查询类型定义了数据消费者访问数据的方式，而在买方市场中，研究根据隐私概念划分，定义了量化数据所有者隐私的方式。在双边市场中，隐私概念和查询类型都被用作标准。我们系统地检查属于我们分类法中每个类别的研究。最后，我们讨论现有研究的差距并确定未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了数据市场中数据定价的研究现状，并提出了一种基于市场结构的新分类框架。
AI.motivation: 数据定价是数据市场核心功能，但现有研究分散且缺乏统一分类标准，阻碍了领域内知识的整合与进展。
AI.method: 通过构建涵盖市场结构（卖方/买方/双面市场）的分类框架，结合查询类型与隐私概念进行多维度细分，系统梳理各类别研究。
AI.result: 建立了统一的数据定价研究分类体系，分析了各分类下的代表性工作，并指出现有研究在隐私量化、动态定价等方向的不足。
AI.conclusion: 分类框架为理解数据定价研究提供了结构化视角，未来需加强跨市场结构模型的兼容性研究与实际场景验证。

search_text: A Survey of Data Pricing for Data Marketplaces 数据市场数据定价调查 A data marketplace is an online venue that brings data owners, data brokers, and data consumers together and facilitates commoditisation of data amongst them. Data pricing, as a key function of a data marketplace, demands quantifying the monetary value of data. A considerable number of studies on data pricing can be found in literature. This paper attempts to comprehensively review the state-of-the-art on existing data pricing studies to provide a general understanding of this emerging research area. Our key contribution lies in a new taxonomy of data pricing studies that unifies different attributes determining data prices. The basis of our framework categorises these studies by the kind of market structure, be it sell-side, buy-side, or two-sided. Then in a sell-side market, the studies are further divided by query type, which defines the way a data consumer accesses data, while in a buy-side market, the studies are divided according to privacy notion, which defines the way to quantify privacy of data owners. In a two-sided market, both privacy notion and query type are used as criteria. We systematically examine the studies falling into each category in our taxonomy. Lastly, we discuss gaps within the existing research and define future research directions. 数据市场是一个在线场所，它将数据所有者、数据经纪人和数据消费者聚集在一起，并促进他们之间的数据商品化。数据定价作为数据市场的关键功能，需要量化数据的货币价值。在文献中可以找到大量关于数据定价的研究。本文试图全面回顾现有数据定价研究的最新进展，以提供对这一新兴研究领域的总体了解。我们的主要贡献在于数据定价研究的新分类法，该分类法统一了决定数据价格的不同属性。我们框架的基础是根据市场结构的类型对这些研究进行分类，无论是卖方、买方还是双边。然后，在卖方市场中，研究进一步按查询类型划分，查询类型定义了数据消费者访问数据的方式，而在买方市场中，研究根据隐私概念划分，定义了量化数据所有者隐私的方式。在双边市场中，隐私概念和查询类型都被用作标准。我们系统地检查属于我们分类法中每个类别的研究。最后，我们讨论现有研究的差距并确定未来的研究方向。 本文系统综述了数据市场中数据定价的研究现状，并提出了一种基于市场结构的新分类框架。 Mengxiao Zhang,Fernando Beltran,Jiamou Liu cs.GT,cs.AI,cs.DB

authors_text: Han Liu,Yizhou Tian,Chacha Chen,Shi Feng,Yuxin Chen,Chenhao Tan
title: Learning Human-Compatible Representations for Case-Based Decision Support
title_zh: 学习人类兼容的表示以实现基于案例的决策支持
abstract: Algorithmic case-based decision support provides examples to help human make sense of predicted labels and aid human in decision-making tasks. Despite the promising performance of supervised learning, representations learned by supervised models may not align well with human intuitions: what models consider as similar examples can be perceived as distinct by humans. As a result, they have limited effectiveness in case-based decision support. In this work, we incorporate ideas from metric learning with supervised learning to examine the importance of alignment for effective decision support. In addition to instance-level labels, we use human-provided triplet judgments to learn human-compatible decision-focused representations. Using both synthetic data and human subject experiments in multiple classification tasks, we demonstrate that such representation is better aligned with human perception than representation solely optimized for classification. Human-compatible representations identify nearest neighbors that are perceived as more similar by humans and allow humans to make more accurate predictions, leading to substantial improvements in human decision accuracies (17.8% in butterfly vs. moth classification and 13.2% in pneumonia classification).
summary: Algorithmic case-based decision support provides examples to help human make sense of predicted labels and aid human in decision-making tasks. Despite the promising performance of supervised learning, representations learned by supervised models may not align well with human intuitions: what models consider as similar examples can be perceived as distinct by humans. As a result, they have limited effectiveness in case-based decision support. In this work, we incorporate ideas from metric learning with supervised learning to examine the importance of alignment for effective decision support. In addition to instance-level labels, we use human-provided triplet judgments to learn human-compatible decision-focused representations. Using both synthetic data and human subject experiments in multiple classification tasks, we demonstrate that such representation is better aligned with human perception than representation solely optimized for classification. Human-compatible representations identify nearest neighbors that are perceived as more similar by humans and allow humans to make more accurate predictions, leading to substantial improvements in human decision accuracies (17.8% in butterfly vs. moth classification and 13.2% in pneumonia classification).
abstract_zh: 基于案例的算法决策支持提供了示例来帮助人们理解预测的标签并帮助人们完成决策任务。尽管监督学习的性能很有前途，但监督模型学习到的表示可能与人类的直觉不太一致：模型认为相似的例子可能会被人类认为是不同的。因此，它们在基于案例的决策支持方面的有效性有限。在这项工作中，我们将度量学习和监督学习的思想结合起来，以检验对齐对于有效决策支持的重要性。除了实例级标签之外，我们还使用人类提供的三元组判断来学习与人类兼容的以决策为中心的表示。在多个分类任务中使用合成数据和人类受试者实验，我们证明这种表示比仅针对分类进行优化的表示更符合人类感知。与人类兼容的表示可以识别人类认为更相似的最近邻居，并允许人类做出更准确的预测，从而显着提高人类决策准确性（蝴蝶与飞蛾分类为 17.8%，肺炎分类为 13.2%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合度量学习与监督学习的方法，学习与人类直觉对齐的决策导向表示，以提升基于案例的决策支持效果。
AI.motivation: 监督学习模型生成的表示可能与人类感知不一致，导致案例解释和决策支持效果有限，需通过人类判断增强模型与人类认知的对齐。
AI.method: 在监督学习基础上引入人类提供的三元组判断，结合度量学习优化表示，使模型相似性判断更贴近人类感知，并通过合成数据与人类实验验证效果。
AI.result: 在蝴蝶/蛾类分类和肺炎分类任务中，人类决策准确率分别提升17.8%和13.2%，模型生成的近邻更符合人类相似性判断。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合人类三元组判断，模型表示能更好匹配人类认知，显著提升决策支持效果，证明对齐人类感知对案例解释与决策的重要性。

authors_text: Kaiyue Shen,Chen Guo,Manuel Kaufmann,Juan Jose Zarate,Julien Valentin,Jie Song,Otmar Hilliges
title: X-Avatar: Expressive Human Avatars
title_zh: X-Avatar：富有表现力的人类头像
abstract: We present X-Avatar, a novel avatar model that captures the full expressiveness of digital humans to bring about life-like experiences in telepresence, AR/VR and beyond. Our method models bodies, hands, facial expressions and appearance in a holistic fashion and can be learned from either full 3D scans or RGB-D data. To achieve this, we propose a part-aware learned forward skinning module that can be driven by the parameter space of SMPL-X, allowing for expressive animation of X-Avatars. To efficiently learn the neural shape and deformation fields, we propose novel part-aware sampling and initialization strategies. This leads to higher fidelity results, especially for smaller body parts while maintaining efficient training despite increased number of articulated bones. To capture the appearance of the avatar with high-frequency details, we extend the geometry and deformation fields with a texture network that is conditioned on pose, facial expression, geometry and the normals of the deformed surface. We show experimentally that our method outperforms strong baselines in both data domains both quantitatively and qualitatively on the animation task. To facilitate future research on expressive avatars we contribute a new dataset, called X-Humans, containing 233 sequences of high-quality textured scans from 20 participants, totalling 35,500 data frames.
summary: We present X-Avatar, a novel avatar model that captures the full expressiveness of digital humans to bring about life-like experiences in telepresence, AR/VR and beyond. Our method models bodies, hands, facial expressions and appearance in a holistic fashion and can be learned from either full 3D scans or RGB-D data. To achieve this, we propose a part-aware learned forward skinning module that can be driven by the parameter space of SMPL-X, allowing for expressive animation of X-Avatars. To efficiently learn the neural shape and deformation fields, we propose novel part-aware sampling and initialization strategies. This leads to higher fidelity results, especially for smaller body parts while maintaining efficient training despite increased number of articulated bones. To capture the appearance of the avatar with high-frequency details, we extend the geometry and deformation fields with a texture network that is conditioned on pose, facial expression, geometry and the normals of the deformed surface. We show experimentally that our method outperforms strong baselines in both data domains both quantitatively and qualitatively on the animation task. To facilitate future research on expressive avatars we contribute a new dataset, called X-Humans, containing 233 sequences of high-quality textured scans from 20 participants, totalling 35,500 data frames.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 X-Avatar，这是一种新颖的化身模型，可以捕捉数字人类的完整表现力，从而在远程呈现、AR/VR 等领域带来逼真的体验。我们的方法以整体方式对身体、手部、面部表情和外观进行建模，并且可以从完整的 3D 扫描或 RGB-D 数据中学习。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一个部分感知的学习前向蒙皮模块，该模块可以由 SMPL-X 的参数空间驱动，从而允许 X-Avatars 的表现力动画。为了有效地学习神经形状和变形场，我们提出了新颖的部分感知采样和初始化策略。这会带来更高的保真度结果，特别是对于较小的身体部位，同时尽管铰接骨骼数量增加，仍能保持有效的训练。为了捕捉具有高频细节的头像外观，我们使用以姿势、面部表情、几何形状和变形表面法线为条件的纹理网络来扩展几何形状和变形场。我们通过实验证明，我们的方法在动画任务的数量和质量上都优于两个数据域的强大基线。为了促进未来对富有表现力的化身的研究，我们贡献了一个名为 X-Humans 的新数据集，其中包含来自 20 名参与者的 233 个高质量纹理扫描序列，总计 35,500 个数据帧。

AI.tldr: 本文提出X-Avatar模型，通过融合全身动作、面部表情和外观信息，实现高保真数字人类的表达，适用于远程临场感、AR/VR等场景。
AI.motivation: 现有数字人模型在表达细腻度和身体各部分细节还原上存在不足，难以满足虚拟现实等场景对高真实感的需求。
AI.method: 设计基于SMPL-X参数空间的部件感知前向蒙皮模块，结合部件感知采样策略与纹理网络，联合建模几何形变与高精度外观细节。
AI.result: 在动画任务中定量定性优于现有方法，构建包含20名参与者35,500帧高质量纹理扫描数据的X-Humans数据集。
AI.conclusion: X-Avatar通过统一建模框架和新型网络结构显著提升数字人表现力，为未来研究提供技术方案与数据支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出X-Avatar模型，通过融合全身动作、面部表情和外观信息，实现高保真数字人类的表达，适用于远程临场感、AR/VR等场景。
ai_content.motivation: 现有数字人模型在表达细腻度和身体各部分细节还原上存在不足，难以满足虚拟现实等场景对高真实感的需求。

search_text: X-Avatar: Expressive Human Avatars X-Avatar：富有表现力的人类头像 We present X-Avatar, a novel avatar model that captures the full expressiveness of digital humans to bring about life-like experiences in telepresence, AR/VR and beyond. Our method models bodies, hands, facial expressions and appearance in a holistic fashion and can be learned from either full 3D scans or RGB-D data. To achieve this, we propose a part-aware learned forward skinning module that can be driven by the parameter space of SMPL-X, allowing for expressive animation of X-Avatars. To efficiently learn the neural shape and deformation fields, we propose novel part-aware sampling and initialization strategies. This leads to higher fidelity results, especially for smaller body parts while maintaining efficient training despite increased number of articulated bones. To capture the appearance of the avatar with high-frequency details, we extend the geometry and deformation fields with a texture network that is conditioned on pose, facial expression, geometry and the normals of the deformed surface. We show experimentally that our method outperforms strong baselines in both data domains both quantitatively and qualitatively on the animation task. To facilitate future research on expressive avatars we contribute a new dataset, called X-Humans, containing 233 sequences of high-quality textured scans from 20 participants, totalling 35,500 data frames. 我们推出了 X-Avatar，这是一种新颖的化身模型，可以捕捉数字人类的完整表现力，从而在远程呈现、AR/VR 等领域带来逼真的体验。我们的方法以整体方式对身体、手部、面部表情和外观进行建模，并且可以从完整的 3D 扫描或 RGB-D 数据中学习。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一个部分感知的学习前向蒙皮模块，该模块可以由 SMPL-X 的参数空间驱动，从而允许 X-Avatars 的表现力动画。为了有效地学习神经形状和变形场，我们提出了新颖的部分感知采样和初始化策略。这会带来更高的保真度结果，特别是对于较小的身体部位，同时尽管铰接骨骼数量增加，仍能保持有效的训练。为了捕捉具有高频细节的头像外观，我们使用以姿势、面部表情、几何形状和变形表面法线为条件的纹理网络来扩展几何形状和变形场。我们通过实验证明，我们的方法在动画任务的数量和质量上都优于两个数据域的强大基线。为了促进未来对富有表现力的化身的研究，我们贡献了一个名为 X-Humans 的新数据集，其中包含来自 20 名参与者的 233 个高质量纹理扫描序列，总计 35,500 个数据帧。 本文提出X-Avatar模型，通过融合全身动作、面部表情和外观信息，实现高保真数字人类的表达，适用于远程临场感、AR/VR等场景。 Kaiyue Shen,Chen Guo,Manuel Kaufmann,Juan Jose Zarate,Julien Valentin,Jie Song,Otmar Hilliges cs.CV

authors_text: Jiarui Xu,Sifei Liu,Arash Vahdat,Wonmin Byeon,Xiaolong Wang,Shalini De Mello
title: Open-Vocabulary Panoptic Segmentation with Text-to-Image Diffusion Models
title_zh: 使用文本到图像扩散模型的开放词汇全景分割
comment: CVPR 2023 Highlight. Project page and code: https://jerryxu.net/ODISE
comments: CVPR 2023 Highlight. Project page and code: https://jerryxu.net/ODISE
abstract: We present ODISE: Open-vocabulary DIffusion-based panoptic SEgmentation, which unifies pre-trained text-image diffusion and discriminative models to perform open-vocabulary panoptic segmentation. Text-to-image diffusion models have the remarkable ability to generate high-quality images with diverse open-vocabulary language descriptions. This demonstrates that their internal representation space is highly correlated with open concepts in the real world. Text-image discriminative models like CLIP, on the other hand, are good at classifying images into open-vocabulary labels. We leverage the frozen internal representations of both these models to perform panoptic segmentation of any category in the wild. Our approach outperforms the previous state of the art by significant margins on both open-vocabulary panoptic and semantic segmentation tasks. In particular, with COCO training only, our method achieves 23.4 PQ and 30.0 mIoU on the ADE20K dataset, with 8.3 PQ and 7.9 mIoU absolute improvement over the previous state of the art. We open-source our code and models at https://github.com/NVlabs/ODISE .
summary: We present ODISE: Open-vocabulary DIffusion-based panoptic SEgmentation, which unifies pre-trained text-image diffusion and discriminative models to perform open-vocabulary panoptic segmentation. Text-to-image diffusion models have the remarkable ability to generate high-quality images with diverse open-vocabulary language descriptions. This demonstrates that their internal representation space is highly correlated with open concepts in the real world. Text-image discriminative models like CLIP, on the other hand, are good at classifying images into open-vocabulary labels. We leverage the frozen internal representations of both these models to perform panoptic segmentation of any category in the wild. Our approach outperforms the previous state of the art by significant margins on both open-vocabulary panoptic and semantic segmentation tasks. In particular, with COCO training only, our method achieves 23.4 PQ and 30.0 mIoU on the ADE20K dataset, with 8.3 PQ and 7.9 mIoU absolute improvement over the previous state of the art. We open-source our code and models at https://github.com/NVlabs/ODISE .
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 ODISE：基于开放词汇扩散的全景分割，它统一了预先训练的文本图像扩散和判别模型来执行开放词汇全景分割。文本到图像的扩散模型具有生成具有多种开放词汇语言描述的高质量图像的卓越能力。这表明它们的内部表示空间与现实世界中的开放概念高度相关。另一方面，像 CLIP 这样的文本图像判别模型擅长将图像分类为开放词汇标签。我们利用这两个模型的冻结内部表示来执行任何类别的全景分割。我们的方法在开放词汇全景和语义分割任务上都明显优于以前的最先进技术。特别是，仅通过 COCO 训练，我们的方法在 ADE20K 数据集上实现了 23.4 PQ 和 30.0 mIoU，比之前的现有技术绝对提高了 8.3 PQ 和 7.9 mIoU。我们在 https://github.com/NVlabs/ODISE 开源我们的代码和模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ODISE方法，结合文本-图像扩散模型与判别模型，实现开放词汇全景分割。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在开放词汇分割任务中存在词汇覆盖有限的问题，而文本-图像扩散模型能生成多样开放词汇图像，CLIP等判别模型擅长分类，二者结合可提升分割性能。
AI.method: 利用预训练扩散模型和CLIP的冻结表示，通过特征对齐与分割头实现任意类别的全景分割。
AI.result: 在ADE20K数据集上，仅用COCO训练达到23.4 PQ和30.0 mIoU，较之前方法分别提升8.3 PQ和7.9 mIoU。
AI.conclusion: 证明了扩散模型与判别模型联合表示的有效性，为开放词汇分割提供新思路，并开源代码促进研究。

authors_text: Yanhao Yang,Joseph Norby,Justin K. Yim,Aaron M. Johnson
title: Proprioception and Tail Control Enable Extreme Terrain Traversal by Quadruped Robots
title_zh: 本体感觉和尾部控制使四足机器人能够穿越极端地形
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures, accepted to IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2023
comments: 8 pages, 9 figures, accepted to IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2023
abstract: Legged robots leverage ground contacts and the reaction forces they provide to achieve agile locomotion. However, uncertainty coupled with contact discontinuities can lead to failure, especially in real-world environments with unexpected height variations such as rocky hills or curbs. To enable dynamic traversal of extreme terrain, this work introduces 1) a proprioception-based gait planner for estimating unknown hybrid events due to elevation changes and responding by modifying contact schedules and planned footholds online, and 2) a two-degree-of-freedom tail for improving contact-independent control and a corresponding decoupled control scheme for better versatility and efficiency. Simulation results show that the gait planner significantly improves stability under unforeseen terrain height changes compared to methods that assume fixed contact schedules and footholds. Further, tests have shown that the tail is particularly effective at maintaining stability when encountering a terrain change with an initial angular disturbance. The results show that these approaches work synergistically to stabilize locomotion with elevation changes up to 1.5 times the leg length and tilted initial states.
summary: Legged robots leverage ground contacts and the reaction forces they provide to achieve agile locomotion. However, uncertainty coupled with contact discontinuities can lead to failure, especially in real-world environments with unexpected height variations such as rocky hills or curbs. To enable dynamic traversal of extreme terrain, this work introduces 1) a proprioception-based gait planner for estimating unknown hybrid events due to elevation changes and responding by modifying contact schedules and planned footholds online, and 2) a two-degree-of-freedom tail for improving contact-independent control and a corresponding decoupled control scheme for better versatility and efficiency. Simulation results show that the gait planner significantly improves stability under unforeseen terrain height changes compared to methods that assume fixed contact schedules and footholds. Further, tests have shown that the tail is particularly effective at maintaining stability when encountering a terrain change with an initial angular disturbance. The results show that these approaches work synergistically to stabilize locomotion with elevation changes up to 1.5 times the leg length and tilted initial states.
abstract_zh: 腿式机器人利用地面接触及其提供的反作用力来实现敏捷运动。然而，不确定性加上接触不连续性可能会导致失败，尤其是在具有意外高度变化的现实环境中，例如岩石山丘或路缘石。为了实现极端地形的动态穿越，这项工作引入了 1) 基于本体感觉的步态规划器，用于估计由于海拔变化而导致的未知混合事件，并通过在线修改接触时间表和规划的立足点进行响应，以及 2) 用于改进接触无关控制的二自由度尾部和相应的解耦控制方案，以实现更好的多功能性和效率。仿真结果表明，与假设固定接触时间表和立足点的方法相比，步态规划器在不可预见的地形高度变化下显着提高了稳定性。此外，测试表明，当遇到带有初始角度扰动的地形变化时，尾部在保持稳定性方面特别有效。结果表明，这些方法协同作用，可在海拔变化高达腿长 1.5 倍和倾斜初始状态时稳定运动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于本体感觉的步态规划器和双自由度尾部控制方案，使四足机器人能够稳定穿越极端地形。
AI.motivation: 现有腿部机器人因假设固定接触计划和足端位置，在面对岩石、台阶等突发高度变化的复杂地形时易失稳。
AI.method: 1) 设计本体感觉驱动的在线步态规划器，动态调整接触时序和足端位置；2) 开发双自由度尾部及解耦控制策略，提升无接触状态下的控制能力。
AI.result: 仿真与实验证明，该方法在1.5倍腿长的地形突变和初始倾斜状态下显著提升稳定性，尾部控制有效抑制角扰动。
AI.conclusion: 本体感觉规划与尾部控制协同作用，使四足机器人具备应对极端地形的鲁棒性与适应性。

To enable dynamic traversal of extreme terrain, this work introduces 1) a proprioception-based gait planner for estimating unknown hybrid events due to elevation changes and responding by modifying contact schedules and planned footholds online, and 2) a two-degree-of-freedom tail for improving contact-independent control and a corresponding decoupled control scheme for better versatility and efficiency. Simulation results show that the gait planner significantly improves stability under unforeseen terrain height changes compared to methods that assume fixed contact schedules and footholds. Further, tests have shown that the tail is particularly effective at maintaining stability when encountering a terrain change with an initial angular disturbance. The results show that these approaches work synergistically to stabilize locomotion with elevation changes up to 1.5 times the leg length and tilted initial states. 腿式机器人利用地面接触及其提供的反作用力来实现敏捷运动。然而，不确定性加上接触不连续性可能会导致失败，尤其是在具有意外高度变化的现实环境中，例如岩石山丘或路缘石。为了实现极端地形的动态穿越，这项工作引入了 1) 基于本体感觉的步态规划器，用于估计由于海拔变化而导致的未知混合事件，并通过在线修改接触时间表和规划的立足点进行响应，以及 2) 用于改进接触无关控制的二自由度尾部和相应的解耦控制方案，以实现更好的多功能性和效率。仿真结果表明，与假设固定接触时间表和立足点的方法相比，步态规划器在不可预见的地形高度变化下显着提高了稳定性。此外，测试表明，当遇到带有初始角度扰动的地形变化时，尾部在保持稳定性方面特别有效。结果表明，这些方法协同作用，可在海拔变化高达腿长 1.5 倍和倾斜初始状态时稳定运动。 本文提出基于本体感觉的步态规划器和双自由度尾部控制方案，使四足机器人能够稳定穿越极端地形。 Yanhao Yang,Joseph Norby,Justin K. Yim,Aaron M. Johnson cs.RO

authors_text: Paul Hagemann,Sophie Mildenberger,Lars Ruthotto,Gabriele Steidl,Nicole Tianjiao Yang
title: Multilevel Diffusion: Infinite Dimensional Score-Based Diffusion Models for Image Generation
title_zh: 多级扩散：用于图像生成的基于无限维分数的扩散模型
abstract: Score-based diffusion models (SBDM) have recently emerged as state-of-the-art approaches for image generation. Existing SBDMs are typically formulated in a finite-dimensional setting, where images are considered as tensors of finite size. This paper develops SBDMs in the infinite-dimensional setting, that is, we model the training data as functions supported on a rectangular domain. In addition to the quest for generating images at ever-higher resolutions, our primary motivation is to create a well-posed infinite-dimensional learning problem that we can discretize consistently on multiple resolution levels. We thereby intend to obtain diffusion models that generalize across different resolution levels and improve the efficiency of the training process. We demonstrate how to overcome two shortcomings of current SBDM approaches in the infinite-dimensional setting. First, we modify the forward process using trace class operators to ensure that the latent distribution is well-defined in the infinite-dimensional setting and derive the reverse processes for finite-dimensional approximations. Second, we illustrate that approximating the score function with an operator network is beneficial for multilevel training. After deriving the convergence of the discretization and the approximation of multilevel training, we demonstrate some practical benefits of our infinite-dimensional SBDM approach on a synthetic Gaussian mixture example, the MNIST dataset, and a dataset generated from a nonlinear 2D reaction-diffusion equation.

abstract_zh: Score-based diffusion models (SBDM) have recently emerged as state-of-the-art approaches for image generation. Existing SBDMs are typically formulated in a finite-dimensional setting, where images are considered as tensors of finite size.本文在无限维设置中开发了 SBDM，即将训练数据建模为矩形域上支持的函数。除了追求以更高的分辨率生成图像之外，我们的主要动机是创建一个适定的无限维学习问题，我们可以在多个分辨率级别上一致地离散化该问题。因此，我们打算获得能够泛化不同分辨率级别的扩散模型，并提高训练过程的效率。我们演示了如何在无限维设置中克服当前 SBDM 方法的两个缺点。首先，我们使用跟踪类运算符修改前向过程，以确保潜在分布在无限维设置中得到明确定义，并导出有限维近似的逆向过程。其次，我们说明用算子网络逼近得分函数有利于多级训练。在推导出离散化的收敛性和多级训练的近似之后，我们在合成高斯混合示例、MNIST 数据集以及从非线性 2D 反应扩散方程生成的数据集上展示了无限维 SBDM 方法的一些实际好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无限维分数扩散模型（SBDM）方法，用于生成高分辨率图像并解决跨分辨率泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有SBDM在有限维设置下难以处理高分辨率图像生成，且缺乏跨分辨率级别的泛化能力，需构建无限维学习框架以提升训练效率。
AI.method: 通过迹类算子修改前向过程确保无限维潜变量分布定义良好，并利用算子网络近似分数函数以支持多级训练，最终验证离散化收敛性。
AI.result: 在合成高斯混合数据、MNIST数据集及非线性反应扩散方程生成数据上验证了方法有效性，展示了跨分辨率生成与训练效率提升。
AI.conclusion: 无限维SBDM框架可有效解决高分辨率图像生成与多级训练问题，为未来扩散模型发展提供理论支持与实践方向。

authors_text: Hiroshi Hirai,Harold Nieuwboer,Michael Walter
title: Interior-point methods on manifolds: theory and applications
title_zh: 流形上的内点方法：理论与应用
comment: 85 pages. v2: Merged with independent work arXiv:2212.10981 by Hiroshi Hirai
comments: 85 pages. v2: Merged with independent work arXiv:2212.10981 by Hiroshi Hirai
abstract: Interior-point methods offer a highly versatile framework for convex optimization that is effective in theory and practice. A key notion in their theory is that of a self-concordant barrier. We give a suitable generalization of self-concordance to Riemannian manifolds and show that it gives the same structural results and guarantees as in the Euclidean setting, in particular local quadratic convergence of Newton's method. We analyze a path-following method for optimizing compatible objectives over a convex domain for which one has a self-concordant barrier, and obtain the standard complexity guarantees as in the Euclidean setting. We provide general constructions of barriers, and show that on the space of positive-definite matrices and other symmetric spaces, the squared distance to a point is self-concordant. To demonstrate the versatility of our framework, we give algorithms with state-of-the-art complexity guarantees for the general class of scaling and non-commutative optimization problems, which have been of much recent interest, and we provide the first algorithms for efficiently finding high-precision solutions for computing minimal enclosing balls and geometric medians in nonpositive curvature.
summary: Interior-point methods offer a highly versatile framework for convex optimization that is effective in theory and practice. A key notion in their theory is that of a self-concordant barrier. We give a suitable generalization of self-concordance to Riemannian manifolds and show that it gives the same structural results and guarantees as in the Euclidean setting, in particular local quadratic convergence of Newton's method. We analyze a path-following method for optimizing compatible objectives over a convex domain for which one has a self-concordant barrier, and obtain the standard complexity guarantees as in the Euclidean setting. We provide general constructions of barriers, and show that on the space of positive-definite matrices and other symmetric spaces, the squared distance to a point is self-concordant. To demonstrate the versatility of our framework, we give algorithms with state-of-the-art complexity guarantees for the general class of scaling and non-commutative optimization problems, which have been of much recent interest, and we provide the first algorithms for efficiently finding high-precision solutions for computing minimal enclosing balls and geometric medians in nonpositive curvature.
abstract_zh: 内点方法为凸优化提供了一个高度通用的框架，在理论和实践中都很有效。他们理论中的一个关键概念是自洽障碍。 We give a suitable generalization of self-concordance to Riemannian manifolds and show that it gives the same structural results and guarantees as in the Euclidean setting, in particular local quadratic convergence of Newton's method. We analyze a path-following method for optimizing compatible objectives over a convex domain for which one has a self-concordant barrier, and obtain the standard complexity guarantees as in the Euclidean setting. We provide general constructions of barriers, and show that on the space of positive-definite matrices and other symmetric spaces, the squared distance to a point is self-concordant. To demonstrate the versatility of our framework, we give algorithms with state-of-the-art complexity guarantees for the general class of scaling and non-commutative optimization problems, which have been of much recent interest, and we provide the first algorithms for efficiently finding high-precision solutions for computing minimal enclosing balls and geometric medians in nonpositive curvature.

AI.tldr: 本文将内点法推广到黎曼流形，通过自共轭障碍函数的扩展，实现流形上凸优化问题的高效求解，并应用于矩阵缩放和非对称优化等实际问题。
AI.motivation: 传统内点法局限于欧几里得空间，难以处理流形结构的优化问题。而流形上的优化在机器学习、几何处理等领域具有重要应用，亟需理论支持与算法框架。
AI.method: 提出流形上的自共轭障碍函数定义，证明牛顿法局部二次收敛性；设计路径跟踪算法并分析复杂度；构造正定矩阵流形等典型空间的障碍函数，结合非正曲率几何特性开发高效算法。
AI.result: 获得与欧氏空间一致的复杂度保证，在正定矩阵流形等场景验证障碍函数有效性，首次实现非正曲率空间下最小包围球和几何中位数的高精度求解。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为流形优化提供了理论完备且实用的算法工具，显著拓展了内点法的应用边界，为处理非欧几里得结构的优化问题奠定基础。

authors_text: Florian Jaeckle,Fartash Faghri,Ali Farhadi,Oncel Tuzel,Hadi Pouransari
title: FastFill: Efficient Compatible Model Update
title_zh: FastFill：高效兼容模型更新
comment: To appear in The Eleventh International Conference on Learning Representations
comments: To appear in The Eleventh International Conference on Learning Representations
abstract: In many retrieval systems the original high dimensional data (e.g., images) is mapped to a lower dimensional feature through a learned embedding model. The task of retrieving the most similar data from a gallery set to a given query data is performed through a similarity comparison on features. When the embedding model is updated, it might produce features that are not comparable/compatible with features already in the gallery computed with the old model. Subsequently, all features in the gallery need to be re-computed using the new embedding model -- a computationally expensive process called backfilling. Recently, compatible representation learning methods have been proposed to avoid backfilling. Despite their relative success, there is an inherent trade-off between the new model performance and its compatibility with the old model. In this work, we introduce FastFill: a compatible model update process using feature alignment and policy based partial backfilling to promptly elevate retrieval performance. We show that previous backfilling strategies suffer from decreased performance and demonstrate the importance of both the training objective and the ordering in online partial backfilling. We propose a new training method for feature alignment between old and new embedding models using uncertainty estimation. Compared to previous works, we obtain significantly improved backfilling results on a variety of datasets: mAP on ImageNet (+4.4\%), Places-365 (+2.7\%), and VGG-Face2 (+1.3\%). Further, we demonstrate that when updating a biased model with FastFill, the minority subgroup accuracy gap promptly vanishes with a small fraction of partial backfilling.
summary: In many retrieval systems the original high dimensional data (e.g., images) is mapped to a lower dimensional feature through a learned embedding model. The task of retrieving the most similar data from a gallery set to a given query data is performed through a similarity comparison on features. When the embedding model is updated, it might produce features that are not comparable/compatible with features already in the gallery computed with the old model. Subsequently, all features in the gallery need to be re-computed using the new embedding model -- a computationally expensive process called backfilling. Recently, compatible representation learning methods have been proposed to avoid backfilling. Despite their relative success, there is an inherent trade-off between the new model performance and its compatibility with the old model. In this work, we introduce FastFill: a compatible model update process using feature alignment and policy based partial backfilling to promptly elevate retrieval performance. We show that previous backfilling strategies suffer from decreased performance and demonstrate the importance of both the training objective and the ordering in online partial backfilling. We propose a new training method for feature alignment between old and new embedding models using uncertainty estimation. Compared to previous works, we obtain significantly improved backfilling results on a variety of datasets: mAP on ImageNet (+4.4\%), Places-365 (+2.7\%), and VGG-Face2 (+1.3\%). Further, we demonstrate that when updating a biased model with FastFill, the minority subgroup accuracy gap promptly vanishes with a small fraction of partial backfilling.
abstract_zh: 在许多检索系统中，原始高维数据（例如图像）通过学习的嵌入模型映射到较低维特征。从图库集中检索与给定查询数据最相似的数据的任务是通过特征的相似性比较来执行的。当嵌入模型更新时，它可能会产生与旧模型计算的图库中已有的特征无法比较/兼容的特征。随后，图库中的所有特征都需要使用新的嵌入模型重新计算——这是一个计算成本高昂的过程，称为回填。最近，已经提出了兼容的表示学习方法来避免回填。尽管它们相对成功，但新模型的性能与其与旧模型的兼容性之间存在固有的权衡。在这项工作中，我们引入了 FastFill：一种兼容的模型更新过程，使用特征对齐和基于策略的部分回填来快速提升检索性能。我们表明，以前的回填策略性能下降，并证明了在线部分回填中训练目标和顺序的重要性。我们提出了一种使用不确定性估计来实现新旧嵌入模型之间特征对齐的新训练方法。与之前的工作相比，我们在各种数据集上获得了显着改善的回填结果：ImageNet 上的 mAP (+4.4\%)、Places-365 (+2.7\%) 和 VGG-Face2 (+1.3\%)。此外，我们证明，当使用 FastFill 更新有偏差的模型时，少数子组的准确度差距会通过一小部分部分回填而迅速消失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FastFill方法，通过特征对齐和部分回填策略，实现高效兼容的模型更新以提升检索性能。
AI.motivation: 传统模型更新需全量回填历史特征导致计算成本高，而现有兼容方法存在新旧模型性能与兼容性之间的权衡问题。
AI.method: 结合特征对齐训练与基于不确定性的部分回填策略，通过在线分阶段回填优化训练目标与顺序。
AI.result: 在ImageNet/Places-365/VGG-Face2数据集上mAP分别提升4.4%/2.7%/1.3%，且能快速消除偏倚模型的子群准确率差距。
AI.conclusion: FastFill通过创新训练方法与回填策略，在保证兼容性的同时显著提升更新效率与公平性，为模型迭代提供新范式。

The task of retrieving the most similar data from a gallery set to a given query data is performed through a similarity comparison on features. When the embedding model is updated, it might produce features that are not comparable/compatible with features already in the gallery computed with the old model. Subsequently, all features in the gallery need to be re-computed using the new embedding model -- a computationally expensive process called backfilling. Recently, compatible representation learning methods have been proposed to avoid backfilling. Despite their relative success, there is an inherent trade-off between the new model performance and its compatibility with the old model. In this work, we introduce FastFill: a compatible model update process using feature alignment and policy based partial backfilling to promptly elevate retrieval performance. We show that previous backfilling strategies suffer from decreased performance and demonstrate the importance of both the training objective and the ordering in online partial backfilling. We propose a new training method for feature alignment between old and new embedding models using uncertainty estimation. Compared to previous works, we obtain significantly improved backfilling results on a variety of datasets: mAP on ImageNet (+4.4\%), Places-365 (+2.7\%), and VGG-Face2 (+1.3\%). Further, we demonstrate that when updating a biased model with FastFill, the minority subgroup accuracy gap promptly vanishes with a small fraction of partial backfilling. 在许多检索系统中，原始高维数据（例如图像）通过学习的嵌入模型映射到较低维特征。从图库集中检索与给定查询数据最相似的数据的任务是通过特征的相似性比较来执行的。当嵌入模型更新时，它可能会产生与旧模型计算的图库中已有的特征无法比较/兼容的特征。随后，图库中的所有特征都需要使用新的嵌入模型重新计算——这是一个计算成本高昂的过程，称为回填。最近，已经提出了兼容的表示学习方法来避免回填。尽管它们相对成功，但新模型的性能与其与旧模型的兼容性之间存在固有的权衡。在这项工作中，我们引入了 FastFill：一种兼容的模型更新过程，使用特征对齐和基于策略的部分回填来快速提升检索性能。我们表明，以前的回填策略性能下降，并证明了在线部分回填中训练目标和顺序的重要性。我们提出了一种使用不确定性估计来实现新旧嵌入模型之间特征对齐的新训练方法。与之前的工作相比，我们在各种数据集上获得了显着改善的回填结果：ImageNet 上的 mAP (+4.4\%)、Places-365 (+2.7\%) 和 VGG-Face2 (+1.3\%)。此外，我们证明，当使用 FastFill 更新有偏差的模型时，少数子组的准确度差距会通过一小部分部分回填而迅速消失。 本文提出FastFill方法，通过特征对齐和部分回填策略，实现高效兼容的模型更新以提升检索性能。 Florian Jaeckle,Fartash Faghri,Ali Farhadi,Oncel Tuzel,Hadi Pouransari cs.CV,cs.IR,cs.LG

authors_text: Shaoteng Liu,Yuechen Zhang,Wenbo Li,Zhe Lin,Jiaya Jia
title: Video-P2P: Video Editing with Cross-attention Control
title_zh: Video-P2P：具有交叉注意力控制的视频编辑
abstract: This paper presents Video-P2P, a novel framework for real-world video editing with cross-attention control. While attention control has proven effective for image editing with pre-trained image generation models, there are currently no large-scale video generation models publicly available. Video-P2P addresses this limitation by adapting an image generation diffusion model to complete various video editing tasks. Specifically, we propose to first tune a Text-to-Set (T2S) model to complete an approximate inversion and then optimize a shared unconditional embedding to achieve accurate video inversion with a small memory cost. For attention control, we introduce a novel decoupled-guidance strategy, which uses different guidance strategies for the source and target prompts. The optimized unconditional embedding for the source prompt improves reconstruction ability, while an initialized unconditional embedding for the target prompt enhances editability. Incorporating the attention maps of these two branches enables detailed editing. These technical designs enable various text-driven editing applications, including word swap, prompt refinement, and attention re-weighting. Video-P2P works well on real-world videos for generating new characters while optimally preserving their original poses and scenes. It significantly outperforms previous approaches.
summary: This paper presents Video-P2P, a novel framework for real-world video editing with cross-attention control. While attention control has proven effective for image editing with pre-trained image generation models, there are currently no large-scale video generation models publicly available. Video-P2P addresses this limitation by adapting an image generation diffusion model to complete various video editing tasks. Specifically, we propose to first tune a Text-to-Set (T2S) model to complete an approximate inversion and then optimize a shared unconditional embedding to achieve accurate video inversion with a small memory cost. For attention control, we introduce a novel decoupled-guidance strategy, which uses different guidance strategies for the source and target prompts. The optimized unconditional embedding for the source prompt improves reconstruction ability, while an initialized unconditional embedding for the target prompt enhances editability. Incorporating the attention maps of these two branches enables detailed editing. These technical designs enable various text-driven editing applications, including word swap, prompt refinement, and attention re-weighting. Video-P2P works well on real-world videos for generating new characters while optimally preserving their original poses and scenes. It significantly outperforms previous approaches.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 Video-P2P，这是一种具有交叉注意力控制的现实世界视频编辑的新颖框架。虽然注意力控制已被证明对于使用预先训练的图像生成模型进行图像编辑是有效的，但目前还没有公开可用的大规模视频生成模型。 Video-P2P 通过采用图像生成扩散模型来完成各种视频编辑任务来解决此限制。具体来说，我们建议首先调整 Text-to-Set (T2S) 模型来完成近似反转，然后优化共享无条件嵌入，以较小的内存成本实现准确的视频反转。对于注意力控制，我们引入了一种新颖的解耦引导策略，该策略对源提示和目标提示使用不同的引导策略。源提示的优化无条件嵌入提高了重构能力，而目标提示的初始化无条件嵌入增强了可编辑性。合并这两个分支的注意力图可以进行详细的编辑。这些技术设计支持各种文本驱动的编辑应用程序，包括单词交换、提示细化和注意力重新加权。视频 P2P 非常适用于现实世界的视频，可以生成新角色，同时最佳地保留其原始姿势和场景。它明显优于以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Video-P2P框架，通过交叉注意力控制实现真实世界视频编辑。
AI.motivation: 尽管注意力控制在图像编辑中有效，但缺乏大规模视频生成模型，现有方法难以直接应用。
AI.method: 通过微调文本到集合模型实现近似反转，优化共享无条件嵌入降低内存成本，并引入源提示与目标提示的解耦引导策略。
AI.result: 在真实视频中生成新角色时能有效保持原姿态和场景，显著优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过交叉注意力机制实现了高效且精确的文本驱动视频编辑。
