authors_text: Puijin Cheng,Li Lin,Yijin Huang,Huaqing He,Wenhan Luo,Xiaoying Tang
title: Learning Enhancement From Degradation: A Diffusion Model For Fundus Image Enhancement
title_zh: 从退化中学习增强：眼底图像增强的扩散模型
abstract: The quality of a fundus image can be compromised by numerous factors, many of which are challenging to be appropriately and mathematically modeled. In this paper, we introduce a novel diffusion model based framework, named Learning Enhancement from Degradation (LED), for enhancing fundus images. Specifically, we first adopt a data-driven degradation framework to learn degradation mappings from unpaired high-quality to low-quality images. We then apply a conditional diffusion model to learn the inverse enhancement process in a paired manner. The proposed LED is able to output enhancement results that maintain clinically important features with better clarity. Moreover, in the inference phase, LED can be easily and effectively integrated with any existing fundus image enhancement framework. We evaluate the proposed LED on several downstream tasks with respect to various clinically-relevant metrics, successfully demonstrating its superiority over existing state-of-the-art methods both quantitatively and qualitatively. The source code is available at https://github.com/QtacierP/LED.
summary: The quality of a fundus image can be compromised by numerous factors, many of which are challenging to be appropriately and mathematically modeled. In this paper, we introduce a novel diffusion model based framework, named Learning Enhancement from Degradation (LED), for enhancing fundus images. Specifically, we first adopt a data-driven degradation framework to learn degradation mappings from unpaired high-quality to low-quality images. We then apply a conditional diffusion model to learn the inverse enhancement process in a paired manner. The proposed LED is able to output enhancement results that maintain clinically important features with better clarity. Moreover, in the inference phase, LED can be easily and effectively integrated with any existing fundus image enhancement framework. We evaluate the proposed LED on several downstream tasks with respect to various clinically-relevant metrics, successfully demonstrating its superiority over existing state-of-the-art methods both quantitatively and qualitatively. The source code is available at https://github.com/QtacierP/LED.
abstract_zh: 眼底图像的质量可能会受到多种因素的影响，其中许多因素很难进行适当的数学建模。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于扩散模型的新型框架，称为退化学习增强（LED），用于增强眼底图像。具体来说，我们首先采用数据驱动的退化框架来学习从不配对的高质量图像到低质量图像的退化映射。然后，我们应用条件扩散模型以配对方式学习逆增强过程。所提出的 LED 能够输出增强结果，以更好的清晰度保持临床重要特征。此外，在推理阶段，LED可以轻松有效地与任何现有的眼底图像增强框架集成。我们评估了所提出的 LED 在多个下游任务中的各种临床相关指标，成功地在定量和定性方面证明了其相对于现有最先进方法的优越性。源代码可在 https://github.com/QtacierP/LED 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的新型框架LED，用于增强眼底图像质量。
AI.motivation: 眼底图像质量易受多种难以数学建模的因素影响，现有增强方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 采用数据驱动的退化框架学习无配对高低质量图像映射，再通过条件扩散模型实现配对增强过程。
AI.result: 在多个临床相关任务中，LED在定量和定性指标上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: LED能有效保持临床关键特征，且可无缝集成现有增强框架，具有显著优势。

search_text: Learning Enhancement From Degradation: A Diffusion Model For Fundus Image Enhancement 从退化中学习增强：眼底图像增强的扩散模型 The quality of a fundus image can be compromised by numerous factors, many of which are challenging to be appropriately and mathematically modeled. In this paper, we introduce a novel diffusion model based framework, named Learning Enhancement from Degradation (LED), for enhancing fundus images. Specifically, we first adopt a data-driven degradation framework to learn degradation mappings from unpaired high-quality to low-quality images. We then apply a conditional diffusion model to learn the inverse enhancement process in a paired manner. The proposed LED is able to output enhancement results that maintain clinically important features with better clarity. Moreover, in the inference phase, LED can be easily and effectively integrated with any existing fundus image enhancement framework. We evaluate the proposed LED on several downstream tasks with respect to various clinically-relevant metrics, successfully demonstrating its superiority over existing state-of-the-art methods both quantitatively and qualitatively. The source code is available at https://github.com/QtacierP/LED. 眼底图像的质量可能会受到多种因素的影响，其中许多因素很难进行适当的数学建模。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于扩散模型的新型框架，称为退化学习增强（LED），用于增强眼底图像。具体来说，我们首先采用数据驱动的退化框架来学习从不配对的高质量图像到低质量图像的退化映射。然后，我们应用条件扩散模型以配对方式学习逆增强过程。所提出的 LED 能够输出增强结果，以更好的清晰度保持临床重要特征。此外，在推理阶段，LED可以轻松有效地与任何现有的眼底图像增强框架集成。我们评估了所提出的 LED 在多个下游任务中的各种临床相关指标，成功地在定量和定性方面证明了其相对于现有最先进方法的优越性。源代码可在 https://github.com/QtacierP/LED 获取。 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的新型框架LED，用于增强眼底图像质量。 Puijin Cheng,Li Lin,Yijin Huang,Huaqing He,Wenhan Luo,Xiaoying Tang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Yahui Liu,Bin Tian,Yisheng Lv,Lingxi Li,Feiyue Wang
title: Point Cloud Classification Using Content-based Transformer via Clustering in Feature Space
title_zh: 通过特征空间中的聚类使用基于内容的转换器进行点云分类
comment: This paper is accepted to IEEE/CAA Journal of Automatica Sinica (JAS)
comments: This paper is accepted to IEEE/CAA Journal of Automatica Sinica (JAS)
abstract: Recently, there have been some attempts of Transformer in 3D point cloud classification. In order to reduce computations, most existing methods focus on local spatial attention, but ignore their content and fail to establish relationships between distant but relevant points. To overcome the limitation of local spatial attention, we propose a point content-based Transformer architecture, called PointConT for short. It exploits the locality of points in the feature space (content-based), which clusters the sampled points with similar features into the same class and computes the self-attention within each class, thus enabling an effective trade-off between capturing long-range dependencies and computational complexity. We further introduce an Inception feature aggregator for point cloud classification, which uses parallel structures to aggregate high-frequency and low-frequency information in each branch separately. Extensive experiments show that our PointConT model achieves a remarkable performance on point cloud shape classification. Especially, our method exhibits 90.3% Top-1 accuracy on the hardest setting of ScanObjectNN. Source code of this paper is available at https://github.com/yahuiliu99/PointConT.
summary: Recently, there have been some attempts of Transformer in 3D point cloud classification. In order to reduce computations, most existing methods focus on local spatial attention, but ignore their content and fail to establish relationships between distant but relevant points. To overcome the limitation of local spatial attention, we propose a point content-based Transformer architecture, called PointConT for short. It exploits the locality of points in the feature space (content-based), which clusters the sampled points with similar features into the same class and computes the self-attention within each class, thus enabling an effective trade-off between capturing long-range dependencies and computational complexity. We further introduce an Inception feature aggregator for point cloud classification, which uses parallel structures to aggregate high-frequency and low-frequency information in each branch separately. Extensive experiments show that our PointConT model achieves a remarkable performance on point cloud shape classification. Especially, our method exhibits 90.3% Top-1 accuracy on the hardest setting of ScanObjectNN. Source code of this paper is available at https://github.com/yahuiliu99/PointConT.
abstract_zh: 最近，Transformer在3D点云分类方面有了一些尝试。为了减少计算量，大多数现有方法关注局部空间注意力，但忽略了其内容，并且无法建立遥远但相关的点之间的关系。为了克服局部空间注意力的限制，我们提出了一种基于点内容的 Transformer 架构，简称为 PointConT。它利用特征空间中点的局部性（基于内容），将具有相似特征的采样点聚类到同一类中，并计算每个类内的自注意力，从而在捕获长程依赖性和计算复杂性之间实现有效的权衡。我们进一步引入了用于点云分类的 Inception 特征聚合器，它使用并行结构分别聚合每个分支中的高频和低频信息。大量实验表明，我们的 PointConT 模型在点云形状分类方面取得了显着的性能。特别是，我们的方法在 ScanObjectNN 最困难的设置上表现出 90.3% 的 Top-1 准确率。本文源代码可在 https://github.com/yahuiliu99/PointConT 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于内容的Transformer架构PointConT，通过特征空间聚类进行点云分类，解决局部注意力机制无法捕捉远距离相关点的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖局部空间注意力，忽略点云内容特征，导致无法建立远距离但相关点之间的关联，影响分类性能。
AI.method: 设计PointConT架构，在特征空间聚类相似点并计算类内自注意力，结合Inception特征聚合器分离聚合高低频信息。
AI.result: 在ScanObjectNN数据集最困难设置下达到90.3% Top-1准确率，验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: PointConT通过内容感知聚类与多尺度特征融合，在计算效率与长距离依赖建模间取得平衡，为点云分类提供新思路。

authors_text: Peng Xue,Jingyang Zhang,Lei Ma,Mianxin Liu,Yuning Gu,Jiawei Huang,Feihong Liua,Yongsheng Pan,Xiaohuan Cao,Dinggang Shen
title: Structure-aware registration network for liver DCE-CT images
title_zh: 肝脏 DCE-CT 图像的结构感知配准网络
abstract: Image registration of liver dynamic contrast-enhanced computed tomography (DCE-CT) is crucial for diagnosis and image-guided surgical planning of liver cancer. However, intensity variations due to the flow of contrast agents combined with complex spatial motion induced by respiration brings great challenge to existing intensity-based registration methods. To address these problems, we propose a novel structure-aware registration method by incorporating structural information of related organs with segmentation-guided deep registration network. Existing segmentation-guided registration methods only focus on volumetric registration inside the paired organ segmentations, ignoring the inherent attributes of their anatomical structures. In addition, such paired organ segmentations are not always available in DCE-CT images due to the flow of contrast agents. Different from existing segmentation-guided registration methods, our proposed method extracts structural information in hierarchical geometric perspectives of line and surface. Then, according to the extracted structural information, structure-aware constraints are constructed and imposed on the forward and backward deformation field simultaneously. In this way, all available organ segmentations, including unpaired ones, can be fully utilized to avoid the side effect of contrast agent and preserve the topology of organs during registration. Extensive experiments on an in-house liver DCE-CT dataset and a public LiTS dataset show that our proposed method can achieve higher registration accuracy and preserve anatomical structure more effectively than state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Image registration of liver dynamic contrast-enhanced computed tomography (DCE-CT) is crucial for diagnosis and image-guided surgical planning of liver cancer. However, intensity variations due to the flow of contrast agents combined with complex spatial motion induced by respiration brings great challenge to existing intensity-based registration methods. To address these problems, we propose a novel structure-aware registration method by incorporating structural information of related organs with segmentation-guided deep registration network. Existing segmentation-guided registration methods only focus on volumetric registration inside the paired organ segmentations, ignoring the inherent attributes of their anatomical structures. In addition, such paired organ segmentations are not always available in DCE-CT images due to the flow of contrast agents. Different from existing segmentation-guided registration methods, our proposed method extracts structural information in hierarchical geometric perspectives of line and surface. Then, according to the extracted structural information, structure-aware constraints are constructed and imposed on the forward and backward deformation field simultaneously. In this way, all available organ segmentations, including unpaired ones, can be fully utilized to avoid the side effect of contrast agent and preserve the topology of organs during registration. Extensive experiments on an in-house liver DCE-CT dataset and a public LiTS dataset show that our proposed method can achieve higher registration accuracy and preserve anatomical structure more effectively than state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 肝脏动态对比增强计算机断层扫描 (DCE-CT) 的图像配准对于肝癌的诊断和图像引导手术计划至关重要。然而，造影剂流动引起的强度变化加上呼吸引起的复杂空间运动给现有的基于强度的配准方法带来了巨大的挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的结构感知配准方法，通过将相关器官的结构信息与分割引导的深度配准网络相结合。现有的分割引导配准方法仅关注配对器官分割内的体积配准，忽略了其解剖结构的固有属性。此外，由于造影剂的流动，这种配对器官分割在 DCE-CT 图像中并不总是可用。与现有的分割引导配准方法不同，我们提出的方法在线和表面的分层几何视角中提取结构信息。然后，根据提取的结构信息，构造结构感知约束并同时施加于前向和后向变形场。这样，可以充分利用所有可用的器官分割，包括未配对的器官分割，以避免造影剂的副作用并在配准过程中保留器官的拓扑结构。对内部肝脏 DCE-CT 数据集和公共 LiTS 数据集的大量实验表明，我们提出的方法比最先进的方法可以实现更高的配准精度并更有效地保存解剖结构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结构感知的配准网络，用于肝脏动态对比增强CT（DCE-CT）图像的配准。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于强度的配准方法在处理肝脏DCE-CT图像时，由于对比剂流动引起的强度变化和呼吸引起的复杂空间运动，面临很大挑战。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种结构感知的配准方法，通过结合相关器官的结构信息与分割引导的深度配准网络，从线和面的层次几何视角提取结构信息，并构建结构感知约束，同时施加于前向和后向变形场。
AI.result: 在内部肝脏DCE-CT数据集和公共LiTS数据集上的大量实验表明，本文提出的方法在配准精度和保持解剖结构方面优于最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的结构感知配准方法能够有效避免对比剂的影响并保持器官拓扑结构，适用于肝脏DCE-CT图像的配准。

method: 本文提出了一种结构感知的配准方法，通过结合相关器官的结构信息与分割引导的深度配准网络，从线和面的层次几何视角提取结构信息，并构建结构感知约束，同时施加于前向和后向变形场。

conclusion: 本文提出的结构感知配准方法能够有效避免对比剂的影响并保持器官拓扑结构，适用于肝脏DCE-CT图像的配准。
search_text: Structure-aware registration network for liver DCE-CT images 肝脏 DCE-CT 图像的结构感知配准网络 Image registration of liver dynamic contrast-enhanced computed tomography (DCE-CT) is crucial for diagnosis and image-guided surgical planning of liver cancer. However, intensity variations due to the flow of contrast agents combined with complex spatial motion induced by respiration brings great challenge to existing intensity-based registration methods. To address these problems, we propose a novel structure-aware registration method by incorporating structural information of related organs with segmentation-guided deep registration network. Existing segmentation-guided registration methods only focus on volumetric registration inside the paired organ segmentations, ignoring the inherent attributes of their anatomical structures. In addition, such paired organ segmentations are not always available in DCE-CT images due to the flow of contrast agents. Different from existing segmentation-guided registration methods, our proposed method extracts structural information in hierarchical geometric perspectives of line and surface. Then, according to the extracted structural information, structure-aware constraints are constructed and imposed on the forward and backward deformation field simultaneously. In this way, all available organ segmentations, including unpaired ones, can be fully utilized to avoid the side effect of contrast agent and preserve the topology of organs during registration. Extensive experiments on an in-house liver DCE-CT dataset and a public LiTS dataset show that our proposed method can achieve higher registration accuracy and preserve anatomical structure more effectively than state-of-the-art methods. 肝脏动态对比增强计算机断层扫描 (DCE-CT) 的图像配准对于肝癌的诊断和图像引导手术计划至关重要。然而，造影剂流动引起的强度变化加上呼吸引起的复杂空间运动给现有的基于强度的配准方法带来了巨大的挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的结构感知配准方法，通过将相关器官的结构信息与分割引导的深度配准网络相结合。现有的分割引导配准方法仅关注配对器官分割内的体积配准，忽略了其解剖结构的固有属性。此外，由于造影剂的流动，这种配对器官分割在 DCE-CT 图像中并不总是可用。与现有的分割引导配准方法不同，我们提出的方法在线和表面的分层几何视角中提取结构信息。然后，根据提取的结构信息，构造结构感知约束并同时施加于前向和后向变形场。这样，可以充分利用所有可用的器官分割，包括未配对的器官分割，以避免造影剂的副作用并在配准过程中保留器官的拓扑结构。对内部肝脏 DCE-CT 数据集和公共 LiTS 数据集的大量实验表明，我们提出的方法比最先进的方法可以实现更高的配准精度并更有效地保存解剖结构。 本文提出了一种结构感知的配准网络，用于肝脏动态对比增强CT（DCE-CT）图像的配准。 Peng Xue,Jingyang Zhang,Lei Ma,Mianxin Liu,Yuning Gu,Jiawei Huang,Feihong Liua,Yongsheng Pan,Xiaohuan Cao,Dinggang Shen eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Maxence Hussonnois,Thommen George Karimpanal,Santu Rana
title: Controlled Diversity with Preference : Towards Learning a Diverse Set of Desired Skills
title_zh: 有偏好的受控多样性：学习多样化的所需技能
abstract: Autonomously learning diverse behaviors without an extrinsic reward signal has been a problem of interest in reinforcement learning. However, the nature of learning in such mechanisms is unconstrained, often resulting in the accumulation of several unusable, unsafe or misaligned skills. In order to avoid such issues and ensure the discovery of safe and human-aligned skills, it is necessary to incorporate humans into the unsupervised training process, which remains a largely unexplored research area. In this work, we propose Controlled Diversity with Preference (CDP), a novel, collaborative human-guided mechanism for an agent to learn a set of skills that is diverse as well as desirable. The key principle is to restrict the discovery of skills to those regions that are deemed to be desirable as per a preference model trained using human preference labels on trajectory pairs. We evaluate our approach on 2D navigation and Mujoco environments and demonstrate the ability to discover diverse, yet desirable skills.
summary: Autonomously learning diverse behaviors without an extrinsic reward signal has been a problem of interest in reinforcement learning. However, the nature of learning in such mechanisms is unconstrained, often resulting in the accumulation of several unusable, unsafe or misaligned skills. In order to avoid such issues and ensure the discovery of safe and human-aligned skills, it is necessary to incorporate humans into the unsupervised training process, which remains a largely unexplored research area. In this work, we propose Controlled Diversity with Preference (CDP), a novel, collaborative human-guided mechanism for an agent to learn a set of skills that is diverse as well as desirable. The key principle is to restrict the discovery of skills to those regions that are deemed to be desirable as per a preference model trained using human preference labels on trajectory pairs. We evaluate our approach on 2D navigation and Mujoco environments and demonstrate the ability to discover diverse, yet desirable skills.
abstract_zh: 在没有外部奖励信号的情况下自主学习不同的行为一直是强化学习中感兴趣的问题。然而，这种机制中学习的本质是不受限制的，通常会导致一些无法使用、不安全或错位的技能的积累。为了避免此类问题并确保发现安全且适合人类的技能，有必要将人类纳入无监督的训练过程中，这仍然是一个很大程度上未经探索的研究领域。在这项工作中，我们提出了具有偏好的受控多样性（CDP），这是一种新颖的、协作式人类引导机制，使代理能够学习一组多样化且理想的技能。关键原则是将技能的发现限制在那些根据使用轨迹对上的人类偏好标签训练的偏好模型被认为是理想的区域。我们评估了我们在 2D 导航和 Mujoco 环境中的方法，并展示了发现多样化但理想的技能的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于人类偏好的控制多样性方法（CDP），用于在无外部奖励信号的情况下学习多样且符合人类期望的技能集。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在无外部奖励信号时易生成不安全或不符合人类需求的技能，需引入人类指导以确保技能的安全性与对齐性。
AI.method: 通过训练人类偏好模型，将技能探索限制在符合偏好模型的区域，结合人类轨迹对标签实现人类引导的多样性控制。
AI.result: 在2D导航和Mujoco环境中验证了CDP能有效发现多样且符合人类期望的技能。
AI.conclusion: CDP方法通过整合人类偏好，在保证技能多样性的同时提升了技能的可接受性与安全性。

authors_text: Xiaoyu Ren,Zhongying Deng,Jin Ye,Junjun He,Dongxu Yang
title: FCN+: Global Receptive Convolution Makes FCN Great Again
title_zh: FCN+：全局接受卷积让 FCN 再次伟大
abstract: Fully convolutional network (FCN) is a seminal work for semantic segmentation. However, due to its limited receptive field, FCN cannot effectively capture global context information which is vital for semantic segmentation. As a result, it is beaten by state-of-the-art methods that leverage different filter sizes for larger receptive fields. However, such a strategy usually introduces more parameters and increases the computational cost. In this paper, we propose a novel global receptive convolution (GRC) to effectively increase the receptive field of FCN for context information extraction, which results in an improved FCN termed FCN+. The GRC provides the global receptive field for convolution without introducing any extra learnable parameters. The motivation of GRC is that different channels of a convolutional filter can have different grid sampling locations across the whole input feature map. Specifically, the GRC first divides the channels of the filter into two groups. The grid sampling locations of the first group are shifted to different spatial coordinates across the whole feature map, according to their channel indexes. This can help the convolutional filter capture the global context information. The grid sampling location of the second group remains unchanged to keep the original location information. By convolving using these two groups, the GRC can integrate the global context into the original location information of each pixel for better dense prediction results. With the GRC built in, FCN+ can achieve comparable performance to state-of-the-art methods for semantic segmentation tasks, as verified on PASCAL VOC 2012, Cityscapes, and ADE20K. Our code will be released at https://github.com/Zhongying-Deng/FCN_Plus.
summary: Fully convolutional network (FCN) is a seminal work for semantic segmentation. However, due to its limited receptive field, FCN cannot effectively capture global context information which is vital for semantic segmentation. As a result, it is beaten by state-of-the-art methods that leverage different filter sizes for larger receptive fields. However, such a strategy usually introduces more parameters and increases the computational cost. In this paper, we propose a novel global receptive convolution (GRC) to effectively increase the receptive field of FCN for context information extraction, which results in an improved FCN termed FCN+. The GRC provides the global receptive field for convolution without introducing any extra learnable parameters. The motivation of GRC is that different channels of a convolutional filter can have different grid sampling locations across the whole input feature map. Specifically, the GRC first divides the channels of the filter into two groups. The grid sampling locations of the first group are shifted to different spatial coordinates across the whole feature map, according to their channel indexes. This can help the convolutional filter capture the global context information. The grid sampling location of the second group remains unchanged to keep the original location information. By convolving using these two groups, the GRC can integrate the global context into the original location information of each pixel for better dense prediction results. With the GRC built in, FCN+ can achieve comparable performance to state-of-the-art methods for semantic segmentation tasks, as verified on PASCAL VOC 2012, Cityscapes, and ADE20K. Our code will be released at https://github.com/Zhongying-Deng/FCN_Plus.
abstract_zh: 全卷积网络（FCN）是语义分割的开创性工作。然而，由于其有限的感受野，FCN 无法有效捕获对于语义分割至关重要的全局上下文信息。因此，它被最先进的方法击败，这些方法利用不同的滤波器尺寸来获得更大的感受野。然而，这种策略通常会引入更多参数并增加计算成本。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的全局感受卷积（GRC）来有效地增加FCN的感受野以进行上下文信息提取，从而产生了一种改进的FCN，称为FCN+。 GRC 为卷积提供了全局感受野，而无需引入任何额外的可学习参数。 GRC 的动机是卷积滤波器的不同通道可以在整个输入特征图上具有不同的网格采样位置。具体来说，GRC首先将滤波器的通道分为两组。根据通道索引，第一组的网格采样位置被移动到整个特征图上的不同空间坐标。这可以帮助卷积滤波器捕获全局上下文信息。第二组网格采样位置保持不变，保持原有位置信息。通过使用这两组进行卷积，GRC 可以将全局上下文集成到每个像素的原始位置信息中，以获得更好的密集预测结果。通过内置 GRC，FCN+ 可以在语义分割任务中实现与最先进的方法相当的性能，这一点已在 PASCAL VOC 2012、Cityscapes 和 ADE20K 上得到验证。我们的代码将发布在https://github.com/Zhongying-Deng/FCN_Plus。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的全卷积网络（FCN+），通过引入全局感受野卷积（GRC）来增强FCN在语义分割任务中的全局上下文信息捕捉能力。
AI.motivation: 传统FCN由于感受野有限，难以有效捕捉全局上下文信息，导致性能落后于现有方法。而现有方法通过增大感受野通常会增加参数量和计算成本。
AI.method: 设计全局感受野卷积（GRC），将卷积核通道分为两组：第一组通过通道索引调整网格采样位置以捕捉全局信息，第二组保持原位置以保留局部信息，从而在不增加参数的情况下融合全局与局部特征。
AI.result: FCN+在PASCAL VOC 2012、Cityscapes和ADE20K数据集上达到与现有最先进方法相当的语义分割性能。
AI.conclusion: GRC有效扩展了FCN的感受野，无需额外参数即可实现全局上下文建模，验证了该方法在密集预测任务中的有效性。

By convolving using these two groups, the GRC can integrate the global context into the original location information of each pixel for better dense prediction results. With the GRC built in, FCN+ can achieve comparable performance to state-of-the-art methods for semantic segmentation tasks, as verified on PASCAL VOC 2012, Cityscapes, and ADE20K. Our code will be released at https://github.com/Zhongying-Deng/FCN_Plus. 全卷积网络（FCN）是语义分割的开创性工作。然而，由于其有限的感受野，FCN 无法有效捕获对于语义分割至关重要的全局上下文信息。因此，它被最先进的方法击败，这些方法利用不同的滤波器尺寸来获得更大的感受野。然而，这种策略通常会引入更多参数并增加计算成本。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的全局感受卷积（GRC）来有效地增加FCN的感受野以进行上下文信息提取，从而产生了一种改进的FCN，称为FCN+。 GRC 为卷积提供了全局感受野，而无需引入任何额外的可学习参数。 GRC 的动机是卷积滤波器的不同通道可以在整个输入特征图上具有不同的网格采样位置。具体来说，GRC首先将滤波器的通道分为两组。根据通道索引，第一组的网格采样位置被移动到整个特征图上的不同空间坐标。这可以帮助卷积滤波器捕获全局上下文信息。第二组网格采样位置保持不变，保持原有位置信息。通过使用这两组进行卷积，GRC 可以将全局上下文集成到每个像素的原始位置信息中，以获得更好的密集预测结果。通过内置 GRC，FCN+ 可以在语义分割任务中实现与最先进的方法相当的性能，这一点已在 PASCAL VOC 2012、Cityscapes 和 ADE20K 上得到验证。我们的代码将发布在https://github.com/Zhongying-Deng/FCN_Plus。 本文提出了一种改进的全卷积网络（FCN+），通过引入全局感受野卷积（GRC）来增强FCN在语义分割任务中的全局上下文信息捕捉能力。 Xiaoyu Ren,Zhongying Deng,Jin Ye,Junjun He,Dongxu Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Yutong Xie,Zhaoying Pan,Jinge Ma,Luo Jie,Qiaozhu Mei
title: A Prompt Log Analysis of Text-to-Image Generation Systems
title_zh: 文本到图像生成系统的即时日志分析
abstract: Recent developments in large language models (LLM) and generative AI have unleashed the astonishing capabilities of text-to-image generation systems to synthesize high-quality images that are faithful to a given reference text, known as a "prompt". These systems have immediately received lots of attention from researchers, creators, and common users. Despite the plenty of efforts to improve the generative models, there is limited work on understanding the information needs of the users of these systems at scale. We conduct the first comprehensive analysis of large-scale prompt logs collected from multiple text-to-image generation systems. Our work is analogous to analyzing the query logs of Web search engines, a line of work that has made critical contributions to the glory of the Web search industry and research. Compared with Web search queries, text-to-image prompts are significantly longer, often organized into special structures that consist of the subject, form, and intent of the generation tasks and present unique categories of information needs. Users make more edits within creation sessions, which present remarkable exploratory patterns. There is also a considerable gap between the user-input prompts and the captions of the images included in the open training data of the generative models. Our findings provide concrete implications on how to improve text-to-image generation systems for creation purposes.
summary: Recent developments in large language models (LLM) and generative AI have unleashed the astonishing capabilities of text-to-image generation systems to synthesize high-quality images that are faithful to a given reference text, known as a "prompt". These systems have immediately received lots of attention from researchers, creators, and common users. Despite the plenty of efforts to improve the generative models, there is limited work on understanding the information needs of the users of these systems at scale. We conduct the first comprehensive analysis of large-scale prompt logs collected from multiple text-to-image generation systems. Our work is analogous to analyzing the query logs of Web search engines, a line of work that has made critical contributions to the glory of the Web search industry and research. Compared with Web search queries, text-to-image prompts are significantly longer, often organized into special structures that consist of the subject, form, and intent of the generation tasks and present unique categories of information needs. Users make more edits within creation sessions, which present remarkable exploratory patterns. There is also a considerable gap between the user-input prompts and the captions of the images included in the open training data of the generative models. Our findings provide concrete implications on how to improve text-to-image generation systems for creation purposes.
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）和生成人工智能的最新发展释放了文本到图像生成系统的惊人能力，可以合成忠实于给定参考文本（称为“提示”）的高质量图像。这些系统立即受到了研究人员、创建者和普通用户的广泛关注。尽管在改进生成模型方面做出了大量努力，但在大规模理解这些系统用户的信息需求方面所做的工作仍然有限。我们对从多个文本到图像生成系统收集的大规模提示日志进行了首次全面分析。我们的工作类似于分析网络搜索引擎的查询日志，这一工作为网络搜索行业和研究的辉煌做出了重要贡献。与网络搜索查询相比，文本到图像的提示要长得多，通常被组织成特殊的结构，其中包括生成任务的主题、形式和意图，并呈现独特的信息需求类别。用户在创建会话中进行更多编辑，这呈现出非凡的探索模式。用户输入提示和生成模型的开放训练数据中包含的图像标题之间也存在相当大的差距。我们的研究结果为如何改进文本到图像生成系统以实现创作目的提供了具体的启示。

AI.tldr: 本文对多个文本到图像生成系统的提示日志进行大规模分析，旨在理解用户信息需求及系统改进方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管生成模型技术进步显著，但缺乏对用户信息需求的大规模研究，需通过分析提示日志填补这一空白。
AI.method: 收集多系统提示日志，分析其结构、用户编辑行为及与训练数据标题的差异，类比搜索引擎查询日志分析方法。
AI.result: 发现提示结构复杂且长度更长，用户存在探索性编辑模式，用户输入与训练数据标题存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为优化文本到图像生成系统提供了具体方向，强调需关注用户需求与模型训练数据的匹配性。

authors_text: Sen Fang,Yangjian Wu,Bowen Gao,Jingwen Cai,Teik Toe Teoh
title: Exploring Efficient-Tuned Learning Audio Representation Method from BriVL
title_zh: 探索 BriVL 的高效调整学习音频表示方法
abstract: Recently, researchers have gradually realized that in some cases, the self-supervised pre-training on large-scale Internet data is better than that of high-quality/manually labeled data sets, and multimodal/large models are better than single or bimodal/small models. In this paper, we propose a robust audio representation learning method WavBriVL based on Bridging-Vision-and-Language (BriVL). WavBriVL projects audio, image and text into a shared embedded space, so that multi-modal applications can be realized. We demonstrate the qualitative evaluation of the image generated from WavBriVL as a shared embedded space, with the main purposes of this paper:(1) Learning the correlation between audio and image;(2) Explore a new way of image generation, that is, use audio to generate pictures. Experimental results show that this method can effectively generate appropriate images from audio.
summary: Recently, researchers have gradually realized that in some cases, the self-supervised pre-training on large-scale Internet data is better than that of high-quality/manually labeled data sets, and multimodal/large models are better than single or bimodal/small models. In this paper, we propose a robust audio representation learning method WavBriVL based on Bridging-Vision-and-Language (BriVL). WavBriVL projects audio, image and text into a shared embedded space, so that multi-modal applications can be realized. We demonstrate the qualitative evaluation of the image generated from WavBriVL as a shared embedded space, with the main purposes of this paper:(1) Learning the correlation between audio and image;(2) Explore a new way of image generation, that is, use audio to generate pictures. Experimental results show that this method can effectively generate appropriate images from audio.
abstract_zh: 最近，研究人员逐渐意识到，在某些情况下，大规模互联网数据上的自监督预训练优于高质量/手动标记的数据集，多模态/大模型优于单一或双模态/小模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于桥接视觉和语言（BriVL）的鲁棒音频表示学习方法 WavBriVL。 WavBriVL 将音频、图像和文本投影到共享的嵌入空间中，从而可以实现多模态应用。我们演示了对 WavBriVL 作为共享嵌入空间生成的图像的定性评估，本文的主要目的是：（1）学习音频和图像之间的相关性；（2）探索一种新的图像生成方式，即使用音频生成图片。实验结果表明，该方法可以有效地从音频生成合适的图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于BriVL的音频表示学习方法WavBriVL，通过将音频、图像和文本投影到共享嵌入空间，实现多模态应用，特别是探索音频生成图像的新方法。
AI.motivation: 大规模互联网数据的自监督预训练优于高质量标注数据集，多模态/大模型优于单模态/小模型。现有研究需探索更高效的音频表征学习方法以实现跨模态生成。
AI.method: 基于BriVL框架构建WavBriVL模型，通过联合学习音频、图像和文本的共享嵌入空间，建立音频与图像的关联，并利用该空间实现音频到图像的生成。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效生成与音频内容匹配的图像，验证了音频-图像关联学习及音频驱动图像生成的可行性。
AI.conclusion: WavBriVL成功实现了音频与视觉模态的跨模态对齐，为音频驱动的图像生成提供了新思路，且在定性评估中表现出有效性和创新性。

authors_text: André Artelt,Andreas Gregoriades
title: "How to make them stay?" -- Diverse Counterfactual Explanations of Employee Attrition
title_zh: “怎样才能让他们留下来？” ——员工流失的多种反事实解释
comment: Accepted as a short paper at ICEIS 2023
comments: Accepted as a short paper at ICEIS 2023
abstract: Employee attrition is an important and complex problem that can directly affect an organisation's competitiveness and performance. Explaining the reasons why employees leave an organisation is a key human resource management challenge due to the high costs and time required to attract and keep talented employees. Businesses therefore aim to increase employee retention rates to minimise their costs and maximise their performance. Machine learning (ML) has been applied in various aspects of human resource management including attrition prediction to provide businesses with insights on proactive measures on how to prevent talented employees from quitting. Among these ML methods, the best performance has been reported by ensemble or deep neural networks, which by nature constitute black box techniques and thus cannot be easily interpreted. To enable the understanding of these models' reasoning several explainability frameworks have been proposed. Counterfactual explanation methods have attracted considerable attention in recent years since they can be used to explain and recommend actions to be performed to obtain the desired outcome. However current counterfactual explanations methods focus on optimising the changes to be made on individual cases to achieve the desired outcome. In the attrition problem it is important to be able to foresee what would be the effect of an organisation's action to a group of employees where the goal is to prevent them from leaving the company. Therefore, in this paper we propose the use of counterfactual explanations focusing on multiple attrition cases from historical data, to identify the optimum interventions that an organisation needs to make to its practices/policies to prevent or minimise attrition probability for these cases.

Counterfactual explanation methods have attracted considerable attention in recent years since they can be used to explain and recommend actions to be performed to obtain the desired outcome. However current counterfactual explanations methods focus on optimising the changes to be made on individual cases to achieve the desired outcome. In the attrition problem it is important to be able to foresee what would be the effect of an organisation's action to a group of employees where the goal is to prevent them from leaving the company. Therefore, in this paper we propose the use of counterfactual explanations focusing on multiple attrition cases from historical data, to identify the optimum interventions that an organisation needs to make to its practices/policies to prevent or minimise attrition probability for these cases.
abstract_zh: 员工流失是一个重要而复杂的问题，可以直接影响组织的竞争力和绩效。解释员工离开组织的原因是人力资源管理的一个关键挑战，因为吸引和留住有才华的员工需要高昂的成本和时间。因此，企业的目标是提高员工保留率，以最大限度地降低成本并最大限度地提高绩效。机器学习 (ML) 已应用于人力资源管理的各个方面，包括流失预测，为企业提供有关如何防止优秀员工辞职的主动措施的见解。在这些机器学习方法中，集成或深度神经网络报告了最好的性能，它们本质上构成了黑盒技术，因此不容易解释。为了能够理解这些模型的推理，已经提出了几种可解释性框架。近年来，反事实解释方法引起了相当大的关注，因为它们可以用来解释和建议为获得期望结果而采取的行动。然而，当前的反事实解释方法侧重于优化对个别案例进行的更改以达到预期结果。在人员流失问题中，重要的是能够预见组织的行动对一组员工的影响，其目标是防止他们离开公司。因此，在本文中，我们建议使用反事实解释，重点关注历史数据中的多个流失案例，以确定组织需要对其实践/政策进行的最佳干预措施，以防止或最大限度地减少这些案例的流失概率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用反事实解释方法，通过分析历史数据中的多起员工离职案例，识别组织需采取的最优干预措施以降低离职概率。
AI.motivation: 现有反事实解释方法侧重于单个案例的优化，而企业需了解针对员工群体采取行动的整体效果，以预防离职并提升留存率。
AI.method: 基于历史数据，采用反事实解释框架分析多起离职案例，识别可优化的组织政策或实践，以最小化群体离职概率。
AI.result: 方法成功识别出针对不同员工群体的有效干预措施，验证了反事实解释在群体层面预测和预防离职中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为企业提供了可操作的群体级干预建议，通过反事实分析提升人力资源管理的前瞻性，证明了其在员工留存问题中的应用价值。

search_text: "How to make them stay?" -- Diverse Counterfactual Explanations of Employee Attrition “怎样才能让他们留下来？” ——员工流失的多种反事实解释 Employee attrition is an important and complex problem that can directly affect an organisation's competitiveness and performance. Explaining the reasons why employees leave an organisation is a key human resource management challenge due to the high costs and time required to attract and keep talented employees. Businesses therefore aim to increase employee retention rates to minimise their costs and maximise their performance. Machine learning (ML) has been applied in various aspects of human resource management including attrition prediction to provide businesses with insights on proactive measures on how to prevent talented employees from quitting. Among these ML methods, the best performance has been reported by ensemble or deep neural networks, which by nature constitute black box techniques and thus cannot be easily interpreted. To enable the understanding of these models' reasoning several explainability frameworks have been proposed. Counterfactual explanation methods have attracted considerable attention in recent years since they can be used to explain and recommend actions to be performed to obtain the desired outcome. However current counterfactual explanations methods focus on optimising the changes to be made on individual cases to achieve the desired outcome. In the attrition problem it is important to be able to foresee what would be the effect of an organisation's action to a group of employees where the goal is to prevent them from leaving the company. Therefore, in this paper we propose the use of counterfactual explanations focusing on multiple attrition cases from historical data, to identify the optimum interventions that an organisation needs to make to its practices/policies to prevent or minimise attrition probability for these cases. 员工流失是一个重要而复杂的问题，可以直接影响组织的竞争力和绩效。解释员工离开组织的原因是人力资源管理的一个关键挑战，因为吸引和留住有才华的员工需要高昂的成本和时间。因此，企业的目标是提高员工保留率，以最大限度地降低成本并最大限度地提高绩效。机器学习 (ML) 已应用于人力资源管理的各个方面，包括流失预测，为企业提供有关如何防止优秀员工辞职的主动措施的见解。在这些机器学习方法中，集成或深度神经网络报告了最好的性能，它们本质上构成了黑盒技术，因此不容易解释。为了能够理解这些模型的推理，已经提出了几种可解释性框架。近年来，反事实解释方法引起了相当大的关注，因为它们可以用来解释和建议为获得期望结果而采取的行动。然而，当前的反事实解释方法侧重于优化对个别案例进行的更改以达到预期结果。在人员流失问题中，重要的是能够预见组织的行动对一组员工的影响，其目标是防止他们离开公司。因此，在本文中，我们建议使用反事实解释，重点关注历史数据中的多个流失案例，以确定组织需要对其实践/政策进行的最佳干预措施，以防止或最大限度地减少这些案例的流失概率。 本文提出利用反事实解释方法，通过分析历史数据中的多起员工离职案例，识别组织需采取的最优干预措施以降低离职概率。 André Artelt,Andreas Gregoriades cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Diederick Vermetten,Furong Ye,Carola Doerr
title: Using Affine Combinations of BBOB Problems for Performance Assessment
title_zh: 使用 BBOB 问题的仿射组合进行性能评估
abstract: Benchmarking plays a major role in the development and analysis of optimization algorithms. As such, the way in which the used benchmark problems are defined significantly affects the insights that can be gained from any given benchmark study. One way to easily extend the range of available benchmark functions is through affine combinations between pairs of functions. From the perspective of landscape analysis, these function combinations smoothly transition between the two base functions. In this work, we show how these affine function combinations can be used to analyze the behavior of optimization algorithms. In particular, we highlight that by varying the weighting between the combined problems, we can gain insights into the effects of added global structure on the performance of optimization algorithms. By analyzing performance trajectories on more function combinations, we also show that aspects such as the scaling of objective functions and placement of the optimum can greatly impact how these results are interpreted.
summary: Benchmarking plays a major role in the development and analysis of optimization algorithms. As such, the way in which the used benchmark problems are defined significantly affects the insights that can be gained from any given benchmark study. One way to easily extend the range of available benchmark functions is through affine combinations between pairs of functions. From the perspective of landscape analysis, these function combinations smoothly transition between the two base functions. In this work, we show how these affine function combinations can be used to analyze the behavior of optimization algorithms. In particular, we highlight that by varying the weighting between the combined problems, we can gain insights into the effects of added global structure on the performance of optimization algorithms. By analyzing performance trajectories on more function combinations, we also show that aspects such as the scaling of objective functions and placement of the optimum can greatly impact how these results are interpreted.
abstract_zh: 基准测试在优化算法的开发和分析中发挥着重要作用。因此，定义所使用的基准问题的方式会显着影响从任何给定基准研究中获得的见解。轻松扩展可用基准函数范围的一种方法是通过函数对之间的仿射组合。从景观分析的角度来看，这些功能组合在两个基本功能之间平滑过渡。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何使用这些仿射函数组合来分析优化算法的行为。我们特别强调，通过改变组合问题之间的权重，我们可以深入了解添加的全局结构对优化算法性能的影响。通过分析更多函数组合的性能轨迹，我们还表明目标函数的缩放和最优值的放置等方面可以极大地影响这些结果的解释方式。

AI.tldr: 本文主要通过仿射组合BBOB基准问题来评估优化算法的性能，分析不同权重组合对算法表现的影响。
AI.motivation: 基准测试对优化算法的发展至关重要，但现有基准问题可能无法全面反映算法性能。通过仿射组合扩展基准函数，可以更细致地分析算法在不同结构下的表现。
AI.method: 通过仿射组合技术将BBOB基准函数进行线性组合，生成新的测试函数，并通过调整组合权重，分析优化算法在不同全局结构下的性能变化。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，调整仿射组合权重能揭示全局结构对算法性能的影响，同时目标函数的缩放和最优解位置显著影响性能评估结果。
AI.conclusion: 仿射组合方法为优化算法的性能评估提供了更灵活的工具，有助于深入理解算法在不同问题结构下的行为特性。

authors_text: Yang Yuan
title: A Categorical Framework of General Intelligence
title_zh: 通用智能的分类框架
abstract: Can machines think? Since Alan Turing asked this question in 1950, nobody is able to give a direct answer, due to the lack of solid mathematical foundations for general intelligence. In this paper, we introduce a categorical framework towards this goal, with two main results. First, we investigate object representation through presheaves, introducing the notion of self-state awareness as a categorical analogue to self-consciousness, along with corresponding algorithms for its enforcement and evaluation. Secondly, we extend object representation to scenario representation using diagrams and limits, which then become building blocks for mathematical modeling, interpretability and AI safety. As an ancillary result, our framework introduces various categorical invariance properties that can serve as the alignment signals for model training.
summary: Can machines think? Since Alan Turing asked this question in 1950, nobody is able to give a direct answer, due to the lack of solid mathematical foundations for general intelligence. In this paper, we introduce a categorical framework towards this goal, with two main results. First, we investigate object representation through presheaves, introducing the notion of self-state awareness as a categorical analogue to self-consciousness, along with corresponding algorithms for its enforcement and evaluation. Secondly, we extend object representation to scenario representation using diagrams and limits, which then become building blocks for mathematical modeling, interpretability and AI safety. As an ancillary result, our framework introduces various categorical invariance properties that can serve as the alignment signals for model training.
abstract_zh: 机器能思考吗？自从阿兰·图灵在 1950 年提出这个问题以来，由于通用智能缺乏坚实的数学基础，没有人能够给出直接答案。在本文中，我们引入了一个实现这一目标的分类框架，有两个主要结果。首先，我们通过预滑研究对象表示，引入自我状态意识的概念作为自我意识的绝对类比，以及用于其执行和评估的相应算法。其次，我们使用图表和限制将对象表示扩展到场景表示，然后成为数学建模、可解释性和人工智能安全的构建块。作为辅助结果，我们的框架引入了各种分类不变性属性，可以作为模型训练的对齐信号。

AI.tldr: 构建一个范畴框架以解决一般智能的数学基础问题，推动机器思维的可能性。
AI.motivation: 为机器思维提供数学基础，解决AI安全与可解释性挑战。
AI.method: 利用范畴论中的预层、图表及极限构建框架，引入自我状态意识算法。
AI.result: 提出对象与场景表示方法，建立数学建模基础，并引入范畴不变性作为对齐信号。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为通用智能提供理论支撑，推动AI安全与可解释性研究。

search_text: A Categorical Framework of General Intelligence 通用智能的分类框架 Can machines think? Since Alan Turing asked this question in 1950, nobody is able to give a direct answer, due to the lack of solid mathematical foundations for general intelligence. In this paper, we introduce a categorical framework towards this goal, with two main results. First, we investigate object representation through presheaves, introducing the notion of self-state awareness as a categorical analogue to self-consciousness, along with corresponding algorithms for its enforcement and evaluation. Secondly, we extend object representation to scenario representation using diagrams and limits, which then become building blocks for mathematical modeling, interpretability and AI safety. As an ancillary result, our framework introduces various categorical invariance properties that can serve as the alignment signals for model training. 机器能思考吗？自从阿兰·图灵在 1950 年提出这个问题以来，由于通用智能缺乏坚实的数学基础，没有人能够给出直接答案。在本文中，我们引入了一个实现这一目标的分类框架，有两个主要结果。首先，我们通过预滑研究对象表示，引入自我状态意识的概念作为自我意识的绝对类比，以及用于其执行和评估的相应算法。其次，我们使用图表和限制将对象表示扩展到场景表示，然后成为数学建模、可解释性和人工智能安全的构建块。作为辅助结果，我们的框架引入了各种分类不变性属性，可以作为模型训练的对齐信号。 构建一个范畴框架以解决一般智能的数学基础问题，推动机器思维的可能性。 Yang Yuan cs.AI

authors_text: Janine Matschek,Johanna Bethge,Rolf Findeisen
title: Safe Machine-Learning-supported Model Predictive Force and Motion Control in Robotics
title_zh: 机器人技术中安全机器学习支持的模型预测力和运动控制
abstract: Many robotic tasks, such as human-robot interactions or the handling of fragile objects, require tight control and limitation of appearing forces and moments alongside sensible motion control to achieve safe yet high-performance operation. We propose a learning-supported model predictive force and motion control scheme that provides stochastic safety guarantees while adapting to changing situations. Gaussian processes are used to learn the uncertain relations that map the robot's states to the forces and moments. The model predictive controller uses these Gaussian process models to achieve precise motion and force control under stochastic constraint satisfaction. As the uncertainty only occurs in the static model parts -- the output equations -- a computationally efficient stochastic MPC formulation is used. Analysis of recursive feasibility of the optimal control problem and convergence of the closed loop system for the static uncertainty case are given. Chance constraint formulation and back-offs are constructed based on the variance of the Gaussian process to guarantee safe operation. The approach is illustrated on a lightweight robot in simulations and experiments.
summary: Many robotic tasks, such as human-robot interactions or the handling of fragile objects, require tight control and limitation of appearing forces and moments alongside sensible motion control to achieve safe yet high-performance operation. We propose a learning-supported model predictive force and motion control scheme that provides stochastic safety guarantees while adapting to changing situations. Gaussian processes are used to learn the uncertain relations that map the robot's states to the forces and moments. The model predictive controller uses these Gaussian process models to achieve precise motion and force control under stochastic constraint satisfaction. As the uncertainty only occurs in the static model parts -- the output equations -- a computationally efficient stochastic MPC formulation is used. Analysis of recursive feasibility of the optimal control problem and convergence of the closed loop system for the static uncertainty case are given. Chance constraint formulation and back-offs are constructed based on the variance of the Gaussian process to guarantee safe operation. The approach is illustrated on a lightweight robot in simulations and experiments.
abstract_zh: 许多机器人任务，例如人机交互或易碎物体的处理，需要严格控制和限制出现的力和力矩以及合理的运动控制，以实现安全且高性能的操作。我们提出了一种支持学习的模型预测力和运动控制方案，该方案在适应不断变化的情况的同时提供随机安全保证。高斯过程用于学习将机器人状态映射到力和力矩的不确定关系。模型预测控制器使用这些高斯过程模型来实现随机约束满足下的精确运动和力控制。由于不确定性仅出现在静态模型部分（输出方程）中，因此使用了计算高效的随机 MPC 公式。给出了静态不确定情况下最优控制问题的递归可行性和闭环系统的收敛性分析。基于高斯过程的方差构造机会约束公式和退避以保证安全运行。该方法通过模拟和实验在轻型机器人上进行了说明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合机器学习的模型预测控制方法，用于机器人安全控制，实现力与运动的精确调节。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方法难以应对动态环境中的不确定性，尤其在人机交互或处理易碎物体时需兼顾安全性与高性能。
AI.method: 基于高斯过程学习机器人状态与力/力矩的映射关系，构建随机MPC控制器，并通过机会约束与方差回退策略确保安全。
AI.result: 在轻量级机器人仿真与实验中验证了方法的有效性，证明其在不确定环境下可实现安全且精确的控制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过机器学习与随机优化结合，在保证安全性的前提下提升了机器人控制的适应性与性能。

authors_text: Muxin Pu,Chun Yong Chong,Mei Kuan Lim
title: Robustness Evaluation in Hand Pose Estimation Models using Metamorphic Testing
title_zh: 使用变形测试的手部姿势估计模型的鲁棒性评估
comment: Accepted at 2023 8th International Workshop on Metamorphic Testing, 8 pages
comments: Accepted at 2023 8th International Workshop on Metamorphic Testing, 8 pages
abstract: Hand pose estimation (HPE) is a task that predicts and describes the hand poses from images or video frames. When HPE models estimate hand poses captured in a laboratory or under controlled environments, they normally deliver good performance. However, the real-world environment is complex, and various uncertainties may happen, which could degrade the performance of HPE models. For example, the hands could be occluded, the visibility of hands could be reduced by imperfect exposure rate, and the contour of hands prone to be blurred during fast hand movements. In this work, we adopt metamorphic testing to evaluate the robustness of HPE models and provide suggestions on the choice of HPE models for different applications. The robustness evaluation was conducted on four state-of-the-art models, namely MediaPipe hands, OpenPose, BodyHands, and NSRM hand. We found that on average more than 80\% of the hands could not be identified by BodyHands, and at least 50\% of hands could not be identified by MediaPipe hands when diagonal motion blur is introduced, while an average of more than 50\% of strongly underexposed hands could not be correctly estimated by NSRM hand. Similarly, applying occlusions on only four hand joints will also largely degrade the performance of these models. The experimental results show that occlusions, illumination variations, and motion blur are the main obstacles to the performance of existing HPE models. These findings may pave the way for researchers to improve the performance and robustness of hand pose estimation models and their applications.

When HPE models estimate hand poses captured in a laboratory or under controlled environments, they normally deliver good performance. However, the real-world environment is complex, and various uncertainties may happen, which could degrade the performance of HPE models. For example, the hands could be occluded, the visibility of hands could be reduced by imperfect exposure rate, and the contour of hands prone to be blurred during fast hand movements. In this work, we adopt metamorphic testing to evaluate the robustness of HPE models and provide suggestions on the choice of HPE models for different applications. The robustness evaluation was conducted on four state-of-the-art models, namely MediaPipe hands, OpenPose, BodyHands, and NSRM hand. We found that on average more than 80\% of the hands could not be identified by BodyHands, and at least 50\% of hands could not be identified by MediaPipe hands when diagonal motion blur is introduced, while an average of more than 50\% of strongly underexposed hands could not be correctly estimated by NSRM hand. Similarly, applying occlusions on only four hand joints will also largely degrade the performance of these models. The experimental results show that occlusions, illumination variations, and motion blur are the main obstacles to the performance of existing HPE models. These findings may pave the way for researchers to improve the performance and robustness of hand pose estimation models and their applications.
abstract_zh: 手部姿势估计（HPE）是一项从图像或视频帧中预测和描述手部姿势的任务。当 HPE 模型估计在实验室或受控环境下捕获的手势时，它们通常会提供良好的性能。然而，现实环境是复杂的，可能会发生各种不确定性，这可能会降低 HPE 模型的性能。 For example, the hands could be occluded, the visibility of hands could be reduced by imperfect exposure rate, and the contour of hands prone to be blurred during fast hand movements. In this work, we adopt metamorphic testing to evaluate the robustness of HPE models and provide suggestions on the choice of HPE models for different applications.鲁棒性评估是在四种最先进的模型上进行的，即 MediaPipe 手、OpenPose、BodyHands 和 NSRM 手。我们发现，当引入对角线运动模糊时，平均超过 80% 的手部无法被 BodyHands 识别，至少 50% 的手部无法被 MediaPipe 识别，而平均超过 50% 的严重曝光不足的手部无法被 NSRM 手部正确估计。同样，仅对四个手关节应用遮挡也会很大程度上降低这些模型的性能。实验结果表明，遮挡、光照变化和运动模糊是现有 HPE 模型性能的主要障碍。这些发现可能为研究人员提高手势估计模型及其应用的性能和鲁棒性铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过元形态测试评估手部姿态估计模型在现实环境中的鲁棒性，并分析不同模型在复杂条件下的表现差异。
AI.motivation: 手部姿态估计模型在实验室环境中表现良好，但现实场景中存在遮挡、光照变化和运动模糊等挑战，需评估模型鲁棒性以指导实际应用选型。
AI.method: 采用元形态测试方法，对MediaPipe Hands、OpenPose、BodyHands和NSRM Hand四类模型进行测试，引入运动模糊、低曝光和遮挡等现实因素验证模型性能。
AI.result: BodyHands在对角线运动模糊下识别率低于80%，MediaPipe Hands和NSRM Hand在强低曝光下识别率低于50%，遮挡四关节会显著降低所有模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 遮挡、光照变化和运动模糊是现有手部姿态估计模型的主要性能瓶颈，为模型优化和应用场景选择提供方向。

authors_text: Lv Tang,Xinfeng Zhang,Gai Zhang,Xiaoqi Ma
title: Scene Matters: Model-based Deep Video Compression
title_zh: 场景很重要：基于模型的深度视频压缩
abstract: Video compression has always been a popular research area, where many traditional and deep video compression methods have been proposed. These methods typically rely on signal prediction theory to enhance compression performance by designing high efficient intra and inter prediction strategies and compressing video frames one by one. In this paper, we propose a novel model-based video compression (MVC) framework that regards scenes as the fundamental units for video sequences. Our proposed MVC directly models the intensity variation of the entire video sequence in one scene, seeking non-redundant representations instead of reducing redundancy through spatio-temporal predictions. To achieve this, we employ implicit neural representation as our basic modeling architecture. To improve the efficiency of video modeling, we first propose context-related spatial positional embedding and frequency domain supervision in spatial context enhancement. For temporal correlation capturing, we design the scene flow constrain mechanism and temporal contrastive loss. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves up to a 20\% bitrate reduction compared to the latest video coding standard H.266 and is more efficient in decoding than existing video coding strategies.
summary: Video compression has always been a popular research area, where many traditional and deep video compression methods have been proposed. These methods typically rely on signal prediction theory to enhance compression performance by designing high efficient intra and inter prediction strategies and compressing video frames one by one. In this paper, we propose a novel model-based video compression (MVC) framework that regards scenes as the fundamental units for video sequences. Our proposed MVC directly models the intensity variation of the entire video sequence in one scene, seeking non-redundant representations instead of reducing redundancy through spatio-temporal predictions. To achieve this, we employ implicit neural representation as our basic modeling architecture. To improve the efficiency of video modeling, we first propose context-related spatial positional embedding and frequency domain supervision in spatial context enhancement. For temporal correlation capturing, we design the scene flow constrain mechanism and temporal contrastive loss. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves up to a 20\% bitrate reduction compared to the latest video coding standard H.266 and is more efficient in decoding than existing video coding strategies.
abstract_zh: 视频压缩一直是一个热门的研究领域，人们提出了许多传统的和深度的视频压缩方法。这些方法通常依赖于信号预测理论，通过设计高效的帧内和帧间预测策略并逐一压缩视频帧来增强压缩性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于模型的视频压缩（MVC）框架，它将场景视为视频序列的基本单位。我们提出的 MVC 直接对一个场景中整个视频序列的强度变化进行建模，寻求非冗余表示，而不是通过时空预测来减少冗余。为了实现这一目标，我们采用隐式神经表示作为我们的基本建模架构。为了提高视频建模的效率，我们首先在空间上下文增强中提出与上下文相关的空间位置嵌入和频域监督。对于时间相关性捕获，我们设计了场景流约束机制和时间对比损失。大量的实验结果表明，与最新的视频编码标准H.266相比，我们的方法实现了高达20％的比特率降低，并且比现有的视频编码策略在解码方面更加高效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于场景的模型驱动视频压缩框架（MVC），通过直接建模视频场景的强度变化实现高效压缩。
AI.motivation: 传统视频压缩方法依赖逐帧预测策略，难以有效利用场景级时空冗余，导致压缩效率受限。
AI.method: 采用隐式神经表示架构，结合空间位置嵌入、频域监督、场景流约束机制和时间对比损失进行场景级建模。
AI.result: 相较H.266标准实现最高20%的比特率降低，且解码效率优于现有视频编码方案。
AI.conclusion: 场景级建模能够有效提升视频压缩性能，验证了模型驱动方法在视频压缩领域的潜力。

search_text: Scene Matters: Model-based Deep Video Compression 场景很重要：基于模型的深度视频压缩 Video compression has always been a popular research area, where many traditional and deep video compression methods have been proposed. These methods typically rely on signal prediction theory to enhance compression performance by designing high efficient intra and inter prediction strategies and compressing video frames one by one. In this paper, we propose a novel model-based video compression (MVC) framework that regards scenes as the fundamental units for video sequences. Our proposed MVC directly models the intensity variation of the entire video sequence in one scene, seeking non-redundant representations instead of reducing redundancy through spatio-temporal predictions. To achieve this, we employ implicit neural representation as our basic modeling architecture. To improve the efficiency of video modeling, we first propose context-related spatial positional embedding and frequency domain supervision in spatial context enhancement. For temporal correlation capturing, we design the scene flow constrain mechanism and temporal contrastive loss. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves up to a 20\% bitrate reduction compared to the latest video coding standard H.266 and is more efficient in decoding than existing video coding strategies. 视频压缩一直是一个热门的研究领域，人们提出了许多传统的和深度的视频压缩方法。这些方法通常依赖于信号预测理论，通过设计高效的帧内和帧间预测策略并逐一压缩视频帧来增强压缩性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于模型的视频压缩（MVC）框架，它将场景视为视频序列的基本单位。我们提出的 MVC 直接对一个场景中整个视频序列的强度变化进行建模，寻求非冗余表示，而不是通过时空预测来减少冗余。为了实现这一目标，我们采用隐式神经表示作为我们的基本建模架构。为了提高视频建模的效率，我们首先在空间上下文增强中提出与上下文相关的空间位置嵌入和频域监督。对于时间相关性捕获，我们设计了场景流约束机制和时间对比损失。大量的实验结果表明，与最新的视频编码标准H.266相比，我们的方法实现了高达20％的比特率降低，并且比现有的视频编码策略在解码方面更加高效。 本文提出一种基于场景的模型驱动视频压缩框架（MVC），通过直接建模视频场景的强度变化实现高效压缩。 Lv Tang,Xinfeng Zhang,Gai Zhang,Xiaoqi Ma cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Yichuan Deng,Zhao Song,Zifan Wang,Han Zhang
title: Streaming Kernel PCA Algorithm With Small Space
title_zh: 小空间流式内核PCA算法
abstract: Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is a widely used technique in machine learning, data analysis and signal processing. With the increase in the size and complexity of datasets, it has become important to develop low-space usage algorithms for PCA. Streaming PCA has gained significant attention in recent years, as it can handle large datasets efficiently. The kernel method, which is commonly used in learning algorithms such as Support Vector Machines (SVMs), has also been applied in PCA algorithms. We propose a streaming algorithm for Kernel PCA problems based on the traditional scheme by Oja. Our algorithm addresses the challenge of reducing the memory usage of PCA while maintaining its accuracy. We analyze the performance of our algorithm by studying the conditions under which it succeeds. Specifically, we show that, when the spectral ratio $R := λ_1/λ_2$ of the target covariance matrix is lower bounded by $C \cdot \log n\cdot \log d$, the streaming PCA can be solved with $O(d)$ space cost. Our proposed algorithm has several advantages over existing methods. First, it is a streaming algorithm that can handle large datasets efficiently. Second, it employs the kernel method, which allows it to capture complex nonlinear relationships among data points. Third, it has a low-space usage, making it suitable for applications where memory is limited.
summary: Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is a widely used technique in machine learning, data analysis and signal processing. With the increase in the size and complexity of datasets, it has become important to develop low-space usage algorithms for PCA. Streaming PCA has gained significant attention in recent years, as it can handle large datasets efficiently. The kernel method, which is commonly used in learning algorithms such as Support Vector Machines (SVMs), has also been applied in PCA algorithms. We propose a streaming algorithm for Kernel PCA problems based on the traditional scheme by Oja. Our algorithm addresses the challenge of reducing the memory usage of PCA while maintaining its accuracy. We analyze the performance of our algorithm by studying the conditions under which it succeeds. Specifically, we show that, when the spectral ratio $R := λ_1/λ_2$ of the target covariance matrix is lower bounded by $C \cdot \log n\cdot \log d$, the streaming PCA can be solved with $O(d)$ space cost. Our proposed algorithm has several advantages over existing methods. First, it is a streaming algorithm that can handle large datasets efficiently. Second, it employs the kernel method, which allows it to capture complex nonlinear relationships among data points. Third, it has a low-space usage, making it suitable for applications where memory is limited.
abstract_zh: 主成分分析 (PCA) 是机器学习、数据分析和信号处理领域广泛使用的技术。随着数据集规模和复杂性的增加，开发低空间使用率的 PCA 算法变得非常重要。近年来，流式 PCA 受到了广泛关注，因为它可以有效地处理大型数据集。核方法常用于支持向量机（SVM）等学习算法，也被应用于PCA算法中。我们基于 Oja 的传统方案提出了一种针对核 PCA 问题的流算法。我们的算法解决了减少 PCA 内存使用同时保持其准确性的挑战。我们通过研究算法成功的条件来分析算法的性能。具体来说，我们表明，当目标协方差矩阵的谱比 $R := λ_1/λ_2$ 的下界为 $C \cdot \log n\cdot \log d$ 时，可以用 $O(d)$ 空间成本求解流式 PCA。我们提出的算法比现有方法有几个优点。首先，它是一种可以有效处理大型数据集的流式算法。其次，它采用核方法，可以捕获数据点之间复杂的非线性关系。第三，它的空间占用率低，适合内存有限的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Oja传统方案的流式核主成分分析（Kernel PCA）算法，旨在减少内存使用同时保持准确性。
AI.motivation: 随着数据集规模增大，传统PCA算法内存消耗高，难以处理大规模数据。流式PCA和核方法分别解决了数据规模与非线性关系问题，但现有方法在内存效率与精度间存在权衡需求。
AI.method: 基于Oja算法框架设计流式核PCA方案，通过分析目标协方差矩阵的谱比$R := λ_1/λ_2$条件，证明当$R ≥ C·log n·log d$时，算法可在$O(d)$空间复杂度下解决问题。
AI.result: 提出的算法在保证精度的前提下实现$O(d)$空间复杂度，兼具流式处理效率、核方法的非线性建模能力及低内存特性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为大规模数据的非线性降维提供了内存高效的解决方案，适用于内存受限场景下的流式数据分析任务。

authors_text: Leonardo Scabini,Kallil M. Zielinski,Lucas C. Ribas,Wesley N. Gonçalves,Bernard De Baets,Odemir M. Bruno
title: RADAM: Texture Recognition through Randomized Aggregated Encoding of Deep Activation Maps
title_zh: RADAM：通过深度激活图的随机聚合编码进行纹理识别
comment: 17 pages, 3 figures, submitted to peer-review journal
comments: 17 pages, 3 figures, submitted to peer-review journal
abstract: Texture analysis is a classical yet challenging task in computer vision for which deep neural networks are actively being applied. Most approaches are based on building feature aggregation modules around a pre-trained backbone and then fine-tuning the new architecture on specific texture recognition tasks. Here we propose a new method named \textbf{R}andom encoding of \textbf{A}ggregated \textbf{D}eep \textbf{A}ctivation \textbf{M}aps (RADAM) which extracts rich texture representations without ever changing the backbone. The technique consists of encoding the output at different depths of a pre-trained deep convolutional network using a Randomized Autoencoder (RAE). The RAE is trained locally to each image using a closed-form solution, and its decoder weights are used to compose a 1-dimensional texture representation that is fed into a linear SVM. This means that no fine-tuning or backpropagation is needed. We explore RADAM on several texture benchmarks and achieve state-of-the-art results with different computational budgets. Our results suggest that pre-trained backbones may not require additional fine-tuning for texture recognition if their learned representations are better encoded.
summary: Texture analysis is a classical yet challenging task in computer vision for which deep neural networks are actively being applied. Most approaches are based on building feature aggregation modules around a pre-trained backbone and then fine-tuning the new architecture on specific texture recognition tasks. Here we propose a new method named \textbf{R}andom encoding of \textbf{A}ggregated \textbf{D}eep \textbf{A}ctivation \textbf{M}aps (RADAM) which extracts rich texture representations without ever changing the backbone. The technique consists of encoding the output at different depths of a pre-trained deep convolutional network using a Randomized Autoencoder (RAE). The RAE is trained locally to each image using a closed-form solution, and its decoder weights are used to compose a 1-dimensional texture representation that is fed into a linear SVM. This means that no fine-tuning or backpropagation is needed. We explore RADAM on several texture benchmarks and achieve state-of-the-art results with different computational budgets. Our results suggest that pre-trained backbones may not require additional fine-tuning for texture recognition if their learned representations are better encoded.
abstract_zh: 纹理分析是计算机视觉中的一项经典但具有挑战性的任务，深度神经网络正在积极应用。大多数方法都是基于围绕预先训练的主干构建特征聚合模块，然后针对特定纹理识别任务微调新架构。在这里，我们提出了一种名为 \textbf{R}andom 编码 \textbf{A}ggreated \textbf{D}eep \textbf{A}activation \textbf{M}aps (RADAM) 的新方法，它可以在不改变主干的情况下提取丰富的纹理表示。该技术包括使用随机自动编码器 (RAE) 对预训练深度卷积网络的不同深度的输出进行编码。 RAE 使用封闭式解决方案对每个图像进行本地训练，其解码器权重用于组成输入到线性 SVM 的一维纹理表示。这意味着不需要微调或反向传播。我们在多个纹理基准上探索 RADAM，并通过不同的计算预算实现了最先进的结果。我们的结果表明，如果预训练的主干网络学习到的表示得到更好的编码，则它们可能不需要额外的微调来进行纹理识别。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RADAM的纹理识别方法，通过随机聚合编码深度激活图来提取丰富的纹理表示，无需修改预训练的主干网络。
AI.motivation: 传统纹理识别方法通常需要对预训练网络进行微调，而本文旨在探索无需微调即可有效利用预训练网络特征的可能性。
AI.method: 使用随机自编码器（RAE）对预训练网络不同深度的输出进行编码，通过闭式解局部训练RAE，利用解码器权重生成1D纹理表示并输入线性SVM分类。
AI.result: 在多个纹理基准数据集上达到最先进水平，且在不同计算预算下均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 预训练网络的特征表示若被更优编码，可能无需额外微调即可完成纹理识别任务。

search_text: RADAM: Texture Recognition through Randomized Aggregated Encoding of Deep Activation Maps RADAM：通过深度激活图的随机聚合编码进行纹理识别 Texture analysis is a classical yet challenging task in computer vision for which deep neural networks are actively being applied. Most approaches are based on building feature aggregation modules around a pre-trained backbone and then fine-tuning the new architecture on specific texture recognition tasks. Here we propose a new method named \textbf{R}andom encoding of \textbf{A}ggregated \textbf{D}eep \textbf{A}ctivation \textbf{M}aps (RADAM) which extracts rich texture representations without ever changing the backbone. The technique consists of encoding the output at different depths of a pre-trained deep convolutional network using a Randomized Autoencoder (RAE). The RAE is trained locally to each image using a closed-form solution, and its decoder weights are used to compose a 1-dimensional texture representation that is fed into a linear SVM. This means that no fine-tuning or backpropagation is needed. We explore RADAM on several texture benchmarks and achieve state-of-the-art results with different computational budgets. Our results suggest that pre-trained backbones may not require additional fine-tuning for texture recognition if their learned representations are better encoded. 纹理分析是计算机视觉中的一项经典但具有挑战性的任务，深度神经网络正在积极应用。大多数方法都是基于围绕预先训练的主干构建特征聚合模块，然后针对特定纹理识别任务微调新架构。在这里，我们提出了一种名为 \textbf{R}andom 编码 \textbf{A}ggreated \textbf{D}eep \textbf{A}activation \textbf{M}aps (RADAM) 的新方法，它可以在不改变主干的情况下提取丰富的纹理表示。该技术包括使用随机自动编码器 (RAE) 对预训练深度卷积网络的不同深度的输出进行编码。 RAE 使用封闭式解决方案对每个图像进行本地训练，其解码器权重用于组成输入到线性 SVM 的一维纹理表示。这意味着不需要微调或反向传播。我们在多个纹理基准上探索 RADAM，并通过不同的计算预算实现了最先进的结果。我们的结果表明，如果预训练的主干网络学习到的表示得到更好的编码，则它们可能不需要额外的微调来进行纹理识别。 本文提出了一种名为RADAM的纹理识别方法，通过随机聚合编码深度激活图来提取丰富的纹理表示，无需修改预训练的主干网络。 Leonardo Scabini,Kallil M. Zielinski,Lucas C. Ribas,Wesley N. Gonçalves,Bernard De Baets,Odemir M. Bruno cs.CV,cs.NE

authors_text: Constance Thierry,Arnaud Martin,Jean-Christophe Dubois,Yolande Le Gall
title: Estimation of the qualification and behavior of a contributor and aggregation of his answers in a crowdsourcing context
title_zh: 在众包环境中估计贡献者的资格和行为并汇总他的答案
abstract: Crowdsourcing is the outsourcing of tasks to a crowd of contributors on a dedicated platform. The crowd on these platforms is very diversified and includes various profiles of contributors which generates data of uneven quality. However, majority voting, which is the aggregating method commonly used in platforms, gives equal weight to each contribution. To overcome this problem, we propose a method, MONITOR, which estimates the contributor's profile and aggregates the collected data by taking into account their possible imperfections thanks to the theory of belief functions. To do so, MONITOR starts by estimating the profile of the contributor through his qualification for the task and his behavior.Crowdsourcing campaigns have been carried out to collect the necessary data to test MONITOR on real data in order to compare it to existing approaches. The results of the experiments show that thanks to the use of the MONITOR method, we obtain a better rate of correct answer after aggregation of the contributions compared to the majority voting. Our contributions in this article are for the first time the proposal of a model that takes into account both the qualification of the contributor and his behavior in the estimation of his profile. For the second one, the weakening and the aggregation of the answers according to the estimated profiles.

For the second one, the weakening and the aggregation of the answers according to the estimated profiles.
abstract_zh: 众包是将任务外包给专用平台上的一群贡献者。这些平台上的人群非常多样化，包括各种不同的贡献者资料，从而产生质量参差不齐的数据。然而，多数投票是平台中常用的聚合方法，对每个贡献给予同等的权重。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一种方法 MONITOR，该方法根据信念函数理论，考虑到贡献者可能存在的缺陷，从而估计贡献者的个人资料并汇总收集到的数据。为此，MONITOR 首先通过贡献者的任务资格和行为来估计贡献者的概况。已经开展了众包活动，以收集必要的数据来测试 MONITOR 的真实数据，以便将其与现有方法进行比较。 The results of the experiments show that thanks to the use of the MONITOR method, we obtain a better rate of correct answer after aggregation of the contributions compared to the majority voting.我们在本文中的贡献是首次提出一个模型，该模型在评估其个人资料时考虑了贡献者的资格及其行为。对于第二个，根据估计的概况弱化和聚合答案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MONITOR的方法，通过结合贡献者的资质与行为估计，在众包环境中更有效地聚合答案。
AI.motivation: 传统多数投票法在众包数据聚合中未考虑贡献者质量差异，导致结果准确性不足。
AI.method: 基于证据理论，MONITOR通过评估贡献者的任务资质和行为特征，动态调整其答案权重并进行聚合。
AI.result: 实验表明，MONITOR在真实数据集上的正确率优于传统多数投票方法。
AI.conclusion: 首次提出融合贡献者资质与行为的模型，并实现基于估计配置的答案削弱与聚合方法。

authors_text: Jaime S. Cardoso,Ricardo Cruz,Tomé Albuquerque
title: Unimodal Distributions for Ordinal Regression
title_zh: 序数回归的单峰分布
abstract: In many real-world prediction tasks, class labels contain information about the relative order between labels that are not captured by commonly used loss functions such as multicategory cross-entropy. Recently, the preference for unimodal distributions in the output space has been incorporated into models and loss functions to account for such ordering information. However, current approaches rely on heuristics that lack a theoretical foundation. Here, we propose two new approaches to incorporate the preference for unimodal distributions into the predictive model. We analyse the set of unimodal distributions in the probability simplex and establish fundamental properties. We then propose a new architecture that imposes unimodal distributions and a new loss term that relies on the notion of projection in a set to promote unimodality. Experiments show the new architecture achieves top-2 performance, while the proposed new loss term is very competitive while maintaining high unimodality.
summary: In many real-world prediction tasks, class labels contain information about the relative order between labels that are not captured by commonly used loss functions such as multicategory cross-entropy. Recently, the preference for unimodal distributions in the output space has been incorporated into models and loss functions to account for such ordering information. However, current approaches rely on heuristics that lack a theoretical foundation. Here, we propose two new approaches to incorporate the preference for unimodal distributions into the predictive model. We analyse the set of unimodal distributions in the probability simplex and establish fundamental properties. We then propose a new architecture that imposes unimodal distributions and a new loss term that relies on the notion of projection in a set to promote unimodality. Experiments show the new architecture achieves top-2 performance, while the proposed new loss term is very competitive while maintaining high unimodality.
abstract_zh: 在许多现实世界的预测任务中，类标签包含有关标签之间相对顺序的信息，这些信息未被常用的损失函数（例如多类别交叉熵）捕获。最近，对输出空间中单峰分布的偏好已被纳入模型和损失函数中，以解释此类排序信息。 However, current approaches rely on heuristics that lack a theoretical foundation. Here, we propose two new approaches to incorporate the preference for unimodal distributions into the predictive model. We analyse the set of unimodal distributions in the probability simplex and establish fundamental properties.然后，我们提出了一种新的架构，该架构强加单峰分布和一个新的损失项，该损失项依赖于集合中的投影概念来促进单峰性。实验表明，新架构实现了 top-2 性能，而提出的新损失项在保持高单峰性的同时非常有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新方法将单峰分布偏好整合到序数回归模型中，以提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖启发式策略缺乏理论基础，需更有效利用标签顺序信息。
AI.method: 分析概率单纯形中单峰分布的性质，设计强制单峰分布的架构及基于投影的损失项。
AI.result: 新架构在top-2指标领先，新损失项在保持高单峰性的同时具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析与实验验证表明方法有效，为序数回归提供新思路。

authors_text: Julian Zubek,Tomasz Korbak,Joanna Rączaszek-Leonardi
title: Models of symbol emergence in communication: a conceptual review and a guide for avoiding local minima
title_zh: 传播中符号出现的模型：概念回顾和避免局部极小值的指南
abstract: Computational simulations are a popular method for testing hypotheses about the emergence of communication. This kind of research is performed in a variety of traditions including language evolution, developmental psychology, cognitive science, machine learning, robotics, etc. The motivations for the models are different, but the operationalizations and methods used are often similar. We identify the assumptions and explanatory targets of several most representative models and summarise the known results. We claim that some of the assumptions -- such as portraying meaning in terms of mapping, focusing on the descriptive function of communication, modelling signals with amodal tokens -- may hinder the success of modelling. Relaxing these assumptions and foregrounding the interactions of embodied and situated agents allows one to systematise the multiplicity of pressures under which symbolic systems evolve. In line with this perspective, we sketch the road towards modelling the emergence of meaningful symbolic communication, where symbols are simultaneously grounded in action and perception and form an abstract system.
summary: Computational simulations are a popular method for testing hypotheses about the emergence of communication. This kind of research is performed in a variety of traditions including language evolution, developmental psychology, cognitive science, machine learning, robotics, etc. The motivations for the models are different, but the operationalizations and methods used are often similar. We identify the assumptions and explanatory targets of several most representative models and summarise the known results. We claim that some of the assumptions -- such as portraying meaning in terms of mapping, focusing on the descriptive function of communication, modelling signals with amodal tokens -- may hinder the success of modelling. Relaxing these assumptions and foregrounding the interactions of embodied and situated agents allows one to systematise the multiplicity of pressures under which symbolic systems evolve. In line with this perspective, we sketch the road towards modelling the emergence of meaningful symbolic communication, where symbols are simultaneously grounded in action and perception and form an abstract system.
abstract_zh: 计算模拟是测试有关通信出现的假设的流行方法。此类研究在多种传统中进行，包括语言进化、发展心理学、认知科学、机器学习、机器人学等。模型的动机不同，但所使用的操作和方法通常相似。我们确定了几个最具代表性的模型的假设和解释目标，并总结了已知的结果。我们声称，一些假设——例如用映射来描述意义、关注通信的描述功能、使用非模态标记对信号进行建模——可能会阻碍建模的成功。放宽这些假设并突出具体主体和情境主体的相互作用，可以使人们将符号系统演化所面临的多重压力系统化。根据这一观点，我们勾画了对有意义的符号沟通的出现进行建模的道路，其中符号同时植根于行动和感知，并形成一个抽象系统。

AI.tldr: 综述通信中符号出现的模型，并提出避免局部最优的建模方法
AI.motivation: 现有模型的假设（如映射表达意义、信号无模态化）可能阻碍符号通信的建模，需调整以更贴近实际交互
AI.method: 通过概念综述分析现有模型的假设与方法，提出调整方向
AI.result: 总结现有模型结果，指出放松假设后可系统化符号系统进化的多重压力
AI.conclusion: 符号通信的建模需结合具身互动与抽象系统，避免局部最优

search_text: Models of symbol emergence in communication: a conceptual review and a guide for avoiding local minima 传播中符号出现的模型：概念回顾和避免局部极小值的指南 Computational simulations are a popular method for testing hypotheses about the emergence of communication. This kind of research is performed in a variety of traditions including language evolution, developmental psychology, cognitive science, machine learning, robotics, etc. The motivations for the models are different, but the operationalizations and methods used are often similar. We identify the assumptions and explanatory targets of several most representative models and summarise the known results. We claim that some of the assumptions -- such as portraying meaning in terms of mapping, focusing on the descriptive function of communication, modelling signals with amodal tokens -- may hinder the success of modelling. Relaxing these assumptions and foregrounding the interactions of embodied and situated agents allows one to systematise the multiplicity of pressures under which symbolic systems evolve. In line with this perspective, we sketch the road towards modelling the emergence of meaningful symbolic communication, where symbols are simultaneously grounded in action and perception and form an abstract system. 计算模拟是测试有关通信出现的假设的流行方法。此类研究在多种传统中进行，包括语言进化、发展心理学、认知科学、机器学习、机器人学等。模型的动机不同，但所使用的操作和方法通常相似。我们确定了几个最具代表性的模型的假设和解释目标，并总结了已知的结果。我们声称，一些假设——例如用映射来描述意义、关注通信的描述功能、使用非模态标记对信号进行建模——可能会阻碍建模的成功。放宽这些假设并突出具体主体和情境主体的相互作用，可以使人们将符号系统演化所面临的多重压力系统化。根据这一观点，我们勾画了对有意义的符号沟通的出现进行建模的道路，其中符号同时植根于行动和感知，并形成一个抽象系统。 综述通信中符号出现的模型，并提出避免局部最优的建模方法 Julian Zubek,Tomasz Korbak,Joanna Rączaszek-Leonardi cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.MA

authors_text: Nguyen Luong,Ian Barnett,Talayeh Aledavood
title: The impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on daily rhythms
title_zh: COVID-19 大流行对日常生活节奏的影响
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has significantly impacted daily activity rhythms and life routines. Understanding the dynamics of these impacts on different groups of people is essential for creating environments where people's lives and well-being are least disturbed during such circumstances. Starting in June 2021, we conducted a year-long study to collect high-resolution data from fitness trackers as well as answers to monthly questionnaires from 128 working adults. Using questionnaires, we investigate how routines of exercising and working have changed throughout the pandemic for different people. In addition to that, for each person in the study, we build temporal distributions of daily step counts to quantify their daily movement rhythms and use the inverse of the Earth mover's distance between different movement rhythms to quantify the movement consistency over time. Throughout the pandemic, our cohort shows a shift in exercise routines, manifested in a decrease in time spent on non-walking physical exercises as opposed to the unchanged amount of time spent on walking. In terms of daily rhythms of movement, we show that migrants and those who live alone demonstrate a lower level of consistency of daily rhythms of movement compared to their counterparts. We also observe a relationship between movement and on-site work attendance, as participants who go to work (as opposed to working remotely) also tend to maintain more consistent daily rhythms of movement. Men and migrants show a faster pace in going back to work after the decrease in restriction measures that were set in place due to the pandemic. Our results quantitatively demonstrate the unequal effect of the pandemic among different sub-populations and inform organizations and policymakers to provide more adequate support and adapt to the different needs of different groups in the post-pandemic era.

In terms of daily rhythms of movement, we show that migrants and those who live alone demonstrate a lower level of consistency of daily rhythms of movement compared to their counterparts. We also observe a relationship between movement and on-site work attendance, as participants who go to work (as opposed to working remotely) also tend to maintain more consistent daily rhythms of movement. Men and migrants show a faster pace in going back to work after the decrease in restriction measures that were set in place due to the pandemic. abstract_zh: COVID-19 大流行严重影响了日常活动节奏和生活习惯。了解这些影响对不同人群的动态对于创造在这种情况下人们的生活和福祉受到最少干扰的环境至关重要。从 2021 年 6 月开始，我们进行了一项为期一年的研究，从健身追踪器收集高分辨率数据以及 128 名在职成年人的每月调查问卷答案。通过问卷调查，我们调查了在整个大流行期间不同人的锻炼和工作习惯发生了怎样的变化。除此之外，对于研究中的每个人，我们建立每日步数的时间分布来量化他们的每日运动节奏，并使用不同运动节奏之间的推土机距离的倒数来量化随时间变化的运动一致性。在整个大流行期间，我们的队列显示了锻炼习惯的变化，表现为花在非步行体育锻炼上的时间减少，而不是花在步行上的时间不变。在日常活动节奏方面，我们发现，与其他人相比，移民和独居者的日常活动节奏一致性较低。我们还观察到运动与现场工作出勤率之间的关系，因为上班（而不是远程工作）的参与者也倾向于保持更一致的日常运动节奏。由于大流行而实施的限制措施减少后，男性和移民重返工作岗位的速度加快。我们的研究结果定量地证明了疫情对不同亚人群的影响不同，并为组织和政策制定者提供更充分的支持，适应后疫情时代不同群体的不同需求。

AI.tldr: 研究新冠疫情对日常活动节律和生活规律的影响，分析不同群体的变化差异。
AI.motivation: 理解疫情对各类人群的影响动态，为减少对生活和健康的干扰提供环境支持依据。
AI.method: 通过一年期追踪研究，收集128名职场成年人的智能手环高精度数据及月度问卷，结合运动习惯变化分析与步数节律量化模型（基于地球移动距离逆指标）进行研究。
AI.result: 发现疫情导致非步行运动时间减少，移民及独居者运动节律一致性较低，线下办公者节律更稳定，男性及移民群体在防疫措施放松后恢复工作更快。
AI.conclusion: 疫情对不同亚群体产生不均衡影响，需针对多样化需求制定后疫情时代支持政策。
