authors_text: Mario Alviano,Laura Giordano,Daniele Theseider Dupré
title: Complexity and scalability of defeasible reasoning in many-valued weighted knowledge bases with typicality
title_zh: 具有典型性的多值加权知识库中可废推理的复杂性和可扩展性
abstract: Weighted knowledge bases for description logics with typicality under a "concept-wise" multi-preferential semantics provide a logical interpretation of MultiLayer Perceptrons. In this context, Answer Set Programming (ASP) has been shown to be suitable for addressing defeasible reasoning in the finitely many-valued case, providing a $Π^p_2$ upper bound on the complexity of the problem, nonetheless leaving unknown the exact complexity and only providing a proof-of-concept implementation. This paper fulfils the lack by providing a $P^{NP[log]}$-completeness result and new ASP encodings that deal with weighted knowledge bases with large search spaces.
summary: Weighted knowledge bases for description logics with typicality under a "concept-wise" multi-preferential semantics provide a logical interpretation of MultiLayer Perceptrons. In this context, Answer Set Programming (ASP) has been shown to be suitable for addressing defeasible reasoning in the finitely many-valued case, providing a $Π^p_2$ upper bound on the complexity of the problem, nonetheless leaving unknown the exact complexity and only providing a proof-of-concept implementation. This paper fulfils the lack by providing a $P^{NP[log]}$-completeness result and new ASP encodings that deal with weighted knowledge bases with large search spaces.
abstract_zh: 在“概念明智”多优先语义下具有典型性的描述逻辑的加权知识库提供了多层感知器的逻辑解释。在这种情况下，答案集编程 (ASP) 已被证明适合解决有限多值情况下的可废推理，提供问题复杂性的 $Π^p_2$ 上限，但仍然未知确切的复杂性，并且仅提供概念验证实现。本文通过提供 $P^{NP[log]}$ 完整性结果和新的 ASP 编码来处理具有大搜索空间的加权知识库，从而弥补了这一不足。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多值加权知识库中带有典型性的可废止推理的复杂性和可扩展性问题。
AI.motivation: 已有研究给出了该问题的 Π^p_2 上界，但精确复杂度未知，且仅有概念验证实现，缺乏可处理大规模搜索空间的实际方案。
AI.method: 通过复杂度分析证明了 P^{NP[log]}-完全性，并设计了新的回答集编程（ASP）编码来处理大规模加权知识库。
AI.result: 获得了 P^{NP[log]}-完全性的精确复杂度结果，并提出了能处理大规模搜索空间的新型ASP编码。
AI.conclusion: 填补了多值加权知识库中可废止推理的精确复杂度空白，并提供了更具可扩展性的实现方案。

search_text: Complexity and scalability of defeasible reasoning in many-valued weighted knowledge bases with typicality 具有典型性的多值加权知识库中可废推理的复杂性和可扩展性 Weighted knowledge bases for description logics with typicality under a "concept-wise" multi-preferential semantics provide a logical interpretation of MultiLayer Perceptrons. In this context, Answer Set Programming (ASP) has been shown to be suitable for addressing defeasible reasoning in the finitely many-valued case, providing a $Π^p_2$ upper bound on the complexity of the problem, nonetheless leaving unknown the exact complexity and only providing a proof-of-concept implementation. This paper fulfils the lack by providing a $P^{NP[log]}$-completeness result and new ASP encodings that deal with weighted knowledge bases with large search spaces. 在“概念明智”多优先语义下具有典型性的描述逻辑的加权知识库提供了多层感知器的逻辑解释。在这种情况下，答案集编程 (ASP) 已被证明适合解决有限多值情况下的可废推理，提供问题复杂性的 $Π^p_2$ 上限，但仍然未知确切的复杂性，并且仅提供概念验证实现。本文通过提供 $P^{NP[log]}$ 完整性结果和新的 ASP 编码来处理具有大搜索空间的加权知识库，从而弥补了这一不足。 本文研究了多值加权知识库中带有典型性的可废止推理的复杂性和可扩展性问题。 Mario Alviano,Laura Giordano,Daniele Theseider Dupré cs.AI

authors_text: Shrestha Ghosh,Simon Razniewski,Gerhard Weikum
title: Class Cardinality Comparison as a Fermi Problem
title_zh: 作为费米问题的类基数比较
abstract: Questions on class cardinality comparisons are quite tricky to answer and come with its own challenges. They require some kind of reasoning since web documents and knowledge bases, indispensable sources of information, rarely store direct answers to questions, such as, ``Are there more astronauts or Physics Nobel Laureates?'' We tackle questions on class cardinality comparison by tapping into three sources for absolute cardinalities as well as the cardinalities of orthogonal subgroups of the classes. We propose novel techniques for aggregating signals with partial coverage for more reliable estimates and evaluate them on a dataset of 4005 class pairs, achieving an accuracy of 83.7%.
summary: Questions on class cardinality comparisons are quite tricky to answer and come with its own challenges. They require some kind of reasoning since web documents and knowledge bases, indispensable sources of information, rarely store direct answers to questions, such as, ``Are there more astronauts or Physics Nobel Laureates?'' We tackle questions on class cardinality comparison by tapping into three sources for absolute cardinalities as well as the cardinalities of orthogonal subgroups of the classes. We propose novel techniques for aggregating signals with partial coverage for more reliable estimates and evaluate them on a dataset of 4005 class pairs, achieving an accuracy of 83.7%.
abstract_zh: 关于类基数比较的问题很难回答，并且有其自身的挑战。它们需要某种推理，因为网络文档和知识库是不可或缺的信息来源，很少存储问题的直接答案，例如“是否有更多的宇航员或诺贝尔物理学奖获得者？”我们通过利用绝对基数的三个来源以及类的正交子群的基数来解决类基数比较的问题。我们提出了聚合部分覆盖信号的新技术，以获得更可靠的估计，并在 4005 个类对的数据集上对其进行评估，实现了 83.7% 的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过多源信息和新型聚合技术解决类基数比较问题，提高估算可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有信息源缺乏直接答案，传统方法难以准确比较不同类别的基数，需新方法提升可靠性。
AI.method: 通过整合三个信息源的绝对基数及正交子群数据，设计新型部分覆盖信号聚合算法。
AI.result: 在包含4005个类对的数据集上，方法准确率达到83.7%。
AI.conclusion: 本研究通过多源数据融合与创新算法有效提升了类基数比较的准确性，为相关领域提供新思路。

authors_text: Changhong Fu,Mutian Cai,Sihang Li,Kunhan Lu,Haobo Zuo,Chongjun Liu
title: Continuity-Aware Latent Interframe Information Mining for Reliable UAV Tracking
title_zh: 用于可靠无人机跟踪的连续性感知潜在帧间信息挖掘
comment: 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) tracking is crucial for autonomous navigation and has broad applications in robotic automation fields. However, reliable UAV tracking remains a challenging task due to various difficulties like frequent occlusion and aspect ratio change. Additionally, most of the existing work mainly focuses on explicit information to improve tracking performance, ignoring potential interframe connections. To address the above issues, this work proposes a novel framework with continuity-aware latent interframe information mining for reliable UAV tracking, i.e., ClimRT. Specifically, a new efficient continuity-aware latent interframe information mining network (ClimNet) is proposed for UAV tracking, which can generate highly-effective latent frame between two adjacent frames. Besides, a novel location-continuity Transformer (LCT) is designed to fully explore continuity-aware spatial-temporal information, thereby markedly enhancing UAV tracking. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments on three authoritative aerial benchmarks strongly validate the robustness and reliability of ClimRT in UAV tracking performance. Furthermore, real-world tests on the aerial platform validate its practicability and effectiveness. The code and demo materials are released at https://github.com/vision4robotics/ClimRT.
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) tracking is crucial for autonomous navigation and has broad applications in robotic automation fields. However, reliable UAV tracking remains a challenging task due to various difficulties like frequent occlusion and aspect ratio change. Additionally, most of the existing work mainly focuses on explicit information to improve tracking performance, ignoring potential interframe connections. To address the above issues, this work proposes a novel framework with continuity-aware latent interframe information mining for reliable UAV tracking, i.e., ClimRT. Specifically, a new efficient continuity-aware latent interframe information mining network (ClimNet) is proposed for UAV tracking, which can generate highly-effective latent frame between two adjacent frames. Besides, a novel location-continuity Transformer (LCT) is designed to fully explore continuity-aware spatial-temporal information, thereby markedly enhancing UAV tracking. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments on three authoritative aerial benchmarks strongly validate the robustness and reliability of ClimRT in UAV tracking performance. Furthermore, real-world tests on the aerial platform validate its practicability and effectiveness. The code and demo materials are released at https://github.com/vision4robotics/ClimRT.
abstract_zh: 无人机（UAV）跟踪对于自主导航至关重要，在机器人自动化领域有着广泛的应用。然而，由于频繁遮挡和纵横比变化等各种困难，可靠的无人机跟踪仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。此外，大多数现有工作主要集中在显式信息以提高跟踪性能，忽略潜在的帧间连接。为了解决上述问题，本文提出了一种具有连续性感知潜在帧间信息挖掘的新框架，用于可靠的无人机跟踪，即 ClimRT。具体来说，提出了一种用于无人机跟踪的新型高效连续性感知潜在帧间信息挖掘网络（ClimNet），它可以在两个相邻帧之间生成高效的潜在帧。此外，一种新颖的位置连续性变换器（LCT）旨在充分探索连续性感知的时空信息，从而显着增强无人机跟踪。在三个权威航空基准上进行的广泛定性和定量实验有力地验证了 ClimRT 在无人机跟踪性能方面的稳健性和可靠性。此外，高空作业平台的实际测试验证了其实用性和有效性。代码和演示材料发布于https://github.com/vision4robotics/ClimRT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ClimRT的新型框架，用于实现可靠的小型无人机（UAV）跟踪。
AI.motivation: 由于频繁遮挡和长宽比变化等因素，可靠的小型无人机跟踪仍然是一个具有挑战性的任务。现有工作主要关注显式信息以提升跟踪性能，而忽略了潜在的帧间联系。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的高效连续感知的潜在帧间信息挖掘网络（ClimNet），用于生成两个相邻帧之间的高效潜在帧，并设计了一种新的位置连续性Transformer（LCT）以充分挖掘连续感知的空间-时间信息。
AI.result: 在三个权威的空中基准测试中进行了大量定性和定量实验，结果验证了ClimRT在小型无人机跟踪中的鲁棒性和可靠性。此外，实际测试也验证了其可行性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: ClimRT在小型无人机跟踪任务中表现出色，具有较高的鲁棒性和实用性，其代码和演示材料已公开。

authors_text: Souvick Das,Novarun Deb,Agostino Cortesi,Nabendu Chaki
title: An Annexure to the Paper "Driving the Technology Value Stream by Analyzing App Reviews"
title_zh: “通过分析应用程序评论来驱动技术价值流”论文的附件
abstract: This paper presents a novel framework that utilizes Natural Language Processing (NLP) techniques to understand user feedback on mobile applications. The framework allows software companies to drive their technology value stream based on user reviews, which can highlight areas for improvement. The framework is analyzed in depth, and its modules are evaluated for their effectiveness. The proposed approach is demonstrated to be effective through an analysis of reviews for sixteen popular Android Play Store applications over a long period of time.
summary: This paper presents a novel framework that utilizes Natural Language Processing (NLP) techniques to understand user feedback on mobile applications. The framework allows software companies to drive their technology value stream based on user reviews, which can highlight areas for improvement. The framework is analyzed in depth, and its modules are evaluated for their effectiveness. The proposed approach is demonstrated to be effective through an analysis of reviews for sixteen popular Android Play Store applications over a long period of time.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的框架，利用自然语言处理（NLP）技术来理解移动应用程序上的用户反馈。该框架允许软件公司根据用户评论来推动其技术价值流，从而突出需要改进的领域。对该框架进行了深入分析，并对其模块的有效性进行了评估。通过对 16 个流行的 Android Play 商店应用程序在很长一段时间内的评论进行分析，证明所提出的方法是有效的。

AI.tldr: 开发基于自然语言处理（NLP）的框架，通过分析移动应用用户评论来优化技术价值流。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效处理大量用户反馈，导致无法及时优化产品，需自动化分析工具提升决策效率。
AI.method: 采用自然语言处理技术构建框架，分析用户评论，并评估模块有效性。
AI.result: 分析显示框架能有效识别改进点，提升软件公司的技术价值流。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效利用用户评论驱动技术价值流，为软件公司优化产品提供支持。

method: 采用自然语言处理技术构建框架，分析用户评论，并评估模块有效性。
result: 分析显示框架能有效识别改进点，提升软件公司的技术价值流。
conclusion: 该框架有效利用用户评论驱动技术价值流，为软件公司优化产品提供支持。
search_text: An Annexure to the Paper "Driving the Technology Value Stream by Analyzing App Reviews" “通过分析应用程序评论来驱动技术价值流”论文的附件 This paper presents a novel framework that utilizes Natural Language Processing (NLP) techniques to understand user feedback on mobile applications. The framework allows software companies to drive their technology value stream based on user reviews, which can highlight areas for improvement. The framework is analyzed in depth, and its modules are evaluated for their effectiveness. The proposed approach is demonstrated to be effective through an analysis of reviews for sixteen popular Android Play Store applications over a long period of time. 本文提出了一种新颖的框架，利用自然语言处理（NLP）技术来理解移动应用程序上的用户反馈。该框架允许软件公司根据用户评论来推动其技术价值流，从而突出需要改进的领域。对该框架进行了深入分析，并对其模块的有效性进行了评估。通过对 16 个流行的 Android Play 商店应用程序在很长一段时间内的评论进行分析，证明所提出的方法是有效的。 开发基于自然语言处理（NLP）的框架，通过分析移动应用用户评论来优化技术价值流。 Souvick Das,Novarun Deb,Agostino Cortesi,Nabendu Chaki cs.SE,cs.AI

authors_text: Kai Pfeiffer,Leonardo Edgar,Quang-Cuong Pham
title: Monte-Carlo Tree Search with Prioritized Node Expansion for Multi-Goal Task Planning
title_zh: 用于多目标任务规划的具有优先节点扩展的蒙特卡罗树搜索
abstract: Symbolic task planning for robots is computationally challenging due to the combinatorial complexity of the possible action space. This fact is amplified if there are several sub-goals to be achieved due to the increased length of the action sequences. In this work, we propose a multi-goal symbolic task planner for deterministic decision processes based on Monte Carlo Tree Search. We augment the algorithm by prioritized node expansion which prioritizes nodes that already have fulfilled some sub-goals. Due to its linear complexity in the number of sub-goals, our algorithm is able to identify symbolic action sequences of 145 elements to reach the desired goal state with up to 48 sub-goals while the search tree is limited to under 6500 nodes. We use action reduction based on a kinematic reachability criterion to further ease computational complexity. We combine our algorithm with object localization and motion planning and apply it to a real-robot demonstration with two manipulators in an industrial bearing inspection setting.
summary: Symbolic task planning for robots is computationally challenging due to the combinatorial complexity of the possible action space. This fact is amplified if there are several sub-goals to be achieved due to the increased length of the action sequences. In this work, we propose a multi-goal symbolic task planner for deterministic decision processes based on Monte Carlo Tree Search. We augment the algorithm by prioritized node expansion which prioritizes nodes that already have fulfilled some sub-goals. Due to its linear complexity in the number of sub-goals, our algorithm is able to identify symbolic action sequences of 145 elements to reach the desired goal state with up to 48 sub-goals while the search tree is limited to under 6500 nodes. We use action reduction based on a kinematic reachability criterion to further ease computational complexity. We combine our algorithm with object localization and motion planning and apply it to a real-robot demonstration with two manipulators in an industrial bearing inspection setting.
abstract_zh: 由于可能的动作空间的组合复杂性，机器人的符号任务规划在计算上具有挑战性。如果由于动作序列的长度增加而需要实现多个子目标，则这一事实会被放大。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于蒙特卡罗树搜索的确定性决策过程的多目标符号任务规划器。我们通过优先节点扩展来增强算法，该扩展优先考虑已经实现一些子目标的节点。由于其子目标数量的线性复杂性，我们的算法能够识别 145 个元素的符号动作序列，以达到具有最多 48 个子目标的期望目标状态，而搜索树限制在 6500 个节点以下。我们使用基于运动学可达性标准的动作减少来进一步减轻计算复杂性。我们将我们的算法与对象定位和运动规划相结合，并将其应用于工业轴承检查设置中使用两个操纵器的真实机器人演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）并结合优先节点扩展的多目标符号任务规划方法，用于解决机器人复杂环境下的多子目标规划问题。
AI.motivation: 传统符号任务规划在面对多子目标时因动作空间组合复杂度高、动作序列长度增加而面临计算瓶颈，需更高效的规划算法。
AI.method: 在MCTS框架中引入优先节点扩展机制，优先扩展已达成部分子目标的节点；结合运动学可达性准则减少动作冗余，并与物体定位、运动规划模块集成。
AI.result: 算法在48个子目标场景下生成145步动作序列，搜索树节点数控制在6500以内，成功应用于双机械臂工业轴承检测的实际机器人系统。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过优先扩展与动作简化有效降低计算复杂度，验证了其在多目标任务规划中的可行性与工业应用潜力。

authors_text: Kai Pfeiffer,Quang-Cuong Pham
title: Time-Optimal Control via Heaviside Step-Function Approximation
title_zh: 通过赫维赛阶跃函数逼近的时间最优控制
abstract: Least-squares programming is a popular tool in robotics due to its simplicity and availability of open-source solvers. However, certain problems like sparse programming in the $\ell_0$- or $\ell_1$-norm for time-optimal control are not equivalently solvable. In this work, we propose a non-linear hierarchical least-squares programming (NL-HLSP) for time-optimal control of non-linear discrete dynamic systems. We use a continuous approximation of the heaviside step function with an additional term that avoids vanishing gradients. We use a simple discretization method by keeping states and controls piece-wise constant between discretization steps. This way, we obtain a comparatively easily implementable NL-HLSP in contrast to direct transcription approaches of optimal control. We show that the NL-HLSP indeed recovers the discrete time-optimal control in the limit for resting goal points. We confirm the results in simulation for linear and non-linear control scenarios.
summary: Least-squares programming is a popular tool in robotics due to its simplicity and availability of open-source solvers. However, certain problems like sparse programming in the $\ell_0$- or $\ell_1$-norm for time-optimal control are not equivalently solvable. In this work, we propose a non-linear hierarchical least-squares programming (NL-HLSP) for time-optimal control of non-linear discrete dynamic systems. We use a continuous approximation of the heaviside step function with an additional term that avoids vanishing gradients. We use a simple discretization method by keeping states and controls piece-wise constant between discretization steps. This way, we obtain a comparatively easily implementable NL-HLSP in contrast to direct transcription approaches of optimal control. We show that the NL-HLSP indeed recovers the discrete time-optimal control in the limit for resting goal points. We confirm the results in simulation for linear and non-linear control scenarios.
abstract_zh: 最小二乘编程由于其简单性和开源求解器的可用性而成为机器人领域的流行工具。然而，某些问题（例如用于时间最优控制的 $\ell_0$- 或 $\ell_1$-范数中的稀疏编程）并不是同等可解决的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种非线性分层最小二乘规划（NL-HLSP），用于非线性离散动态系统的时间最优控制。我们使用亥维赛阶跃函数的连续近似以及避免梯度消失的附加项。我们使用简单的离散化方法，通过在离散化步骤之间保持状态和控制分段恒定。这样，与最优控制的直接转录方法相比，我们获得了相对容易实现的 NL-HLSP。我们证明 NL-HLSP 确实在静止目标点的限制内恢复了离散时间最优控制。我们确认了线性和非线性控制场景的仿真结果。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于阶跃函数逼近的非线性分层最小二乘规划方法，用于解决非线性离散系统的最优控制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有最小二乘规划无法有效解决时间最优控制中的稀疏优化问题，需更优方法。
AI.method: 采用连续阶跃函数逼近与分段常数离散化，构建非线性分层最小二乘规划（NL-HLSP）以实现易实现的最优控制。
AI.result: 模拟验证显示方法在多种控制场景下有效，且在静止目标点极限情况下能恢复最优解。
AI.conclusion: NL-HLSP相比直接转录方法更易实现，有效解决时间最优控制问题。

authors_text: Seunghwan Lee,Gwanmo Park,Hyewon Son,Jiwon Ryu,Han Joo Chae
title: InFusionSurf: Refining Neural RGB-D Surface Reconstruction Using Per-Frame Intrinsic Refinement and TSDF Fusion Prior Learning
title_zh: InFusionSurf：使用每帧内在细化和 TSDF 融合先验学习来细化神经 RGB-D 表面重建
abstract: We introduce InFusionSurf, an innovative enhancement for neural radiance field (NeRF) frameworks in 3D surface reconstruction using RGB-D video frames. Building upon previous methods that have employed feature encoding to improve optimization speed, we further improve the reconstruction quality with minimal impact on optimization time by refining depth information. InFusionSurf addresses camera motion-induced blurs in each depth frame through a per-frame intrinsic refinement scheme. It incorporates the truncated signed distance field (TSDF) Fusion, a classical real-time 3D surface reconstruction method, as a pretraining tool for the feature grid, enhancing reconstruction details and training speed. Comparative quantitative and qualitative analyses show that InFusionSurf reconstructs scenes with high accuracy while maintaining optimization efficiency. The effectiveness of our intrinsic refinement and TSDF Fusion-based pretraining is further validated through an ablation study.
summary: We introduce InFusionSurf, an innovative enhancement for neural radiance field (NeRF) frameworks in 3D surface reconstruction using RGB-D video frames. Building upon previous methods that have employed feature encoding to improve optimization speed, we further improve the reconstruction quality with minimal impact on optimization time by refining depth information. InFusionSurf addresses camera motion-induced blurs in each depth frame through a per-frame intrinsic refinement scheme. It incorporates the truncated signed distance field (TSDF) Fusion, a classical real-time 3D surface reconstruction method, as a pretraining tool for the feature grid, enhancing reconstruction details and training speed. Comparative quantitative and qualitative analyses show that InFusionSurf reconstructs scenes with high accuracy while maintaining optimization efficiency. The effectiveness of our intrinsic refinement and TSDF Fusion-based pretraining is further validated through an ablation study.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 InFusionSurf，它是使用 RGB-D 视频帧进行 3D 表面重建的神经辐射场 (NeRF) 框架的创新增强功能。基于之前采用特征编码来提高优化速度的方法，我们通过细化深度信息进一步提高了重建质量，同时对优化时间的影响最小。 InFusionSurf 通过每帧内在细化方案解决每个深度帧中相机运动引起的模糊问题。它采用了截断符号距离场（TSDF）Fusion（一种经典的实时3D表面重建方法）作为特征网格的预训练工具，增强了重建细节和训练速度。定量和定性对比分析表明，InFusionSurf 在保持优化效率的同时，能够高精度地重建场景。我们的内在细化和基于 TSDF Fusion 的预训练的有效性通过消融研究得到进一步验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出InFusionSurf方法，通过每帧内在优化和TSDF融合预训练，提升NeRF框架在RGB-D视频下的3D表面重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有NeRF方法在优化速度与重建精度间难以平衡，且存在相机运动导致的深度模糊问题，需进一步提升细节还原能力。
AI.method: 结合每帧深度图的内在优化消除运动模糊，并利用TSDF Fusion作为特征网格预训练工具，增强细节表达与训练效率。
AI.result: 实验显示InFusionSurf在保持优化效率的同时实现高精度场景重建，消融实验证实了内在优化与TSDF预训练的有效性。
AI.conclusion: InFusionSurf通过双路径优化策略，有效解决了NeRF在RGB-D重建中的精度与效率矛盾，为动态场景建模提供新思路。

search_text: InFusionSurf: Refining Neural RGB-D Surface Reconstruction Using Per-Frame Intrinsic Refinement and TSDF Fusion Prior Learning InFusionSurf：使用每帧内在细化和 TSDF 融合先验学习来细化神经 RGB-D 表面重建 We introduce InFusionSurf, an innovative enhancement for neural radiance field (NeRF) frameworks in 3D surface reconstruction using RGB-D video frames. Building upon previous methods that have employed feature encoding to improve optimization speed, we further improve the reconstruction quality with minimal impact on optimization time by refining depth information. InFusionSurf addresses camera motion-induced blurs in each depth frame through a per-frame intrinsic refinement scheme. It incorporates the truncated signed distance field (TSDF) Fusion, a classical real-time 3D surface reconstruction method, as a pretraining tool for the feature grid, enhancing reconstruction details and training speed. Comparative quantitative and qualitative analyses show that InFusionSurf reconstructs scenes with high accuracy while maintaining optimization efficiency. The effectiveness of our intrinsic refinement and TSDF Fusion-based pretraining is further validated through an ablation study. 我们推出了 InFusionSurf，它是使用 RGB-D 视频帧进行 3D 表面重建的神经辐射场 (NeRF) 框架的创新增强功能。基于之前采用特征编码来提高优化速度的方法，我们通过细化深度信息进一步提高了重建质量，同时对优化时间的影响最小。 InFusionSurf 通过每帧内在细化方案解决每个深度帧中相机运动引起的模糊问题。它采用了截断符号距离场（TSDF）Fusion（一种经典的实时3D表面重建方法）作为特征网格的预训练工具，增强了重建细节和训练速度。定量和定性对比分析表明，InFusionSurf 在保持优化效率的同时，能够高精度地重建场景。我们的内在细化和基于 TSDF Fusion 的预训练的有效性通过消融研究得到进一步验证。 本文提出InFusionSurf方法，通过每帧内在优化和TSDF融合预训练，提升NeRF框架在RGB-D视频下的3D表面重建质量。 Seunghwan Lee,Gwanmo Park,Hyewon Son,Jiwon Ryu,Han Joo Chae cs.CV

authors_text: Renato Sortino,Daniel Magro,Giuseppe Fiameni,Eva Sciacca,Simone Riggi,Andrea DeMarco,Concetto Spampinato,Andrew M. Hopkins,Filomena Bufano,Francesco Schillirò,Cristobal Bordiu,Carmelo Pino
title: Radio astronomical images object detection and segmentation: A benchmark on deep learning methods
title_zh: 射电天文图像目标检测和分割：深度学习方法的基准
abstract: In recent years, deep learning has been successfully applied in various scientific domains. Following these promising results and performances, it has recently also started being evaluated in the domain of radio astronomy. In particular, since radio astronomy is entering the Big Data era, with the advent of the largest telescope in the world - the Square Kilometre Array (SKA), the task of automatic object detection and instance segmentation is crucial for source finding and analysis. In this work, we explore the performance of the most affirmed deep learning approaches, applied to astronomical images obtained by radio interferometric instrumentation, to solve the task of automatic source detection. This is carried out by applying models designed to accomplish two different kinds of tasks: object detection and semantic segmentation. The goal is to provide an overview of existing techniques, in terms of prediction performance and computational efficiency, to scientists in the astrophysics community who would like to employ machine learning in their research.
summary: In recent years, deep learning has been successfully applied in various scientific domains. Following these promising results and performances, it has recently also started being evaluated in the domain of radio astronomy. In particular, since radio astronomy is entering the Big Data era, with the advent of the largest telescope in the world - the Square Kilometre Array (SKA), the task of automatic object detection and instance segmentation is crucial for source finding and analysis. In this work, we explore the performance of the most affirmed deep learning approaches, applied to astronomical images obtained by radio interferometric instrumentation, to solve the task of automatic source detection. This is carried out by applying models designed to accomplish two different kinds of tasks: object detection and semantic segmentation. The goal is to provide an overview of existing techniques, in terms of prediction performance and computational efficiency, to scientists in the astrophysics community who would like to employ machine learning in their research.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习已成功应用于各个科学领域。继这些有希望的结果和性能之后，它最近也开始在射电天文学领域进行评估。特别是，随着射电天文学进入大数据时代，随着世界上最大的望远镜——平方公里阵列（SKA）的出现，自动目标检测和实例分割任务对于源查找和分析至关重要。在这项工作中，我们探索了最受肯定的深度学习方法的性能，应用于通过无线电干涉测量仪器获得的天文图像，以解决自动源检测的任务。这是通过应用旨在完成两种不同类型的任务的模型来实现的：对象检测和语义分割。目标是向天体物理学界希望在研究中采用机器学习的科学家提供现有技术在预测性能和计算效率方面的概述。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了深度学习方法在射电天文图像中的目标检测与分割任务表现，为天体物理研究提供基准参考。
AI.motivation: 随着SKA望远镜等大数据时代的射电天文设备发展，自动化的源检测与分析需求迫切，需验证深度学习方法的适用性。
AI.method: 应用目标检测与语义分割两类深度学习模型，测试其在射电干涉仪图像上的性能及计算效率。
AI.result: 对比了多种深度学习技术的预测准确率与计算资源消耗，揭示了不同方法在天文图像处理中的优劣差异。
AI.conclusion: 现有深度学习方法在射电天文图像分析中表现潜力，但需进一步优化以满足大规模数据处理需求。
